Name: Valeo
Description:
Valeo is a technology company and partner to all automakers and new mobility players worldwide. Valeo innovates to make mobility safer, smarter and more sustainable. Valeo enjoys technological and industrial leadership in electrification, driving assistance systems, reinvention of the interior experience and lighting everywhere. These four areas, vital to the transformation of mobility, are the Group's growth drivers.

Valeo in figures: 21.5 billion euros in sales in 2024 | 106,100 employees, 28 countries, 155 plants, 64 research and development centers and 19 distribution platforms at February 28, 2025. Valeo is listed on the Paris Stock Exchange

--

Valeo, entreprise technologique, partenaire de tous les constructeurs automobiles et des nouveaux acteurs de la mobilité, œuvre pour une mobilité plus propre, plus sûre et plus intelligente, grâce à ses innovations. Valeo dispose d’un leadership technologique et industriel dans l’électrification, les aides à la conduite, la réinvention de la vie à bord et l'éclairage à l’intérieur et à l’extérieur du véhicule. Ces quatre domaines, essentiels à la transformation de la mobilité, sont les vecteurs de croissance du Groupe.

Valeo en chiffres: 21.5 milliards d'euros de chiffre d'affaires en 2024 | 106 100 employés, 28 pays, 155 sites de production, 64 centres de recherche et développement et 19 plateformes de distribution au 28 février 2025. Valeo est cotée à la Bourse de Paris.

Name: ZF Group
Description:
ZF is a global technology company supplying advanced mobility products and systems for passenger cars, commercial vehicles and industrial technology. Its comprehensive product range is primarily aimed at vehicle manufacturers, mobility providers and start-up companies in the fields of transportation and mobility. ZF electrifies a wide range of vehicle types. With its products, the company contributes to reducing emissions, protecting the climate as well as enhancing safe mobility. Alongside the automotive sector – passenger cars and commercial vehicles – ZF also serves market segments such as construction and agricultural machinery, wind power, marine propulsion, rail drives and test systems.

With some 161,600 employees worldwide, ZF reported sales of €41.4 billion in fiscal year 2024. The company operates 161 production locations in 30 countries.

For further press information and photos please visit: www.zf.com 

Imprint: https://www.zf.com/site/meta/en/imprint.html
Data Protection: https://www.zf.com/master/media/en/corporate/m_zf_com/meta/data_protection_social_media/Data_Protection_Notice_Social_Media_EN.pdf

Name: Uno Minda
Description:
Uno Minda Limited incepted in 1958, is a leading global manufacturer and supplier of advanced automotive technology and systems to OEMs.  They design and manufacture over 25 categories of components and systems for vehicles across all segments (passenger cars, commercial vehicles, two- and three-wheelers) catering to both internal combustion engines (ICE) and electric/hybrid vehicles.

It is one of the leading manufacturers of automotive switching systems, automotive lighting systems, automotive acoustics systems, automotive seating systems and alloy wheels. It has a leadership position in almost all the products it manufactures. Technology and innovation are the two strong pillars of the organisation, on the basis of which it has continued to lead the emerging trends in the automotive sector, over the past six decades.

The Group is a global player in the automotive sector with 74 manufacturing facilities in India, Indonesia, Vietnam, Germany, Spain, and Mexico, as well as 37 R&D and Engineering Centres in India, Germany, Japan, Taiwan, Korea & Spain. It has 19 JVs/Technical Agreements with world renowned manufacturers from Japan, Germany, Korea, and China.

Name: Autoliv
Description:
Autoliv, Inc. is the worldwide leader in automotive safety systems. We develop, manufacture and market protective systems, such as airbags, seatbelts, steering wheels and pedestrian protection systems for all major automotive manufacturers in the world. Our products save 37,000 lives and prevent 450,000 injuries each year. 

Our ~65,000 employees in 25 countries are passionate about our vision of Saving More Lives and quality is at the heart of everything we do. We have 13 technical centers, with 20 test tracks.  

In the world of automotive occupant safety, we were the first to introduce the two- and three-point seat belt system and airbags for front and side impacts. We were also the first to launch pyrotechnic belt pretensioners and pedestrian protection systems. 
 
Autoliv, Inc. is a publicly traded Delaware U.S.  corporation with its headquarters in Stockholm, Sweden. The shares are listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: ALV) and the Swedish Depository Receipts on Nasdaq Stockholm (ALIV sdb). For more information go to www.autoliv.com.

Name: Grupo Moura
Description:
O Grupo Moura nasceu há mais 60 anos, na cidade de Belo Jardim, em Pernambuco, com a criação da Baterias Moura - líder na América do Sul no segmento de acumuladores de energia e considerada uma das empresas mais inovadoras e sustentáveis do país. São seis fábricas, cinco no Brasil e uma na Argentina, e uma rede de distribuição própria com mais de 80 unidades espalhadas pelo Brasil e Cone Sul.
 
Movida a desafios, a corporação ampliou a sua área de atuação também para o setor de construção, empreendedorismo social e Pesquisa & Desenvolvimento em acumulação de energia. O Grupo Moura caminha para rumos cada vez mais ousados, comprometido em fazer mais e melhor, garantindo a qualidade dos seus produtos, a força dos vínculos em seus relacionamentos, a perenidade e a sustentabilidade do negócio.

Name: Varroc
Description:
Varroc Group is a global tier-1 automotive component manufacturer and supplier of exterior lighting systems, plastic and polymer components, electrical-electronics components, and precision metallic components to two-wheeler, three-wheeler, passenger cars, commercial vehicles and off-highway vehicle OEMs. 

With 36 world-class manufacturing facilities, 7 R&D centers and over 6500 employees across 8 countries, Varroc is on an exponential growth trajectory, clocking net revenues in excess of ₹58,000 million in FY 22. 

With 3 decades of relentless commitment to excellence and value-based performance, Varroc offers the best design solutions that gives its customers a competitive edge in their markets.

Name: Spark Minda
Description:
Minda Corporation Limited
BSE: 538962
NSE: MINDACORP

Minda Corporation Limited is one of the leading automotive component manufacturing companies in India with a pan-India presence and a significant international footprint. The Company was incorporated in 1985. MCL is the flagship company of Spark Minda Group, which was part of the erstwhile Minda Group. The company has a diversified product portfolio that encompasses Mechatronics, Information & Connected Systems, Plastics & Interior, and Electronics for auto OEMs. These products cater to 2/3 wheelers, passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, off-roaders, and after-market segments. The company has a varied customer base including Indian and global original equipment manufacturers and Tier-1 customers. For assimilating the latest technologies, Minda Corporation has a dedicated R&D facility and strategic collaborations with pioneers and leaders of the global automobile industry. This gives Minda Corporation an edge in product design and delivers products consistent with stringent international quality standards. For further information, visit www.sparkminda.com. It is currently engaged in businesses like Security Systems, Die Casting, Starter Motors & Alternators, Wiring Harness, Instrument Clusters & Sensors, Components, Antenna Systems, Interiors & Plastics, Aftermarket, Electric Vehicle & Connected Systems.


For more information, please refer to the below link:
http://sparkminda.com/

Name: MRF
Description: MRF Limited, is a stalwart in the global tyre industry. Established in 1946, MRF has grown into one of the largest and most respected tyre manufacturers, renowned for its commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction. The company boasts a diverse range of high-quality tyres catering to various vehicles, including passenger cars, two-wheelers, commercial, agricultural and defence vehicles. Known for its cutting-edge research and development, MRF has consistently introduced innovative tyre technologies that enhance performance, safety, and fuel efficiency. MRF is not only the number 1 tyre manufacturer in the Indian market, but has also earned a formidable reputation globally, with its products exported to over 90 countries.

Name: Denso Brasil
Description:
A DENSO é líder mundial em inovação tecnológica fornecendo sistemas e componentes para todas as grandes montadoras do setor automotivo no mundo. Operamos em 32 países e regiões, com mais de 170.000 colaboradores.

Temos como princípio de gestão guia nossa " Filosofia DENSO " e o " DENSO Spirit " que orienta e dirige nossas ações corporativas, que assegura a perpetuação da organização em termos de credibilidade para as pessoas em todo o mundo. 

Consideramos a melhoria contínua um procedimento de rotina, buscamos o crescimento e aperfeiçoamento constante dos nossos produtos, processos e tecnologia, contribuindo assim para um mundo melhor através da criação de valores com a visão de futuro. 

Valorizamos nossos profissionais estimulando-os a assumir sempre os desafios como chave para motivação no trabalho e que isto permite inovação constante para superar as expectativas dos nossos clientes com excelência em qualidade e extraindo o melhor do potencial e força do nossa equipe.

Name: WABCO
Description: Wabco has been acquired by ZF Group and is part of the Commerical Vehicle Solutions Division.

Name: Cooper Standard
Description:
Cooper Standard, headquartered in Northville, Mich., with locations in 21 countries, is a leading global supplier of sealing and fluid handling systems and components. Utilizing our materials science and manufacturing expertise, we create innovative and sustainable engineered solutions for diverse transportation and industrial markets. Cooper Standard's team of more than 22,000 employees are at the heart of our success, continuously improving our business and surrounding communities. 

We are committed to being the First Choice of the Stakeholders We Serve by living out our core values and demonstrating our capabilities to exceed their expectations. We strive for world-class excellence living by our Purpose: Creating Sustainable Solutions Together.

For more information about Cooper Standard, visit www.cooperstandard.com. 

NYSE: CPS

Name: Maxwell Energy Systems
Description:
Maxwell, a subsidiary of Endurance Technologies Limited, is driving the future of the EV industry with innovative advanced electronics. As a leading advanced electronics manufacturing company, we provide end-to-end solutions for all your advanced electronics needs—delivered under one roof. From off-the-shelf products to custom-engineered systems, we tailor solutions to meet the unique requirements of OEMs in electric vehicles and energy storage systems.

At Maxwell, we push the boundaries of innovation and sustainability, ensuring our products are not only cutting-edge but also reliable and high-performing. Our expertise spans across Battery Management Systems (BMS), chargers, Motor Control Units (MCU), Telematics Control Units (TCU), and more—making us the one-stop shop for all your advanced electronics requirements in the EV space.

With over a decade of experience and collaborations on 50+ 2/3-Wheeler projects, we’ve mastered both low- and high-voltage applications in the EV industry and Energy Storage Systems (ESS). Our solutions are designed to empower a sustainable future and accelerate the global transition to electric mobility.

We're still in search of top talent as we disrupt the battery industry. Know any ambitious and fun-loving people in software, hardware, engineering, or operations who want to make new moves in 2025? Refer them to us at hr@maxwellenergy.co.

For partnership inquiries, reach out to us at marketing@maxwellenergy.co, or visit www.maxwellenergy.co to learn more.

Let’s build the electric future together!

Name: Clarios
Description:
Clarios creates the most advanced battery technologies for virtually every type of vehicle. We are a global leader in advanced energy storage solutions, powering one in three of the world’s vehicles.

We produce more than 150 million batteries – one-third of the industry’s output – every year, and we continue to build and expand our capacity to meet our customer’s future demand.

Name: PT ASTRA OTOPARTS Tbk
Description:
PT Astra Otoparts Tbk  is Indonesia’s largest group of automotive parts manufacturing and trading companies. Through 7 Divisions, 13 Subsidiaries, 20 Associates and Joint Ventures, 14 Indirect Investment Entities, Astra Otoparts serves almost all automotive manufacturers and replacement parts market in Indonesia both for two-wheel and four-wheel vehicles as well as other industries with a wide product range.

In the manufacturing segment, Astra Otoparts collaborates with a number of well known worldwide business partners such as Denso, Kayaba, Aisin, Akebono Brake, GS Yuasa International, Pirelli, SKF, Daido, and many others to produce various types of components and assemblies which are directly distributed to automotive manufacturers in domestic and foreign countries.

In the trading segment, Astra Otoparts distributes automotive components to both domestic and foreign replacement parts market through 45 countries, 49 main dealers and 24 sales offices serving around 12,000 spare parts shops throughout Indonesia.

In order to reach customers directly and provide convenience to customer, Astra Otoparts also has modern workshop outlets for two-wheel and fourwheel such as Super Shop&Drive, Shop&Drive, Shop&Bike, Motoquick, Astra Otoservice and created an online shoping platform www.astraotoshop.com.

For more than four decades, Astra Otoparts has proven itself as a manufacturer and trader of various automotive parts with high technical capabilities and capable to maintain the balance of its business processes to achieve future sustainable growth.

Name: Subros Limited
Description:
Subros Limited, founded in 1985 as a joint venture public limited company with 36.79% ownership by Indian Promoters 20% ownership by Denso Corporation , Japan & 11.96% ownership by Suzuki Motor Corporation , Japan , is the leading manufacturer of thermal products for automotive applications in India, in technical collaboration with Denso.

The company has grown from a capacity of 15,000 AC units in 1985 comprising of largely an assembly operation, into the largest and only integrated manufacturing unit in India for auto air conditioning systems. Subros manufactures compressors, condensers, heat exchangers and all connecting elements required to complete AC loop and caters to all segments viz. passenger vehicles, buses, trucks, refrigeration transport, off- roaders, residential air conditioners & railways.

Subros has manufacturing plants at Noida, Manesar, Pune, Chennai, Nalagarh and Karsanpura with an annual capacity of 2.0 Million AC Kits per annum beside a well equipped R&D Center and Tool Room at Noida.

Name: WHB AUTOMOTIVE S.A
Description:
A WHB AUTOMOTIVE S.A. é uma empresa de capital nacional localizada em Curitiba, no Paraná, que atende as principais montadoras e sistemistas do mercado automotivo e ferroviário.
 
Com atuação no segmento de usinagem, forjaria, fundição de alumínio e ferro, a empresa prima pela qualidade, produtividade, inovação tecnológica e respeito aos clientes e como resultado, a WHB tornou-se especialista em usinagem de componentes de alta precisão.

Name: Stoneridge Brasil
Description:
A PST Electronics, detentora da marca Pósitron, é líder em segurança automotiva e referência no desenvolvimento de soluções tecnológicas em rastreamento e segurança eletrônica. Os diferenciais tecnológicos e a qualidade de seus produtos fizeram a empresa conquistar a liderança do mercado há mais de 15 anos.
Além disso, a companhia é uma das principais fornecedoras de equipamentos genuínos para as montadoras de veículos na América Latina. Conhecida pela sua ampla gama de produtos e serviços, a empresa desenvolve rastreadores, bloqueadores e alarmes para automóveis, motocicletas e caminhões, som automotivo, sensor de estacionamento, vidros e travas elétricas, painéis de instrumentos, além de alarmes e monitoramento residencial. 
Atualmente, a empresa possui plantas em Campinas (SP) e Manaus (AM) e uma filial em Buenos Aires, na Argentina. 
Desde 1997, a PST Electronics tem como sócio o grupo norte-americano Stoneridge, com presença na Europa, Ásia e Américas.

Name: Dayco
Description:
Dayco is a global leader in the research, design, manufacture and distribution of essential engine drive systems and aftermarket services for automotive, truck, construction, agriculture and industrial applications.

Through our expertise in transferring power quietly and efficiently, Dayco has emerged as the leading global system solutions provider for hybrid electric vehicles.  Dayco’s 100+ years of experience in drive systems allows us to equip all customer applications around the world with the most effective drive systems to meet customer specific performance requirements.  Dayco’s world class global distribution network services the aftermarket industry with a full offering of kits and products to meet each local market’s need.

We accomplish this with a dedicated global team that respects one another, shows humility through continuous learning and acts like owners in everything we do.

Move Forward. Always.

Name: SEDEMAC
Description:
We supply innovative, critical-to-the-application control products in large volumes, from in-house lines, to leaders of large markets. Our products typically incorporate one or more of unique control technologies built in-house.
 
Markets of interest currently are engine-powered as well as electric two & three wheelers; power generators; automotive and electric bicycles.

Name: Verkor
Description:
Founded in July 2020, Verkor is a French industrial company based in Grenoble. Backed by a strong network of financial and industrial partners, Verkor is accelerating the production of low-carbon batteries in France and Europe to meet the growing demand for electric vehicles, electric mobility in general and stationary storage in Europe.  

Verkor is developing an attractive business model in terms of agility, sustainability and governance, and is attracting the best talent as a result. A strong, agile team continues to grow to meet new challenges. The project led by Verkor is unifying, bringing together the best partners to localize the entire value chain in Europe, ensuring optimal use of skills and resources.  

Thanks to these strengths, Verkor has opened its Verkor Innovation Centre in 2023, it provides three major functions: innovate, manufacture and train. Based on the innovations coming out of the VIC, the Verkor Gigafactory will have an annual production capacity of 16 GWh in lithium-ion batteries, that’s enough to fit out 300,000 electric vehicles and create over 1,200 direct jobs. The Gigafactory will be operational by 2025. 

Join our team : https://verkor.com/en/join-our-team/

Name: PT KAYABA INDONESIA
Description: PT Kayaba Indonesia is member of Astra (join venture KYB Co.,Ltd & PT Astra Otoparts Tbk.) as of the largest shock absorber manufacturer in Indonesia that uses high quality machines that meet OEM quality standards. Products are used by around 90% of car and motorcycle manufacturers in Indonesia, such as Toyota, Mitsubishi, Daihatsu,Isuzu, etc (Cars) and Yamaha, Honda, Suzuki, etc (Motorcycles).

Name: KANJIKO DO BRASIL (TOYOTA GROUP)
Description:
A Kanjiko é uma empresa especializada na fabricação de peças e acessórios automotivos, com mais de 15 anos de atuação no mercado brasileiro. Contamos com duas unidades produtivas estrategicamente localizadas no interior do Estado de São Paulo: nossa matriz na cidade de Salto e uma filial em Sorocaba.  

Com uma equipe composta por mais de 1.000 colaboradores, nos dedicamos a entregar soluções que promovam segurança e façam a diferença no cotidiano de nossos clientes. Nossos valores são alicerçados na proatividade, compromisso, respeito às pessoas, sustentabilidade e responsabilidade social.  

 Saiba mais sobre a Kanjiko: www.kanjiko.com.br

Name: ACC - Automotive Cells Company
Description:
We are one of Europe’s newest and most exciting high-tech companies. Backed by Saft-TotalEnergies, Stellantis (PSA-Opel) and Mercedes, Automotive Cells Company (ACC) is set to revolutionize the automotive industry by innovating in battery technology. We aim to produce sustainable, affordable, high-capacity, longer-life batteries as a cleaner alternative to current energy sources.

Our new R&D Expertise Center in Bordeaux (Nouvelle Aquitaine - France) is already up and running as well as a state-of-the-art Industrial Excellence Center near Angouleme (Nouvelle Aquitaine - France). We are now building our first gigafactory in Billy Berclau / Douvrin (Hauts-de-France - France). A new Applied Engineering Center and a second gigafactory planned in Kaiserslautern (Germany), and a third one in Termoli (Italy) will soon reinforce our innovation and production capacities. 

We’ve already established a global network of R&D associates, along with industrial partners and suppliers.

As a fast-growing company, we need a range of skilled and agile people, across all areas of battery innovation, design, manufacture and any other functions of a new-born company.  If you’re looking to take your career further than you imagined, and if you’re passionate about creating cleaner transport we’d like to hear from you. 
At ACC, we are committed to building a more diverse and inclusive workplace: our vision is about creating a place of mutual respect, where all each one of us feels valued and included, wherever we work & whoever we are. 
Visit our website to find out about our career opportunities: https://jobs.acc-emotion.com/. 

ACC. Accelerating for sustainable mobility for all.

Co-funded by the European Union 
Emissions Trading System
Innovation Fund

Name: Stoneridge
Description: Stoneridge, Inc. is a designer and manufacturer of highly engineered electrical and electronic systems, components and modules, primarily for the automotive, commercial vehicle, motorcycle, agricultural and off-highway vehicle markets. Stoneridge is well-positioned to meet the global needs of the mobility industry, providing solutions that power vehicle intelligence, provide dramatic increases in fuel efficiency, reduce vehicle emissions, and improve safety and security for vehicles, cargo and drivers. The mobility industry’s sought-after integrated technology partner, Stoneridge is ready to take on your next vehicle challenge.

Name: Vodafone Automotive
Description:
Vodafone Automotive, part of Vodafone Business, employs more than 600 people who specialise in cutting-edge in-car telematics, driver safety services, and vehicle security. These services include emergency calls, stolen vehicle recovery, usage-based services, driving behavior scoring for insurance companies, and fleet management solutions. 

We cater to a diverse range of clients, including over 40 automobile manufacturers like Aston Martin, Ferrari, Geely, Maserati, Mercedes Benz, Mazda, Nissan, PSA, Renault, Rolls-Royce,Toyota, Volkswagen Group. Insurance companies such as Admiral, Allianz, Catalana Occidente, Generali Group, HDI, Autosped G -Gavio Group-, Generalitat de Catalunya, United Utilities who use our fleet management services. Our extensive experience in security, safety, and data management has enabled us to offer valuable data insights and analytics for various mobility stakeholders. 

We oversee every aspect of vehicle components, from hardware design and production to network and telematics architecture, all of which are developed and supplied in Varese, Italy. Our Secure Operating Centres (SOC) provide 24/7 security and safety services and cover more than 55 markets worldwide. 

Are you eager to make a difference in the automotive industry? Explore our job opportunities by visiting: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/vodafone-automotive-jobs-worldwide/

Name: Marquardt Group
Description:
Founded in 1925 and headquartered in Rietheim-Weilheim, Germany, the family-owned company Marquardt is one of the world's leading manufacturers of mechatronic switching and operating systems. The mechatronics specialist's products - including operating components, vehicle access, driving authorization and battery management systems for electric vehicles - are used by many well-known customers in the automotive industry. Marquardt systems can also be found in household appliances, industrial applications and power tools. The company has around 9,700 employees worldwide at 22 locations on four continents. Turnover in the 2024 financial year was around 1.35 billion euros. Marquardt invests around ten percent of its turnover in research and development every year.

Imprint: https://www.marquardt.com/imprint
Privacy Policy: https://www.marquardt.com/privacy-policy

Name: Vibracoustic
Description: Vibracoustic is a leading global automotive NVH expert, providing customized solutions adding comfort and supporting efficiency, safety and durability. Its expertise along the entire product life cycle and all vehicle systems as well as its broad product range enable Vibracoustic to solve current and future NVH challenges across all automotive segments. With approximately 12,000 employees at around 40 production and engineering locations across 17 countries, Vibracoustic serves all major automotive manufacturers. In 2024 Vibracoustic recorded total sales of 2.6 billion €. For more information, see www.vibracoustic.com

Name: Sogefi Group
Description:
With 40 years of expertise and success, SOGEFI Group designs, develops, and manufactures suspension components as well as air and engine cooling flow management systems, all while upholding principles of integrity, responsibility, and transparency. 

Our strong commitment to research and innovation drives us to continuously develop technologies that improve our components across all sectors, optimizing durability, efficiency, size, weight, and environmental impact. 

For the past six years, we have been transforming our products and production processes with cutting-edge technology. This challenge is fueled by a true team culture, where collaboration between our experts and partners leads to ever more efficient and sustainable solutions. 

SOGEFI Group is home to nearly 3,500 employees across four continents, 14 countries with 5 R&D center. Our multicultural teams consist of individuals dedicated to achieving goals and customer satisfaction, always eager to take on new challenges. Fully focused on the future, they are the driving force propelling the company forward with pride and passion. 

Sogefi S.p.A. is listed on the Milan Stock Exchange in the STAR segment.

Name: Mobis Technical Center of India(Hyundai Mobis R &D)
Description:
Career Page Link -  https://hyundaimobisin.cluster3.openings.co/#!/

Hyundai Mobis Technical Center India(MTCI) ,Hyderabad works on various vehicle Infotainment, Mechatronics(Chassis, Safety, Vision Systems), CAE(CFD, Crash, Durability, EMI-EMC, and NVH). The focussed area will be on software development on many cutting edge technology projects like different generations of AVN (Audio Video Navigation) products, functional safety, AUTOSAR technologies  based on brake, steering and airbag systems. Engineers are involved in various project phases from gathering requirements to validation phase of the Product Life cycle. Software Development projects executed at Mobis India Limited R&D Center, Hyderabad are appraised against International Standards such as CMMi, ISO-26262, IEC-61508.

Hyundai Mobis Global a 40 billion USD company, is the worldwide Strategic business partner of Hyundai Motor Company (HMC) & Kia Motor Company in the areas of Advanced Module supply for car manufacturing and handles Exclusive Service Parts distribution/sales for roughly 16 million Hyundai/Kia branded cars operating worldwide in 190 countries. I order to consolidate the business and cater to the increasing business requirement and to ensure enhanced customer satisfaction,

Name: CIE Automotive
Description:
CIE Automotive es un grupo industrial especializado en el suministro de componentes y subconjuntos para el mercado de automoción. Cotiza en la Bolsa española y tiene presencia en 4 continentes y 16 países.

Actualmente, CIE Automotive fabrica componentes utilizando diversas tecnologías: inyección de aluminio, estampación y conformado de tubo, fundición de hierro, mecanizado, plástico, forja y sistemas de techo. El objetivo de la compañía es desarrollar sus capacidades en cada una de estas tecnologías allí donde lo necesiten sus clientes a nivel global.

Name: Sharda Motor Industries Ltd
Description: Founded in 1986, Sharda Motor Industries Ltd (SMIL) is an ISO 9001 certified auto-ancillary company with global aspirations. Over the years, SMIL has scaled to numerous highs in the automotive industry. With a legacy of strong market share and healthy long-term relationships with marquee OEMs, Sharda Motors offer highly engineered products and services commencing from emission to suspension systems, roof systems and supply chain management solutions. The organization has portrayed a significant potential growth trajectory making new grooves in the industry, adding excellence and technological expertise and working towards creating futuristic and sustainable products.

Name: ARTEB
Description:
O Grupo Arteb é uma das mais importantes e respeitadas indústrias do mundo em sistemas de iluminação para o setor automotivo com qualidade original na fabricação de faróis, lanternas, brakelights e também com desenvolvimento Full LED.
As certificações comprovam a nossa tecnologia que garante o fornecimento para as principais montadoras no Brasil.

Há mais de 85 anos com investimentos constantes em inovação e tecnologia, a Arteb segue adiante com sua vocação para identificar novas oportunidades e com uma grande determinação para manter-se extremamente competitiva e preparada para os desafios da economia global.

Name: UFI Filters Group
Description:
Founded in 1971, UFI Filters is a global leader in filtration technology and thermal management solutions, as well as hydrogen filtration. It serves a wide range of sectors – from automotive, aerospace and marine, to specialised industrial and customised hydraulic applications. Renowned for its innovation, UFI’s products and know-how are found in all kinds of vehicles – from Ferrari and other top F1 teams, to the European ExoMars spacecraft.
UFI supplies the full range of air, oil, fuel, cabin, hydraulic and coolant filters as well as thermal management systems (including heat exchanger for combustion, electric and hybrid vehicles) to the automotive sector, meeting the needs of nearly all car brands and motorcycles as well as commercial, heavy duty (on-road and off-road) and agricultural vehicles. In the OE market, UFI is a leading filtration provider. Each family of filters within the company’s two Aftermarket brands, UFI and SOFIMA, covers 98% of the European car parc.
One of the first Italian companies to identify growth opportunities in the Far East, today UFI has 21 industrial sites and employs over 4,000 people in 21 countries. It employs over 250 specialised technicians in its 3 Innovation and Research Centres and holds more than 280 patents. As a research-driven company, it reinvests over 5% of its revenues in R&D.

Name: Beyçelik Gestamp
Description:
We embrace innovation as a part of continuous improvement, we keep pace with the latest developments to achieve something better, and we focus on the future. 
We maintain a strong sense of team spirit in every moment that we share together. We actually do the things about which others have said “never, that’s impossible” on this journey we have embarked on with the goal of being number one even though it is not easy to stay dynamic, strive for innovation and always aim higher… 
Our team has the passion, the experience, the energy, the excitement and the strength to achieve all of this. 
We are brave enough to touch lives and have the courage required for the future and for success.
 #CesaretleVarız  #WeAreBrave


Beyçelik Gestamp specialises in the design and manufacturing of chassis components, as well as hot/cold-press body frames and metal exterior parts, along with their corresponding molds – all for some of the automotive industry’s biggest OEM’s Our commitment lies in developing innovative solutions that prioritise safety, reduce vehicle weight, minimise energy consumption, and contribute to environmental production. Today, we proudly employ a workforce of 4,800 individuals across 9  plants located in Bursa, Kocaeli and Romania.

Name: SEWS-CABIND
Description:
The history of SEWS CABIND began in May 04 2001 when the Japanese Company, Sumitomo Electric Group (SEI and SWS), took over the Italian business 'Cabind Automotive S.p.A.' located near Torino, in the northwest of Italy, setting the foundations for what was to become a very successful partnership.

SEWS-CABIND GROUP in 2025 now operates in four countries Italy, Poland, Morocco and Albania and employs circa 10.500 people. 
 
We flourish on leading-edge design & engineering, cost-effective techniques and highly skilled, dynamic Human Resources. 

Each day we embody the Sumitomo Spirit and the inspiring values of Sumitomo Electric Group:  Visionary, Committted, Diverse and Innovative.

Our three subsidiaries that run local offices and production plants are:

In Morocco, SEWS-CABIND Maroc has 4 manufacturing sites in Ain Harrouda (headquarters), Berrechid (2 plants) and Ain Sebaa. There is a new company under construction near the city of El-Jadida, which should open in 2026. 

In Poland, SEWS-CABIND Poland has two production sites in Zywiec.

In Albania, SEWS-CABIND Albania opened in 2020 near Bathore Kamez (Tirana) and the plant now has three manufacturing sites.  

Since the foundation 24 years ago, the cornerstone of our business has been the production and supply of high and low voltage wire harnesses and wiring for the automotive and vehicle industry. 

The wiring of a vehicle can be compared to the human nervous system. It transmits electric signals which permit the exchange of information within the vehicle. 

We also manufacture wiring at our Ain Harrouda production site. 

SEWS CABIND continues to strive for growth in new business segments such as High Voltage and Autonomous, Hybrid and Electric vehicles. We are always ready to take on any new challenge and opportunity that evolves in our industry.

Name: Dhoot Transmission Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Dhoot Transmission is an Indian conglomerate company headquartered in Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India, and was founded by Mr. Rahul Dhoot in the year 1999. It operates the business in products as diverse as Wiring Harness, Electronic Sensors and Controllers, Automotive Switches, Power Cords, Automotive Cables, Connectors and Terminals, suiting to 2-Wheelers, 3-Wheelers, Commercial Vehicles, Off-Road Vehicles, Earth Movers, Farming Equipments, Medical Equipments & Domestic Appliances etc.

Today, we enjoy the patronage of having 22 manufacturing facilities spread across the globe that includes 5 locations in UK, Slovakia, Thailand, Japan & South Korea and 17 locations in India. We are serving to a large customer’s base stretched in 8 countries and 3 continents. In fact, we are one of the most ‘in-demand’ company globally for wiring solutions.

Wiring & Connection Systems, Electronic Sensors & Controllers, Automotive Switches and EV Products.

Name: Neweast Group
Description: Neweast Group is a leading auto spare parts distributor. As the demand for high-quality aftermarket automotive parts continues to rise, Neweast General Trading is your go-to destination for premium brands and unmatched service. Since 1992, we have diligently served the automotive industry, establishing ourselves as the largest importer and distributor of aftermarket automotive parts in the UAE.

Name: O'Reilly Autopartes México
Description:
Somos una empresa con más de 67 años de experiencia en la comercialización de refacciones, accesorios y productos automotrices, enfocados en ser el proveedor líder de autopartes en todas nuestras áreas de mercado.

Comprometidos en ofrecer a nuestros clientes de mayoreo, al instalador profesional y al consumidor final un excelente servicio al cliente y la mejor combinación de precio y calidad, expandimos nuestros horizontes al formar parte del Grupo O'Reilly Auto Parts.

Contamos con más de 6,300 tiendas y más de 28 Centros de Distribución alrededor de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

Somos Profesionales en Autopartes entusiastas, dedicados, honestos y estamos comprometidos en mantener un constante crecimiento con una cultura de mejora continua, lo cual nos permite ofrecer grandes oportunidades de desarrollo profesional.

Name: Sona Comstar
Description:
Sona BLW Precision Forgings Limited (Sona Comstar) is one of the world’s leading mobility technology companies, designing, manufacturing, and supplying highly engineered, mission-critical systems and components for global OEMs in electrified, personalised, intelligent, and connected mobility.

Founded in 1995 as Sona Okegawa Precision Forgings, a JV between Sona Group and Mitsubishi Materials, the company pioneered precision bevel gear technology in India’s automotive market. It later acquired ThyssenKrupp’s precision forging business, BLW, the inventor of this technology, and became Sona BLW Precision Forgings.

In 2019, the acquisition of Comstar Automotive added motor capabilities, leading to a new brand identity, Sona Comstar. In 2023, it added sensors and software capabilities by acquiring a majority stake in NOVELIC, a Serbia-based company with expertise in mmWave radar sensing technology. Expanding beyond automotive, it acquired the Railway Business from Escorts Kubota in 2025, becoming a key supplier of safety systems to India’s railway industry.

Headquartered in Gurugram, India, it operates 12 manufacturing and assembly facilities across India, the USA, Mexico, and China, with over 70% of its sales from international markets. It is a leading supplier of driveline and traction motor solutions to the global EV market, with 36% of revenue from EVs and a diversified base across geographies, products, vehicle segments, and customers.

Across its 5 R&D centres, Sona Comstar develops advanced drivetrain systems and high-performance motors for electric mobility, mmWave radar sensors and perception solutions for autonomous and connected applications, and safety-critical solutions for railway applications. It aims to be at the forefront of shaping the next generation of mobility technology and providing sustainable solutions.

Sona Comstar aspires to become one of the world’s most respected and valuable mobility technology companies.

Name: Hero Motors
Description:
Hero Motors is part of the HMC group, a diversified conglomerate with interests in automotive components, E-Mobility, cycles, real estate and premium retail, with the group revenue of USD 700 million. The automotive businesses of the group under Hero Motors Limited comprises two business verticals. Powertrain Solutions and Allloys & Metallics.  Hero Motors specializes in designing, manufacturing & supplying highly engineered powertrain solutions catering to automotive OEMs in US, Europe, India and ASEAN region. 
Leveraging the capabilities of Hewland Engineering Limited, a Hero Motors Company, Hero Motors is a fully integrated powertrain systems provider offering comprehensive solutions for designing, validating, developing, and delivering system-level transmission solutions for both electric as well as non-electric powertrains and metallic components. Our products find application in two-wheelers, performance automotive, e-bikes, off-road vehicles, electric and hybrid cars, heavy duty vehicles, and electric vertical take-off and landing (“eVTOL”) categories. We cater to requirements of global original equipment manufacturers (“OEMs”).
We are recognized for our leadership in the development and production of continuously variable transmission (“CVT”) technology, electric vehicle (“EV”) transmissions, electric motors, integrated drive units and gear sets. We were among the first companies in India to capitalize on the global e-bike powertrain opportunity and have a distinct first mover advantage in this industry. 
We commenced operations in 2004 with our A&M segment, focusing on sheet metal component manufacturing, machining of casting products and other sheet metal components.

Name: Belrise Industries (formerly Badve Engineering)
Description:
Badve Engineering is now Belrise Industries!
Belrise is a leading automotive systems manufacturer.

Name: Hyundai Mobis - Middle East
Description:
Mobis Parts Middle East (MPME) is a 100% subsidiary of Hyundai Mobis, the "parts and service" arm of Hyundai Motor Company, Genesis Motors and Kia Motors.

MPME supplies all the genuine parts and genuine accessories required for vehicles made by Hyundai Motor Company, Genesis Motors and Kia Motors for the Middle East and African region.

The After-sales Parts Division continues to bring innovation to the parts supply system including streamlining logistics hubs and early construction of high-tech distribution systems, and operates customer focused management by way of enhancing customer satisfaction with improved services at customer touch points and vigorous communications with customers.

Name: Lucas TVS
Description: Lucas-TVS is the leaders in Auto Electrical in India to day with 50 years experience in design and manufacturing.  4 out of 5 vehicles rolled out daily are fitted with Lucas-TVS products.  Lucas-TVS is a TS16949, ISO 14001 and  OHSAS Certified Company and bagged the Deming application price from the Japanese Union of Scientists and Engineers (JUSE).  The fact that Lucas-TVS products are fitted on most vehicles produced in India is because of the company’s ability to respond to changing customer needs swiftly, effectively and consistently.  The Company’s in-house Engineering center has been the key driving force behind the design and development of new products.  In addition to sound in-house capabilities, Lucas-TVS has strong Technical alliances with leading International manufactures.    This has further enabled the Company to provide its customers products incorporating the most contemporary technology.

Name: Sundaram Clayton Limited
Description:
Sundaram Clayton Limited (SCL) is one of the largest auto components manufacturing and distribution group in India. SCL is a leading supplier of aluminium die castings to automotive and non-automotive sector.

Since commencing operation in 1962, SCL has achieved many milestones and emerged as one of the preferred solution providers in machined and sub-assembled aluminium castings.

Our contribution commences from early design stage to development and supply of finished product. Over the years, we have built strategic partnership with global OE / Tier one.

With the robust manufacturing driven by TQM, TPM, Lean practices and investments in state-of-the-art technologies, SCL is poised to serve the future needs of the industry in light metal castings.

SCL is a part of the TVS Group which was established in 1911 by Shri. T V Sundaram Iyengar. As one of India's largest industrial entities TVS epitomizes Trust, Value and Service.

There are over fifty companies in the TVS Group, employing more than 50,000 people worldwide and a turnover in excess of USD 8.5 billion. Uniting these multiple businesses is a common ethos of quality, customer service and social responsibility.

Srinivasan Services Trust (SST), is the social arm of Sundaram Clayton Limited. The community program of SCL through the Srinivasan Services Trust (SST) is also a journey — one of learning and development on a road towards prosperity for millions of Indians in underserved communities create a prosperous rural India.

SST works in over 2500 villages across 5 states in India: Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Maharashtra, Andhra & Himachal Pradesh. SST does this by helping villagers find solutions that are sustainable in areas ranging from economic development, education, health, infrastructure, environment, social and cultural development.

Name: ITAESBRA Indústria Mecânica Ltda
Description:
Presente nas indústrias automotiva, duas rodas, agro e linha branca, a ITAESBRA é uma empresa 100% nacional que se destaca pelo seu know-how na fabricação de peças estampadas e conjuntos soldados através de processos automatizados. Com mais de 700 itens produzidos em nossas fábricas localizadas em Diadema/SP e Igarassú/PE, a ITAESBRA orgulha-se em ter colaboradores qualificados e comprometidos com os mesmos princípios éticos presentes desde a sua fundação, garantindo a excelência em fornecimento, qualidade, satisfação plena dos clientes e melhoria contínua dos processos de produção. Graças a união da capacitação do nosso time e comprometimento com os objetivos da empresa, aliados à investimentos em tecnologia, nosso trabalho tem tido importante reconhecimento dos nossos clientes.

Visite o nosso website e conheça a nossa história.

Name: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd.
Description:
Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd (SPRL) has an exceptional lineage of Shriram Group, one of the most reputed Industrial houses. Driven by advance technology, The Company has the capability to provide end-to-end solutions which include Design, Develop, Validate and Manufacture products for it customers at its Tech Centre with highly talented Design and Engineering Professionals in Concept Design, FEA, Simulation, Rig Testing, Prototype Development and Engine Testing & Analysis. 
This is supplemented with continuous Technology and Application Engineering support from the technology partners including in Advanced Engineering and manufacturing processes. 

The Company is the largest manufacturer of Pistons, Pins, Rings, and Engine Valves in India with two Manufacturing units in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, Pathredi (Rajasthan), Pithampur (Madhya Pradesh). Its products are marketed to almost all OEMs and Aftermarkets under the brands SPR and USHA, names that are synonymous with Quality and Reliability globally.

Export is at the core of SPR's business strategy. Development and manufacture of the latest technology products for OEMs in Europe, USA, etc. challenge the enterprise to hone its manufacturing processes, technology, and quality to global standards. This acts as a catalyst to transform the entire organization. Not surprisingly, SPR is the largest exporter of Pistons and Rings from India.

Name: NAL Brasil
Description:
North American Lighting (NAL) Brazil is a member of the Japan-based Koito Group of companies who has been manufacturing automotive lighting systems for vehicle manufacturers since 1915. NAL provides advanced lighting technology, engineering design expertise, and state-of-the-art production capabilities to auto makers based in North and South America and beyond. This, combined with our global network of Koito Group companies, uniquely positions NAL to meet increasing global demand for safe, energy-efficient, eco-friendly, intelligent automotive lighting systems.
Currículos apenas pelo e-mail curriculo@nalbrasil.com

Name: Sabó
Description:
A leader in the manufacturing of oil seals, gaskets and rubber hoses.
With its head office located in the City of São Paulo, plants in Brazil, Argentina, Germany, Austria, Hungary, United States and China, branches in Australia, aside from technical-commercial offices in Italy and England

Name: Cinpal
Description:
Somos a Cinpal, uma indústria brasileira com mais de 70 anos de atuação no setor automotivo. Desenvolvemos componentes para caminhões, ônibus, tratores, máquinas agrícolas e de construção, com foco em soluções robustas, confiáveis e alinhadas às demandas da mobilidade atual.

Atendemos as principais montadoras (OEM) e grandes distribuidores do mercado de reposição, unindo tecnologia, escala produtiva e rigor técnico em cada entrega.

Nossa estrutura é verticalizada. Em três plantas localizadas em Taboão da Serra (SP), integramos engenharia, forjaria, fundição, usinagem, tratamento térmico e controle de qualidade — uma combinação que garante eficiência operacional, agilidade e excelência em todas as etapas.

Mais de 2 mil pessoas fazem parte dessa engrenagem. Profissionais comprometidos com segurança, inovação e melhoria contínua, que atuam com precisão e consistência para transformar conhecimento em resultado.

A Cinpal vive um novo momento. Evoluímos na marca, nos processos e na cultura, sem perder de vista o que nos trouxe até aqui. Mantemos nossa base sólida enquanto avançamos com visão de futuro, entregando mobilidade inteligente, estrutura técnica e confiança em cada componente.

Cinpal. Confiança em avançar.

Name: Agrati Group
Description:
Respect, Proactivity, Innovation, Accountability, Communication, TeamWork, Sustainability and Continuous Learning. 
These are shared values of AGRATI: worldwide leader in fasteners solutions with 12 Production sites, 15 Sales & Application Offices, 5 logistics centres, more than 2.300 employees and a turnover of 670 mln € in 2024. 

Agrati boasts 4 Agrati Tech Centres with cutting edge laboratory equipment services of engineering, co-design, testing & prototyping. 

Every year Agrati purchases over 170.000 tons of steel, develops 800 new products, invests 8% in innovation and technology and produces 8 billion parts in order to assemble over 40 million cars worldwide. 

Find the right solutions in our technical excellence.

Name: Poliplast srl
Description:
PRODUTTORI DAL 1969

Il gruppo ha sessant’anni di esperienza nel campo della progettazione e realizzazione di stampi per materie plastiche e poliuretano ed oltre quarant’anni in quello dello stampaggio e della finitura.
L’esperienza acquisita, l’attenzione costante alle nuove tecnologie unita alla qualità, alla flessibilità e al prezzo vantaggioso, contribuiscono a formare la base su cui fondiamo i rapporti con i nostri clienti.
I nostri stabilimenti, situati in un’area industriale facilmente accessibile,
coprono una superficie totale di 25.000 m2.

Nell’azienda lavorano più di 100 dipendenti. La produzione a ciclo completo permette di offrire al cliente un servizio efficiente in termini di design e funzionalità del prodotto finito.

***
BUMPER MANUFACTURER SINCE 1969

The group has sixty years of experience in the field of design and realization of molds for plastics and polyurethane, and over fourty years in the injection and finishing processes.
The acquired experience, the constant attention to new technologies joined to quality, flexibility and price, constitute the bases on which we establish the relationship with our customers. Our factory, located in an easily accessible industrial area in Brianza -Milan-, covers a total surface of 25.000m2.
The company employs over 100 people. We offer the customer a full service cycle for the production of articles in plastic and polyurethane: from design to production of the finished product.

Name: Elay Group
Description:
ELAY is a multinational company specialised in the production of parts using fineblanking technology. We add value to our customers by offering integral solutions that complement the fineblanking activity such as overmoulding by means of plastic injection, precision finishings, complementary operating  as well as sub-assemblies, all of them under DOIKA Process.
DOIKA Process is ELAY's commitment to the integration and control of highly complex processes in the manufacture of complex fineblanking parts
With more than 58 years of experience and with our headquarters in Antzuola, currently we have three production plants - ELAY EUROPE (Spain), ELAY AMERICA (Mexico) and ELAY ASIA(China) - and more than 600 employees.
We produce more than 160 million parts/year in a wide range of parts that are integrated in the following automotive systems: braking, transmission, seat, safety and locking, connection and combustion systems, among others.
The companies in the automotive sector that today are world leaders have in their products parts that have been manufactured in one of our plants.
Please contact us!

Name: BWI GROUP México
Description: BWI Group is a premier and full service chassis supplier that designs and manufactures brake and suspension systems for the global transportation market. With leading intellectual property and innovations, we bring to market a legacy of producing brake and suspension components, modules, and systems of more than 8 decades. Our globally widespread technical and manufacturing footprint enables us to work in partnership with OEMs around the world to make each project successful.

Name: LEMA SRL
Description:
Since 1969 LEMA has been a worldwide leader in the manufacturing and supplying of top quality rubber-metal spare parts and gaskets for all major European brands of trucks and buses (Iveco, Man, Mercedes, Scania, Volvo VI, Daf, RVI, Astra, Breda and Menarini). Our success is due to, an unbeatable level of quality, quick delivery terms throughout the world (often within 24 hours), excellent service and business support.

Over the years, we have broadened our wide range of products even further with a vast choice of spare parts for trailers and semi-trailers (Bpw, Ror-Meritor, Saf, Viberti, Acerbi, etc.). Nowadays LEMA is worldwide recognised as one of the major players in the independent aftermarket of industrial vehicle spare parts.

Our continuous quality development and increasing reliability has been confirmed by CORTECO, a recognized world leader in the sector of oil seals, who has appointed us in the important position as Specialized Distributor for Industrial Vehicles for this prestigious brand.

Name: Metalúrgica Formigari
MTS Roof Racks
Description: Founded in 1975, MTS designs, manufactures and distributes roof racks and accessories for commercial vehicles. MTS equipment is made to fit a wide range of current and past vehicle models, including both standard and customised versions.
Location: Châteauneuf en Thymerais, Eure et Loir

Name: TMB S.p.A.
Description: TMB is an Italian leading company for the production of aluminium components for the world of 2 and 4-wheel vehicles. The internal verticalization of the process allows us to develop the project from the base to its completion, supervising each process to meet at the best the customers’ technical requirements.

Name: Moto Peças Transmissões S/A
Description:
Os produtos Moto Peças são perfeitamente intercambiáveis e compatíveis como todos os produtos que seguem os mesmos desenhos, os mesmos padrões de qualidade e os mesmos processos tecnológicos utilizados pelas grandes montadoras.

Com tecnologias cada vez mais sofisticadas, os produtos Moto Peças asseguram a alta qualidade, confiabilidade e durabilidade que o mercado exige. Isto coloca a Moto Peças entre os principais fabricantes nacionais e mundiais. 

Além dos constantes investimentos, possuímos toda a garantia da qualidade do processo de fabricação controlado e certificado com o sistema ISO 9000. 

Atendemos no mercado de reposição de câmbio e diferencial as principais montadoras nas linhas Automotiva Pesada (Ônibus e Caminhões), Automotiva Leve (Pick Ups), Agrícola e Fora de Estrada.

Name: Dowa Thermotech México
Description:
DOWA THERMOTECH MÉXICO miembro del grupo DOWA HOLDINGS se encuentra establecida en Villa de Reyes desde el año 2015, brindando servicios de tratamiento térmico a empresas del sector automotriz. 
Contamos con los siguientes servicios:
- Nitrurado.
- Nitrocarburizado Ferrítico.
- Hardernite.
- Carburizado.
- Proceso TD.
- Recocido Magnético.
- Temple en vacío.
- Temple con atmósfera controlada.
- Brazing.
- Próximamente Plug quench.
Adicional realizamos venta de hornos industriales marca DOWA, equipos periféricos para tu área interna de tratamientos térmicos (Lavadoras de vacío, Generadores de gases endotérmicos, otros.), refacciones y servicio de mantenimiento post- venta.
Location: SAN LUIS POTOSÍ, San Luis Potosí

Name: Promotech Kunststoff- und Metallverarbeitungsges.m.b.H
Description: Promotech Kunststoff- und Metallverarbeitungsges.m.b.H is a mechanical or industrial engineering company based out of Austria.

Name: BRPNEUMATICI S.p.A.
Description:
Fondata nel 1963 da Battista Busin, la BRPNEUMATICI SpA opera nel settore della Ricostruzione, Commercio e Assistenza Pneumatici.
Affermatasi inizialmente come impresa a precisa vocazione industriale, ha sviluppato negli anni una rete logistica e commerciale che le consente d’essere oggi una delle realtà più solide e apprezzate del settore in Italia.

La Società vanta una capacità produttiva annua di oltre 30.000 pneumatici ricostruiti per il trasporto pesante e industriale nei sistemi a caldo e a freddo, oltre a commercializzare più di 200.000 pneumatici nuovi di tutte le dimensioni e per tutti gli utilizzi. 

BRPneumatici è presente nel settore wholesale di pneumatici nuovi per tutti i tipi d’utilizzo, dall’agricoltura ai mezzi movimento terra, dal trasporto pesante, core business dell’azienda, alle autovetture, dal carrello industriale ai motocicli. La giacenza media nel magazzino centralizzato di Thiene è di oltre 50.000 pneumatici delle principali marche.

L’azienda negli anni si è integrata a valle nel settore retail sviluppando una rete che oggi è composta da 10 Centri di Servizio (CdS) dislocati nelle province di Vicenza, Verona, Padova, Trento, Reggio Emilia e Pordenone. I CdS fanno parte della rete di franchising europeo Euromaster-Michelin. Questa affiliazione ha consentito l’ampliamento della gamma di servizi offerti, aggiungendo all’attività tradizionale di gommista la meccanica veloce (cosiddetto Quick fit), riparazione/sostituzione cristalli e tagliandi auto, e in generale l’aumento del fatturato nei servizi ad alto valore aggiunto.

Dispone di 18 officine mobili per il servizio d’assistenza pneumatici. Il servizio è particolarmente apprezzato dalle aziende di trasporto, sia per le assistenze di emergenza lungo la rete stradale, sia per la manutenzione programmata in loco che evita lo spostamento dei mezzi e i relativi costi.

L’Azienda ha un sistema di Qualità a norma ISO 9001:2015 e un impianto certificato dal T.U.V. secondo la norma ECE 109-R.

Name: Borneo Motors Singapore
Description:
Borneo Motors Singapore (BMS) is the preferred authorised vehicle distributor and the trusted partner of established brands such as Toyota, Lexus and Hino. As a leading car distributor in Singapore, Borneo Motors Singapore has represented Toyota since 1967, Lexus since 1992, and ventured into the heavy goods vehicle market with Hino since 2006. Inchcape Singapore also owns Inchcape Automotive Services, which partners with insurance and finance partners to bring automotive insurance to our customers.

Committed to uphold the vision of being the world’s most trusted automotive distributor and retailer, BMS leads the industry with a 'Customer First' philosophy, delivering products of quality, durability and reliability. With a strong belief that there is always a better way, BMS’s team of employees constantly aim to exceed customer expectations, challenge conventional boundaries and create engaging driving experiences with a strong commitment to the environment.

Name: SHINHO Precision India Private Limited
Description: we are in precision mold manufacturing and precision injection molding .JV With Shinho precsion Korea .providing one stop solutions from Precision tooling ,Precision molding and assembly

Name: Satech Rastreo Satelital
Description: Con más de 10 años liderando el sector Rastreo satelital y con presencia todo el país, nos especializamos en soluciones tecnológicas. Ofrecemos Desarrollo e innovación, plataforma de rastreo y seguimiento, desarrollo de software, control de combustible y mucho más.

Name: Kinnegrip
Description: Kinnegrip develops, manufactures and markets solutions for safe transport for European and global companies and brands. Our product offering covers the light, medium and heavy commercial vehicle segments. Development and manufacturing takes place at the facility in Lidköping, Sweden and Kostrzyn, Poland. Sales take place through our own salespeople and dealers on the local markets in Europe and the rest of the world.

Name: Work System Sweden AB
Description:
Välkommen till Work System!
Serviceinredning, bilinredning, arbetsinredning, verkstadsinredning, modulsystem, kärt system har många namn huvudsaken är att dina behov tillgodogörs. Du vill optimera tid, plats och säkerhet i din mobila arbetsplats. Välkommen till Work System, vi ordnar detta snabbt, smidigt och till marknadens bästa pris.

Name: DAIMAY FRANCE SAS
Description:
Filiale d’un groupe familial chinois, nous sommes principalement spécialisés dans la conception et fabrication de pare-soleil pour l’industrie automobile. 
Présents depuis 1975 à Creutzwald, nous travaillons essentiellement pour des marques allemandes telles que MERCEDES BENZ, BMW, ainsi que le groupe VOLKSWAGEN mais également pour d’autres clients internationaux comme ROLLS-ROYCE et VOLVO.
Nous sommes reconnus pour notre savoir-faire et notre haut niveau de qualité dans la filière automobile, une expertise qui se retrouve dans nos équipes.

Name: Galaxy Technoforge (I) Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Based in Rajkot (Gujarat) India, Galaxy Technoforge is among the leading manufacturers of forged and machined components. It is an ace development partner to a huge base of clientele for automotive and non automotive industries spread across the globe for manufacturing high-quality, world-class customized components.

With a history of excellence stretching back more than two decades currently production facility boasts capacity around 11000 T per annum. Reduced production cost due to collaborative business ecosystem adds value to the supply chain while maintaining quality through solid network of product and service collaborators. Elevating the eco-system has always been into the DNA of Galaxy Technoforge.

With an unabated commitment to quality, focused on technological advancements, thrust on customized solutions and power of superior engineering capabilities, Galaxy has sustained a great success saga as a leading national player. It envisages evolving as a leading global player in the years to come.
 
For further information please contact on info@galaxytechnoforge.com 

GALAXY TECHNOFORGE (INDIA) PVT. LTD
SURVEY NO.26, SHAPAR (VERAVAL),
RAJKOT - 360024,
GUJARAT
INDIA

Name: DENGE AUTOMOTIVE
Description: Denge; İstanbul'un Topkapı semtinde 1988 yılında kurulan, günümüzde Kocaeli'nin Gebze ilçesinde  GEPOSB'da 5000 metrekare üzerine "Yeşil Sertifika" olarak da bilinen Leed sertifikalı fabrikasında hizmet veren otomotiv yedek parça üreticisi ve tedarikçisidir.

Name: EDiM
Description: EDiM aims to be a point of reference for global markets for what concerns Die-casting and Machining for the large-scale industry: an innovative and environmental friendly company that offers excellent products, which is state of the art from a technological point of view, and is therefore the biggest companies’ preferred partner in many sectors, including in particular the Automotive industry.

Name: Pichinin Industria e Comercio Ltda.
Description: A Pichinin é uma empresa especializada em injeção de alumínio sob pressão (HPDC) e coquilha, além de usinagem e pequenas montagens. No mercado desde 1989, pertence ao Grupo Acme, que tem sua sede em Chicago, nos EUA, e outra planta na China.

Name: VM Industries
Description:
Through the components it designs and manufactures, VM Industries contributes to the growing market of electricity in motor vehicles. Since its creation in 2009, VMI has decided to take an original position in the automotive equipment market, so that major equipment manufacturers have a connectician at their service, able to meet their specific needs when catalog solutions are not suitable.
This market, very dynamic, which allows VMI to address all European car manufacturers, benefiting from the network and the presence of its direct customers.

Growth is there: + 25% every year since 2013, a doubling in size every two years. The dynamics are present in all the departments, in order to adapt the organizations to the growth and to the innovations: trade, design office, projects, tool workshop, production workshops, maintenance, supply chain purchasing and logistics, IT, human resources, accounting and finance.

Name: Arpek HPDC
Description:
Arpek is an integrated HPDC (High-Pressure Die Casting) parts provider that delivers uniquely designed creative solutions. Through in-house research, development, die design, die production, simulation and engineering capabilities, we offer innovative technology focus, and are credited as a “world-class HPDC development partner” by our customers.

We are a strong team of over 180 people, working together to meet the needs of our customers around the globe. Our state-of-the-art plant with a high degree of robotic automation facilitates the production of complex series and also enables the quick delivery of HPDC parts. These are among the many reasons why leading global automotive manufacturers trust us for their functional areas such as engines, power trains, air brake systems, chassis and body. 

We operate with a set of three core values that guide every Arpek employee every day, through all of our processes, initiatives — and with every interaction. We are driven by a passion for technology and innovation, partnering with industry leaders to empower repair shops with the tools they need to streamline operations, enhance efficiency, and deliver top-tier service. With 60 years of experience in the automotive aftermarket, Apec has firmly established itself as a market-leading specialist in supplying braking components and products to the UK and Ireland.

Today, Apec has developed its decades of expertise into a growing catalogue of parts and accessories that branch out beyond braking to meet the demands of an evolving marketplace.

From coil springs to shock absorbers, the name that was once synonymous with quality braking now means excellence on every level.

Name: BMV BETENHEUSER METAL TÉCNICA
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada em soluções logísticas metalmecânica, atendendo os setores automotivo, agrícola e linha branca.

Nossa principal missão é fornecer produtos de alta qualidade e soluções eficientes para otimizar a logística das empresas, proporcionando ganhos de produtividade, redução de custos e maior eficiência operacional. 

Nossos principais produtos incluem peças usinadas seriadas, estamparia leve e conjuntos soldados. Trabalhamos com materiais de alta qualidade e contamos com uma equipe de profissionais altamente compatíveis, garantindo a precisão e confiabilidade de nossos produtos. Além disso, oferecemos contêiner metálico, embalagens metálicas e serviços de montagem e desmontagem de módulos, porta-paletes, drive-in e acessórios.

Para atender às demandas específicas de nossos clientes, investimos constantemente em tecnologia e inovação. Nossa empresa está equipada com maquinário de última geração e utilizamos processos eficientes para garantir a qualidade e a entrega pontual de nossos produtos.

Valorizamos a dedicação, o trabalho em equipe e o atendimento personalizado aos nossos clientes. Estamos sempre prontos para entender suas necessidades e oferecer soluções sob medida.

Acreditamos que a parceria com nossos clientes é fundamental para o sucesso de ambos. Buscamos estabelecer relações de longo prazo, base na confiança e na satisfação mútua. Colocamos nossos clientes em primeiro lugar, buscando sempre superar suas expectativas e oferecer soluções inovadoras.

Buscamos constantemente maneiras de minimizar o impacto ambiental de nossas operações e promovemos práticas ecológicas em toda a cadeia de valor.

Com produtos de excelência, profissionais protegidos e um compromisso inabalável com nossos clientes, estamos prontos para enfrentar os desafios e oportunidades do mercado.

Name: VEMA S.r.l
Description: Dal 1972 Vema produce e distribuisce ricambi auto di qualità in tutto il mondo. La sede logistica dell’azienda si trova alle porte di Milano. Vema è da sempre un’azienda all’avanguardia, dinamica ed attenta all’evoluzione del marcato dell’aftermarket che diventa più selettivo giorno dopo giorno. Fin dalla sua nascita l’azienda è famosa per l’attenzione che pone nei confronti di ogni articolo della propria gamma, talvolta modificando i propri prodotti al fine di sopperire anche ad eventuali lacune di progettazione dei componenti montati in origine sulle vetture. L’azienda nasce come produttrice di articoli di tiranteria (bracci sospensione, testine, tiranti…) e negli anni si è sempre confermata ai vertici del mercato per ampiezza della gamma, qualità e competitività, ma Vema non è solo tiranteria, oggi può infatti vantare un catalogo di componenti auto unico in Europa per varietà di articoli e copertura di parco auto circolante. I cataloghi sono aggiornati ogni 24 mesi e sviluppati internamente dai propri tecnici, le novità vengono inserite giornalmente in TecDoc e nel proprio catalogo web, strumento estremamente innovativo, preciso e di semplice utilizzo. L’azienda è certificata ISO 9001:2015 e offre l’assicurazione RC sui propri prodotti. La qualità dei propri prodotti, del servizio offerto e la dinamicità dell’azienda sono la chiave del successo di Vema dalla sua nascita ad oggi e i valori in cui ancora crede per poter continuare a crescere ed affermarsi nel settore dell’aftermarket.

Name: Aerodyne Global Ltd
Description:
TAKE AERODYNAMIC ACTION. SAVE FUEL. REDUCE CARBON.

We are global consultant-manufacturers for fuel-saving truck aerodynamic devices. Established in 1979, and still a family-run business, we offer a complete service from design and manufacturing to fitting and testing at our Head Office and factory in Bourne, UK.

Aerodyne was established in 1979 by an engineer who was running a logistics company, and experiencing many of the same problems faced by fleets of all sizes today – how to save fuel, increase profits, and enhance vehicle appearance.

In order to reduce the fleet’s fuel consumption, research was carried out to source some fuel-saving truck aerodynamics. After extensive road tests and vehicle monitoring, the effectiveness of aerodynamics was proven; Aerodyne began trading, marketing and selling these devices across the UK and then globally.

Today at Aerodyne, we manufacture some of the most innovative aerodynamic devices available on the market. Combined with our expert aerodynamic design advice, we can provide you with detailed CAD proposals for your fleet, potential fuel-saving calculation and consequent data Return-on-Investment.

AERODYNE, AeroMatic, AeroLuton and AeroCool are Trademarks of Aerodyne Global Ltd and Aerodyne Equipment”.

Zertifizierungen wie IATF 16949 (Automotive Industry), ISO 9001 (Qualitätsmanagement) und ISO 14001 (Umwelt) legen die Grundsteine zur Umsetzung qualitativ hochwertiger Produkte.

Name: Elcome
Description:
Elcome is a leading supplier of software solutions and services to the global automotive and vehicle aftermarket. Our philosophy is, 'Do It ONCE, Use It Many Times', which is the principle at the heart of our solutions and services, created in partnership with our customers, to minimise workload and maximise their efficiency. 

Elcome's unique solutions help Product and Category Managers, in the vehicle aftermarket, realise the full potential of their parts catalogue. Xchecker is the gateway solution that enables the easy management of large amounts of evolving product data, visual assets and vehicle applications. Store, analyse, map and edit complex parts information for distribution to multiple outputs. 

We also offer specialist aftermarket professional services, custom development and API integration. Plus, publishing and data services, covering content standardisation, enhancement, analysis, format translation, bespoke design and build of electronic catalogues, websites and printed catalogues. 

As a company Elcome is independent, we're not beholden to any particular platform, technology or data structure, we believe the authors of parts data are the owners of that data, with absolute rights to use it as they choose.

Our products and services are designed for cataloguers, by cataloguers and can be customised to suit specific needs and wants. We also offer a complete package of support including dedicated Account Management, Training and Support Help Desk.

Name: Plastic7A
Description:
Nacemos en 1989 con la actividad de moldeado de piezas por inyección para productos de línea blanca. En pocos años nos convertimos en Tier II para la industria de la automoción. Actualmente contamos con 4 plantas de fabricación en Valencia y 450 trabajadores.
Nos especializamos en la fabricación de componentes plásticos decorativos y funcionales para la industria automotriz. Nuestro compromiso con la calidad, eficiencia y flexibilidad nos posiciona como líderes en el sector.
Disponemos de las siguientes certificaciones y reconocimientos:
•	Certificación TISAX
•	Proveedor Tier I
•	Certificación Medioambiental ISO 9001 y 14001
•	Certificado de Calidad IATF 16949
•	Certificado en Sostenibilidad, medalla de Bronce ECOVADIS

Ofrecemos productos como rejillas de radiador, tapas de gasolina, rocker panels, pilares, tapabujes, interiores decorativos y funcionales, cromados, carcasas de espejo y molduras. Somos proveedores de Stellantis y Grupo Volkswagen, demostrando nuestra solvencia técnica y compromiso con la calidad.
Utilizamos tecnología punta y metodologías como Lean Manufacturing. Nos enfocamos en la innovación y la sostenibilidad, implementando materiales y técnicas que minimizan el impacto ambiental. 
Nuestra especialidad es el moldeo de piezas plásticas por inyección, con tecnologías de 2 y 3K. Contamos con inyectoras bimateria, inyección secuenciada, inyección de insertos, corte y grabado por láser, y moldes complejos. La pintura es una de nuestras fortalezas, ofreciendo acabados de alto y bajo brillo, pintura soft y colores perlados. Nuestra I+D+i en ingeniería asegura innovación continua y contamos con gran capacidad de respuesta ante imprevistos y adaptabilidad.
Nuestros empleados son nuestro mayor activo. Fomentamos un entorno donde prosperan como profesionales cualificados. Su formación y motivación han sido una constante en la compañía, así como la retención de talento. 

 962 79 08 01  info@plastic7a.com

Description:

The company has earned multiple national honors, including National High-tech Enterprise, National Green Factory, National Specialized and Innovative Small Giant Enterprise, and National Postdoctoral Research Station.

Easyland's main products include turbocharger and PEM fuel cell air compressor. The turbochargers are suitable for engine displacement from 0.8L to 2.5L, applying in the energy-saving vehicle (both gasoline and diesel engine vehicles) and new energy vehicle (PHEV, REEV, alternative fuel ICE vehicles, etc.), engine rating power ranges from 70kW to 180kW. SJM DECOUPLING SYSTEMS
EFFICIENT SOLUTIONS FOR MOVEMENT, VIBRATION AND TIGHTNESS.

New Thinking Right Action
Think differently, try something new, do it right away/achieve result that multiples in its value.

https://www.sjmflex.com/en/ 

SJM is a manufacturer of high-quality decoupling solutions for the automotive industry, plants and buildings, and has developed the flexible decoupling elements to solve the problems of vibration, noise, linear motion and pressure parameters. Our company was founded in 1975 and is now the largest technology leader in Korea. Based on the international network in Europe, Africa and America, we supply the global market.

SJM is headquartered in Korea. Our Automotive Division has developed flexible decoupling elements to reduce air pollution, ensure lifelong durability of the exhaust system and ensure comfortable driving in every respect. All processes from new design to manufacturing through the various tests are controlled and managed based on the automotive quality certificate IATF 16949.
