Name: Kwangjin America Inc.
Description:
Kwangjin provides the best door systems available with high level quality and technology to world class OEM's.

In the Words of our Chairman and CEO Young Jik Kwon:

"As Kwangjin Grew alongside the automotive industry in Korea, we continue to manufacture outstanding parts and impressing our local and global customers with 40 years of accumulated experience with door systems and technical expertise.

Kwangjin will fulfill the customer's needs, perpetually dedicate ourselves to our customer and lead the twenty-first century industry of automotive parts by demonstrating creativity, sincerity, and never-ending efforts."

Having begun operations in Korea over 40 years ago Kwangjin has blossomed into a creative and energetic globally recognized and globally spanning tier one supplier of automotive components. Since its inception in the mid 1990's Kwangjin America, located in Detroit, Michigan has risen to provide the top-rated quality of any other Kwangjin location out of the 18 spread across the planet.

Kwangjin offers a variety of products to our customers such as dual and single rail window regulators, arm type window regulators, quarter class window regulators and wiring harness arrangement devices. In addition to this Kwangjin also offers our customers door modules that shorten the assembly time in the door process as well as reduce weight compared to standard vehicle doors installed with a separate window regulation system; and as if all that was not enough Kwangjin is on the leading edge of powered door systems and the manufacture of electronic control units.

Over the past few decades Kwangjin America has earned the GM supplier of the year award a total of 20 times, more than proving our sincerity and dedication to providing customers with the best products available on the market by clearly reflecting that goal in our actions as a company from the ground up.

Name: Juntalima - Indústria e Comércio de Auto Peças Ltda.
Description:
O grupo Juntalima participa desde 1993 do mercado de reposição de juntas automotivas, sendo cada vez mais reconhecida pelo seu profissionalismo, transparência e qualidade.

Atenta ao mercado, a empresa segue evoluindo no processo produtivo, ampliando suas instalações, adquirindo novas maquinas e hoje processa sua própria matéria-prima, projetando e construindo suas ferramentas.

Sempre em busca de inovações, rápida em lançamentos, sua linha cresce semana a semana, sendo uma das mais diversificadas do setor.

A Juntalima busca conhecer as necessidades dos seus clientes e atende-los completamente. Para isso, conta com excelentes serviços de pré e pós venda, através de uma equipe treinada e conscientizada da importância do nosso trabalho.

Situada em São Paulo, a Juntalima está presente em todas as regiões do país, contando com mais de 20 representantes em todo o território nacional. Participa também com destaque do mercado sul-americano, exportando para Argentina, Paraguai, Venezuela, Bolívia, Chile, Peru e Uruguai, além do mercado Asiático, Oriente Médio, e África. Desde 2005 é certificada pela norma ISO 9001/2008, mantendo e aperfeiçoando sua política de Gestão da Qualidade.

Compromissada com a Saúde e o Meio Ambiente, a Juntalima não utiliza Amianto em suas matérias-primas.

A Juntalima repetirá seus anos de crescimento, junto aos seus colaboradores, fornecedores e clientes.

Name: Chitra Paratama
Description:
Initially established in 2000 as a supporting company for the TMT Group, PT Chitra Paratama (Chitra) is the sole importer for Michelin (earthmover) series tires in Indonesia. The Company has since grown into the country's largest Michelin dealer and currently provides integrated solutions for tires including repair, retread, service & tire management with a number of leading tire brands in its product line.

Currently, Chitra is focused in the mining industry. Name: A.B.M. TOOL & DIE CO. LTD.
Description:
A.B.M. Tool & Die Co. Ltd. is at the forefront of modern technology in the design and manufacture of stamped metal parts, automated and welded assemblies. Since the founding of our company in 1969, A.B.M. Tool and Die has consistently provided unmatched quality, competitive pricing, on-time delivery, and uncompromising customer service.

We have the capability to take your design concept and supply a single component or a full sub-assembly.

We build everything from complex progressive dies to fully automated transfer dies in our fully staffed and fully equipped modern tool room. Other in-house capabilities include prototyping, die build, automation equipment design and build. 

Our modern facilities house presses from 120 tons to 1400 tons providing progressive and servo automated transfer stamping services, including robot welders and automated assembly. Value-added services are the most important part of what we provide and what set us apart.

In-house tool and die designers along with CAD/CAM programmers offer their expertise utilizing the industry's latest software for today's stamped metal parts manufacturing.

A.B.M. Tool and Die invests on an ongoing basis into modern technology to keep abreast of the latest innovations that can enhance quality, reduce production time, and improve cost efficiency. Automated assembly, automated welding cells, and robotic machinery, designed specifically to handle complex operations, are part of our hi-tech manufacturing process.

Our manufacturing division is backed up by Quality Assurance and Inventory Control to ensure compliance with all customer specifications, and we are ISO 9001 compliant and IATF 16949 certified.

We have 2 locations to support your business including:
* 100,000 sq. ft. Manufacturing Facility in Brampton, ON, Canada
* 100,000 sq. ft. Manufacturing Facility in San Luis Potosi, SLP, Mexico (ABM Estampados S.A. de C.V.)

Name: SISMI S.R.L.
Description:
La nostra mission aziendale si può tradurre in una importante parola:
risparmio economico.
Risparmio per il cliente che, vista la situazione economica mondiale, non è da sottovalutarsi; la nostra riparazione infatti fa risparmiare al cliente finale oltre il 50% del valore di riacquisto a nuovo, senza pregiudicare la qualità che è comparabile al 100% del prodotto originale o equivalente.
Inoltre focalizziamo l'attenzione sul risparmio delle risorse e delle materie prime; riparando, realizziamo un servizio a favore dell'ambiente riutilizzando le materie prime che così non vengono inutilmente sprecate.

PART OF AL MASOOD GROUP

Name: PREXAparts
Description:
PREXAparts beliefert den Auto-Teile-Aftermarket mit hochwertigen und zuverlässigen OEM-Ident-Teilen. Unsere über 40jährige Erfahrung als Spezialist für Auto-Teile garantiert große Sachkenntnis mit allen Marken und Original-Ersatzteilen. 
Sorgfältige Auswahl und Qualifizierung unserer Produkte und enge Zusammenarbeit mit Produktions-Partnern stellt unseren hohen Anspruch an erstklassiger Qualität und überzeugendem Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis sicher.
Wir liefern ausschließlich ausgesuchte Ident-Teile von hervorragender Qualität, die in Präzision, Beschaffenheit und Funktion dem OE-Teile-Standard entsprechen und vielfach übertreffen. Dabei steht für uns die Kundenzufriedenheit im Vordergrund. Erwartungen übertreffen, vertrauensvolle Beziehungen pflegen und Qualitätsprodukte für den modernen Autoteilemarkt bieten sind unsere Verpflichtung und unser Erfolg.
Mit über 40 Jahren Branchenerfahrung sind wir bewährter Spezialist für Autoteile mit Sitz in Deutschland. Das Unternehmen bietet fachkundig umfassende Beratung und Unterstützung im Großhandelsgeschäft, weit über geltende Standards hinaus.
Innovation und Weiterentwicklung, sowie ein zuverlässiges, beständiges Team aus hochqualifizierten Mitarbeitern der Branche sind dabei der Schlüssel zum Erfolg. Durch die Nähe zum Kunden bleiben wir an der Spitze der Automobilbranche und investieren nachhaltig in Forschung und Entwicklung, Prozessoptimierung und Integration neuer Technologien. Dabei setzen wir uns aktiv für umweltfreundliche Standards ein.
Unsere Ziele sind erstklassiger Service, hochwertige Produkte und hoher Mehrwert für unsere Kunden.

Name: IXIT BEEPER
Description:
IXIT BEEPER – L’expertise électronique au service de la sécurité et du confort automobile 

Créée en 2001, IXIT conçoit et développe des systèmes d’électronique embarquée à travers sa marque Beeper.
Depuis plus de 20 ans, nous mettons notre savoir-faire technologique au service du secteur automobile, en accompagnant aussi bien les constructeurs (OE) que le grand public à travers un large réseau de distribution.

 Notre mission : proposer des solutions électroniques fiables, innovantes et accessibles, pour renforcer la sécurité, le confort et la connectivité des véhicules.

La qualité est au cœur de notre stratégie :

- Système de Management de la Qualité (SMQ) structuré 
- Contrôles et tests en laboratoires certifiés 
- SAV intégré en France et service client réactif 

Avec une équipe à taille humaine, IXIT poursuit sa croissance en développant les solutions électroniques de demain, au service des professionnels comme des particuliers.

 IXIT | Beeper – On tient la route.

www.beeper.fr | www.ixit.fr

Name: T&D Drive Systems
Description:

Headquartered in Suzhou, China, T&D is a subsidiary of Bafang, one of the world’s largest and most pioneering manufacturers of electric bicycle drive systems. Electric motorcycles were a logical next stage for the organisation and five e-drive systems with individual characteristics have been developed in laboratory evaluation facilities and rigorously tested on an onsite test track. 
High performance excitement meets zero emission silence for off-road, sports, touring, mopeds, and indoor entertainment motorcycles.
T&D. Electric Evolution.

Description:
Present in Brazil since 2006, Nidec Mobility Brasil is a Japanese company in the automotive sector, specializing in solutions that enhance vehicle comfort, such as switches, sensors, controllers, and electronic modules. Aligned with the technological evolution of the automotive industry, Nidec is always at the forefront, anticipating the future needs of mobility.

KBU Automotive is the main force behind next-generation automotive seating solutions. We are proud of our commitment to innovation, which has set new standards in quality and comfort in the automotive industry. We are building the future of automotive seating. 

Our vision is to become a global innovation hub in the automotive sector, revolutionizing the way people interact with their vehicles through exceptional seating solutions. Our ambition is to inspire the world with unprecedented levels of comfort and safety.

Name: Metsan Makina - MTSCO
Description:
İngilizce
The company's origins date back to 1980. It was officially established in 1996 under the name METSAN MAKİNA and has been producing tractor spare parts. MTSCO was founded in 2014 as a subsidiary of METSAN MAKINA with the primary objective of exporting METSAN MAKINA products worldwide. Leveraging its extensive network of 85 local manufacturers, it also supplies comprehensive range of high-quality aftermarket components. 

METSAN MAKINA has focused on supplying premium tractor spare parts, such as hydraulic pumps, steering systems, balancers, oil pumps and distributors since 1980. MTSCO's primary goal is to offer customers high-quality, OEM-like products at more competitive price point. Its product portfolio includes over 15,000 fast-moving spare parts, which we distribute to 25 countries. It consistently introduces new products on a monthly basis.  The sister company, MALKARA DOKUM, its customers semi-finished and finished products in the categories of pig iron, ductile iron, vermicular cast iron, High Si and High Si-Mo nodular cast iron. It manufactures single-piece castings and all kinds of model works from 0.5 kg to 100 kg using full and semi automatic SINTO casting molding line

Türkçe
Şirketin kökleri 1980 yılına dayanmaktadır. 1996 yılında METSAN MAKİNA adıyla resmi olarak kurulan şirket, traktör yedek parça üretimi yapmaktadır. MTSCO, METSAN MAKİNA ürünlerini dünya çapında ihraç etmek amacıyla 2014 yılında METSAN MAKİNA'nın bir iştiraki olarak kurulmuştur. 85 yerel üreticiden oluşan geniş ağını kullanarak yüksek kaliteli yedek parçaları müşterilerine sunmaktadır.

Name: Stampjet Contrapesos e Produtos para Pneus
Description:
Há mais de 30 anos fabricando contrapesos para balanceamento de rodas para veículos leves, comerciais e motocicletas utilizando as melhores matérias-primas, respeitando todas as exigências ambientais, garantindo segurança em todas as operações amparados pela certificação ISO 9001:2015. 

Nossa atuação comercial abrange todo o território nacional bem como forte presença em toda a América Latina na distribuição de nossos produtos. 

Desde 1995, a Stampjet foi integrada ao Grupo Mazola Ambiental e segue à risca sua filosofia: respeito ao meio ambiente, atuação na área social e busca contínua por qualidade e inovação, tudo isso apontando para um único objetivo: a sustentabilidade dos seus negócios e de suas parcerias.

Missão									 
Ser referência de qualidade e liderança; agindo com ética e sustentabilidade na fabricação, desenvolvimento e comercialização de produtos para o mercado de pneus e reparação automotiva, compartilhando conhecimento com os nossos colaboradores clientes e parceiros.
 
Visão	
Tornar as marca Stampjet reconhecida como referência de qualidade e liderança, diferenciando-as pela credibilidade e relacionamento com o mercado na entrega de soluções, com continuidade e inovação de forma sustentável.

Valores 
Somos uma empresa que valoriza a integridade, ética, transparência, compromisso com o meio ambiente e inovação. Compartilhamos conhecimento, trabalhando em equipe com respeito ao ser humano e meio ambiente.

Name: Exmotive
Description:
We are probably India's first Tech start-up for Make in India Automotive ADAS products!
Our Vision: To make driving automobiles safer and more exciting!
Our Mission: To give the power of advanced automotive technology to everyone to have a safer driving. We develop ADAS products and intend to manufacture 76-77 GHz automotive radar sensors locally in India. Currently we have our product manufacturing lines in China through semi-conductor chip partnerships.
Our Products Suite: 
•	Forward Collision Warning (FCW) 
•	Blindspot Detection (BSD)
•	Lane Change Alert (LCA) 
We sell aftermarket products and looking to collaborate with Indian Automobile OEMs to support end-to-end development of ADAS features for their products.
Our Expertise:
•	76-77GHz radar development
•	Advanced Algorithms for tracking and prediction
•	Complete radar based ADAS feature development (FCW, BSD, LCA etc)
•	Wiring harness, connectors localization
•	Vehicle architecture integration (CAN bus)
•	RF testing and ETA approval
Value to Automobile OEMs:
•	Faster time to market with our readily available products
•	Complete product knowledge sharing
•	Hands on skill up to OEM, Complete access to software development & signal processing tools
•	Realize your ideas into PoCs in just few days
•	Deploy our Engineers to make the features within OEM
•	Vehicle testing and end-to-end product ownership and service

For more exciting info, please visit our website: https://www.exmotive.com/

Name: GVA
Description:
Amacımız, GVA ürünlerini yüksek kalite ve uygun fiyatlarla müşterilerimize ulaştırmaktır.

Her geçen gün uzmanlaşarak ve ürün gruplarımız arasına kayış sistemleri, soğutma sistemleri, aks, aks kafası, plastik & kaporta gibi bir çok yeni ürün grubu ekleyerek Türkiye’de ve Dünya’da tanınan bir marka olduk.

15.000+ fazla ürün çeşidiyle, yedek parça sektörüne hizmet vermeye devam ediyoruz. Portföyümüzdeki parçalarımız, OEM ve eşdeğer fabrikalarda üretildiğinden, müşterilerimize kusursuz kalite ve performans teklif ediyoruz. Böylelikle GVA markamızda yer alan yedek parçalarımızla, siz değerli müşterilerimize kaliteli ürünleri uygun fiyatlara sunuyoruz.

Portföyümüzdeki ürünlerimiz, bugün Avrupa araç filosunun %80’inden fazlasını kapsamaktadır. 

GVA olarak; önceliğimiz her zaman müşteri memnuniyetidir. Uzman, genç ve dinamik kadromuzla müşterilerimizin taleplerini anlayarak, müşterilerimize hızlıca cevap veriyoruz. Müşterilerimizle kurduğumuz iş ortaklığı ve iletişim, işimizin en önemli yönü olduğuna inanıyoruz. Tüm süreçlerde, en iyi hizmeti sunabilmek için sizlerle iletişim halinde olmayı tercih ediyoruz.

GVA’nın başarısı, müşterisinin duyduğu güvenden geçer.

With GVA Genuine Value for your Auto!
Our goal is to deliver GVA products to customers with high quality and affordable prices.
Created in 2010, GVA is a company specialized in the aftermarket parts. We started our wonderful adventure with mirror group. Over the time, we have developed our range of parts: Belt drive systems, Cooling system, Axle drive, Body parts etc.

Today, we offer a very wide selection of aftermarket parts : more than 15 000+ references.
Because our parts are produced in the same factories as many OEM parts, we can proudly offer an irreproachable quality and performance product to our customers.
Thus, you will be sure to get the same efficiency as OEM.

Name: Autozilla
Description:
The auto industry today is going through some fundamental changes. As form factors are evolving and engines are adapting to changing consumer demand, the nuts and bolts of cars and motorcycles are getting increasingly complex. The number of spare parts available has grown several folds in a short span and service centers are struggling to cope with this explosion in auto parts.

Autozilla connects sellers and buyers of auto parts in a transparent marketplace and dramatically simplifies the process of auto part discovery and purchase. As a seller you can expand your sales to a national network through Autozilla. As a buyer you can be assured of finding the perfect auto part, no matter how specific your requirement.

Cars don’t belong in a workshop. Bikes don’t belong in a shed. Their home is the road, their juice the gush of wind. Autozilla was born from a simple idea – that we should get cars and bikes fixed up as quickly as possible so they can do what they do best – move!

Everybody wins with Autozilla. Vehicle owners don’t fret about delayed service. Workshops turn around delivery quicker and build loyal customers. Wholesalers find customers from across the country. And guess who wins the most – the millions of cars and bikes that check into service centers across the country every day.

With this simple goal, Autozilla has set about disrupting the Indian auto industry. By enabling digitization of the highly fragmented auto service providers, suddenly everything has become easy. No supply chain bottlenecks, no stuck inventory, no opaque pricing and no frenzied customers.

We are proud to announce our recent partnership with Bosch India. Bosch acquires 26% stake in Autozilla and we see this as just the beginning!! 

A team of deeply passionate and capable motor-heads, this is our first step towards disrupting the auto industry and turning it on its head. 

Watch this space as we race forward.....

Name: Dobinsons Latin America
Description:
En los años 40, Reg Dobinsons, un herrero ferroviario de Queensland, dio los primeros pasos de lo que se convertiría en un legado familiar. Con una pasión innata por la ingeniería y una meticulosa atención al detalle, Reg comenzó a perfeccionar sus habilidades en la reparación y la producción de espirales, al realizar trabajos de fin de semana para sus amigos. En poco tiempo gracias a su excelente trabajo, ganó una bien merecida reputación como experto reparador de espirales.

En 1953, fundó oficialmente Dobinsons Welding Works, debajo de un árbol en el patio de su casa en Rockhampton, sentando las bases de una empresa que hoy, con más de seis décadas de historia, es sinónimo de calidad y durabilidad en la industria de las suspensiones. 

Reg, un hombre innovador y adelantado para su época, compró la primera computadora de Central Queensland a mediados de los 60 para mejorar la eficiencia. También comenzó a fabricar su propia maquinaria, como un rodillo ocular, diseñado y fabricado por el propio Reg, utilizando piezas tomadas de ex-aviones de combate.

La pasión por la ingeniería y la dedicación al trabajo se transmitieron de generación en generación. A finales de los años 70, los hijos de Reg, Glen y Keith Dobinsons, se unieron a la creciente empresa familiar e inmediatamente mostraron la misma pasión y experiencia en la reparación y el manejo de suspensiones, lo que permitió compartir la carga de trabajo de Reg. Con nuevos ojos y más manos, Dobinsons comenzó a distribuir sus productos de calidad en toda Australia.

60 años y tres generaciones después, el centro de producción y oficina central de Dobinsons Spring and Suspension en Rockhampton se ha expandido a más de 60.000 pies cuadrados, ampliando su alcance más allá de las fronteras australianas con presencia en más de 50 países, siendo un referente global en la industria de las suspensiones y la visión de una familia que ha dedicado su vida a construir una empresa sólida y duradera.

Name: Doctor Air Brake Ltd
Description:
Having specialised in Heavy Truck Air Brake Systems for many years Doctor Air Brake was born in the early 90’s as a result of fleet customers asking Jeff Lowe the founder for technical support on ABS & Air Brake fault finding. Demand for this was so strong that Jeff soon switched his full focus onto Braking & Electronic Systems Diagnostics, on both Trucks & Trailers.

During these early years Jeff was unhappy with the diagnostic equipment available at the time and decided to design his own, to both help himself and the now growing team solving everyday problems with ABS, MOT failures and general HGV maintenance. This range of equipment was aimed at making everything a “one man” operation speeding up fault finding, so Doctor Air Brake could establish itself as a leader in this 'niche' technology support area. 

Doctor Air Brakes first design was the Trailer-Check which focused on providing a completely portable 24v power box for Trailer Electrical Systems. This was soon followed by combining Wabco & Haldex Code Readers into one easy to use package and this diagnostics development continued up to 2006, when the decision was made to invest heavily in Code-Talk a combined diagnostic fault code reader specifically design for trailer ABS & EBS braking systems. Robin Arnold an Electronics designer and Jeff worked many nights to simulate faults in various ECU’s and record diagnostic messages logged. These were then decoded and displayed in plain English on a small LCD display, as each make and variant was added the code built up into a library totalling 24,000 lines of code and the project was completed in June 2009, but development continued beyond that as new ECU’s were released by all 3 Global Brake Manufacturers

Name: Power Escapamentos
Description:
Fabricante de escapamentos esportivos para motocicletas e carros esportivos 
Há 25 anos atrás preparadores buscavam o maior ganho de velocidade em motos de pistas (na época eram famosas as motos RD 350, CBX 750, CBR 450, RD 135, DT 200, ML, Turuna). A Power Escapamentos começou em 94, quando o fundador Paulo, mais conhecido como Rato, se especializou no conserto e preparação de motos 2 tempos. Com o passar dos anos, ele percebeu que ainda faltava algo em suas preparações. Então que, com dificuldade e usando sua experiência e seu conhecimento em motores, conseguiu fabricar seu 1º escapamento para alta performance, para uma RD 135, na sua própria casa, um modelo novo e exclusivo.
“Fomos para o Kartódromo de Bebedouro, testamos e o resultado foi encantador. As motos tinham mais desempenho e velocidade final aumentada!”
Levamos então, nosso novo modelo ao Kartódromo de Itu e em apenas um final de semana conseguimos vender 10 unidades. Lá também fomos Campões Paulista por 5 anos consecutivos (98-2002) nas categorias Estreante e Pró (os pilotos eram o Fubá de Rib. Preto e o Turquinho de SP) usando nosso 1º escape.
Nos tornamos referência na fabricação escapamento de alta performance para motos de 2 tempos.
Desde então a demanda e a procura foi só aumentando e surgia uma nova necessidade no mercado: escapamento de alta performance para motocicletas 4 tempos.
Entrar nessa categoria não foi fácil, conseguimos espaço no mercado reformando e modificando escapamentos importados e a partir dai fomos desenvolvendo nosso próprio modelo, com cálculos, testes em ruas, pistas e dinamômetros de terceiros.
Foi um processo demorado (5 anos em média), mas com muito esforço vencemos! Desenvolvemos um escapamento com preço acessível, qualidade e desempenho surpreendentes. Hoje contamos com amplo um espaço para fabricação, são 980 m² com 18 colaboradores na parte de produção e desenvolvimento + loja física com 720m², 6 atendentes, sala de testes e espaço de instalação.

Name: SmartVan, Denmark
Description:
SmartVan er din leverandør af professionelt udstyr til varevognen.
Blandt vore sikkerhedstestede og håndværkergodkendte produkter finder du udstyr, der hjælper i det daglige arbejde med varevognen men også løsninger som 5Fleet flådestyring og materielsporing til hjælp med administration og styring af din virksomhed.

Vi har selv udviklet en Plug’n Play LED-løsning til varerummet. Vores LED erstatter det eksisterende lys og bliver monteret med originale stik i oprindelige placering. Med LED fra SmartVan er det slut med lommelygter for at finde dine ting i varerummet.

Til daglig glæde for brugeren af varevognen har vi vores holdbare ULTI Bar tagbøjler i aluminium samt masser af tilbehør. Heriblandt er klassikere som rørbokse, læsseruller der beskytter varevognens tag ved lastning samt stigeholdere.

Også til tagmontering har vi vores prisvindende ULTI Rack tagbagagebærer. ULTI Racken er ligesom vores ULTI Bars utroligt nemme at montere, aerodynamiske og giver mange muligheder for at anvende varevognens tag til last.

Vores vinduesgitre afskrækker på en effektiv måde tyven. Til samme formål har vi også en UFO – en smart forsikringsanbefalet ekstralås til varerummet, der er dirkefri og næsten umulig at bryde op.
Også vores 5Fleet-system samt DIIMS materielsporing kan sætte en stopper for tyveri, da de hurtigt afslører positionen på det værktøj og materiel, der har fået en tracker monteret.

Derudover kan vi tilbyde produkter som LED-blitz, arbejdslamper og lygtebroer samt varerumsadskillelser der beskytter ved hårde opbremsninger.

Endelig er vi lagerførende i produkter til bilindretning. Her producerer vi selv gulve samt sidepaneler og markedsfører desuden basisreolsystemer.

Med perlerækken af produkter når vi hele vejen rundt og sikrer ambitionen om at være den foretrukne udstyrsleverandør til den professionelles varevogn!

Vi glæder os til at servicere jer fremover!

Du kan finde os her:

Telefon: 45+ 58 10 12 00

Name: AQUARIUS
Description:
Distribuidora de produtos para veículos automotores
45 Anos - Distribuindo as melhores marcas do Seguimento: 

Teve início em maio de 1979, no município de São João da Boa Vista. Fundada com o objetivo de oferecer produtos e serviços de qualidade no setor de derivados de petróleo, a empresa logo se destacou pela sua excelência no atendimento aos clientes e pela busca constante por inovação e parcerias de sucesso.

Em 1994, a Aquarius tornou-se o terceiro Distribuidor franqueado Shell a ser inaugurado no Brasil e o primeiro no Estado de São Paulo, consolidando ainda mais sua posição de destaque no mercado de combustíveis. Com a parceria, a empresa passou a oferecer produtos de alta qualidade e tecnologia de ponta para atender as necessidades de seus clientes.

Em julho de 2011, a Aquarius expandiu ainda mais sua atuação, tornando-se Distribuidor MICHELIN nos segmentos leve e caminhonetes. Com essa nova parceria, a empresa passou a oferecer pneus de alta qualidade para atender as necessidades dos seus clientes em diversas áreas.

Em 2012, a empresa consolidou sua aptidão por representar marcas premiuns estabelecendo uma parceria com o grupo CHEVRON BRASIL LUBRIFICANTES (TEXACO), expandindo ainda mais seu portfólio de produtos de alta qualidade. Essa parceria durou até setembro de 2022, trazendo ainda mais experiência e tecnologia para a Aquarius.

Em novembro de 2022, quando a empresa estabeleceu uma nova parceria no mercado, agora com a YPF. Com essa nova parceria, a empresa amplia ainda mais sua atuação no mercado de derivados de petróleo e passa a oferecer produtos de alta qualidade para seus clientes.

Em 2023, mais uma grande conquista: a Aquarius foi premiada como a maior distribuidora nacional da marca de pneus BFGoodrich.

Ao longo de sua história, a Aquarius sempre se destacou pela sua busca constante por inovação, tecnologia de ponta e parcerias de sucesso, oferecendo sempre produtos e serviços de alta qualidade para atender as necessidades de seus clientes.
Location: São Joao da Boa Vista, São Paulo

Description:

The company began importing mineral oils for automobiles in 1953. (from the American Sconi Vacuum Company). The first fuel station was established on Faisal Street, the most 
influential street in Nablus in the same year. The western station was then established in Ard Al-Ghazalia.

Our areas of expertise:
1.  Petrol stations in the most vital places in Nablus.
2.  High-quality mechanical oils and lubricants of various brands.
3.  Spare parts for various types of vehicles of various brands with high quality.
4.  Car accessories and perfumes.
5.  Vehicle care products.

Mineral oil development occurred when the company began importing oils and lubricants for various types of vehicles from numerous brands in 2011. Since 2016, a line of products 
has been developed that includes vehicle spare parts and accessories, as well as some types of car perfumes, from the world's leading spare parts manufacturers.

To be more accessible to our customers, the company has opened an exhibition to sell lubricants and spare parts in a strategic location in the heart of the vital 
Nablus Street / Faisal Street.

We are fully prepared to provide lubricants and original spare parts for your vehicles and those of your employees, in addition to the following services:
Providing the best international oils based on the recommendations of the vehicle's parent company.
The possibility of sending our employee to receive your vehicle and have it examined in approved centers through specialized technicians.
After receiving and examining, we offer you the best quotations for the finest original products based on the recommendation of experts

Name: Ultimate Battery Company Ltd
Description:
We are energy storage technology innovators, founded in 2017.

Together with our customers and supply chain partners, we are accelerating the drive to Net Zero.

UBC batteries enable any vehicle to become greener, because our product solutions are lighter and more energy dense than traditional products. 

Our flagship first-generation modular batteries are drop-in replacements enabling automotive manufacturers to reduce on-board weight by up to 12-15kg and save up to 15kg of CO2 emissions per vehicle per year.

When applied to energy storage applications, our technologies enable anyone (from large industrial conglomerates to home-owners) to economically save generated power for later use.

With close to 50 years’ experience within the industry, we offer a complete vehicle conversion service from essential racking systems and flooring to vehicle electrics and van livery. Description:
SEP is a production company which makes plastic components. Our company specialises in thermoplastic blow moulding, suction blow moulding and injection moulding technologies, assembling intermediate products into finished products or assemblies and testing the systems in a vehicle. Company SEP manufactures in two locations; in Europe (Slovenia) and Russia (Togliatti).

The key activity of our company is manufacturing component parts for entire windscreen washer and headlamp cleaning system for vehicles. Today we can provide our customers complete washing/cleaning function for any type of vehicle, as our products are used in a number of car makers. Moreover, we offer separate components for air-conditioning and ventilation systems in vehicles - HVAC & engine ducts Air Intake.

By maintaining good performance and investing into knowledge we have become supplier-development company. Our knowhow obtained through years of company's growth and development enables us to market product which are based on selected technologies. By further investing into research and development we provide our customers with everything they need today and for the future.

Ensuring supply of items in the right quality, in customary packaging, to the required place, at the right time and of proper quality are key guidelines for operational logistics in company SEP. Our strategic guidelines with regard to logistics planning are in line with up-to-date logistics trends, economic goals and ensuring minimum environmental impact.

We maintain quality at the highest level. As holders of  IATF 16949:2016 and ISO14001:2015 certificates, we can meet different needs of car manufactures by all standards. Our pursuit of the idea of having zero errors has led us through years of process control development to the results we are seeing today, which ranks our company at the very top of automotive suppliers with regard to quality.

Name: Point Zero
Description:
Point Zero develops advanced automotive technologies focused on sustainability and performance. Our main product, the Zero-Emissions Driving System (ZEDS), is an innovative braking solution that eliminates particulate emissions. ZEDS combines an electric motor with a magnetorheological brake, meeting and exceeding upcoming brake particulate emission regulations for a cleaner, safer urban environment.

Spin-off from Politecnico di Torino, born in the Innovative Electric and Hybrid Vehicles research group, Point Zero holds multiple patents and is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of zero-emissions mobility. Our products are designed to enhance vehicle safety and performance with advanced control systems, extended lifespan, rapid response times and modular design, making them a perfect choice for the vehicle tomorrow.

At Point Zero, we are committed to leading the transition to sustainable mobility. Join us in revolutionizing the automotive industry and driving the future of clean technology. Let's break through the future!

Our product portfolio consists of 1000 plus products covering NVH Applications, Torsional Vibration Dampers, Suspension Products and Allied Ranges for the 3 wheeler, Passenger car (PCR), Light Commercial Vehicles (LCV) and the recent introduction for Heavy Commercial Vehicle (HCV) segments.

AMG Corporation is a part of a 35-year-old reputed Automobile Group. The Group has 5 business divisions in its portfolio-

# Automotive Rubber Parts Distribution in Indian Automotive Aftermarket.
# Authorized Distributors of Ford & Mobis Genuine Parts in Maharashtra & Goa.
# Authorized Dealership of Hyundai Motors India Limited in Pune.

We are driven by our value of Quality Excellence. Our consistent focus on the quality of our products has helped us to grow our business significantly over the last few years.

Over the 10 years of Premier Plus brand, we have shipped 80 million pieces with only less than 0.2% field complaints. We have also consistently delivered as per our customer’s orders with an order fulfillment rate of over 95%.

Premier Plus products are currently available across 1500 retail counters pan India. We are highly focused on our mission of increasing Range, Reach & Results and are poised to grow 3 times by CY 2022.

In the rubber suspension product category, Premier Plus is a leading brand in 3-wheeler segment, emerging as preferred brand in LCV segment and is among the top brands in 4-wheelers segment.

Name: OPAŞ Otomotiv Platinleri San. Ve Tic. A.Ş.
Description: Founded in Istanbul in 1974, OPAŞ has continued its steady development since then and has become one of the companies that the Turkish automotive sub-industry can be proud of. The company, which produced automotive ignition systems in its early days, has continuously expanded its product range and has reached the technology and manpower to produce all types of ignition system elements found in modern vehicles. Its main products currently include distributor and magneto platinums, distributor caps, various types of capacitors, spark plug cable sets and distribution reels, heavy-duty induction coils, new generation ignition coils, sensors, lambda sensors, and air flow meters. OPAŞ, which continued its production by obtaining a license (know-how) from the German DODUCO KG DR. E. Dürrwachter company in 1982, has thus become the most important ignition system manufacturer in the world markets. As a result of this relationship that continued with mutual trust until 1996, the complete facility in Germany was purchased by OPAŞ with the agreement to transfer production and the facility was brought to Turkey, and later Doduco was purchased by BERU A.G., another important company in Germany, and as a result of the continuation of the same agreement, OPAŞ became a long-term supplier of BERU A.G. Later, as a result of the merger of BERU A.G. and BorgWarner, OPAŞ became a supplier of BorgWarner BERU Systems GmbH with the same conditions. While OPAŞ was a supplier of BorgWarner BERU Systems GmbH for many years, it has been continuing as a supplier of Federal Mogul Aftermarket GmbH since 2013. As a result of its management philosophy that has not compromised on quality since the first day, our company has been certified by Bureau Veritas with ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System Certificate and ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management System Certificate and continues its planned work especially on Total Quality Management.

Name: Picksons Plc Group
Description:
The Picksons Plc Group incorporates Picksons, Fleetwheel Ltd, Farbex Refinish (UK) Ltd and CSD Friction Ltd. We are an independent, family run business that since beginning trading in 1979, has grown to become the region’s leading supplier of truck, trailer and bus spare parts and accessories, with twelve depots, over 200 staff and £35m+ turnover a year.

With the latest technology in parts identification and cataloguing, and backed by leading Original Equipment suppliers, Picksons and Fleetwheel have the range and quality of parts in stock to keep fleets on the road. The range of products we offer is constantly expanding and adapting to meet the requirements of our customers, ensuring we can cater for any make of truck, trailer or bus.

Farbex is our specialist industrial, commercial paint and coatings business. We manufacturer and supply premium paints, coatings and ancillary products to leading businesses in the automotive, motorcycle, commercial, plant and engineering sectors, throughout the UK.

Our subsidiary, CSD Friction, specialises in the wholesale supply of brake shoes, linings and friction materials to automotive factors throughout the UK. Whether it’s for truck, trailer, bus, coach, motorcycle, car, hoist or crane, we are able to source even the rarest and hard to find brakes.

Our knowledgeable and experienced staff offer a local, fast and friendly service from our depots, which span the South West and South Wales. Our aim is to continuously build strong relationships with customers and suppliers, to ensure we offer the best service possible at the most competitive prices.

Picksons and Fleetwheel are members of the ICD national supply group, which has been a major factor in the group’s development allowing national contracts to be serviced at a local level. They are both also members of the IFA Buying Group, ensuring they get the best market deals and pricing.

We are always on the look out for experienced and motivated CV parts people.

Name: Grudem. Grupo de Desarrollo Empresarial
Description:
En Grudem somos pioneros en la innovación en materiales compuestos ecológicos, ligeros y con una gran resistencia estructural a partir del papel y cartón como principal materia prima. Somos especialistas en tecnología de estructuras de nido de abeja que pueden utilizarse en múltiples aplicaciones para diversas industrias. Con más de 25 años de experiencia hemos consolidado una sólida reputación en la industria de la automoción, artes gráficas, embalaje y construcción.

Nos dedicamos activamente a la investigación y desarrollo, siendo líderes en España en la producción de honeycomb composites con poliuretano. Su uso abarca desde soluciones para interiores de automóvil, hasta soluciones a medida para embalajes y protección de mercancías, soportes para impresión digital publicitaria, o paneles de encofrado perdido para la construcción gracias a su gran resistencia y compresión.

Nuestra contribución al sector automotriz es significativa; fabricamos piezas interiores para las principales marcas, como suelos de carga, bandejas de separación, recubrimientos de maletero y paneles interiores.

En nuestra fábrica de 12.000 m2 integramos todo el ciclo de diseño, desarrollo, fabricación y distribución. Contamos con líneas de producción automatizadas y un equipo humano multidisciplinar, altamente cualificado y apasionado por impulsar nuestra misión de transformar la industria con tecnología innovadora y funcional.

Cultivamos una cultura empresarial centrada en el compromiso y la colaboración, valores fundamentales para nuestro equipo y clientes. Fomentamos la creatividad y el crecimiento profesional, impulsando un entorno donde florecen las ideas innovadoras. Name: KBB Automotive
Description:
KBB Seating adalah kekuatan utama di balik solusi kursi otomotif generasi mendatang. Kami bangga dengan komitmen kami terhadap inovasi, yang telah menetapkan standar baru dalam kualitas dan kenyamanan dalam industri otomotif. Kami membangun masa depan kursi otomotif.

Visi kami adalah menjadi pusat inovasi global di sektor otomotif, merevolusi cara orang berinteraksi dengan kendaraan mereka melalui solusi kursi yang luar biasa. Kami berambisi untuk menginspirasi dunia dengan tingkat kenyamanan dan keamanan yang belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya.

Inovasi adalah darah kita. Kami menciptakan produk yang menentukan tren baru dalam industri otomotif. Anda dapat terlibat dalam proyek-proyek revolusioner yang membentuk ulang masa depan mobilitas.

Kami percaya bahwa bakat adalah aset terbesar kami. Kami menawarkan kesempatan pembelajaran dan pengembangan berkelanjutan. KBB Seating adalah tempat di mana staf dapat membangun karier yang memuaskan.

KBB Seating adalah tempat di mana Anda dapat berkontribusi pada masa depan yang cerah dan inovatif dalam industri otomotif. Kami dengan antusias menantikan bakat terbaik untuk menjadi bagian dari perjalanan kami menuju kesuksesan.

Next Generation Wheel Safety Products

Maintenance fundamentals remain, early identification and resolution of potential failure dramatically improve fleet efficiency and safety. Products which do not provide clear early identification compromise these very basic rules, we only design high quality products which address the best visual identification concepts. Our sales team continue to develop global relationships with distributors who share these values and welcome your enquiries.

Além de chavetas, a Rezler produz, desde 2020, com a mesma atenção e qualidade, peças usinadas em centros e tornos CNC. Nossos Centros de Usinagem possuem eixos de até 1020x520x540 (XYZ), e nossos tornos atendem diâmetro de até 280mm e 350mm de comprimento.

Name: STEDI
Description:
At STEDI, we are driven by a passion for designing and manufacturing the highest-quality LED lighting products in the industry, offering them at prices that are accessible to all.

Since our inception in 2013, STEDI has aimed to lead the way in high-performance LED automotive auxiliary lighting. Central to our success is our unwavering dedication to creating premium LED driving lights that deliver exceptional performance without compromising on affordability.

Our cutting-edge manufacturing, design, and testing processes ensure that our LED driving lights are on par with the industry's most respected brands in both performance and quality. 

With 100% of our inventory housed at our fulfillment headquarters in Melbourne, Australia, we maintain complete control over our supply chain and fulfillment operations. This allows us to guarantee same-day dispatch, ensuring our customers receive their orders swiftly.

**QUALITY THAT ENDURES.**  
STEDI is synonymous with innovative design and industry-leading performance. Our relentless commitment to pushing the boundaries of durability and functionality has established us as a globally recognized and highly sought-after brand, proudly crafted in Australia. Where others may focus on the details, for us, every detail matters. We obsess over even the smallest design elements to create visually stunning, high-performing lighting solutions. When you choose STEDI, you’re investing in a product meticulously engineered with our expertise and state-of-the-art tooling, backed by our reputation and robust warranty.

**YOUR OEM/ODM PARTNER OF CHOICE.**  
Whether in the locomotive, mining, or automotive sectors, we invite you to tap into our design and production capabilities. Our expertise spans a wide range of services, including Printed Circuit Boards, Die Cast Parts, Extrusions, Injection Molding, Sheet Metal Fabrication, and Rapid Prototyping. We are ready to help bring your vision to life.

Basés à Plérin, et armés d'une expérience solide dans le domaine, nous équipons, aménageons et sécurisons

l'espace de chargement de vos véhicules utilitaires, toutes tailles, toutes marques.

Soucieux de votre satisfaction, notre rôle de conseil saura vous aiguiller afin d'équiper votre véhicule

de manière cohérente, en tenant compte de votre activité, vos problèmatiques, et vos besoins.

Protections et meubles bois, galeries de toit, signalisation, accessoires ou autres équipements de sécurité,

nous vous proposons et installons au sein de nos ateliers une large gamme de produits afin de faciliter votre quotidien.

Nous restons à votre disposition pour toutes demandes de renseignements complémentaires.

Name: Ferramentaria Solução
Description:
Atuando no setor metal mecânico, a FERRAMENTARIA SOLUÇÃO é uma empresa especializada em projeto e construção de ferramentais progressivos, transferizados, tandem, dispositivos de controle, peças protótipos e maquinas especiais.

Há 20 anos no mercado valorizamos o respeito, honestidade e compromisso com nossos clientes, fornecedores e colaboradores.

A garantia de sucesso do nosso trabalho, é o constante investimento em tecnologia e a manutenção de uma equipe experiente, competente e altamente qualificada.

Name: NTL Motorsports
Description:
Our expertise is in machining and our passion is in motorsports.

We are both an authorized distributer and custom manufacturer of motorsports vehicle components.

Name: KTH Manufacturing - Shelburne
Description: KTH is a responsible member of society producing excellent quality performance products at a reasonable price. KTH Shelburne is Dufferin County's largest employer! Our goal is to be involved with and support the community. To become a part of our team, check out our careers page!

Name: Elektrokontakt México
Description:
Desde 2001, Elektrokontakt México se ha dedicado a la fabricación de arneses automotrices para chasis, motor y sistema de frenos ABS, así como ensambles y componentes eléctricos (sensores y válvulas) producidos en nuestras plantas de Piedras y Sabinas.
Elektrokontakt es parte de Nexans autoelectric; como proveedor de sistemas y desarrollo, piensa en el futuro en cuanto a tecnología inteligente y desarrolla la movilidad del mañana, junto con los principales fabricantes de automóviles.
Con nuestros juegos de cables y componentes del sistema de cableado del vehículo, estamos muy comprometidos con el rendimiento del vehículo.

Name: Beydemir Sac Profil San. ve Tic. A.Ş.
Description:
Otomotiv imalat sanayi de 30 yılı aşkındır hizmet vermekteyiz.Müşterilerimizin istifleme ve stoklama alanındaki en iyi çözüm ortağı olmak için hergün kendimizi geliştirmeye devam etmekteyiz.
Ayrıca bünyemizde ticari araçlar ve trailer yedek parça üretimi bulunmaktadir.Dünyanın lider firmalarının A sınıf tedarikçilerindeniz.
Bir diğer alanımız ise Kumlama makinası imalatımız bulunmaktdır.Sektörün en köklü makina imalatçılarındanız.Aynı zamanda  fason kumlama tesisimizde bulunmaktadır.
Üretim kapasitemizin %35-40 lık kısmıını ihracat oluşturmaktır.

Name: LEONI Ukraine
Description:
LEONI — це глобальний постачальник продуктів, рішень і послуг для управління енергією та даними в автомобільній промисловості. Група компаній налічує близько 86 000 працівників у 21 країні та досягла консолідованого виторгу в розмірі 3, 9 мільярдів євро у 2025 році (без урахування колишнього підрозділу Automotive Cable Solutions).

Партнерство між LEONI та Luxshare Group набуло чинності з середини 2025 року.

Перший завод LEONI в Україні було відкрито у 2002 році в м. Стрий. У 2017 році відкрито завод у м. Коломия, який став найбільшим інвестиційним проєктом у Івано-Франківській області за останні 25 років. Разом ми виготовляємо кабельні мережі до всесвітньовідомих автомобільних брендів та налічуємо більше 4000 працівників.

Name: Mana Innovation Center
Description:
عصر ظهور ایده های مانا یک مرکز نوآوری است و در جهت خلق نوآوری، ارتقاء و توسعه فناوري و برطرف کردن نیازهاي فناورانه روز و آینده در حوزه طراحی و ساخت سیستم های پیشرفته الکترونیکی خودرو فعالیت می کند. 
ما توانسته ایم با ایجاد زیرساخت های فناورانه روز، مشاوران، متخصصان با تجربه و نخبگان دانشگاهی در محیطی پویا، علمی و نوآورانه گرد هم آوریم و در اجرای پروژه های خود از روشها، فرایندها و ابزارهای روز دنیا استفاده نماییم.
مرکز نوآوری مانا برای افزایش کیفیت محصول و انطباق طراحی با نیازمندیهای آن، از همان فاز اول طراحی برنامه ریزی کرده برای تضمین کیفیت محصول و کسب حداکثر رضایت مشتری، در هرکدام از حوزه های مدیریت، کنترل پروژه، مستندسازی، طراحی و تولید از زمان آغاز طرح تا تحویل آن به مشتری، برنامه دقیق و مشخصی دارد.
صداقت، خلاقیت، سخت کوشی و اخلاق از مهمترین ارزشهای سازمانی این شرکت است. ما کارکنان خود را به عنوان ارزشمندترین دارایی خود می دانیم و افزایش کیفیت زندگی آنان، ارتقاء جایگاه رقابتی شرکت و بهبود توان علمی و صنعتی ایران در جهان از اهداف اصلی ماست.

Name: Febest Europe Distribution OU
Description:
Febest Europe Distribution is the official FEBEST group car parts supplier for Europe and North Africa. 
FEBEST is known for its deep assortment of rubber-to-metal parts in the independent aftermarket for Japanese and Korean cars. The company specializes in production of suspension parts - repair kits and hard-to-find components. Parts for European and American cars are also available. FEBEST online catalog features over 14 200 parts for Suspension, Steering, Clutch and Brake systems, Engine systems, Transmission and Body. 
Wholesale deliveries take 1 – 8 business days within Europe. Loyalty programs are supported. 
Visit febest.eu to reach online catalog and wholesale web shop. 
FEBEST is TecAlliance Certified Data Supplier.

Name: Hellermanntyton Monterrey
Description:
Somos una empresa de origen alemán, como miembros de la zona Norteamérica, nuestro corporativo se localiza en Milwaukee, Wisconsin; con más de 5,000 empleados a nivel mundial y presencia en más de 38 países, ofreciendo una estabilidad financiera y una empresa bien definida, además de una cultura de trabajo enriquecedora y divertida.

En HellermannTyton Monterrey somos fabricantes líderes y proveedores de productos para la fijación, instalación, conexión, aislamiento, protección e identificación de cableado para la industria automotriz. Nuestros principales clientes finales son BMW, Tesla y General Motors.

Name: UEM Pistons (United Engine & Machine Co.)
Description:
United Engine & Machine Co. (UEM Pistons) is a cast & forged piston manufacturing company. UEM is family owned and operated and is now in its 4th generation of leadership with over 100 successful years in business. Headquartered in Carson City Nevada, the company has global manufacturing capability and proudly serves multi generational employees in the US, Mexico, and India. 

UEM offers a complete line of OE replacement and high performance/race racing Pistons. Some brands you may recognize are, Icon Forged Pistons, KB Hypereutectic Pistons, KB Motorcycle Pistons, Dualoy Diesel Pistons, and the long-standing flagship brand Silv-O-Lite for aftermarket OE replacement pistons. Through its industry partners, UEM is additionally starting to offer its own line of piston rings.

Name: Jrone Turbocharger System
Description:
Jrone Turbocharger System is the Aftermarket brand of Easyland, the professional turbocharger and turbocharger component manufacturer in China. 

Jrone Turbocharger System has a vast range of products which covers originally manufactured parts, including Garrett, Holset, Borg Warner (Schwitzer/3K), Komatsu, Mitsubishi, IHI, Toyota and Hitachi.
We currently supply more than 1200 types of cartridges and spare parts for customers in over 100 countries worldwide.

Jrone Turbocharger System can also supply more than 700 complete turbochargers at present.

Jrone Turbocharger System has a very strict quality control system to make sure our products are of the very highest quality. 
a.	ISO9001 certificate achieved in 2008 
b.	IATF16949 certificate achieved in 2015.
c.	Professional R&D Team to ensure fast development of new products.
d.	All Jrone products have 12 months warranty.

Jrone Turbocharger System not only focuses on product diversity and quality, but also values the service to our customers. We have vast quantities of stock to ensure a high percentage of orders are fulfilled first time.

Moreover, we are building a Jrone distributor network in most countries which will help realize localization of Jrone’s high-quality product and superior service.

Jrone’s success cannot flourish without your support. Jrone will do its utmost to fulfill your expectations.

Name: Altos Radar
Description: To accelerate the development and implementation of 4D Imaging Radar technology in driver-assisted and fully autonomous driving systems

Name: Union Moldes
Description:
Situada em Joinville, o maior pólo industrial do estado de Santa Catarina, e também um dos maiores pólos de fabricação de moldes do Brasil, carrega consigo mais de 20 anos de experiência na fabricação de moldes para injeção de plástico e alumínio. Com uma equipe técnica altamente qualificada, e com equipamento de precisão, a Union entrega a seus clientes moldes com uma qualidade indiscutível.

Com uma equipe conhecida no mercado brasileiro por sua capacidade técnica, a Union tem em sua cultura interna a busca por inovação, conhecimento e tecnologia, e está sempre pronta a encarar desafios e entregar soluções que tragam vantagens aos seus clientes.

Seriedade, compromisso com o cliente e com os colaboradores são os ingredientes da receita de sucesso da Union, que a torna forte no mercado brasileiro de ferramentarias. Os seus clientes podem ter a certeza de que somente materiais confiáveis serão utilizados na fabricação dos moldes, e que profissionais capacitados irão lhes entregar produtos e soluções que farão a diferença em seu processo produtivo.

Name: Wastebuilt Environmental Solutions
Description:
Wastebuilt provides OEM and aftermarket parts, equipment and repair services to the refuse industry and fleet operators across the U.S. We operate 15 U.S. locations in Arizona, California, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Kentucky, Massachusetts, North Carolina, Ohio, Texas, and Wisconsin. 

Our mission is to be the go-to source for high-quality waste and recycling equipment, OEM and aftermarket parts, and services for fleets across the U.S.

Name: CMP AUTOMOTIVE GROUP
Description: We are a Group that designs and manufactures Anti-Vibration systems, Sealing systems, Module Assemblies and Plastic Compounding for Cable Coating for Automotive Industry. Based on our extensive experience and our continuous development, we provide our clients with the most practical, reliable and environmentally friendly solutions that can be used anywhere in the world, through our global presence in Asia, America, Europe and Africa.

Name: MAP Automotive Group
Description:
Malta Auto Spare Parts was established in the year 2001, with the aim of providing high-quality products in the automotive sector.
Malta Auto Spare Parts is one of the leading Wholeseller and Distributor of high-quality automotive parts in the Middle East, Commonwealth of Independent States (CIS) and African markets, with a wide range of products mainly focusing on Japanese, Korean and American car brands.
Our Aim is to provide high quality products throughout the world and use our Expertise, Energy and Passion to provide premium Automotive Products of Superior Quality. Our Range of products is extensive and includes, but are not limited to Brake Pads, Shock Absorber, Rubber products, Suspension, Wheel Disc, Wheel Drum and Lubricants. We currently Employ more than 100 staff within the group, with the aim to achieve Customer Satisfaction and Business Excellence.

Name: Puig Hi Tech Parts
Description:
PUIG designs, manufactures and distributes its own products since 1964. The experience throughout these years is directly applied to each and every single product designed; for this reason, Puig has been able to acquire the trust of many professional riders and motorcyclists that have used and are using our products. 

Our commitment to plan, carry out, and distribute quality products, which are able to improve the OEM equipment of the motorcycle and motorcyclist on technology and safety performances, is achieved thanks to the sinergy of the PUIG team whose values are always related to the best product development.

The technolgy is, in this industry, a must, and from the very beginning PUIG has entrusted its future to it. On top of a continued improvement on quality product through technology integration, PUIG nowadays has a specialized department of design and development of new products, creating, adapting, and testing all new products that year by year are being included in our catalog.

Name: Mepsan Savunma Sanayi ve Otomotiv A.Ş.
Description:
Mepsan, 1985 yılından bu yana savunma sanayi ve otomotiv sektörlerine yönelik metal ve plastik parça üretmektedir.

Uzun yıllara dayalı üretim deneyimi, güvenilirliği, daimi kalitesi, geniş ürün yelpazesi, rekabetçi fiyat politikası, teknolojik yatırımlarıyla, müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutarak gelişmeye ve büyümeye devam etmiştir.

Kalıphane, metal şekillendirme, metal kaynağı, plastik parça üretimi konularında güçlü makine parkuruna sahiptir. Siparişten teslimata kadar olan tüm süreçlerde ERP yazılımını kullanmakta ve kalite ölçümlerini ise üç boyutlu CNC cihazlarla yapmaktadır.

İstanbul Hadımköy / Arnavutköy bölgesinde çalışmalarına devam eden Mepsan, metal ve plastik parça üretiminde ağırlıklı olarak savunma sanayi ve otomotiv sektörlerine hizmet vermektedir.

ISO 9001:2000 ve TS 16949 kalite belgelerine sahip olan Mepsan,kalite konusundaki sürekli iyileşme ve gelişme politikalarıyla Toplam Kalite Yönetimi çalışmalarını sürdürmektedir.

Mepsan; bugüne kadar olduğu gibi gelecekte de tüm projeleriniz için çözüm ortaklığı sunarak siz müşterilerinin güvenine layık olmaya çalışacaktır.

Name: Reich GmbH
Description:
Reich GmbH, with its production site in Mellrichstadt, sees itself as a leading manufacturer of vehicle parts and special ball bearings.

With an experience of more than nine decades, manufacturing tasks for the automotive industry, power tools and for apparatus and mechanical engineering are solved and manufactured in the highest and continuous product quality. On a production area of approx. 48,000 square meters, approx. 900 employees manufacture precision parts that are delivered to business customers worldwide.

Since the company was founded, Reich GmbH has been committed to its guiding principle and production concept with optimal training and advanced training and the latest technology for effective solutions. Investment in training and further education, as well as the constant modernization of the machine park and the technical systems are a guarantee for further success.

Name: JIT Truck Parts
Description:
JIT Truck Parts is a national aftermarket truck parts distributor. We know truck parts and have a dedicated team of professionals working to help our customers keep their trucks rolling. With distribution centers strategically located throughout the US, JIT Truck Parts offers customers premium parts from leading manufacturers - delivered any place, on time with a strong commitment to the most complete customer service experience in the industry.

Our success depends on hiring the best team. We have a wide variety of opportunities for anyone who is passionate about delivering great products and exceptional service to our customers.

Name: GLOBAL FAP
Description:
Company specialized in remanufactured Euro 6 Catalytic Converters and Particulate Filters. We help dealers and fleets to reduce the high costs of new products.

We have a large stock of remanufactured catalytic converters and DPF'S for all brands (Iveco, Volvo, Renault, Man, Daf, Scania and Mercedes).
 
We maintain a close relationship with the most reliable transport companies, which allows us to offer the best delivery times to our customers all over Europe.

In the last year we have made a commitment to bring our products to other countries. 
We have customers in France, Italy, Germany, Switzerland, Belgium, the Netherlands, Denmark, Norway, Hungary and Estonia. 

We are currently about to open a new office in Germany, which will allow us to reduce delivery times in Central European countries.

All our products are certified and come with a two-year warranty, which allows us to clearly differentiate ourselves as the preferred alternative for our customers.

We are a committed team, in constant contact with our customers, to offer them the solutions they demand. We seek to maintain long-lasting relationships based on trust with the companies we work with.

If you are looking for a reliable, close and serious supplier for Catalytic Converters and Particulate Filters contact us. We will be pleased to help you.

Name: Niterra South Africa
Description:
Niterra (formerly NGK SPARK PLUG) is one of the leading automotive and technical ceramics suppliers. With its corporate headquarters in Nagoya, Japan, the company has sales organisations and production facilities all over the world. The automotive side of the company specialises in the fields of ignition and vehicle electronics technology, supplying Original Equipment customers across the globe. At the same time, the company is transforming its organisation and business portfolio in more sustainability-driven directions. Four business fields have been identified for this purpose: Mobility, Medical, Environment & Energy and Communications. With around 16,100 employees, the company’s automotive and technical ceramics activities generate a total annual turnover of around 3.8 billion Euros worldwide. Niterra’s EMEA sales represent 27% of this global turnover. 

Niterra has seen significant growth across the Aftermarket since expanding beyond motorcycle parts and into the automotive sector in the 1970s. The company is renowned for its outstanding commitment to quality, technology and research & development. The product portfolio of its NGK Ignition Parts brand comprises spark plugs, glow plugs, ignition coils, leads & caps. Its NTK Vehicle Electronics brand offers oxygen sensors (including NOx sensors), exhaust gas temperature sensors (EGTS), exhaust gas recirculation (EGR) valves, mass air flow (MAF) and manifold absolute/boost pressure (MAP) sensors as well as engine speed and position sensors. From its regional headquarters in Ratingen, Germany, Niterra serves the Aftermarket across Europe, the Middle East and Africa. In the EMEA region, the company has six regional companies and around 840 employees. 

Imprint: https://www.ngkntk.com/imprint/

Name: Ecomotive Solutions Srl
Description:
We operate in the field of electronic engine control systems for alternative fuels and renewable energies, offering qualified training and timely assistance all over the world.
 
We design bi-fuel, dual-fuel and full gas solutions with Made in Italy technologies and products for automotive, off-road, railway, marine and energy production.

Modern logistics in all its forms today require sustainable solutions with a high technological profile, which is why we have developed an ecosystem of products and services that can satisfy every type of need.

Dual-fuel, Bi-fuel, Full Gas mode not only confers added value in all sectors in environmental terms thanks to a significant reduction in CO2 emissions, but also represents the achieving an important competitive advantage in terms of reducing logistics costs.

Name: RUFRE Diesel Injection
Description:
We are a company of large tradition and huge experience in Diesel systems. Since 1958 we have always kept intact the spirit of service and continual innovation that we has always had, opening our new premises for Common Rail systems in March 2011. These premises enable the assembly of C.Rail injector and pump parts in an ISO 6-certified controlled-atmosphere cleanroom.

Rufre is the Official Service and Technology Partner for the main manufacturers of injection systems: Bosch, Delphi, Denso, Vdo (Continental-Siemens Vdo), Stanadyne etc. and following their procedures and guidelines to the letter, we carry out Testing, Diagnosis, Repair, Exchange, Inspection and Guarantee Management services, selling Spare Parts and Repaired Units for Diesel Injection Systems to professionals in the industry. 

For more information about our services and our product range, please visit our website: www.rufre.com

Description:
SINGHAL SINTERED PRIVATE LIMITED an IATF 16949 , ISO 14001:2015 Certified Co. established in 2007 , headquartered in Kosi Kalan, District Mathura, Uttar Pradesh , India, with a crystal-clear vision for manufacturing ferrous and non ferrous sintered powder metal parts for application in Automotive, Agricultural Equipments, Railways, Home Appliances, Engineering & Telecom Industry.

Description: Golde Puebla is a manufaturing plant located in Mexico and dedicated to roof systems production for the Automotive sector. It is specialized in Glass Encapsulation and Roof Assembly processes.

Name: Pedal Commander
Description:
At Pedal Commander, we develop to impress. Our mission is to build technology using our know-how from extensive motorsport- experience and foresight in planning. While specializing in innovations of the leading tuning brands and companies globally, we specialize in automotive performance-enhancing accessory parts such as Pedal Commander and Chipwerke. Our company has been in the automotive industry since 2010 and originated in Turkey.  The Result: Quality in excellent condition, to the delight of both tuners and consumers. We guarantee a performance that you can see and feel: With Pedal Commander, we make every vehicle a performance vehicle! Pedal Commander is available for Modern American Muscle cars, American Trucks, Domestic Cars, SUVs, import cars, off-road vehicles, side-by-side, etc.

Command your engine with Pedal Commander. Pedal Commander is a throttle response controller that removes delays in your electronic gas pedal. The faster the engine responds, the faster the car can accelerate. 
-Easy plug-and-play installation that takes minutes. 
-Does not void your vehicle's warranty or "flag" your ECU.
-Comes with 4 modes: Eco, City, Sport & Sport+. Each mode has 8 sensitivity levels to customize the response.
-Use Eco mode as a "valet mode" in your sports car or enhance fuel economy in trucks and off-road vehicles.
LIVE LIFE FULL THROTTLE

Name: STRUT
Description:
At STRUT, our collections are exclusively designed for automobile enthusiasts seeking to customize luxury vehicles. From the initial sketch to the final custom fitting, our designers strive to innovate and deliver the latest luxury accessories that perfectly complement your entire car.

STRUT epitomizes boldness and expert craftsmanship. We don't just refine vehicles; we transform them into something even more unique and luxurious. We undertake only a few collections yearly to ensure precision and quality because we understand that your time matters, from design to driveway.

Your car is a statement waiting to be made; say it with STRUT.

Name: Bottino Girardi
Description:
Quando senti parlare di Vespa o di Piaggio, quando sei dall’estetista e ti stai rilassando oppure quando stai utilizzando il tuo cellulare, allora stai parlando di Bottino Girardi!
Siamo una piccola azienda che radica le sue origini da oltre 60 anni nella cintura torinese, a Moncalieri. Essendo specializzati nella produzione di componenti in gomma ci puoi trovare nell’automotive, nel beauty & wellness, senza dimenticare il mondo dello sport e la produzione di macchinari destinati all’industria agro-alimentare. 
La nostra necessità di continua crescita, sempre alla ricerca di maggiore competitività, abbinata alla voglia di soddisfare le necessità di ogni singolo cliente, ci ha spinto ad entrare in contatto con diverse realtà di livello internazionale. Questo senza dimenticare la qualità e la sostenibilità dei nostri prodotti e del servizio che offriamo, andando a ridurre al minimo l’impatto ambientale, che per noi rappresenta l’obiettivo primario della nostra idea imprenditoriale.  
La caratteristica che più ci contraddistingue è la flessibilità, per cui facci sapere quali sono le tue esigenze e noi valuteremo come meglio soddisfarle!

Name: ZEDER Corporation
Description:
ZEDER Corporation is the merged entity of Fulcrum Suspensions &
Redranger (completed 29 Nov 2019).

Together Fulcrum & Redranger bring together many decades of local and global leadership in the Automotive Aftermarket.

Combined ZEDER is the world’s largest and leading manufacturer of automotive polyurethane bushings and related suspension components with operations in Australia, US, UK, and Vietnam.

In Australia, the merged entity is one of the largest automotive steering and suspension businesses in the country with Wholesale and Retail Workshop operations nationally.

The post-merger plan includes global expansion through consolidation (M&A), investment in innovation, technology, manufacturing, logistics, and our people to ultimately strengthen ZEDER Corporation’s global leadership role.

BEHIND THE NAME
Derived from the inspirational Frederick Zeder who was a pioneer of the automotive industry in the early 20th century. Fred Zeder was a renowned engineer and in partnership with Carl Breer and Owen Skelton designed what would become the 1924 “Chrysler Six”. 
The Chrysler Six was the first modern automobile with shock absorbers and bushings to isolate the engine/suspension components plus many other innovations. This vehicle was fundamental to Chrysler becoming a success and the “Three Musketeers” as they were later known went on to lead the industry for decades due to their engineering prowess. 
These three men represented innovation, technical leadership, and a pioneering spirit which aligns with ZEDER Corporation’s core values.

Name: Tyre Emissions Research Consortium
Description:
A group committed to understanding the environmental effects of tyre emisisons through independent research.

Core principles:

This group is open to anyone who associates with the following core principles:

1. Tyre particles and chemicals are shed in significant quantities into the environment.
2. Tyre particles can potentially pollute air, soil and water.
3. Tyres shed material across a wide size range from macro to ultrafine particles.
4. Tyres contain certain chemical compounds that are potentially toxic to human, animal and marine life.
5. The size and shape of tyre particles generated in the laboratory may not necessarily correlate with real-world emissions.

Name: BR-Performance
Description:
Spécialisé dans la préparation et l’optimisation moteur depuis plus de 15 ans, BR-Performance se positionne comme le leader du marché grâce à un réseau de franchise de 15 centres à travers l'Europe.

Grâce à notre expertise et à notre savoir-faire, nous proposons une large gamme de prestations pour améliorer le quotidien de nos clients :

- Augmentation des performances pour voitures, motos, bateaux, jet-skis, utilitaires et camping-cars
- Optimisation du fonctionnement des logiciels de boîte de vitesses automatiques
- Conversion des véhicules au bio-carburant (E85), avec ou sans augmentation de performance
- Suppression de bride de vitesse maximale, Start & Stop, et d'autres options liées au logiciel moteur
- Fourniture et installation de pièces de performance telles que les échappements, admissions d'air, échangeurs d'air, etc.
- Réalisation de diagnostics moteur avancés

Chez BR-Performance, toutes les cartographies moteurs sont réalisées sur mesure sur banc de puissance. Nos installations sont équipées d'un banc de puissance 4 roues motrices ainsi que d'un banc de puissance moto pour valider/certifier le bon fonctionnement des prestations réalisées. Nos ingénieurs motoristes diplômés traitent chaque véhicule de manière individuelle, en tenant compte des demandes et des souhaits des clients.

Notre service de recherche et développement travaille quotidiennement pour proposer des solutions adaptées aux nouvelles générations de véhicules qui arrivent sur le marché.

Description:
Orscheln Products supplies the world with innovative solutions. Established in 1946, Orscheln Products has built a reputation as the leading global supplier of motion control systems. Orscheln’s family of products has grown to include Park Brake Systems, Control Cables, Fluid Level Indicators (Dipsticks), Electronic Throttle Controls and Electronic Shift Controls. Orscheln Products also produces the Felsted line of heavy-duty Mechanical Cables, Foot Pedals, and Shifters. To further increase service to customers, Orscheln Products has a distributor cable assembly program, called F.A.S.T. , with over 110 locations worldwide. This program allows customers to receive Orscheln quality products in low volumes with a quick turnaround.

Orscheln Products customer groups include the on-highway, off-highway, aircraft, military, marine and specialty markets. Manufacturing and sales are headquartered in Moberly, MO. Orscheln Products is an ISO 9001: 2015 certified operating facility. Global manufacturing and sales facilities are located in Rugby, England, Chennai, India and Shanghai, China.

Our technical expertise and dedication to customer satisfaction have helped us build long-term relationships with our clients.

We are committed to sustainability and environmental stewardship. We employ eco-friendly production processes and use materials that are safe for the environment. We strive to minimize waste and reduce our carbon footprint in all aspects of our operations.

As a company, we believe in continuous improvement and innovation. We invest in research and development to stay ahead of industry trends and offer our clients the latest and most advanced polyurethane solutions. Our commitment to quality, customer service, and innovation has made us a preferred supplier of polyurethane components in the global market.

Thank you for considering Ally International as your partner for your polyurethane needs. We look forward to working with you to provide solutions that meet your unique requirements.

At AdaptFuture, we’re passionate about driving positive change in the automotive service sector. As an Education Technology company, we specialize in bridging the gap between traditional practices and the evolving demands of the industry.

 Our Focus:

•	Digital Diagnostics: Master the art of fault tracing complex automotive issues using cutting-edge tools.
•	Customer-Centric Service: Elevate customer satisfaction through effective communication and service excellence.

 Who We Serve:
•	Technicians: Enhance your skill set and stay competitive.
•	Service Managers: Lead your team with confidence.

Join us on this exciting journey as we revolutionize automotive education. 

Let’s drive progress together! 

#AdaptFuture #AutomotiveEducation #Empowerment

Description:
Durden Plastik Ürünler ve Yapışkan Film Tic. San. A.Ş, Dourdin Dekoratif Çözümler Grubu'nun bir parçasıdır ve uzmanlık alanı dekorasyon, işaretleme, tanımlama ve kişiselleştirme konularında uzmanlaşmıştır. 
Otomotiv, bisiklet ve motosiklet, kamyon, demiryolu, yeni mobilite, ev aletleri, spor ve eğlence pazarları için dekoratif işlevler (parçalar ve ilgili hizmetler) tasarlıyor ve üretiyoruz. 

1958 yılında litograf ve ressam André Dourdin tarafından kurulan şirket, başlangıçta matbaa ve sanat eserlerinin reprodüksiyonu olarak çalışmıştır. Yapısal evrimlere ve 1984'ten bu yana iştiraklerinin gelişimine paralel olarak, farklı yönetici nesilleri Sanat ve Endüstriyi birbirine bağlayan güçlü ve benzersiz bir kurumsal kültürü korumayı ve aktarmayı başardı. 

Bilgi birikiminin çaprazlığı: Dört kıtada ürettiğimiz ve teslim ettiğimiz parçalar ve dekorasyonlar, teknolojilerin bir kombinasyonunun ve aşağıdaki gibi tamamlayıcı bilgi birikiminin güçlü bir entegrasyonunun sonucudur - Filmlerin, teknik ve dekoratif laminatların üretimi ve dönüşümü - Termoform ve kesme - Plastik parçaların elektrolitik kromlanması - Alüminyum ve paslanmaz çelik şeritlerin dönüşümü (damgalama, kesme ve bitirme) - Eksiksiz bir bitirme ve baskı ve gravür teknikleri yelpazesi (serigrafi, dijital baskı, tampon baskı, sıcak damgalama, lazer) - Plastik Boyama 

Durden Plastik Ürünler ve Yapışkan Film Tic. San. A.Ş. – İSTANBUL
Durden Plastik Ürünler ve Yapışkan Film Tic. San. A.Ş. – BiLECiK
