With the aim of developing and growing its corporate structure, Koza Otomotiv constantly renews itself to catch up with the developing global competition environment and increasing high quality standards of sector. Within this context Koza Otomotiv will continue its growth by adding new OEM partnerships with sector leaders and global brands in the future.

Name: Excalibre Manufacturing
Description:
Excalibre Manufacturing Ltd - Commercial vehicle exhaust specialists. Supply, installation and maintenance of retrofit systems for CAZ & NRMM.

DPF cleaning for all bus and truck makes.

Remanufacture of Euro 6 exhaust systems.

Retrofit exhaust specialists for NRMM, truck and bus, DPF cleaning providers and technology experts in exhaust aftertreatment solutions.


Operating in the UK with Sales and Service locations in Gloucestershire, Essex and Manchester. Excalibre provides a fast , reliable and efficient service.

Name: Mobase Electronics India R&D Center @HYD
Description:
Mobase Electronics is an automobile parts manufacturer based in Korea.

Hyundai and Kia Motors are our main customers, and we do business with Volvo, FCA, Mahindra and many other automakers.
We operate factories in Korea, Chennai (India), Mexico, Poland, and China, and have research centers in Korea and India.

The Indian research center performs software development, verification, and evaluation through close cooperation with the Chennai plant and the head office research center.

We are recruiting employees to join us in order to become a global leading company with the world's best competitiveness by 2035 by expanding the global market and creating new growth engines.

Name: Zhejiang Zhengsheng Shock Absorber Co.,Ltd
Description:
Zhejiang ZhengSheng Shock Absorber Co., Ltd was founded in 2007 with a registered capital of 50 million yuan. The company covers an area of 60,000 square meters and employs more than 600 staff members, including over 50 R&D professionals. Specializing in automotive shock absorbers, ZhengSheng produces over 8,000 models to serve both domestic and international markets. The company has obtained IATF16949:2019 and ISO9001 quality management system certifications, ensuring consistent product reliability and quality.

With exports to more than 80 countries, ZhengSheng offers high vehicle coverage, original factory quality testing, and supports both OE and OEM production. Committed to providing high quality at competitive prices, the company ensures fast and reliable shipping to meet the diverse needs of global customers. Dedicated to technological innovation and continuous improvement, ZhengSheng continues to drive steady growth in the global automotive shock absorber market.

Name: ANSA TECH S.r.l.
Description:
AnsaTech produces exhaust systems for high performance cars, motorcycles and scooters, off-road applications and recreational products. AnsaTech manufactures hot and cold end, aftertreatment systems and aesthetics parts.
AnsaTech is a company of SAG Group

Name: Magneti Marelli Parts & Services en France
Description:
Magneti Marelli Parts & Services distribue des composants d’origine conçus et installés en première monte pour les principaux constructeurs automobiles, mais aussi des pièces de rechange de qualité équivalente aux pièces d’origine. 
De l’électronique à l’éclairage, en passant par les amortisseurs et le savoir-faire technique, nous sommes depuis toujours des leaders en matière de technologie.

Name: BoldTech Air Springs
Description:
BSS Bursa Süspansiyon Sistemleri Sanayi Ticaret A.Ş.  was established in 2020 in the main  industrial  centre of the automotive sector  in Bursa-Turkey  and started to produce for significant commercial  vehicle and axle manufacturers ''Boldtech'' branded  air suspension systems. BSS company, which is  started out with the principle of sustainable quality  products, is proud to offer its 30 years of  experience and knowledge in the Air Suspension  Systems sector for Turkey and to the worldwide  markets.

BSS was established entirely with domestic  capital and  5000 m2 closed area production facility. BSS, which is certified with ISO 9001 and ISO 14001  Environmental Management Systems Certificates in  the first year , has a production capacity of 1.000.000 Air Springs per annum.Combining its understanding  of quality and perfect service with the latest  technological investments under one roof, the  company aims to make the Boldtech brand a strong  player in the global market.

Name: SPORT SYSTEM
Description:
SPORT SYSTEM créée en 1999 est spécialisée dans la mise au point moteur. Son activité est essentiellement axée sur le développement et l’optimisation du rendement moteur dans les domaines de l'automobile, du poids-lourd, de l'agricole, et des engins spéciaux.

Située à Albi dans le Tarn à deux pas du circuit automobile et à 30 minutes de Toulouse, nos  bâtiments disposent d’équipements performants permettant à nos motoristes de développer des techniques de programmation spécifiques. Chaque secteur d'activité dispose de ses équipements dédiés.

15 années de recherche et de développement associées à un matériel performant dont un banc de puissance 4 roues motrices VL, un banc de puissance 6 roues poids-lourds, un banc de puissance pour machines agricoles nous permettent d’être présent dans tous les secteurs de notre profession. Nous intervenons aujourd’hui sur les voitures et les 4x4, mais également dans les secteurs du transport, de l’agricole, de l'industrie et du TP.

Notre savoir faire nous amène à travailler pour certains constructeurs dans le domaine de la compétition ou plus particulièrement sur du développement de moteurs adaptés à des usages agricoles ou à des travaux spécifiques de moteurs de courses en turbo diesel.

Desservi par l'autoroute A68, nos locaux de 500 m², proche du circuit, offrent une formidable capacité de développement et d'accueil pour tous nos clients.

La SARL certifiée ISO 9001:2008 et au capital de 390 000 €, s'est vue décerner le Prix "Stars et métiers" 2008 par la chambre des métiers du Tarn

Name: Nakamoto Industrial
Description: Founded by automotive professionals in 1980. Leading auto parts supplier in Asia with a worldwide presence.

Name: Ital Frenos
Description:
En 1972 nace Importadora Ital Frenos Limitada como una empresa familiar fundada por Don Federico Gheza Luscietti. 

La oportunidad de este emprendimiento fue satisfacer, en la Ciudad de Santiago, las soluciones que tuviesen relación con el sistema de frenos. El éxito fue inmediato y el crecimiento también, por esta razón se incorporan los hijos Stefano Gheza Canton y Franco Gheza Canton quienes, con la visión de nuevas generaciones, incorporan las áreas de repuesto e Ital Frenos.

Name: Brick Kiln Composites Limited
Description: Brick Kiln Composites is a carbon composite company operating out of Banbury, Oxfordshire - the heart of Motorsport Valley. Specialising in the manufacture of Formula One, and high-end automotive and motorsport parts.

Name: EFI Automotive Service
Description: In addition to its activities as a Tier 1 equipment supplier to the major car manufacturers, EFI Automotive has a department dedicated to the aftermarket. This department offers of course the ranges from the original equipment lines, but also its own production, thanks to a dedicated production site located in Joinville. This site of almost 5,500m², dedicated to the EFI Automotive group's Aftermarket activity, has more than a hundred employees who manufacture, stock and distribute EFI Automotive Service products. EFI Automotive Service is the specialist in ignition-related ranges - coils, harnesses, igniters, rotors, capacitors, etc. - and is also a specialist in the field of ignition systems. With nearly 50 years of experience in the field, its EFI Automotive Bougicord brand represents an essential reference figure. Our ranges are among the widest on the market, and each reference meets strict quality control criteria. As far as engine management is concerned, EFI Automotive is a Tier 1 OEM and a major player on the market. That is why, under its second brand, EFI Automotive Sensor, it is naturally taking advantage of this privileged position. Thus, we have crankshaft, camshaft, temperature, knock, MAP, FAP, ABS and lambda sensors. From its design office to its dynamic sales force, EFI Automotive Service has all the necessary assets to ensure a first-rate position among the Independent Aftermarket players. Far from being limited to the borders of France, EFI Automotive Service promotes its brands internationally, and can rely on the subsidiaries of the parent company as relay points for its development. To find our quality products, do not hesitate to find us on Tec Doc or on our website, where a hotline adviser will be happy to answer your questions.

Name: Enganches Aragón / TowCar
Description:
Enganches Aragón fabrica y vende enganches y kits electrónicos de automoción para todo tipo de vehículos desde 1992. Con la marca TowCar, comercializamos todo tipo de soluciones de transporte: portabicicletas, portaesquís, Towbox, portaequipajes, portamotos y portaperros. Contamos con un servicio de atención comercial y un servicio de asistencia técnica para resolver todas tus dudas de producto o montaje. 

Enganches Aragón se fundó en el año 1992. Somos una empresa familiar que lidera la fabricación y comercialización de enganches en España. Nuestra red de distribución está presente en más de 50 países de los cinco continentes.

En 2022, pusimos en marcha solo para nuestros clientes el proyecto ARAGÓN VISUAL, unos completos vídeos de montaje donde enseñamos paso a paso cómo instalar cada enganche y cada kit electrónico. Ya no habrá dudas a la hora de hacer un recorte en el paragolpes ni en el momento de conectar las funciones de alumbrado del vehículo con las del remolque. ARAGÓN VISUAL se completa con la APP Enganches Aragón, desde la que podemos realizar numerosas tareas de documentación e identificación de un enganche. 

En 2019, el Clúster de Automoción Aragonesa (CAAR) nos concedió el Premio RSE a la mejor pyme.   En 2018, conseguimos el Premio Innovación en Automechanika Frankfurt. 

Desde 2015, servimos enganches a primeros equipos (OEM) de automoción. En 2014 recibimos el Premio Pilot 2014 a la Excelencia Logística en la categoría de pymes. En 2012, la Cámara de Comercio e Industria de Zaragoza nos concedió el Premio a la Exportación.

Name: Emblems 3d USA
Description:
International company founded in 2004, with national and international business partners, production plant in Mexico, USA and Korea. Our company was born and built with young people with experience in the market, detecting a strong demand in the industry for High Quality emblems for the Automotive, Electronics, Nautical and Aerospace Industries.

In Mexico there are few and very few options, especially with a competitive level (Quality, Price and Service). Our company began to gain market share mainly due to our competitive prices and unbeatable QUALITY, we compete with Asian prices, we have won sales with our philosophy "Earn little and sell a lot" this ultimately translates into profitability by volume, so our customers and we win.

Focused on the Automotive, Electronics, Appliances, Furniture and Footwear Industry. 100% professional bilingual staff, with a minimum degree of bachelor's degree or engineering, All staff have more than 4 years of experience in our market.

We always seek to anticipate your needs. Due to their great flexibility and variety, our products can be easily adapted to meet your particular specifications and needs in terms of design, finish, size, number of colors and surface to adhere, no one can offer such a wide range of products in EMBLEMS: Today , we are your best option, check it out and give us a chance.

Name: DENSO Kirloskar Industries Pvt. Ltd.
Description: DENSO Kirloskar Industries Pvt. Ltd., located in Bengaluru, India, is a key manufacturing arm of DENSO Corporation. Established to cater to the Indian market, the company specializes in producing thermal products, including air-conditioning systems and engine cooling system components. DENSO Kirloskar serves major vehicle manufacturers across India, contributing to the automotive industry's growth with a focus on quality and innovation.

Name: Adrad
Description:
Adrad began as an Australian owned family company specialising in the manufacture, importation and distribution of quality radiators, automotive air-conditioning parts and other heat exchange products.

Over the years, Adrad moved towards the importation and distribution of complete radiators primarily for the passenger vehicle aftermarket segment.

Strategic acquisitions of allied businesses added OE manufacturing capabilities and engineering skills to our group as well as a more diverse customer base. With the support of shared resources and a team of dedicated long-term employees, Adrad grew stronger as a business.

The range of products available in copper, brass, aluminium and steel is the most extensive in Australia and New Zealand and Adrad provides excellence in service and delivery of product through its extensive network of warehouses.

Name: HEL Performance
Description:
Our system, which was the first fully swaged brake line in the UK marketplace, uses only the finest materials of stainless steel and titanium and refuses to use cheaper mild steel or aluminium which rust or corrode. Cost will never replace quality. Since the introduction of the system we have seen our competition bringing out their own versions of the swaged brake line system which strengthens our original decision to offer a tamper evident, safer, permanently attached brake line fitting to the marketplace. We feel that the industry has been taken forward by the instigation of our radical and exciting concepts and designs. We have made braking a safer and more advanced market place.

Our brake lines are used in Moto GP, World Superbikes (Official Technical Sponsor), British Super Bikes (Official Technical Sponsor), Isle Of Man TT, Northwest 200 and most series around the world and continue to win race after race, championship after championship.

First Manufacturer To Only Offer Stainless Steel Or Titanium Fittings

First Manufacturer To Offer Hose With Cover Already Adhered In Over 21 Colours

First Manufacturer To Offer Coloured Stainless Steel Fittings

First Manufacturer To Offer Lifetime Warranty

First Manufacturer To Offer Online Warranty Facility

First Manufacturer To Have A Facebook Presence

First Manufacturer To Have A YouTube Presence 

First UK Brake Line Manufacturer To Manufacture All Mainline Fittings In House On Our Own CNC Machines

Since starting this journey 25 years ago HEL Performance products have spread around the world. We pride ourselves on the fact that we do not have a single company representative on the road and instead have allowed the product to impress and extend itself around the globe. HEL Performance products are now available locally in over seventy one countries around the world covering five continents.

HEL Performance - Always Number One

Name: SANDEN CORPORATION
Description: Sanden group pursues the next generation of Air Conditioning System friendly to human being and the earth. Sanden group has quickly responded to the customer needs of vehicle electrification, so that its Automotive Air Conditioning System Products and the Compressor Products for Automotive Air Conditioning have been adopted by the auto makers, the construction machinery manufacturers, and the agricultural machinery manufacturers around the world

Name: Adient Automotive Romania
Description:
Adient (NYSE: ADNT), companie multinațională, de origine americană, este lider global în fabricarea de scaune auto. Cu aproximativ 75.000 de angajați în 33 de țări, Adient operează 208 fabrici de producție/asamblare în întreaga lume. Producem și livrăm scaune auto pentru toți producătorii OEM importanți. De la sisteme complete până la componente individuale, expertiza noastră se reflectă în fiecare pas al procesului de fabricare a scaunelor auto. Abilitățile noastre integrate, in-house, ne permit să luăm produsul de la etapa de cercetare și design, să îl urmărim pe întreg procesul, până la proiectare și fabricare – munca noastră regăsindu-se în 20 milioane de vehicule în fiecare an.

Suntem prezenți în România din anul 2000. Cu un număr total de peste 5.800 de angajați deținem cinci unități de producție: Jimbolia (armături metalice și mecanisme), Craiova (scaune auto complete), Poiana Lacului (spumă poliuretanică), Ploiești (tapițerii), Pitești (tapițerii).

Suntem o echipă de profesioniști cu inițiativă, a căror viziune țintește cele mai înalte standarde de performanță. Ne mândrim cu faptul că munca noastră este în acord cu cele mai noi tendințe în industrie. În echipa noastră ești parte din cea mai mare inițiativă de a îmbunătăți experiența unei lumi mereu în mișcare. Fiecare coleg este pentru noi, mai mult decât un foarte bun specialist. Apreciem în egală măsură caracterul, valorile comune și pasiunea pentru performanță care ne ajută să rămânem în topul liderilor globali din industria noastră.

Name: OUTBACKARMOUR
Description: Vehicle suspension for 4x4 Offroad Enthusiasts, Fleet, Armored Vehicles & Defence. Australian Designed and Engineered. #NeverGoAlone

Name: Chargebox Net
Description:
ChargeboxNet es una empresa de soluciones de carga para vehículos eléctricos, creemos que todas las personas merecen acceso a una carga confiable y accesible.
Nuestra red conecta estaciones ubicadas en puntos estratégicos del país: estaciones de servicio, supermercados, shoppings, hoteles, aeropuertos y espacios públicos.
Brindamos soluciones inteligentes para municipios, empresas, consorcios y hogares, permitiendo que más comunidades se sumen al futuro de la movilidad eléctrica.
Nuestra app permite localizar, activar, pagar y monitorear cargas de forma simple y segura.
 Tecnología, cercanía y compromiso con un futuro más limpio.

ChargeboxNet is an electric vehicle charging company that believes everyone deserves access to reliable and affordable EV charging.
Our network connects key locations across Argentina—fuel stations, supermarkets, malls, hotels, airports, and public spaces.
We provide smart solutions for cities, businesses, residential buildings, and homes, enabling communities to join the electric mobility future.
With our app, users can easily locate, activate, pay, and track their charging sessions in real time.
 Technology, accessibility, and a commitment to a cleaner future.

 www.chargeboxnet.com

Name: CAGATAY KABLO SAN. VE TIC. A.S.
Description:
Çağatay Kablo was established in 1998 and started manufacturing and supply of cable and electrical Systems for automotive industry. Since the day of our establishment, the importance we give to the quality was proven by received certificates.

Our efforts to ensure quality standards for our customers have eared us the “ISO / TS16949: 2009” and “ISO9001: 2008” certificates. We produce cables and electrical harnesses with world-class environment-friendly processes. Thanks to the processes and practices we carry out with the awareness of our environmental responsibility, we were entitled to receive the “ISO 14001: 2004” certificate. Thanks to our practices to ensure a safe and healthy working environment standards for our employees, we have obtained the OHSAS18001: 2007 ”certificate. We keep these certificates up-to-date.

Our main principle; to support all kinds of projects related to our field and to operate the production processes. All the harnesses are produced in accordance with the technical drawings and specifications sent by our customers. 100% electrical test is applied to each product.

Our most important value is human! Aiming at continuous improvement, we focus on keeping customer satisfaction at the highest level. We walk to our goals with our quality approach, environmental policy, reliable products and services and “zero defect” strategy.

Name: Grupo Geispen
Description:
GRUPO GEISPEN started back in 1963 as Industrias R.Jimenez and currently is formed by three companies, dedicated to manufacturing of high preassure aluminum parts and thermoplastic injection. We have our own workshop to build moulds and tooling, as well as a special plant for machining and subsequent assembly of parts. 


For more info please visit: www.geispen.com

Name: 3D Measurement Solutions Marginean
Description:
3D Measurement Solutions Marginean S.R.L. este o firma fondata in anul 2016, din ambitia managementului de a dezvolta un laborator de masuratori 3D si a veni in sprijinul companiilor din domeniul industrial si nu numai, prin oferirea de servicii de masurare 3D, scanare 3D si inginerie inversa (reverse engineering).

Tehnologia pe care firma 3D Measurement Solutions Marginean S.R.L.  o foloseste, este una moderna si eficienta in domeniul masuratorilor, oferind o acuratete foarte buna a datelor masurate, care permite satisfacerea tuturor cerintelor clientilor sai. 

Viziunea intreprinderii este aceea de a deveni un partener de incredere pentru clientii sai, iar pentru asta ne propunem sa investim in tehnologie de ultima generatie si in scolarizarea continua a personalului, pentru a tine pasul cu evolutia tehnologiei.

Name: Nova Motorsport
Description: A new global motorsport brand and the licensed manufacturer and global supplier of Avon Motorsport products. Rooted in a rich British heritage, Nova Motorsport is poised to revolutionise the world of premium competition and specialist tyres.

Description: Bestbuy Distributors is a buying group and warehousing distribution company supporting automotive wholesalers in the Canadian automotive, industrial, and PBE aftermarket. We provide unbeatable value and service for independent distributors across Canada.

Name: Notus Sistemas Térmicos do Brasil
Description:
Há 15 anos no mercado de Arrefecimento Automotivo, a Notus do Brasil vem se tornando líder na Fabricação e distribuição de Radiadores, Intercoolers, Condensadores e Eletro ventiladores para linha de Automóveis e Caminhões. 

Todos nossos produtos são rigorosamente testados e certificados com os mais rigorosos e renomados controles de qualidade como ISO 9001, TS/16949 e CE,  atendendo assim a todas normas de padrão de qualidade no âmbito nacional e internacional.


A Notus é especialista em arrefecimento e climatização de veículos automotores, além de produtos e conceitos inovadores no mercado de arrefecimento.

Entregamos sempre a união da tecnologia com a qualidade.

Name: Creative Forge Pvt. Ltd
Description: Established in 2005, Creative Forge Private Limited is one of the leading manufacturer and exporter of high quality forging parts and Fully machined components. We are specialized in open and closed die forgings with an installed capacity of 8500 MTPA for producing forged and precision machined components. Our forging unit is well-equipped with Belt Drop Hammer, Die-Shop, latest SCADA Biased heat treatment plant, Machining Facilities, Laboratory, Quality Control & Test Facilities, and Managed by well Qualified & Experienced workforce. We are a team of highly-skilled, experienced, qualified engineers, and having rich experience in their area of operation. Creative Forge is dedicated to client satisfaction by a regular improvement of process to offer the best product for our clients and is an IATF 16949:2016 certified company.

Description:
Fabricante de peças de reposição para motos. Faróis, blocos ópticos, piscas , coxim coroa entre outros.

Name: Stärkx Soluções Automotivas
Description:
Stärkx Soluções Automotivas é uma empresa especializada na venda de ferramentas de alta qualidade para diagnóstico veicular. Com um compromisso constante em oferecer as melhores soluções para profissionais da área automotiva, a Stärkx se destaca por seu portfólio diversificado, que inclui equipamentos inovadores e precisos, que garantem a eficiência e a confiabilidade no diagnóstico veicular. 

Nosso objetivo é proporcionar aos nossos clientes ferramentas de última geração, essenciais para otimizar os processos de reparação de veículos, aumentando a produtividade e a qualidade do serviço  contribuindo para reparos cada vez mais precisos e bem sucedidos. Com um atendimento personalizado, oferecemos suporte técnico especializado e orientação para a escolha dos produtos mais adequados a cada necessidade. 

Na Stärkx Soluções Automotivas, acreditamos na parceria de longo prazo com nossos clientes e fornecedores, fundamentada na confiança, transparência e no compromisso com a excelência. Estamos sempre atentos às novas demandas do mercado automotivo, buscando inovações que proporcionem resultados concretos para o sucesso do seu negócio.

Name: Filtorq İthalat İhracat Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş.
Description: İkiler Otomotiv’in yıllara dayanan tecrübesi ve sektörel bilgi birikimiyle 2013 yılında kurulan FILTORQ, üretim odaklı yapısıyla kısa sürede fark yaratmıştır. Çardak Organize Sanayi Bölgesi’nde 20.000 m²’lik modern üretim tesisinde ağır vasıta, iş makineleri ve binek araçlar için filtre üretimi gerçekleştiren FILTORQ, kalite ve yenilikçiliği bir arada sunmayı ilke edinmiştir. Yalnızca filtre üretimiyle sınırlı kalmayan FILTORQ, madeni yağlar ve araç bakım spreyleri gibi geniş bir ürün yelpazesiyle hem iç piyasaya hem de uluslararası pazarlara hitap etmektedir. Laboratuvarlarında hava, polen (kabin), yağ ve yakıt filtreleri üzerinde kapsamlı testler gerçekleştiren firma, her ürününü ISO 9001:2015, ISO/TSE 16949:2016 ve TSE standartlarına uygun olarak üretmekte ve kalite kontrol süreçleriyle maksimum müşteri memnuniyetini sağlamaktadır. 3000’i aşkın ürün çeşidi, geniş stoğu ve online sipariş sistemiyle müşterilerine hızlı ve güvenilir hizmet sunan FILTORQ, Ar-Ge faaliyetleriyle sektördeki yeniliklere hızla adapte olmakta ve her geçen gün ürün portföyünü zenginleştirmektedir. Dayanıklı ve yüksek performanslı ürünleriyle yerel ve global pazarda adından söz ettiren FILTORQ, geleceğin ihtiyaçlarına bugünden cevap vermeye devam etmektedir.

Name: Autoline | TAKEO
Description:
Committed to providing holistic solutions for light vehicle maintenance - through innovation, expertise, and top of the range customer service.

Your one-stop shop to reduce LV down-time on site.

Established in 1974 as an exhaust manufacturer known as Finn-ex, Autoline has since grown to supply full-scale LV maintenance solutions for a wide range of makes and models. 

In recent years, our focus on innovation and performance quality naturally lead to the booming Aussie mining industry - where LV's need a lot more love than usual.

Our holistic approach to LV maintenance allows us to partner with owners and operators of mining LV fleets, providing tailored solutions that meet the specs and application demands of a particular mine site. Whether an LV's covered in mud, rust or built up gunk - we've seen it all before, and specialise in supplying parts to combat the worst that Aussie terrain can dish out.

Located in Perth, Kalgoorlie, Mt Isa, and Adelaide - our strategic branch locations facilitate supply Australia wide, with plans to expand further in the near future.

Name: GroupAuto AC | CO | ECU | VZL
Description:
Somos parte de GroupAuto Internacional, uno de los principales grupos de distribución -ITGs- del mundo, que busca generar y fortalecer vínculos entre los fabricantes de recambios para auto - moto - vehículo pesado y los Socios del Grupo.

Integramos un bloque regional compuesto por América Central | Colombia | Ecuador | Venezuela. 

Trabajamos bajo el modelo de liderazgo; es decir, reunimos un selecto grupo de fabricantes, distribuidores de partes y talleres consolidando relaciones sólidas que ayudan a generar más y mejores oportunidades de negocio de generación en generación. 

Nos basamos en cuatro pilares para nuestros socios estratégicos, entre ellos:

PERSPECTIVA: Estrategia a futuro
COMPETITIVIDAD: Generador de oportunidades
SINERGIA: Evolución en la Red
INFLUENCIA: Liderazgo consiente

Y cuatro pilares para nuestras redes de fidelización: EuroTaller | TopTruck:
FORMACIÓN
INFORMACIÓN 
IMAGEN 
MERCADEO

Evolucionamos al ritmo de la tecnología elevando el nivel técnico de la industria automotriz.
Lo invitamos a unirse a GroupAuto América Central, Colombia, Ecuador y Venezuela, para que juntos transformemos la post venta.

Name: ZZK Indústria e Comércio de Peças Automotivas
Description:
A ZZK, atualmente localizada no município de Itaquaquecetuba-SP iniciou suas atividades em 11 de julho de 1956. 

Desde a sua fundação, suas atividades foram voltadas para a fabricação de peças usinadas, sob desenhos e amostras fornecidos pelos clientes, preocupando-se sempre com a melhoria contínua dos processos de produção e da qualidade de seus produtos e serviços.

Atualmente nossos serviços estendem-se desde a fabricação de conjuntos e/ou peças usinadas, oxicortadas, dobradas e soldadas e nossa capacidade de produção atinge a marca de 48.000 peças manufaturadas por mês divididas em 700 produtos.

Name: Grebo Otomotiv Sanayi A.Ş.
Description: 2003 yılında kurulan Grebo Otomotiv A.Ş, "Otomotiv, Raylı Sistemler ve Savunma Sanayi" sektörlerine alüminyum parça üretiminde çözüm ortağı olarak faaliyet göstermektedir.

Name: Tri Centrum Fortuna
Description:
PT. Name: S.I.D.A.T. Group
Description:
S.I.D.A.T. Group history begins way back in 1990 in a building of about 250 square meters, located in Vinovo (TO), Italy. 

The perfect mix of competencies and expertise in electro-mechanics, electronics and air-conditioning vehicle spare parts allowed us to enlarge our vision, to found S.I.D.A.T. and KRIOS brand (for the distribution of air-conditioning components) and to acquire FISPA brand.

The several exclusivity agreements with global OE first equipment producers such as Bitron, Freudenberg (MicronAir) and partnerships with other important manufacturers led S.I.D.A.T. Group to a considerable growth either in the Italian and international aftermarket.

Thanks to the quality policy and to the customer care vision, S.I.D.A.T. Group obtained the UNI EN ISO certificate (9001:2000 and now 9001:2008), became S.p.A and started to be present on TecDoc, the international database/platform for the automotive aftermarket.


Vision and mission

Our range covers the vast majority of the world car park. 
We wish to be your trustworthy supplier of spare parts, who can guarantee quality and efficiency on each level.
Customer satisfaction is our first goal and we are fully committed to achieving it day by day: all S.I.D.A.T. Group departments cooperate synergistically together so to promptly reply to the different customers’ queries.
We are a young and open-minded company, attentive to the internal and external needs, focused on improving the service, the punctuality and the reliability and on enlarging the range in order to continuously grow together with you!

Name: SIGNATA Group
Description:
SIGNATA combines mechatronical expertise with a clear vision: We set the highest standards based on knowledge and an innovative spirit. We ensure high quality through certified processes, tailor-made services, and the continuous development of all components. Our focus is on the entire product life cycle - from the specification of the requirements to the development of tailor-made system solutions and production. Thanks to our worldwide network of development and production partners, we can react nimbly to global customer requirements.


SIGNATA GmbH has its origins in the "Electronic Interfaces" product division of ZF Friedrichshafen AG, which was founded in 1998. It has been an independent company since the beginning of 2023.

Name: SNP Automotive
Description:
SNP Automotive is the place where thousands of vehicle and people from many countries over the world can get quality and fast service and also get satisfaction and variety of service. SNP Automotive was established in 1982 when competitive environments accelerated with the globalization. In these years when investments on branding became important in Turkey, SNP Automotive determined customer satisfaction business as a principle.

SNP that carries out manufacturing and exportation of spare parts for worldwide known brands had a vertical growing with innovative structure in step with developing the technology. SNP Automotive progressively aiming for going up without compromising principles provides thousands of customer from 5 continents, 55 different countries, with quality products.

SNP products having world-embracing exercised, quality and competitive prices are used by many worldwide known transportation companies. 

In the leadership of Design and R&D Department in SNP Automotive, project teams create engineering planning. The design of new products is created by using past experiences, competitor analysis and feedbacks from customers.

Each product being brought into use is a symbol of development, each tribute gained is the symbol of SNP quality. By the revolutionary way of work in the global market, SNP provides demanding customers with the products carrying their own brands. The logos sent by the customers are pressed onto the products, and also customer-specific packages are being created. In addition to such products, promotional materials with customers' logo can be created as well. 
In the sector expos, SNP Automotive offers newest products to customers, and reaches new business partnerships thanks to faith and ambition to work. 

We hope to reach better tomorrows with modern management mentality, professional team and business partners all over the world. 

Video Link:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=p_-WXFd3DAA

SNP Automotive

Name: Lazer Lamps Ltd
Description:
Since it was founded in 2010, Lazer Lamps Ltd has been at the forefront of LED technology, bringing world class technology to its customers, and in the process setting the standard in automotive auxiliary lighting solutions. Combining competition beating performance with automotive quality standards, Lazer products are now recognised as leaders in their field.

With product design and manufacture all managed in-house, and in the UK, the performance and build quality of all Lazer products is assured. Testimony to the superior quality of our products that they are now adopted at the highest levels of professional rally and track motorsport. Providing credibility for the brand, it is in the everyday road and off-road markets where Lazer products mostly stand apart, including for their innovative bespoke vehicle integration kits.

Name: KARTESIS INDUSTRIES
Description: KARTESIS INDUSTRIES is a company specialized in the manufacture of precision parts and subassemblies, based at 480 rue des Cygnes, BONNEVILLE , HAUTE-SAVOIE, France.

Name: Usinatech
Description:
Fondée depuis 1986, Usinatech est une usine de transformation de métal (usinage de production CNC, outillage, rectification, soudure et traitement thermique). Elle est située à moins de 30 minutes de Sherbrooke de Drummondville. Elle fabrique sur mesure des pièces mécaniques de haute précision. L’entreprise possède une solide expertise dans la fabrication de pièces mécaniques de transfert de puissance, notamment des pièces d’engrenage, de transmission et de suspension. Ses principaux clients sont dans le domaine des véhicules récréatifs, des équipements agricoles et des véhicules automobiles.

En février 2010, l’entreprise fonde Usinatech De Mexico dans le but de diversifier sa clientèle et de se rapprocher de ses clients déjà installés au Mexique. Les pièces sont complètement produites et livrées en sol mexicain. Le plan au Mexique emploie près de 80 personnes. Le développement de ces pièces et les relations avec les clients sont faits à Usinatech Canada. 

Depuis les dernières années, l’entreprise a rapidement démontré un fort potentiel dans son domaine. La qualité exceptionnelle de ses produits lui a permis de faire sa marque auprès de ses clients, ce qui s’est traduit par une augmentation constante de son carnet de commandes. Employant près de 300 travailleurs à Melbourne, elle compte 3 usines dont la superficie totalise 110 000 pieds carrés et un entrepôt.

Name: Lakshmi Motor Company
Description: Star  rated Export House and Renowned Distributor of auto spare parts. Happy to serve across the globe since 1939 from Delhi, India.

Name: Otom Concept
Description:
OTOM Concept is a family company which is the outcome of an experience of 30 years obtained by its founders in the sector.

Otom has turned into a company which does not follow the innovations in the sector but leads the way with its knowledge and experiences basing on long years. Many projects and innovations that we have carried out are the proof of it and the determination of you, our valuable business partners. 

The adventure of our products starting from raw yarn ends in our integrated premises with all of its stages. Today Otom is a large family with its 5000-m2 production premises, 500-m2 showroom and 160 employees.

We, as Otom family take the justified pride of made progress and continue to work with the same responsibility.

Name: SEWS-TN - Sumitomo Electric Wiring Systems - Tunisia
Description: SEWS TN est une entreprise opérante dans l'Industrie Automobile, branche de fabrication des faiseaux éléctriques. Située à Monastir Tunisia .

Name: ENSO
Description:
ENSO is a tyre technology company that makes better tyres for electric vehicles – to increase EV range and reduce tyre pollution – a major source of air and micro plastic pollution. 

ENSO delivers its more affordable EV tyres directly to customers (D2C), via a vertically integrated product and service model that is designed to improve EV performance. 

ENSO is the only Certified B-Corporation in the tyre industry, a strong recognition of its commitment to environmental, social and governance standards. 

Our mission is to drive innovation in the global tyre industry – as evidenced by our engagement with leading EV OEMs and EV fleets – to make great products, while reducing their environmental impact.

Name: Alcorta USA Inc - Hot steel forge in New Boston, Michigan.
Description: Alcorta Forging Group is an international European based supplier of forged components for automotive, commercial vehicles, heavy duty and industrial markets. We have more than 100 years of experience providing complete solutions, including design, forging, heat treatments, machining, coatings, assemblies and logistic services.

Name: TRAPO
Description: TRAPO, the leading automotive accessories brand in Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand, and Indonesia, invites you to be part of our innovative team. Founded in 2016, we are committed to repurposing industrial waste into high-quality automotive products that elevate the driving experience. By offering products with antibacterial properties and more, we strive to solve the everyday pain points of drivers.

Name: Disa Automotive
Description:
Disa Automotive is a manufacturer of premium quality gears, precision machined parts and steering & suspension parts. With its roots going back to the 1960s, it was founded in 1990 and produces for automotive OEMs, Tier 1 and Tier 2 manufacturers and the global aftermarket with over 10 millions pieces annual capacity.

With its accumulated experience on the production of automotive parts, Disa exports to the international markets since 2003. Disa Automotive aims to provide quality products, competitive prices and best service to its customers. Disa produces in accordance with IATF 16949 automotive quality standards with its production plant that is located in Ergene, Tekirdag, Turkey. It exports 100% of its production to Europe and N. America, mainly to Germany.

In our production portfolio, we have;
>> Gears (cylindrical spur gears, helical gears, bevel gears, pinion gears, internal gears, shafts and serrations)
>> Machined automotive parts (turning, milling, drilling, tapping, threading, cutting, hobbing, skiving, broaching, grinding, reaming and other machining process (transmission parts, differential system parts, gearbox and gearbox components, steering box parts, electric motor transmission parts, hydraulic pump system parts and tow bar system parts), and 
>> Steering and suspension parts

In our suspension and steering parts business, we have coverage for European, Japanese, Korean and North American applications and it has over 5.000 items in product portfolio to include; stabilizer links, ball joints, tie rod ends, axial joints, cross axis joints, wishbones-control arms and rubber bushings.

Name: Haltech
Description:
Innovation, Support and Cutting Edge Technology.

Haltech has been at the cutting edge of engine management technology since it first opened its doors in 1986.

Today, Haltech has six international offices with headquarters based in Sydney, Australia. Haltech products are sold in over 50 countries around the world and . They are the driving force behind many record-setting race vehicles. The company is credited as being the first in the world to develop real time engine management calibration.

Haltech is actively involved with many popular car culture shows like Discovery Channel’s Street Outlaws and Mighty Car Mods as well as numerous racing and motorsport events like the NMCA/NMRA, SEMA, PRI, World Cup Finals, World Time Attack Challenge and Summernats just to name a few.

The Haltech brand is recognised globally as the leader in its field, renowned for its cutting edge technology and customer support. Like all successful companies, Haltech has adapted to stay abreast of the emerging technologies and address changing expectations from tuners, racers and enthusiasts alike.

There are however, things that haven’t and will never change - and those are Haltech’s commitment to quality, innovation and the dedication and passion of the Haltech team. These qualities have been Haltech’s trademark since the beginning and are the main reason why thousands of people around the world choose Haltech for their engine management every year.

Name: Commercial Body Fittings Ltd
Description:
Established in 1970, Commercial Body Fittings is a privately owned company which constantly strives to meet customer’s needs and expectations. With over 50 years of experience, we are clear market leaders in designing, manufacturing and distributing to the commercial vehicle body building, trailer manufacturing and allied trade markets.

CBF is an appointed distributor for many established and well regarded manufacturers based in the UK, Europe and North America. Combined with a large portfolio of products exclusively manufactured for CBF, this has enabled us to service domestic, European and Worldwide markets with over 4,100 products directly from stock.

CBF operates from two strategically placed distribution centres. Our Head Office is based in Welwyn Garden City, Hertfordshire (20 miles north of London),and operates from a 26,000 sq ft (2415.50 sq mt) office and warehousing facility with our Midlands Division based in Coseley (10 miles north west of Birmingham) and operating from a 90,000 sq ft (8361.00 sq mt) office and warehousing facility.

To download our catalogue and to keep up-to-date with all our new products, please visit www.cbf.uk.com

Name: REL,India
Description:
At REL India, we specialise in manufacturing and exporting precision fasteners and cold headed components for the automotive and industrial sectors across the globe.

Whether it’s wheel nuts, hex bolts, flange nuts, threaded fasteners, or high-tensile bolts, our products are built to perform, manufactured to meet the highest global standards.

We are fully certified with ISO 9001:2015, IATF 16949:2016, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018 and audited as per VDA 6.3. 

What makes us different?

Complete in-house production: From raw materials and tool design to CNC machining and electroplating

Advanced machinery: Including 7-station cold heading, in-house tool room, engineering lab, and reverse engineering

Flexible packaging solutions for OEM and aftermarket customers

A strong, auditable and scalable system, with a trusted network of approved vendors

We work with OEMs, Tier 1 suppliers, and distributors across Europe, USA, the Middle East, and Asia. Whether you're looking for a reliable sourcing partner or exploring new product development, we're ready to support you at every step.

Connect with us at:
 mktg@relindia.com
 www.relindia.com

Name: PRECITECH FORGINGS & ENGINEERING PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
We are Experts in the manufacturing of Hot Forged Products. In our 11 years of existence, we have produced over 1.25 Crores units in 95 variants. We have contributed to 45 customers in generating a revenue of Rs. One lakh twenty-one thousand crores. Out of our 45 clients, 11 are OEMs, and 34 are Tier 1 of OEMs. Some of our top clients are OEMs like TAFE, Ashok Leyland, Doosan Bobcat, and defence. We have also contributed to OEMs like Royal Enfield, Tata Motors, Volvo, Eicher, SAME, Bonfigliloli through Tier 1 suppliers like Axles India, Sundaram Fasteners, Dana India, to name a few. Vehicles fitted with our products are being sold in 100+ Countries, and we have helped our clients save and make additional profits of Rs. 2.37 Crores.
 
We have an installed capacity of 5000 MTPA, and a team strength of 103. The combined experience of our production team is 2,49,600 hours, while 81,700 hours is the combined experience of our quality team.

Name: OMR S.p.A.
Description:
Da oltre 50 anni OMR S.p.A. è riconosciuta tra i leader europei nel settore della produzione di Automotive Steel Components, affermandosi partner delle più importanti industrie produttrici di veicoli industriali, commerciali, macchine movimento terra, agricole e per la movimentazione industriale.
Grazie all’integrazione verticale dell’azienda ed al suo raro know-how, OMR S.p.A. affianca i propri clienti e partner nell’evoluzione tecnologica e nelle sfide del mercato, sviluppando soluzioni di eccellenza, con uno sguardo volto alla sostenibilità.

Name: RAYTEC Veículos
Description: A universe of automotive transformation that transcends expectations, where each vehicle becomes a masterpiece of innovation and each customer is an essential part of our extraordinary journey. At RAYTEC, 'The closeness that transforms' is not just a slogan but our guiding philosophy. This closeness allows us to anticipate trends, exchange engineering experiences with our clients in a more dynamic and reactive way, turn challenges into opportunities, and continually elevate the standards of automotive customization, transforming visions into tangible reality.

Name: LPR s.r.l.
Description:
Brescia, 1952: Pietro Arici had a factory for high precision machining, specializing in the production of brake hydraulics for first equipment.
In 1977 the company moved to Piacenza and the name LPR was born, with a new focus towards brake and clutch hydraulics. Thanks to the management and attention of the new president, Luciano Arici, and the level of investment in additional tools and plant, in only a few years LPR has become a world leader for quality and innovation and extended its range to include other products such as brake pads, shoes, discs and drums.

Name: Safecar Brasil
Description:
Na Safecar, acreditamos que todo sistema eletrônico é vulnerável quando há conhecimento e acesso aos seus componentes. Por isso, entendemos que a proteção física é a solução mais eficaz para evitar a perda de patrimônio.

Somos especialistas no combate a riscos automotivos, oferecendo uma gama de soluções que inclui rastreamento, bloqueio inteligente, monitoramento, blindagem de módulos, recuperação de veículos roubados e proteção de catalisadores.

Saiba mais sobre como podemos proteger seu veículo! Entre em contato conosco!

Name: VERNICOLOR TUNISIA
Description: Être un Fournisseur de référence en pièces décoratives en accompagnant nos clients à adopter des solutions innovantes et éco-durable

Name: KRONPRINZ Troyes
Description:
Fort de notre expérience de plus de 60 années au service de l’industrie automobile, nous concevons, optimisons et produisons dans notre usine française des roues en tôle d’acier pour véhicules de tourisme et véhicules utilitaires légers.
Nous approvisionnons les principales unités de production des OEM en Europe et en Afrique du Nord où les constructeurs font confiance à des produits innovants, alliant performance, qualité et taux de service.
D’autres activités périphériques - notamment pour les métros sur pneus - nous permettent d’enrichir notre portefeuille produit en termes de roues acier et d’accessoires.

Pour de plus amples informations sur notre entreprise et nos produits n’hésitez pas à nous suivre sur LinkedIn.

----------------------------------

With a long lasting experience of more than 60 years inside the automotive industry, from our french operations we design, optimize and produce steel wheels for passenger cars and light commercial vehicle.
We supply largest OEM’s production facilities over Europe and North Africa where car manufacturers are proud to use innovative products, combining strong performance, premium quality and high service rate.
Other activities - such as parts for rubber-tired subways - allow us to enlarge our product portfolio in terms of steel wheels and other accessories.

To learn more about us and our products, do not hesitate to follow us on LinkedIn.

Name: OBSC Perfection Ltd
Description:
OBSC Perfection is a precision metal component manufacturer offering a diversified suite of precision engineering products which are high-quality engineered parts across end-user industries and geographies. We primarily cater to top OEMs who ultimately supply various components and parts to top automotive manufacturing companies of India.

Inhouse processes includes Investment Casting, CNC machining, Swiss turning, fifth axis machining, stamping, welding, brazing et al.

Name: NeoCharge
Description:
A NeoCharge nasceu em 2016 como braço da NeoSolar, empresa fundada em 2010, líder de mercado em energia solar fotovoltaica e com sólido histórico de pioneirismo e realizações. O propósito da NeoCharge é acelerar a adoção de veículos elétricos, trazendo ao mercado os melhores produtos e serviços para infraestrutura de recarga veicular.

Levamos em nosso DNA o espírito empreendedor e o desenvolvimento de negócios que impactam positivamente a vida de todos. E foi assim que demos vida à NeoCharge, agora com a missão de promover a mobilidade elétrica no Brasil.

Oferecemos soluções em infraestrutura de recarga para veículos elétricos através de distribuição de equipamentos, cursos, serviços técnicos e operação compartilhada de estações de recarga e eletropostos.

Name: Hidromas Brasil
Description:
Desde 1975, a Hidromas iniciou a produção de bombas hidráulicas para a indústria automobilística na Turquia, evoluindo rapidamente para se tornar um dos maiores fornecedores globais de Soluções Hidráulicas de Basculamento.

Em 2017, a Hidromas Global incorporou a Soprano Óleo Hidráulica como subsidiária, através da aquisição das marcas Coral e Soprano, além de toda a sua infraestrutura.

A Hidromas atua no ramo hidráulico contando com portfólio de soluções completas para implementos e caminhões basculantes, fabricando cilindros telescópicos, válvulas, bombas e demais componentes hidráulicos, destinados ao segmentos rodoviário, agrícola e movimentação de materiais. Possui sede na Holanda, unidades na Polônia e Alemanha e fábricas na Turquia, Índia e Brasil. Tem presença comercial em mais de 50 países. 

A unidade brasileira está localizada em Caxias do Sul, RS, e é responsável pelo mercado nacional e exportações para todo o continente americano.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: SounDigital
Description:
Na década de 90 o estudante de engenharia elétrica, Juliano Anflor, desenvolveu o seu primeiro amplificador de som automotivo como um projeto acadêmico. A partir deste projeto nasceu um ”hobby”, tornando uma paixão e, anos depois, o negócio de sua vida. Inovando e buscando novas tecnologias, a SounDigital consolidou-se no mercado brasileiro e internacional, conquistando o seu espaço e respeito entre os profissionais mais exigentes e renomados do setor.

Hoje os produtos da marca podem ser encontrados em mais de 50 países e, suas especificações, seguem rigorosos padrões internacionais.

A SounDigital possui em seu portfólio produtos para som de alta performance, dentre eles módulos amplificadores de som automotivos com diversas potências e impedâncias, que variam de 400 WRMS a 100.000 WRMS, distribuídos nas linhas GAN, EVO6, EVO5, EVO4.0, EVOX2, EVOX e EVOPS.

Em 2024, lançamos a linha de vestuário, envolvendo você ainda mais no mundo do som de alta performance.  

Um estilo de vida #soundigital

SounDigital: https://www.soundigital.com/
SD Store: https://sdstore.soundigital.com/

Name: ShoulderSink
Description:
Handhygiene for professionals on the fly.

With ShoulderSink you have WATER, SOAP, PAPER and SANITISER with you in your Van, Truck or Bus. Water and soap are recommended by WHO and CDC as the best handhygiene before using Ethanol based handrubs, if your fingers are dirty.

30 seconds of handwashing is the ultimate investment when meeting with customers, working with dirty materials. 50% of sick days are related to hygiene. By choosing water and soap instead of chemical based wetwipes, you will both save both money and avoid potential allegies caused by parabenes and MI.

Anyone on the fly, with occasional dirty fingers benefit from using ShoulderSink;

Installers, Firemen, landscapers, foresters, homecare workers, electricians, soldiers, veterinarians, disaster relief workers, farmers, road side help.... and many many more... 

WE ARE ALWAYS LOOKING FOR PROACTIVE DEALERS

Description:
For over 47 years, Metalúrgica Rivertec has gained a great deal of space in the manufacture and sale of parts for heavy vehicles. With its own tooling, Metalúrgica Rivertec has the facility to develop new products. With emphasis on the processes of stamping and machining, the company also has an effective customer service system throughout Brazil, in addition to exporting part of its production to other countries.

Who is Rivertec customer is sure to be able to count on a fast and efficient service. Constant investments in equipment and training of the team guarantee an update reflected in the quality of the parts and in the relationship with the customer, whose satisfaction is our commitment.
