Description:
F&P Manufacturing Canada is a leading Tier 1 Automotive Parts Manufacturer, a subsidiary of Ftech Inc. in Japan.

Our core business is automotive component manufacturing. Metal stamping, welding, hydroforming, e-coat and modular assembly, producing annually over 58 million component parts for our customers for more than 18 different current models.

Being the first of six F-Tech facilities located in North America, with a second Canadian facility operating in Stratford, ON. Two US plants in Troy, OH & Rome, GA and two plants in Mexico.

F&P Mfg., Inc is committed to continuous improvement keeping us at the forefront of the automotive manufacturing industry.

Name: Baterlife
Description: A BATER LIFE nasceu em 1988, no Oeste Catarinense e desde sempre tem como missão fornecer baterias automotivas de alta qualidade, que garantem energia para sua vida. Com nossa tecnologia exclusiva Maxx Grid, oferecemos produtos que aliam resistência e durabilidade, proporcionando uma fonte confiável de energia para veículos de todos os tipos, além de baterias estacionárias e para sistemas de energia solar.

Name: Ciosa Autopartes
Description:
Nuestra participación en el mercado se caracteriza por:

Estar comprometidos con el servicio y la atención personalizada de cada uno de nuestros clientes, porque son quienes nos impulsan a ser mejores en cada paso que damos.
Contar con líneas de productos completas que ofrecen una amplia variedad y calidad en autopartes y satisfacen las necesidades del mercado.
Tener una alta penetración en el mercado gracias a un eficiente canal de distribución nacional e internacional.
Contar con un equipo directivo altamente calificado con una gran visión global, que nos permite la toma de decisiones oportunas para direccionar la empresa siempre hacia un mejor rumbo.
Creer en el talento joven, quienes con visión y pasión trabajan para "marcar la diferencia".
Promover una cultura organizacional que fomente el crecimiento personal y profesional de todos nuestros colaboradores.
Una sólida gestión de las finanzas que genera valor a nuestros accionistas y a la industria. Innovar continuamente en nuestros procesos y sistemas para ofrecer el mejor servicio a nuestros clientes.
Sabemos la importancia de tener cimientos sólidos, por eso basamos nuestro el trabajo y nuestras acciones en cuatro pilares fundamentales para nuestra toma de decisiones: honestidad, determinación, lealtad y disciplina.

Name: AMK Automotive
Description:
Die AMK Automotive GmbH & Co. KG mit Hauptsitz in Aichwald bei Stuttgart steht für innovative Lösungen in der Druckluftversorgung von luftgefederten Fahrzeugen. Wir entwickeln, produzieren und integrieren Luftfederkompressoren und -systeme für die Mobilität der Zukunft und erfüllen damit Kundenwünsche nach mehr Komfort, Sicherheit und Fahrdynamik, überwiegend in SUV´s, Oberklasse- und leichten Nutzfahrzeugen.

Unsere Kunden sind namhafte Fahrzeughersteller weltweit sowie neue Marken im stark wachsenden Zukunftsmarkt der Elektromobilität. 350 Mitarbeiter setzen Maßstäbe in Qualität, Innovationskraft und Umweltverträglichkeit und verschaffen so unseren Kunden den entscheidenden Vorsprung.

Durch die Integration in die Zhongding Gruppe, einem führenden internationalen Automobil- und Industriezulieferer, sind wir ein global etablierter Tier1 Automobilzulieferer.

Name: MaxiPARTS
Description: MaxiPARTS is your one-stop shop for Truck and Trailer Parts. With over 30 sites around Australia, we have one of the most comprehensive core product ranges covering everything from lights, tools, oil and filters through to axles, suspensions and brakes.

Name: Next Level Cars
Description:
Next Level Cars is premium supplier of:
* TECHART 'premium refinement'
* Akrapovic 'car exhaust systems'
* Clanck 'superior sound systems'
* Xpel 'car protection film'
* Target Blu Eye 'traffic safety system'
* Eventuri 'air intake systems'
* Brixton Forged Wheels 'lightweight forged wheels'
* Car detailing
* Interior upgrades

Check our website: https://www.nextlevelcars.nl

Name: VetroCar
Description:
VetroCar è un marchio della VetroCar & Bus s.p.a., azienda nata nel 1999 e specializzata nella riparazione e sostituzione cristalli auto.

La sede direzionale è ubicata a Verona, in Via del Perlar, 35.

Nel 2015, in un percorso di consolidamento dell’esperienza fatta, VetroCar è stata interessata da una profonda riorganizzazione societaria e organizzativa che ha come obiettivo quello di consentire all’azienda di diventare il primo player italiano nella sostituzione cristalli.

La riorganizzazione passa anche attraverso una nuova struttura manageriale con esperienza specifica nel settore, che si affianca a quella già esistente e che garantisce su ogni area di operatività dell’azienda massima efficacia ed efficienza rispetto al raggiungimento dei risultati.

Attraverso i centri di proprietà e grazie al network degli affiliati, l’azienda è presente su tutto il territorio italiano con oltre 350 filiali.

In brevissimo tempo il Gruppo VetroCar ha sottoscritto degli accordi commerciali con le principali compagnie assicurative e con le società di autonoleggio.

Name: Recomotor
Description: Online secondhand car parts dealer for all brands and categories. Dealing with the safest scraping yards in Europe, being the unique recovered-parts distributor on the market with 2 years warranty and fast shipping throughout Europe. Saving thousands of parts every year.

Name: PT EVERSEIKO INDONESIA
Description: Everseiko mendistribusikan ban MRF dalam berbagai ukuran dan untuk beragam kebutuhn

Name: NBC Global
Description:
NBC Global is a wholly owned subsidiary of National Engineering Industries Ltd. (NEI) based in Europe, with footprints in Germany (Global Technology Center) and Switzerland (Headquarter + Sales & Business Development office). Kinex bearings (Slovakia) was acquired by NBC Global in 2020 as part of NBC’s growth strategy and to be closer to international customers. Kinex offers bearing solutions primarily for Railway and Industrial segments. 

A symbol of dependability and flexible engineering solutions, NBC Bearings is the brand of National Engineering Industries Ltd (NEI). Founded in 1946 and headquartered in Jaipur (India), NEI is India’s leading bearings manufacturer and exporter, renowned for excellence in quality and delivery. Over 250 million NBC bearings are manufactured each year, in 3100+ sizes for customers in more than 30 countries across five continents in automotive, railways and industrial segments. 
NEI is part of the CK Birla Group, a diversified US $2.9 billion conglomerate. 
 With over 35,000 employees, the group operates 49 manufacturing facilities across India and internationally, with a presence in diverse sectors, including technology, automotive, home and building and healthcare. 
 
The companies share a common ambition of serving customers, partners and communities to create long term value through trust-based relationships and philanthropy. The Trusts and Foundations established by the family over the last seven decades actively support social development and healthcare advancements, through the promotion of science, technology, education, art and culture.  
 
The CK Birla Group companies include Birlasoft Limited, GMMCO Limited, HIL Limited, National Engineering Industries Limited (manufacturer of NBC Bearings), Orient Cement Limited, Orient Electric Limited, Orient Paper & Industries Limited, AVTEC Limited, and CK Birla Healthcare Private Limited which operates CK Birla Hospitals and Birla Fertility & IVF Centres.

Name: Solution F
Description:
Solution F, société fondée en 1985 et reprise par le groupe GCK en 2022, est une des références en France concernant les systèmes de propulsion. Notre société, basée à Venelles (13), s’appuie sur son ADN ancré dans la course automobile pour mettre toute son expertise au service de ses clients. Nous alimentons notre passion du défi et notre culture du résultat au travers de projets innovants depuis maintenant près de 40 ans. 

Notre expertise couvre l'ensemble des technologies de propulsion : électrique, hybride, hydrogène et bien d'autres. Notre capacité à concevoir "from scratch" nous permet de développer des solutions innovantes et sur mesure pour chaque projet. De la conception à l’exploitation, nos équipes vous accompagnent à chaque étape ou sur un moment clé de votre projet en alliant réactivité, agilité et performance technique pour en assurer la réussite.

En parallèle nous maîtrisons également la conception de machines spéciales, notamment pour l’aéronautique. Dans ce secteur exigeant, cette expertise joue un rôle crucial pour garantir la sécurité, la fiabilité et la performance des équipements. Notre savoir-faire se concentre sur le développement d'équipements spécifiques, conçus sur mesure pour répondre aux besoins uniques de l'industrie aéronautique, en particulier dans le domaine des systèmes de transmission.

Name: Fabio Air Springs
Description:
Fabio Air Springs; is the leading manufacturer of air spring suspension products mainly for the commercial vehicle industry, with a strong global brand reputation. Although; Fabio was founded in 2004 by Mustafa Bacakci, our heritage is traced back to the year 1981. Today, it is one of the best-known air bellow brands in use worldwide. Our manufacturing operations are located in Bursa (Headquarter) and Samsun totally in 40.000sqm area. The company operates engineering, manufacturing, machinery, molding operations, warehousing and R&D facilities, in Bursa/Turkey. Besides, manufacturing metal components of air springs in Samsun/Turkey.

Fabio Air Springs is proud to be IATF 16949:2016 certified. This marks organizations committed to following a quality management system with several standards. These standards encompass every aspect of our business, from professional employee development and customer service to product design and manufacturing. We are dedicated to fulfilling the requirements of IATF 16949:2016 certification: to develop, manufacture and continuously improve the highest quality products that fit, work, and last.

Our air springs; originally created to help keep large fleets of heavy trucks riding smoothly during long hauls, these same products are also ideal for light and medium duty vehicles, school buses industrial applications and passenger car use. The company serves many of its customers in more than 120 countries with one of the largest product ranges in the world. Today the number of the references has been reached more than 1850+ and continuously increasing every month according to the new product development strategy. Fabio has been engineering and supplying strong quality air springs for the market for more than 20 years and embarks on the principles of innovation power, know-how, global experience, sustainability, quality management and being environmental friendly.

Name: Fuelab
Description: Well over a decade ago we were the first to bring brushless fuel system technology to the performance world, and we continue to lead the way with our expansive line of brushless fuel pumps, pressure regulators, and filters.

Name: Brigade Electronics (UK) Ltd
Description:
Brigade Electronics is a market leader in vehicle safety systems with a comprehensive range of products to reduce the risk of collision and maximise efficiency, including camera monitor systems, reversing alarms, ultrasonic proximity sensors, digital recorders and a thermal image camera. We are a global company with solutions to suit all commercial vehicle and industry types and a team of engineers working to bring innovative answers to the market place as well as a sales service and support team for even the biggest fleet of vehicles. 

Brigade has been pioneering the cause of reversing safety since 1976, when we introduced the very first reversing alarm to Europe. We continue to lead the way in vehicle and plant safety, having extended our range to include all-round visibility, pioneering many products and developing and patenting new technology.

The Brigade group now employs almost 200 people worldwide and turns over in excess of £40 million. With a strong network of specialist distributors, established subsidiaries and partnerships worldwide, we are viewed as a market leader in vehicle safety.

Our wealth of experience has earned us a reputation for expertise. We act as an industry voice and are often called upon in an advisory capacity to sit on both legislative and international committees.

Name: Hankook Tire Italia
Description:
Hankook, uno dei principali produttori mondiali di pneumatici, fornisce pneumatici radiali premium ad alte prestazioni per automobili, SUV, fuoristrada, trasporto leggero, camper, autocarri e autobus oltre che per competizioni motoristiche (gare su circuito e su strada/rally).

Hankook investe costantemente in ricerca e sviluppo al fine di offrire ai propri clienti la massima qualità, abbinata all'eccellenza tecnologica. In cinque centri di sviluppo e in otto stabilimenti situati in tutto il mondo, l'impresa sviluppa e produce pneumatici atti a soddisfare pienamente le speciali esigenze e richieste dei diversi mercati. In Europa, presso il centro tecnologico Hankook di Hannover (Germania), avviene lo sviluppo degli pneumatici per i mercati locali e il primo equipaggiamento, nel rispetto delle indicazioni delle principali case automobilistiche europee. Gli pneumatici vengono prodotti, tra l'altro, nella modernissima fabbrica europea dell'impresa di Rácalmás (Ungheria), inaugurata nel 2007 ed in continua espansione. Attualmente, oltre 3.000 dipendenti vi producono ogni anno fino a 19 milioni di pneumatici.

La sede centrale europea e tedesca Hankook si trova a Neu-Isenburg, nei pressi di Francoforte sul Meno. Il produttore gestisce altre filiali in diversi paesi europei e vende i suoi prodotti tramite distributori regionali in altri mercati locali. L'impresa dà lavoro a 20.000 dipendenti in tutto il mondo e fornisce i propri prodotti in oltre 160 paesi. L'azienda è stata selezionata come partner tecnico e fornitore esclusivo degli pneumatici della Generazione 3 per il FIA ABB Formula E World Championship a partire dal 2023. Gli pneumatici Hankook sono utilizzati in primo equipaggiamento dalle principali case automobilistiche internazionali. Circa il 34% del fatturato globale dell'impresa è generato all'interno dell'Europa e della CSI. Hankook Tire, dal 2016, è rappresentata nel rinomato Dow Jones Sustainability Index World (DJSI World).

Name: GA Neumáticos y Servicios
Description:
GA es un centro integral de ventas y servicios en el rubro neumáticos con mas de 40 años en el mercado rosarino.
Con una política de crecimiento continuo basada en una impecable trayectoria comercial, la empresa cuenta hoy con tres sucursales especializadas en una oferta global para todo tipo de vehículos.

La experiencia en el rubro hace de nuestra empresa un espacio donde los clientes puedan cubrir sus necesidades de calidad, precio y profesionalismo en la atención a sus vehículos.

Ofrecemos venta online con envíos sin cargo a todo el país.

Name: Masterparts (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Masterparts was founded in South Africa in August 1975 with the goal of providing auto shops and the public with an extensive range of high-quality engine parts.

In the early 2000s, the range was extended to include suspension and steering components, and shortly thereafter, braking components, radiators, wheel bearings, clutch kits and more. More recently, it has expanded further to include a wide selection of electronic components.

Today, Masterparts stocks over 55,000 items for more than 4,000 vehicle models.

Our mission is to continue providing the widest possible selection of car parts – including hard-to-find items – while maintaining a depth of knowledge and technical ability that exceeds that of our competitors.

To achieve this, we draw on 50 years of experience in the aftermarket parts and spares industry.

Masterparts currently employs over 600 people across 14 branches, with a distribution centre and head office in Cape Town.

Name: Drivetrain Innovation
Description: Drivetrain Innovation develops high power inverters and battery management system for electric drive applications. The main goal of DTI is to provide plug & play drivetrain solution for e-applications. Our vision is to make a clean and manageable powertrain ecosystem which makes the integration easy in wide spectrum of the areas of use, for the manufacturers or prototypers.

Name: VDO France
Description:
VDO est la marque historique allemande rattachée à la Business Area "Autonomous & Commercial Mobility" du groupe AUMOVIO.
En France, sur notre site de Rambouillet (78) notre département "Commercial & Special Vehicles" propose : 
- des solutions électroniques et équipements d'origine (multimédia, Capteurs...) pour les véhicules "spéciaux"  en première monte (off highway: Engins agricoles, motos) 
- une large sélection de produits et de services pour les centres agréés tachygraphes et gestionnaires de flottes

VDO (constructeurs off highway) : http://www.vdo.fr/ 
VDO (PL / Fleet) : http://www.fleet.vdo.fr 

Chaîne YouTube :
VDO : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC0pMwBJoNv_AiZb53T20MVQ 

#VDO #OEM #Chronotachygraphe

Name: Talbros
Description: Talbros Indiparts Pvt. Ltd. TIPL has been known to pay close attention to its clients’ requirements by consistently adding value and focusing on delivering excellent quality products such as Gaskets, Steering & Suspension Components, Gas Springs, Filters, Dyna Bond - gasket makers, Bushing Kits, Wiper Blades, Drive Shafts, Engine Mounts, coolants etc. in the Aftermarket Segment of the Automotive Industry. Talbros Indiparts is a diversified auto component player with its presence across automobile categories in Passenger Vehicles, Commercial Vehicles, Two-wheelers, Three-wheelers, Agricultural machinery, Off-loaders, and Industrial vehicles.

Name: Kromberg & Schubert México
Description:
Nuestra principal experiencia desde 1932
Kromberg & Schubert ha estado revolucionando la tecnología de sistemas de cableado desde la introducción del primer arnés de cables prefabricado en 1932. Desde entonces, nos hemos convertido en un socio de confianza para los principales fabricantes de automóviles (OEM) y prestigiosos proveedores de la industria automotriz en el suministro de sistemas de cableado a medida para automóviles, camiones y autobuses. Nuestra cartera abarca desde cableado de carrocería, motor, habitáculo y puertas, sistemas de sonido, aire acondicionado y arneses de comunicación, hasta cables de batería y módulos de arneses de cables sobremoldeados. También integramos diversos componentes en sistemas completos de alto rendimiento.

Utilizando nuestras tecnologías de vanguardia y herramientas de software innovadoras, simulamos sistemas de cableado en condiciones realistas desde la fase de desarrollo, adaptándonos con precisión a las necesidades específicas de nuestros clientes. El desarrollo de prototipos se utiliza para validar las lecciones aprendidas en este proceso. Cada nuevo producto se somete a rigurosas pruebas de tipo, pruebas de envejecimiento y estudios a largo plazo, se somete a pruebas exhaustivas en el laboratorio de pruebas de la empresa y, posteriormente, se certifica según las más altas especificaciones.

Name: GKN Automotive Poland
Description:
Established in 1996, we employ 1600 people across the 3 sites at our facilities in Olesnica and manage over 90 production lines. We’ve invested heavily in developing our state-of-the-art engineering centre and in recent years have completely transformed our forging and production facilities to ensure our teams have the tools and resources they need to succeed and thrive in our environment. 

This site represents an important regional facility for the driveline technologies that GKN Automotive supply to our global customer base and has been recognised via various external awards for excellence and innovation. 

Our culture is open and collaborative, and employees regularly have an opportunity to engage with leaders, provide ideas and work to develop these to become a reality. It’s a place where our multi-discipline team's partner, collaborate, and learn from each other. 

Career development is supported by relevant, sponsored technical training, coaching, and access to self-driven training across a wide range of topics covering hard and soft skills. We take pride in the development of our people, supporting them to achieve their goals. Over 40% of our leadership team have progressed from operational delivery roles and 10% of our employees are now in global positions supporting the wider organization. 

We also support our employees to give back to the local communities through the GeKoN programme. In recent years we have sponsored and supported various initiatives from training rescue skills in the local communities, to rennivating schools making time and resources available to collaborate on these important events.

Name: KCPL INDIA
Description: KCPL is the fastest growing Company in India, manufacturing and dealing in automotive Radiators, Condensor, Cooling Coils, Fan assemblies, etc.

Name: Orbe Do Brasil
Description:
Na Orbe do Brasil, desenvolvemos tecnologias inteligentes que transformam a experiência no transporte coletivo rodoviário.
Somos referência nacional em soluções embarcadas para ônibus — integrando hardware robusto, software intuitivo e inteligência artificial de forma simples e eficaz.

Homologada por todas as principais montadoras do Brasil, a Orbe entrega desde carregadores USB e sistemas de áudio e vídeo até plataformas digitais completas, como o Sobrinho — nosso copiloto virtual que automatiza a jornada do passageiro e libera o motorista para focar no que realmente importa: dirigir com segurança.

Acreditamos que tecnologia de verdade acontece quando se conecta com pessoas, propósito e resultado.

 Unidades em Caxias do Sul (RS) e Araquari (SC)
 Clientes em todo o Brasil e América Latina
 Soluções para montadoras, encarroçadoras, frotistas e parceiros de mobilidade
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: TATA AutoComp Hendrickson Suspensions Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Tata AutoComp Hendrickson is a 50:50 Joint Venture between TATA AUTOCOMP SYSTEMS LIMITED and HENDRICKSON This JV was formed in 2006.

Name: CBS - Advanced Composites
Description:
Since 1989, CBS has been working in the world of advanced composites. Thanks to the high level of know-how acquired over the years, CBS is now a benchmark company on the market of composite materials made of carbon fibre. Production includes all those processes behind the creation of advanced composite components and sandwich panels. 
The strong presence of CBS in all areas where top-quality standards, performance and organization are required, is a clear indication of the company’s skills and expertise. 
In its two plants it employs the most advanced production technologies with a plant and machine inventory enabling to look after all the stages of the production process, from component design through to Numerical Control and Quality Control operations. Production flexibility is such as to satisfy all specific needs and special requirements in the field of high-tech manufacturing, starting with model development, the prototyping of “one-of-a-kind” items right through to large-volume production.

Name: Kitoplastic Indústria e Comércio de Plásticos
Description:
A Kitoplastic possui uma moderna estrutura de fabricação, com mais de 5.000 M² de area construída, 6 cabines de pintura, contando com logística própria, fazendo dela uma empresa de grande competência para atuar no sistema DSH (Direct Shipment).

Somos referência no mercado, na produção de peças plásticas pintadas na cor do carro, para venda no After Marketing, como acessórios originais de fábrica.

Utilizamos plásticos da marca BASF Samsung, tintas e vernizes dos fornecedores Axalta e Akzo Nobel, suprimentos de 3M do Brasil. Sempre trabalhamos com as melhores marcas, visando a qualidade dos nossos produtos, desde a linha de montagem até o produto finalizado.

Devido a todo este esforço e preocupação com a qualidade, que conquistamos o reconhecimento da ISO 9001-2008 e ISO TS 16949:2009 em nossas instalações.

Atualmente somos homologados em 17 montadoras, sendo elas: 
- Mitsubishi
- Suzuki
- Toyota
- Honda
- Volkswagen
- Jeep 
- RAM
- KIA
- Chery
- Peugeot
- Citröen
- Nissan
- Hyundai
- Renault
- Chevrolet (GM)
- Ford
- Fiat

Name: Monedero | Vehicle Spare Parts
Description:
At Auto Comercial Monedero, we are dedicated to the development, manufacturing, and distribution of spare parts and components for vehicles. Since our founding in 1998, we have grown to become a benchmark in the sector, operating in more than 70 countries. 

Our headquarters, located in Motilla del Palancar, spans 35,000 m² and includes administrative, commercial, training areas, and an advanced remanufacturing and repair center. 

Additionally, we have a 4,000 m² logistics center that ensures efficient management of storage, dispatch, and shipping of products to all our customers.

We focus on spare parts for:

➤ Engine
➤ Gearbox
➤ Differential
➤ Power steering
➤ Suspension
➤ Brakes
➤ Electrical system
➤ Cooling
➤ Lubrication
➤ Bodywork

At Auto Comercial Monedero, we firmly believe in innovation and continuous improvement. Our B2B platform offers access to over one million references, allowing our customers to easily make purchases and manage orders efficiently. 

It also features a distributor portal that offers exclusive benefits and personalized assistance.

Quality is a priority for us, as evidenced by our collaborations with leading brands such as ZF, Meritor, and Bosch to ensure the highest quality in our products.

Contact us to learn more about how we can help keep your company's vehicles running at peak performance.

Name: Autoliv do Brasil
Description: A Autoliv é líder mundial em sistemas de segurança automotiva: airbag, cinto de segurança e volante.

Name: Albert Jagger Limited
Description:
Albert Jagger is the leading manufacturer and distributer of commercial vehicle fittings since 1887, providing innovative designs, quality products and excellent service.

Astute management, strategic growth and a constant regard for the needs of our customers have seen the company become one of the largest manufacturers and suppliers to the commercial vehicle bodybuilder, boat builder, agricultural and engineering industries in the UK and a major supplier to many countries worldwide.

If you would like any details about our products or services, please contact us using any of the details below.

Call us with any queries or feedback on +44 (0) 1922 471000
Drop us an email anytime at sales@albertjagger.co.uk

Name: Sortimo North America
Description: Sortimo of North America is the global leader in innovative mobile shelving & racking solutions for vehicle organization. Focused on LCV's, Sortimo offers cargo systems for Vans, Trucks, SUV's & Cars to enable the best possible efficiency throughout the workday.

Name: Bardahl de México
Description: BARDAHL DE MÉXICO S. DE R.L. DE C.V., empresa dedicada al diseño, manufactura y distribución de fluidos y especialidades automotrices e industriales, aditivos, grasas lubricantes y cosméticos automotrices

Name: Alkraft Thermotechnologies
Description:
Alkraft is a leading manufacturer and thermal solutions partner to global OEMs in the automotive and non-automotive industries. Since pioneering the introduction of aluminium heat exchangers in India in the early 90s, we have been an innovator in thermal management technologies, driving a number of paradigm shifts in the industry. 

Today, over a quarter of all commercial vehicles on Indian roads count on Alkraft’s radiators, charge air coolers, oil coolers, and cooling system modules for their thermal management. We stay ahead of the curve by continuously pushing boundaries and building new solutions for the most stringent automotive emission standards, for renewable energy installations, for Electric Vehicles, and for specialty high-performance applications.

Name: HICOM DIECASTINGS (148133-M)
Description:
A leader in precision aluminium die casting, HICOM Diecastings Sdn Bhd is one of Malaysia’s most well-known industrial companies and a leading supplier of world-class aluminium die cast products and services to some of the biggest names in the local and international automotive, motorcycle and related industries.

Incorporated in 1985 and fully owned by DRB HICOM Berhad, HICOM Diecastings provides its clients with a cutting-edge combination of technology, technical know-how and a highly-skilled workforce that have made it the leading die caster in the region. The company focuses on its core competencies to continuously evolve and mould its vision to spearhead the industry’s future.

HICOM Diecastings utilises only the most advanced technology available at every stage of production to ensure components of the highest quality. Innovation, the ability to facilitate change and meeting a growing number of international manufacturing and management practice requirements has led to the company being awarded IATF16949, AS9100D, ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certifications.

HICOM Diecasting’s commitment to quality and continual improvement processes ensure that our complete precision die cast solutions exceed customer expectations in terms of cost, quality, development and delivery. Today, the company’s quest for innovation has led us to becoming the world’s most technically advanced manufacturer of quality die cast components.

Name: Helmer automotive srl
Description:
Helmer è un’azienda italiana leader nella distribuzione di lampade per autoveicoli nel mercato del ricambio auto indipendente.
Dal 1996 i nostri prodotti illuminano le strade degli automobilisti europei, contribuendo al miglioramento della loro sicurezza e del comfort di guida. Helmer è continuamente dedicata alla ricerca di tecnologie innovative per garantire la massima soddisfazione del cliente attraverso proposte di prodotti efficienti e di lunga durata, in grado di attrarne la richiesta grazie ad un equilibrato rapporto tra qualità,affidabilità e competitività.

Name: KOOVERS
Description: Welcome to Koovers – your ultimate destination for all automotive spare parts needs. We’re transforming the Indian Automotive Aftermarket by delivering genuine parts directly to your doorstep, making sourcing faster, easier, and more efficient. At Koovers, you’ll find a comprehensive range of authentic spares, delivered on time and at the right price, every time.

Name: LEONI România
Description:
LEONI este un furnizor global de produse, soluții și servicii pentru managementul energiei și al datelor în industria auto. Grupul de companii are aproximativ 87.000 de angajați în 21 de țări și a realizat vânzări consolidate de 5 miliarde EUR în 2024. Parteneriatul dintre LEONI și grupul Luxshare este în vigoare din mijlocul anului 2025.

În România, povestea LEONI a început în anul 1999, iar de atunci compania a devenit un pilon central în industria locală auto, operând 9 fabrici și un Shared Service Center. 

Istoria noastră în România începe odată cu deschiderea primei fabrici Wiring Systems Division la Arad în anul 1999. În anul 2002 a fost deschisă fabrica din Bistrița, urmând ca 3 ani mai târziu să își deschidă porțile și cea de la Pitești. Am continuat să ne extindem cu fabrici satelit în Beiuș, în anul 2010. Ulterior, în anul 2015, LEONI inaugurează a doua fabrică din Bistrița. În anul 2016, am înființat primul nostru Shared Service Center LEONI (SSC) în Cluj-Napoca, de unde sunt coordonate 17 funcții corporate distincte. În anul 2018, compania a făcut un salt important, deschizând simultan două fabrici satelit, în Marghita și Bumbești-Jiu. A doua fabrică din Arad a fost inaugurată în anul 2019, contribuind la creșterea capacității de producție în vestul țării. Cea mai recentă realizare a fost deschiderea unei noi fabrici în Beiuș, în anul 2023, ceea ce a marcat o nouă etapă în extinderea afacerii în România.

Cu o expertiză vastă în cercetare și dezvoltare, LEONI este un partener de încredere pentru producătorii auto în explorarea conceptelor de mobilitate sustenabilă. 

LEONI produce în România produse low-voltage pentru mașinile cu motoare termice, produse pentru motoarele hibride, produse high-voltage pentru mașinile electrice și produse pentru mașinile cu propulsie pe hidrogen.
Lanțul valoric variază de la cabluri standardizate, cabluri speciale și de date, până la sisteme de cablare extrem de complexe și componente conexe.

Name: BFX Peças Automotivas
Description:
A BFX é uma empresa de capital Nacional, que desenvolve e industrializa a mais completa linha de produtos metal borracha de alta performance, destinada a indústria automobilística nacional e internacional.

https://www.instagram.com/bfxautomotiva/

Name: PCEX Automotive
Description:
Experts in the international sales and distribution of automotive components. 
We help the international development of the main manufacturers of OEM automotive spare parts (as Renault, Dacia, Motrio, Peugeot, Citroën, Eurorepar, Toyota, Kia, Honda, Hyundai) and aftermarket (Brembo) on a world scale, providing a deep knowledge in international trade and an extensive sales network capable of distributing automotive components anywhere in the world.
We are specialists in sales and distribution in international markets with high entry barriers, which allows us to provide real added value in the chain of sale of the product.
We aspire to be one of the largest groups of international sales and distribution of automotive components.

Sous le message "Ignite your Spirit", Niterra transforme et étend son organisation ainsi que son portefeuille d'activités dans les domaines de la mobilité, du médical, de l'environnement, de l’énergie et des communications. Dans le monde, Niterra compte 61 filiales, 24 sites de production et de vente et environ 15 950 employés.

Description: We began our journey in 1988 as SW Manufacturing, Inc.; the first international manufacturing facility for Shiroki Corporation (our Parent Company) taking advantage of Shiroki senior management's "international foresight". In 2007 Shiroki Corporation decided for better global management and branding purposes, that SW Manufacturing would be renamed SHIROKI North America, Inc.; establishing a portion of the Smithville, TN site to function as the Headquarters for all North America business. At the end of 2014 it was announced that AISIN SEIKI (Japan) would subsume Shiroki Corporation (and thus SHIROKI North America, Inc.); which was concluded as of April 2016. Now AISIN SHIROKI Corporation (our parent company), an AISIN Group company, we are energized and working towards our better tomorrow each day.

Name: MECANIZADOS GOITONDO SL
Description:
MECANIZADOS GOITONDO es una empresa de subcontratación fundada en el año 2002, dedicada al mecanizado de todo tipo de piezas bajo plano o indicaciones del cliente.

    Contamos con un amplio parque de maquinaria compuesto principalmente por Tornos y Centros de control numérico y estamos especializados en la fabricación unitaria y de series pequeñas y medianas y en el diseño, fabricación y automatización de utillajes sin descartar ningún proyecto de mayores cantidades. 

    Gracias a nuestra red de colaboradores (soldadura, tratamientos térmicos, electroerosión, vulcanizado, corte laser) podemos aportar un mayor valor añadido a nuestros clientes entregando las piezas terminadas si el cliente lo requiere.

    El trabajar durante tantos años con series cortas y unitarias nos ha aportado miles de horas de aprendizaje y especialización en todo tipo de piezas. De esta manera hemos conseguido ser altamente eficientes manteniendo unos altos cánones de calidad, cumpliendo con los plazos de entrega acordados y a unos precios razonables que nos permiten marcar la diferencia dentro de un sector tan competitivo como el de la máquina herramienta.

El trabajo bien hecho, el respeto a las personas, la innovación como base de nuestra mejora, la fidelidad con nuestros clientes y nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad ambiental son valores que nos acompañan en el día a día de este camino que llevamos recorriendo desde hace ya más de 2 décadas y esperamos seguir recorriendo.

Name: RHYTHM VIETNAM (SAIGON) CO., LTD. (Ex. KYOSHIN VIETNAM)
Description:
"When it comes to metal stamping, Ask for Kyoshin!"
Aiming to become the best partner of Vietnam.

One-stop service that offers a little extra satisfaction
1. Metal Stamping
This is our core business. We can handle complicated stamping parts using the latest technology and equipment.
(Terminal, Deep Drawing, Bracket, Bus-bar, Yoke, Plate, Holder, Element, Lamination Core, Clamp, Retainer, Caliper)
2. Metal Stamping Dies
We offer in-house designing and development of progressive metal stamping dies. With our integrated production process starting from tooling, we can handle urgent changes in specifications. In-Die Riveting, Crimping and Tapping are available. 
3. Surface Treatment
We are fully equipped with surface treatment and can handle processes after stamping such as barrel/reel to reel plating and heating treatment.
4. Insert Plastic Molding & Assembly
Besides integrated molding of plastic and metal parts which involves a high level of difficulty, we also carry out solenoid coiling and assembly.

Since our establishment in 1995, Kyoshin Vietnam Co., Ltd. has been engaged in the production of pressed products for more than 25 years in Vietnam. We have continued to grow steadily with the objective of living up to the words of our customers - "When it comes to metal stamping, Ask for Kyoshin!" Today, there are more than 40 million products per month made by our experienced Vietnamese staff. We handle an average of 400 types of products per month with a focus on automotive and motorcycles as well as solar power generators and home appliances industries. We deliver products not only within Vietnam but also to countries around the world.
We take pride in the experience and track record we have build up over the years, and we will continue to stay as a metal stamping company that is loved by everybody in future.

Kyoshin Vietnam Co., Ltd. is a fully owned subsidiary of Rhythm Kyoshin Co., Ltd. and has a branch factory in Hanoi, named Rhythm Kyoshin Hanoi Co., Ltd.

- In-house production of 5-6 dies per month, supported by advanced casting simulation technology.
- A wide range of castings, from 100 grams to 10 kilograms in weight.
- Cutting-edge CNC machining capabilities with 40 CNC machines, including 24 Vertical Machining Centers (VMCs) and 16 Turning Centers.
- CAD/CAM capabilities utilizing industry-leading software such as Unigraphics, Solid Edge, Die-Defice, and Vericut.
- 3 CNC milling machines for precise manufacturing.

Post-Production and Finishing Services:

- In-house processes including trimming, shot blasting, vibro-deburring, anodizing, vacuum impregnation, and chromating.
- Fully automated washing and dedicated leak testing for high-quality assurance.
- Subcontracted services for powder coating and lacquering.

At Sipra, we are committed to delivering precision, quality, and innovation in every casting we produce.

Name: TECNECO FILTRATION
Description:
TECNECO FILTRATION progetta, produce e commercializza filtri aria, filtri olio, filtri carburante, filtri abitacolo e filtri olio per cambi automatici per automobili, veicoli commerciali leggeri, mezzi agricoli e industriali. Il nostro core business è l'Aftermarket Indipendente (IAM), settore che attrae il 70% del volume di affari annuo con una percentuale del 55% in Italia e del 45% all'esportazione.
Il 30% della produzione è destinato al settore Industrial che comprende la produzione conto terzi per altri players nel campo della filtrazione e la produzione per il settore del Ricambio Originale (OES) e del Primo Impianto (OEM).

Name: AEW Automotive Inc.
Description:
Established in 1999, AEW has been dedicated to the design, development, and manufacturing of automotive interior safety and comfort components. With its outstanding technical capabilities, our company has evolved into a leading high-tech enterprise in the industry. We continuously enhance our innovation and R&D systems, successfully establishing the one -stop solution that focuses on automotive thermal and posture comfort systems, providing customers with integrated, high-quality services. Headquartered in Wuqing District, Tianjin, China, AEW currently operates 5 R&D centers and 11 production bases globally.                                                                     
Guided by our business philosophy of creating value for customers, offering opportunities for employees, contributing to society, and establishing a global brand, we are committed to becoming a reliable supplier in the global automotive industry. By harnessing the power of human creativity, we strive to build a safer and more comfortable travel experience for all.

Name: Olystra Special Tools
Description: Olystra Special Tools develops and manufactures special tools for all automobiles. We are committed to making the servicing of vehicles faster and safer. Name: HRC
Description:
Founded in 2014, HRC is one of the global leaders in advanced composite solutions, specializing in high-performance carbon fiber technology. With a presence in five countries worldwide, HRC supports the entire lifecycle of carbon fiber applications—from research and development, engineering design, and industrialized serial production to recycling and reuse. 

We partner with diverse industries, including automotive, aerospace, clean energy, and construction, helping clients achieve key objectives such as lightweighting, product differentiation, and performance improvement.Over the years, we have proudly collaborated with industry leaders such as Koenigsegg, Lotus, Airbus, BYD, Polestar, XPENG, and many others—delivering innovative, high-quality products that redefine what’s possible in composite technology. 

With our focus on technical excellence and sustainable innovation, HRC remains a trusted partner for composite solutions—ensuring every project is Lighter. Faster. Stronger. Greener.

Name: SHOKON
Description:
Our Vision is to become a globally recognized leader in automotive accessories by embracing innovation, sustainability, and social responsibility, while positively impacting our customers, team members, stakeholders, communities, and the environment.

We are the builders of a legacy—Shokon is founded with the spirit of a strong beginning ("Shokon" = beginning spirit), inspired by Japanese precision and driven by continuous evolution. Our mission is to create lasting value that not only serves us today but empowers future generations to carry the vision forward.

Name: Suporte Rei
Description:
Fundada em 1960, a SUPORTE REI é uma das gigantes brasileiras do segmento de peças automotivas para veículos da linha pesada e utilitários. Com sede em Cajuru, a empresa desenvolve, produz e comercializa uma linha ampla e diversificada de suportes e componentes para cardans, polias, antivibradores, tampas de vedação, buchas e batentes de alta qualidade e durabilidade para caminhões, ônibus, utilitários e veículos agrícolas de diferentes montadoras.

Uma empresa familiar com capital 100% brasileiro e presença mundial, que atende com excelência todo o mercado nacional e exporta para mais de 75 países em todos os continentes. Em mais de 60 anos de história, a SUPORTE REI investe forte em inovação, tecnologia, pesquisa e desenvolvimento, todos alinhados à responsabilidade socioambiental.

Os produtos SUPORTE REI são fabricados com matéria-prima de alta pureza, montados em uma linha de produção com equipamentos sofisticados e padronização garantida por normas internacionais de controle de qualidade.

Name: Armada Toolworks Ltd.
Description:
At Armada, we don’t just build parts—we make ideas real.

Founded in 1972, we have evolved from a small tool shop into a full-spectrum manufacturing partner. We combine automotive-grade precision with the agility needed for medical, consumer, and industrial innovation.

Why Armada?
- End-to-End: Design, tooling, prototyping, and production under one roof.
- Financial Certainty: Backed by long-term ownership, we invest when others retreat.
- Diverse Capabilities: Plastic and metal injection molding, decorative finishing, and complex assembly

Whether you have a sketch or a spec, we support your journey from concept to market-ready product.

Name: Ferriere di Stabio SA
Description: Ferriere di Stabio is a European leader and one of the world's main manufacturers of special fasteners, components, and parts in stainless steels and nickel alloys, produced through cold forming and/or precision machining. The company has extensive expertise in high-temperature and corrosion-resistant applications. Key customers include Automotive OEMs and their tiers. Ferriere di Stabio is also a solution provider for the latest applications, such as electric vehicles. We employ 300 people across two production sites located in Stabio and China.

Name: Ciosa Autopartes

Nuestra participación en el mercado se caracteriza por:

Estar comprometidos con el servicio y la atención personalizada de cada uno de nuestros clientes, porque son quienes nos impulsan a ser mejores en cada paso que damos.
Contar con líneas de productos completas que ofrecen una amplia variedad y calidad en autopartes y satisfacen las necesidades del mercado.

Contar con un equipo directivo altamente calificado con una gran visión global, que nos permite la toma de decisiones oportunas para direccionar la empresa siempre hacia un mejor rumbo.
Creer en el talento joven, quienes con visión y pasión trabajan para "marcar la diferencia".
Promover una cultura organizacional que fomente el crecimiento personal y profesional de todos nuestros colaboradores.
Una sólida gestión de las finanzas que genera valor a nuestros accionistas y a la industria. Innovar continuamente en nuestros procesos y sistemas para ofrecer el mejor servicio a nuestros clientes.

Name: AD BOSCH
Description:
AD BOSCH és un grup d'empreses que operen a les comarques de Girona i Barcelona des de l'any 1970. La seves activitats es centren bàsicament en la distribució de recanvi per a l'automòbil i el vehicle industrial; la venda de maquinària pel taller i estacions de rentat, amb el seu corresponent servei de posvenda; la distribució de lubricants i productes químics; els subministraments industrials i un ampli ventall d'activitats complementàries de servei pels seus clients, tals com formació, tutoria i informació tècnica, disseny d'instal·lacions o suport informàtic.

Està integrada en el grup AD PARTS, que aglutina 28 empreses a Espanya i Portugal i que alhora, forma part de AD Internacional amb una presència a 31 països d'Europa.

Contacta'ns per a més informació:

info@adbosch.cat

Name: Driving Change Group
Description:
The Driving Change Group is an international, family-owned group based in the Netherlands that designs, develops and produces high-quality, innovative products for the leisure vehicle market - ranging from premium parts for campers and caravans to compact mobility solutions. 

The group brings together three complementary brands: 

Horrex – flyscreens, blinds and window systems for campers and caravans (OEM) 

InnoSlide – innovative slide-out systems for recreational vehicles 

ClikeBikes – compact bicycles and e-bikes for the leisure market 

Each brand serves its own market and target audience, while sharing the same technical foundation, engineering expertise and long-term vision on innovation and quality. 

What started in 1987 as Horrex, founded by Ed Gennissen, has grown into an international group with multiple brands and product categories. Today, the Driving Change Group works worldwide with OEM partners and customers, driven by a clear mission: to develop smart, sustainable and future-ready solutions that enhance comfort, functionality and mobility - while maintaining a strong family culture, short communication lines and long-term partnerships.

Name: Engrecon S.A.

Name: Sigma Group
Description:
Sigma International, headquartered in the United States, is a global manufacturer of automotive decorative trim.  Our core technologies are injection molding, decorative plating, PVD, LED lighting and painting.  Our molding capabilities range from 2-shot, insert molding, molded-in color and IMD.  Our robotic paint line includes multi-color, hard and soft-touch finishes.  Our LED technologies are used in the CHMSL lighting, interior ambient, puddle lamps and door sill lighting. Ask us about our patent pending LED interior lighting.

With our plating technologies we produce bright, satin, platinum, black and galvano finishes.  We plate and paint finished products such as:  door handles, grilles, door moldings, fog lamp bezels, license plate garnish, steering wheel trim, IP clusters, air vent surrounds and a variety of interior knobs, buttons and bezels.  With operations in USA, Mexico, China, South Korea, India and South Africa, we are well positioned to support global platforms.

Our strong design and engineering teams can develop your products from sketch to production.  We utilize CAD tools such as Catia and NX for design.  Our best-in-class ERP/MRP systems ensure dependable just-in-time support to your assembly plant. 

Contact us to find out how we Craft Beauty Through Innovation.

Name: AutoExcellence For Service & Parts
Description:
Autoexcellence for service and parts is a privately owned company that was founded over 59 years ago as a leading service and parts distribution operation in Jordan.
Our portfolio today reflects a commitment to supply high quality products and services to a diverse loyal customer base.

Today, Autoexcellence owns five service and spare parts sales outlets which are located all over Jordan and expanded its presence within the regional markets “Iraq and Palestine”.

Each branch covers the geographical area it’s in to ensure maximum market penetration. Branches are supported by a well-trained outdoor sales team and a fleet of delivery trucks working around the clock to ensure systematic delivery of products to our trade partners.

Name: Pavoni Tractorparts
Description: Pavoni Tractorparts has been working for more than 40 years in the parts market for tractors, excavators, wheel loaders, backhoe loaders and similars. Make your quote and check out our amazing offers!

GRUPO AUTOMOTRIZ PROLUSA distribuye las llantas PIRELLI, HANKOOK, BRIDGESTONE, FIRESTONE, y la prestigiosa línea de productos de limpieza y mantenimiento del automóvil, MEGUIAR’S.

Name: Yazaki Ciemel Colombia
Description:
Conoce el mundo Yazaki, líder global en energía automotriz, tecnologías de visualización y datos.

En Yazaki somos especialistas. Contamos con centros de innovación, desarrollo e investigación, lo que nos permite suministrar arneses eléctricos y brindar servicios de ensamble para la industria automotriz.

Somos un socio confiable con más de 60 años en la industria automotriz, fomentando la sostenibilidad ambiental en todos nuestros procesos.

Description: Fras-le is a driving force in the global automotive parts industry, bringing together a portfolio of well recognized high-quality products and brands. In addition, it is one of the world's largest manufacturers of friction material, serving both Original Equipment and aftermarket.

Name: Algo Group
Description:
ALGO, frutto di più acquisizioni, è uno degli attori principali a livello mondiale nello sviluppo, produzione e distribuzione di alzacristalli, maniglie e serrature per autovetture e veicoli industriali sia per l’aftermarket con una gamma che copre il 95% del parco circolante europeo, americano e australiano, sia per il primo impianto dove è partner privilegiato delle più importanti aziende automobilistiche europee per veicoli speciali ed auto elettriche.
Oggi il gruppo Algo, fortemente europeo con i suoi stabilimenti in Italia e in Polonia, vede già una presenza in Messico da cui partirà la distribuzione verso il Nord America e il Sud America, e importanti partnership in Asia così come non è esclusa nel futuro qualche operazione industriale in aree come la Cina e gli Stati Uniti. 
Da oltre 60 anni il gruppo persegue l’obiettivo della qualità totale, obiettivo certificato per la gestione della qualità, dell’impatto ambientale e della responsabilità sociale e prevede per il futuro un’accelerazione delle crescite tecnologiche e delle innovazioni a casa propria.
La forza di Algo è rappresentata dai suoi marchi LiftTek, Electric-Life, PMM e Miraglio, così come dalla gestione dei dati tecnici attraverso la digitalizzazione delle informazioni tecniche e l’utilizzo di forme più evolute come il QC.
lgo, credibilità internazionale garantita da un impegno a 360°.

Name: 4QT
Description:
At 4QT, we electrify heavy machinery - without compromising on power or performance.

Our patented hybrid-electric drivetrain delivers maximum torque, significantly lower fuel consumption, and reduced emissions. It's purpose-built for the real-world demands of construction, where downtime is expensive and charging infrastructure is often limited.

With up to 40% lower fuel consumption, 4QT offers operators and OEMs a faster path to both profitability and sustainability - no dedicated charging stations required.

We're engineers, builders, and system thinkers - shaping the future of high-power electric motion.

Name: Albonair GmbH
Description:
It is our mission to make the air cleaner - with exhaust aftertreatment systems made in Germany. The demand for innovative, cost-efficient solutions for exhaust aftertreatment will increase even further in the coming years. Worldwide, the emission standards for diesel engines are becoming stricter. We provide our customers with tailor-made solutions for meeting this challenge.

We count on solid German engineering and offer excellent quality at competitive prices. As globally successful company and member of the Hinduja Group, we develop and produce SCR and diesel particulate filter systems, as well as combined systems that are precision-tailored to the specific market requirements.

Name: Pagid UK & ROI
Description:
Pagid is an OE brand of TMD Friction, one of the world’s biggest manufacturer of brake friction, and a truly global partner for the automotive industry.

Together, the group supplies braking to vehicle manufacturers, distributors and installers on every continent, and in every significant marketplace. With headquarters in Leverkusen, Germany, Pagid brake pads are 100% manufactured in-house at our own state-of-the-art production facilities across Europe.

From specification, development and testing to raw material procurement, manufacturing, and quality control, every stage of the process is entirely under our control. It means that customers can choose Pagid with total confidence.

Name: Tech International do Brasil
Description: 83 anos de confiança em reparação de pneus e reconhecida pelos técnicos de pneus desde 1939, a Tech disponibiliza a melhor qualidade em reparos, produtos e serviços para rodas.

Name: GLN Advanced Solutions S.A.
Description:
GLN Advanced Solutions S.A. is a Group Manuel Champalimaud company that acquired the assets from Novares Portugal S.A., namely the plants in Leiria and Vendas Novas, including the Competence Center.

As a technical plastics solutions provider, with more than 30 years’ experience in automotive, GLN Advanced Solutions designs and manufactures complex components and systems supplying Tier-1 and OEM main clients.

GLN Advanced Solutions creates and produces cutting edge solutions with technical plastics injection, sophisticated surface finishings and complex assemblies for automotive industry.

Manufacturing processes include injection, painting, IML, laser etching, pad printing, silk screening, high-pressure forming, hot stamping, and assembly.

Come and discover the economic, stylistic and functional potential of these technologies!

Name: Grupo Pecmotors
Description:
O Grupo Pecmotors é uma referência nacional no setor automotivo, com uma presença sólida em diversas regiões do Brasil. Reconhecida pela confiança e pelo relacionamento estreito com seus clientes, a empresa oferece um portfólio completo de produtos e serviços voltados para empresas e profissionais que buscam alta performance, durabilidade e elevados padrões de qualidade.

Como representante oficial das marcas Lubegard, Mannol e The Eagle no Brasil, o Grupo Pecmotors entrega soluções completas para o setor. A Lubegard é especializada em aditivos automotivos, com foco na proteção de transmissões automáticas, melhorando a durabilidade e a eficiência dos sistemas de transmissão. A Mannol fabrica óleos e lubrificantes de alta tecnologia para motores e veículos pesados, maximizando o desempenho e reduzindo o desgaste. A The Eagle se destaca no desenvolvimento de equipamentos e acessórios para manutenção e diagnóstico de veículos, otimizando os processos de reparo.

O grupo também investe na capacitação do setor por meio da Velope Cursos, uma plataforma educacional que oferece formação avançada para profissionais, e do Oli App, um aplicativo que facilita a gestão de oficinas. A ATF6000PRO, máquina dedicada à limpeza e manutenção de transmissões, otimiza os serviços de oficina e aumenta a vida útil dos componentes.

A Pecmotors é a distribuidora exclusiva do grupo nas regiões de Santa Catarina, Paraná e Rio Grande do Sul, oferecendo soluções completas e atendimento personalizado para empresas e profissionais dessas localidades.

Assim, o Grupo Pecmotors vai além da distribuição de produtos de qualidade, contribuindo para o desenvolvimento do setor com tecnologias inovadoras e capacitação profissional, melhorando a eficiência das oficinas em todo o Brasil.

Name: UACJ Automotive Whitehall Industries, Inc.
Description:
WE BEGAN AS WHITEHALL INDUSTRIES IN 1974, MANUFACTURING PRECISION COMPONENTS FOR THE COPYING AND PRINTING INDUSTRY.

IN 2001, WE STARTED OUR FIRST ALUMINUM EXTRUSION OPERATION IN ORDER TO PROVIDE BETTER PRODUCTS TO OUR CUSTOMERS, ESPECIALLY THOSE IN THE AUTOMOTIVE INDUSTRY. SINCE THEN, WE HAVE ESTABLISHED OURSELVES AS AN INDUSTRY PIONEER FOR PRECISION EXTRUDED ALUMINUM AUTOMOTIVE COMPONENTS AND ASSEMBLIES.

TODAY, AS UACJ AUTOMOTIVE WHITEHALL INDUSTRIES (UACJ-WHITEHALL), OUR ORIGINAL BUSINESS PHILOSOPHY CONTINUES TO LEAD US, AS WE PROVIDE OUR CUSTOMERS WITH INDUSTRY LEADING QUALITY PARTS AND SERVICES. YEAR AFTER YEAR, OUR BUSINESS HAS STEADILY GROWN BY SETTING INTERNAL BENCHMARKS FAR ABOVE THE INDUSTRY STANDARDS. SINCE GAINING THE GLOBAL SUPPORT OF THE UACJ GROUP, WE HAVE EXPANDED OUR CAPABILITIES IN R&D AND DESIGN, AS WELL AS THE ABILITY TO LEVERAGE OUR FELLOW UACJ COMPANIES IN ORDER TO MEET A BROADER SCOPE OF OUR CUSTOMER’S NEEDS

Description: ELTA is a major automotive component importer and distributor, and a licensee of the iconic Lucas brand. Established in 1993, ELTA supplies motor factors and retailers throughout the world from its locations in the UK and Europe. ELTA delivers a diverse product range across a portfolio of brands to meet customer demands for quality, reliability and value. ELTA are a certified data provider to AutoCat+, Aldoc and TecDoc, ensuring accurate up-to-date application data is available 24/7 throughout the world.

Name: MILE MARKER INDUSTRIES, INC.
Description:
Mile Marker Industries, Inc., first established in 1984, is a Florida based company that designs and manufactures innovative, top quality, and highly durable products for vehicle, ATV/UTV, transport and towing, marine, public safety, and military and government applications. Our products include premium locking hubs, conversion kits, and recovery gear to compliment our electric winches and our legendary hydraulic winch system. We are an ISO certified organization and a TACOM approved supplier to the US Military including the only approved winch for the US Military’s HMMWV (Humvee). 
Our products are not only great for the military proven, but preferred by enthusiasts that care about quality and performance. Our newest product, the Rhino Pull 1000, is a hand held winch that is battery powered with a remote control providing you a portable winching tool anywhere you need it. Our team will be exhibiting at SEMA in Las Vegas in early November, 2022.

Name: GroupAuto Latam Austral
Description:
Somos parte de Groupauto Internacional, el más importante ITG (International Trading Group) del mundo, que busca generar y fortalecer vínculos entre los fabricantes de autopartes y nuestros miembros, con el objetivo de profesionalizar, desarrollar y dar crecimiento al aftermarket y redes de servicio en las regiones donde operamos.

Nuestros miembros representan los mejores distribuidores de autopartes y proveedores de servicios de cada país, tanto para vehículos livianos como pesados.

En LATAM AUSTRAL integramos un bloque regional compuesto por Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Uruguay, Paraguay y Perú que, bajo una misma organización, nos permite desarrollar sinergias e invertir en programas de crecimiento, agregando valor en todos los eslabones de la cadena a nuestros proveedores y miembros, potenciando sus negocios y fortaleciendo el aftermarket independiente.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

We are part of Groupauto Internacional, the most important ITG (International Trading Group) in the world, which seeks to generate and strengthen links between auto-parts manufacturers and our Members with the goal of professionalizing, developing and growing the Aftermarket and Service market.

Our Members represent the best Auto-Parts Distributors and Service providers in each country, for light and heavy duty vehicles.

In LATAM AUSTRAL we integrate a regional block made up of Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Uruguay, Paraguay and Peru, which, under the same organization, allows us to develop synergies and invest in growth programs, adding value across all the stages of the supply chain, to our members & suppliers, boosting their businesses and bolstering the independent automotive aftermarket.

Description:

These technologies provide improved efficiency in the foundry and enhanced product quality assurance for the end-users.

Pikpart Spares - Where Quality Meets Reliability.

Name: Halo By Orthene
Description: Halo By Orthene is the producer of the world's best racing brake fluid for motorsport professionals, Halo P1. Halo By Orthene is backed by nearly 50 years of chemical engineering experience from its parent company, Orthene Chemicals, innovating in brake fluids since the 1970s. Halo P1 is the pinnacle of racing brake fluid available today and is trusted by teams in every elite category of motorsport around the world. Designed specifically for top-tier professional motorsport. Incompressible over the widest temperature range – heat resistant to 341°C – and boasting a stable pedal feel and minimal fade from the first lap to the last, Halo P1 boosts driver confidence for faster times and podium finishes.

Our mission is to deliver superior piston products through innovation, precision engineering, and a commitment to sustainability. We partner with globally recognized manufacturers and provide the best customer service in UAE.
Radiant has showrooms in Dubai, AbuDhabi and Sharjah. We create a reliable and mutually beneficial relationship with the clients assuring them the finest products and services. Description:
Lucky Lion Imp & Exp (Qingdao) Co., Ltd. is located in Qingdao, Shandong Province, the largest tire production base in China. We specialize in the sales and services of truck tires, passenger car tires, and off-road tires, and we are striving to become a professional tire solution provider. Our affiliated factories have obtained ISO/TS16949, DOT, E4, and GCC certificates.

We now have a full range of TBR, PCR, Bias OTR tires, as well as tires for ports, forklifts, and skid-steer loaders, among others. Most of our products have been certified by ISO9001, ISO/TS16949, CCC, E-mark, DOT, GSO/GCC, SONCAP, INMETRO, and NOM.

We provide competitive prices, timely delivery, and excellent after-sales service. We have exported tires to 113 countries, widely distributed in the Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa, Russia, North America, and Latin America. At the same time, we have our own professional marketing team, dedicated to the marketing of our brand, designing and preparing promotional materials, and helping customers to implement marketing plans in the local market, etc.

LIONLK believes that "the value of the product is the key to purchase," so we insist on providing customers with the most suitable products, not the most expensive. Quality is the market vitality of the product. LIONLK tires are backed by advanced production equipment and testing equipment, a strong technical team, and a sound quality control system. We are committed to providing first-class high-quality products.

Win-win cooperation is the foundation of our success. Sincerely treating our partners is our eternal goal. We sincerely hope to become your good partner and friend, join the LIONLK family together, and promise to give timely market protection to our partners and gradually become our regional agents.

We warmly welcome friends to visit our factory to discuss long-term and stable business relationships!

Name: MDS Engineering Solutions
Description:
MDS is a global engineering and manufacturing solutions partner, headquartered in India with a strong international presence. We specialize in delivering critical components and complete solutions through a unique hybrid model – combining in-house machining expertise with a network of 200+ qualified suppliers in casting, forging, and raw materials.

Our strength lies in managing the entire value chain – from raw material sourcing to precision machining – helping our partners improve efficiency, reduce costs, and achieve reliable quality. With operations spanning North America, Europe, and Asia, we ensure seamless supply across global markets.
