Name: EXO Automotive Spa
Description:
EXO Automotive è un’azienda italiana attiva dal 1992 nel
settore after-market automobilistico, specializzata nella
produzione e distribuzione di ricambi auto. Con il marchio OP, l’azienda offre una gamma completa di
ricambi certificati equivalenti agli originali (OES), apprezzati
a livello internazionale per gli elevati standard qualitativi.

Tutta la gamma di prodotti rispetta le specifiche tecniche e gli standard di produzione forniti dal costruttore certificando il prodotto come QUALITÀ EQUIVALENTE, in conformità a quanto previsto dalla Direttiva (EEC) n. 461/2010 e dall’ISO TS 16949:2009.

A conferma del costante impegno nell’assicurare servizi e prodotti di qualità, EXO Automotive ha la certificazione internazionale EN ISO 9001 : 2015.

Nel sito di EXO Automotive www.openparts.it sono presenti informazioni dell’azienda, presentazione prodotti e cataloghi dettagliati per la ricerca dei ricambi completi di specifiche tecniche, disegni tecnici, video istruzioni. 
---
EXO Automotive is an Italian company that has been
operating since 1992 in the automotive after-market sector,
specialising in producing and distributing automotive spare
parts.
Under the OP brand, the company offers a complete range of certified original-equivalent (OES) spare parts appreciated worldwide for their high quality.

The entire range of products offered by EXO complies with the specifications and production standards provided by the manufacturer, in accordance with Regulation (EU) N. 461/2010.
As proof of its on-going commitment to ensuring quality services and products to its customers, in 2010, EXO obtained international EN ISO 9001 : 2008 certification, a further guarantee of optimal management of all operational activities. 

In EXO Automotive website www.openparts.it you can find company informations, presentation of all products and a web catalogue with technical info and images, video instructions.

Name: Hekimoğlu Döküm
Description: Hekimoğlu Corporate Group is an organization which has gained the trust of the largest companies, both domestic and foreign, in the Automotive sector by combining its advanced technology, experience over 50 years and the effort of Turkish labour.

Name: Maselli Suspension
Description:
Italian StartUp, Engineering & Manufacturing high level Motorcycle Rear Shocks, Cartridges and Front Forks. 
We do: 
- Engineering 
- Setting support 
- Production with our own brand & with the customer brand - - The most reliable Fork and Shock absorber for your Motorcycle, all designed, tested and manufactured in Italy

Name: ETBO Tool & Die Inc.
Description:
ETBO Tool and Die is located in Aylmer, Ontario, Canada and is a recognized industry leader in quality tooling systems.
We provide low-risk, simplified supply chain management and continuity of communication by integrating many specialties within one technically driven company.

Name: OSVAT Srl
Description:
OSVAT S.r.l. is one of the world’s leading companies specialised in the production of a wide range of valves, valve seats and valve guides for endothermic engines.

With its 60-year experience and highly specialised personnel, OSVAT faces the market with a “customer oriented” approach with two brands: OSVAT and QUEEN. Both can offer customers a tailor-made product in a customisable packaging.

OSVAT offers a range of over 8,000 items covering the main European, US and Asiatic models for the car, commercial, industrial and agricultural vehicle sectors as well as the earth-moving machinery sector.

Name: Air Top Italia
Description: The history of Air Top Italia is that of a 100% made in Italy provincial company, which in just 30 years has conquered a dominant position in the cabin air filtration market, thanks to the high performance of the products in the abatement of pollen and dust. , pollutants and bacteria. The growing production translates into important structural extensions that lead the company to occupy an area of over 15,000 m2. All production processes for the different lines of filters, activated carbon, fiber, combined and antibacterial are completely automated. Each phase is carried out within the company. For years, Air Top Italia has been designing filters with very high performance and reliability for all the main application sectors. Air Top Italia is present on the market with the widest range of products for the automotive, commercial vehicle, truck, earthmoving, agriculture, home automation and office sectors. All filters are made with advanced filter media to ensure safer, healthier and more comfortable driving. The rigorous laboratory tests confirm that Air Top Italia filters represent the result of the most advanced technologies in the sector. The flagship is the 3Active antibacterial filter which ensures the maximum possible protection (over 99%) inside the passenger compartment against viruses and bacteria.

Name: Dongguan Fortuna Metals Co,Ltd
Description:
Official Email: ym@syjwj.com.cn   Sales Manager/Senior Engineer(Steven Yan)

Dongguan Fortuna Metals Co.,Ltd. was established in 2003. lt has a factory area of 16,500 square meters and 260+ employees. lt is a production enterprise specializing in precision metal stamping parts, precision CNC processing and product assembly.

Certificate: lATF16949:2016,ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 14001:2015 environmental system.

R&D Team: 45 professional mold technicians and 5 mold design engineers；10 sets of low-speed wire cutting Machine; Full-process copyrighted CAD/3D drawing software to ensure data security, design compatibility and collaboration.

Advanced equipment: 85 sets of stamping machines, punching tonnage from 25-300 tons, stamping speed can reach 1200 times/ min. The monthly processing capacity of single product is 20 million pieces; 40 sets of 5-axis CNC machines and 2 sets of 6-axis CNC machines that imported from Japan.CNC machining parts can be processed with diameter of 1.0-32MM, and the machining accuracy can reach 0.005mm.

Quality promise: Strictly implement PPAP level 3 to ensure 0 PPM in mass production.100% full inspection before shipment. RoHS compliant, REACH,SGS,MSDS report.

Fortuna can provide you with verified product carbon data reports that comply with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism) requirements.

Name: Advanced Composites Solutions Srl
Description: ACS works in advanced composites market field. It takes care of design, industrialization and production of composites components, structures and substructures using composites material and advanced production processes. It's skilled in production in autoclave, pressprepreg thermoset, pressCFSMC, pressprepreg thermoplastic, High pressure RTM.

Name: PreBo Automotive Private Limited
Description:
PreBo is a Joint venture company, started in March 2019 under the JV partnership of Prettl & Bosch Ltd.
We offer technical expertise of both these landmark companies in the domain of Electromechanical Sub assemblies. Our product range in Automotive sector ranges from both Electromechanical to Mechanical Sub assemblies viz- Brush cards, Hand primers, Armature, Magnetic coils, Fuel pumps, Wiper Systems .......
We are a team of young professionals who believe in our motto " Shaping the Change". Our Strength is Agility, Lean & Cost effective products. With this belief, we have rolled out all our products in record time. We take pride in launching our second location at Chennai within just two years of the start of our Parent plant in Bangalore.
We believe in a sustainable Partnership & would be pleased to be associated with you.

Name: MANSUERA S.A.
Description:
Desde el año 1985 Mansuera está orientada a la distribución de repuestos alternos, genuinos y originales de las principales marcas de autos de Ecuador. Cuenta con el respaldo del grupo Baca.

El mejoramiento continuo, respeto por los demás y el mejor grupo humano hacen de Mansuera el almacén de repuestos automotrices multimarca líder del país.

Name: Toyoda Gosei South India
Description:
Toyoda Gosei South India is a leading player in the automotive components industry. Established in 1998, we are a joint venture between Toyoda Gosei Japan, Uno Minda and Toyota Tsusho in India. We develop, manufacture, and market high-quality systems such as interior and exterior components, safety systems,  functional components and sealing systems for major automotive manufacturers worldwide. Our innovative solutions enhance vehicle safety, comfort, and environmental sustainability.

Our dedicated team of employees in India is driven by our mission of excellence and quality. We are committed to continuous improvement and innovation, ensuring our products meet the highest standards in the industry. Our state-of-the-art facilities enable us to stay at the forefront of automotive technology.

For more information, visit our website at http://www.tgsin.in

Name: Niken Ind. e Com. Metalurgica Ltda
Description:
A Niken é uma empresa com grande experiência no segmento de autopeças desenvolvendo produtos estampados e conjuntos soldados para a indústria automobilística.
A empresa opera em um sistema “Lean Manufacturing”,  desenvolvendo eficácia de seus colaboradores e processos, adicionando o máximo valor agregado a seus clientes.
Nossa missão é atender nossos clientes com qualidade, pontualidade, tecnologia e preços competitivos.
Localizada na cidade de Suzano-SP em uma área de 10.000m2, a Niken possui grandes instalações com uma enorme variedade de equipamentos de alta tecnologia, além da preservação da área verde.

Name: Ibero Group
Description: Ibero Group é uma empresa 100% nacional que reúne industrias de autopeças de qualidade e tecnologia, levando solução e abastecimento dos segmentos de caminhões pesados, extrapesados, implementos rodoviários, máquinas agrícolas de construção e mineração.

Name: Gauss Parts
Description:
We are experts in vehicle electronics, providing a giant parts portfolio with over 6,000 SKUs for electrical, lighting, electronic injection, cooling and air conditioning, and ignition for light and heavy vehicles, whether in the field, on the road or in the city. 

We shorten distances and break barriers acting geographically with our factories, a headquarters in Brazil (Curitiba), which feeds three Distribution Centers across the country, and with our second factory located in China (Jiaxing), which supplies the world market directly and indirectly through our Distribution Center in Poland.

Thanks to this structure built over the years, we conquered the first positions within the Brazilian aftermarket, in addition to covering five continents of the planet, serving and taking our colors to more than 60 countries.

We have become an internationally recognized and respected Brazilian multinational. Evolution has become our routine.

Name: Perfect Automotive
Description:
A Perfect é especialista em peças automotivas de reposição oferecendo uma linha de produtos com mais de 2.000 itens entre freios, motor, suspensão e ignição.
Tem capacidade de vendas de mais de 140.000 itens por mês, distribuidas em todas as regiões brasileiras.
Tem como visão: " SER CONHECIDA PELOS NOSSOS CLIENTES E FORNECEDORES COMO A MAIOR FACILITADORA DE PRODUTOS E SERVIÇOS PARA O SEGUIMENTO AUTOMOTIVO GLOBALIZADO".

Name: Atturo Tires
Description:
At Atturo Tires, we prioritize your profitability as our valued distributors and dealers. With over a decade of market experience and distribution in 30+ countries, we offer replacement and upgrade tires for your most popular segments. Whether your customers crave drag strip dominance, off-road prowess, specialized fitments for vans/trailers, or a smooth daily ride, Atturo has you covered. While we may not be your highest volume brand, we strive to be the most profitable for our partners. Authorized Atturo Dealers have access to our extensive tire lineup and dedicated support, ensuring your success remains our top priority. As a Partner with Atturo Tires, you’ll always get superior products and unwavering commitment to your success!

Reach out to us today to discover for yourself the quality Atturo Tires available for your SUV, Crossover, Light Truck, Muscle car, or Side-by-Side.

Name: VCST
Description:
VCST is part of the BMT Group.

BMT Group is an industrial family-owned holding which participates in companies throughout the world that are active in high-precision machining of gears, large components and transmissions on the one hand, and the manufacturing of moulds for glass packaging on the other.

VCST is a world-class automotive supplier of precision-machined powertrain components for Automotive OEM’s and Tier 1 suppliers. The company realized a turnover of 158 million euro in 2024 and employs  more than 1000 employees. VCST has production facilities in Belgium, Mexico and Romania, with its headquarters located in Belgium. The company has a diversified blue-chip costumer portfolio, including Audi, Caterpillar, Continental, Cummins, DAF, General Motors, Punch Powertrain and Volkswagen, among others.

Name: Paracoat Products Ltd.
Description: Paracoat Products Ltd. develops and manufactures innovative products to reduce NVH levels, and improve safety, comfort and infrastructure for mobility. Operating from over 5 manufacturing facilities in India and Thailand, we service most automotive OEMs in the market today.

Name: AutoZone South Africa
Description: AutoZone is the largest privately owned automotive parts retailer and wholesaler in Southern Africa. AutoZone has a span of 216 wholly-owned retail branches and 30 member-owned franchise branches. These branches are supported by a supplier base of more than 688 world-class suppliers and an active parts range of more than 75 000. AutoZone also has presence in Namibia, Swaziland and Botswana through a footprint of corporate and member branches. AutoZone’s branches are backed by a well-developed supply chain, merchandise and support services.

Name: Atlas Engineering (Private) Limited
Description:
Atlas Engineering (Pvt.) Ltd. manufactures high-quality parts and components at competitive prices. Over the Years, the Company has evolved into a strategic asset for Atlas Group. The Company is playing a key role in controlling manufacturing costs whilst maintaining the quality standards to ensure that its customer remains firmly ahead of its competitors.

AEL offers high quality OEM standard Parts with precision technology for replacement market of all Honda Models produced indigenously and at competitive prices. These spare parts are perfectly coordinated with one another and give safety, reliability and performance of optimum level.

The Company is also a member/affiliate/licentiate of/by Karachi Chamber of Commerce & Industry (KCCI), Pakistan Association of Automotive Parts and Accessories Manufacturers (PAAPAM) and Sheikhupura Chamber of Commerce & Industry.

Name: EVR Motors
Description:
EVR Motors is an Israeli company that has developed a unique, patented motor technology called the Trapezoidal Stator Radial Flux Permanent Magnet (TS-RFPM) motor. This innovative design is a significant leap forward in the electric motor field, creating smaller, lighter, and more cost-effective motors without affecting power or efficiency.

This not only makes them more cost-competitive due to a lower Bill of Materials (BOM) and simpler assembly process, but also allows for unparalleled customization. Our motors can be tailored for a wide range of requirements, including different sizes, power outputs, and voltage levels (from 48V to 800V). This modularity and versatility are unmatched in the industry.

EVR Motors primarily partners with Tier 1 manufacturers and OEMs who want to produce superior e-motors. We support our partners throughout the entire process, from motor design and prototyping to manufacturing preparation. For companies that prefer not to manufacture their own motors, we also offer a direct supply of our high-performance motors, which can be tailored to their specific needs.

Name: PT Namicoh Indonesia Component
Description: PT Namicoh Indonesai Component

Name: Xerotech
Description:
Xerotech is an award-winning battery technology company solving one of our generation’s most significant challenges: industrial electrification.

Driven by a shared vision of a fully electric future, our talented team is making an impact on a global scale as Xerotech provides the first truly credible path to zero emissions and enables the electrification of machines that were previously too low-volume to be economically electrified.

Our Hibernium battery pack platform adapts to the bespoke needs of your vehicle or application. With Hibernium, you can choose your desired or preferred energy content, operating voltage range, physical dimensions, and even battery cell chemistry.

There are no design or engineering costs, even for one-off prototyping projects, making this solution one of the only viable options for low-volume, high-diversity projects.

The electrification of heavy-duty machinery is now available to every OEM and Integrator.

Name: STETSOM Brasil
Description:
A STETSOM Eletrônica Ltda., fundada em 1989, é a maior fábrica de Amplificadores para som automotivo da América do Sul.

Atuante no segmento de som automotivo, mais especificamente na produção de amplificadores de som, acessórios e antenas automotivas.

Padrões de qualidade assegurados por constantes programas de treinamento e equipe técnica altamente qualificada.
Com isso, a STETSOM garante a seus clientes o melhor preço, qualidade total e pontualidade na entrega.
Qualidade comprovada, selo ISO 9001 de Qualidade.

Capacidade de produção automatizada e exportação para diversos países do mundo.
Tudo isso faz da STETSOM a maior empresa de seu segmento.

Name: Hwashin Automotivas Brasil
Description:
A Hwashin Brasil (HAB: Hwashin Fabricante de pecas Automotivas Brasil LTDA) foi estabelecida como uma base avançada para o mercado sul-americano em dezembro de 2009, em Piracicaba, São Paulo, Brasil.

Hwashin Brasil, uma empresa de investimento mútuo de Hwashin e Sae Hwashin, está fornecendo chassis e componentes de carroceria de alta qualidade para Hyundai Motor Company e Hyundai Mobis. Todos os funcionários da Hwashin Brasil estão se esforçando para se tornar um fabricante global de componentes automotivos no mercado sul-americano.

Name: COLVEN
Description:
COLVEN's basic passion is production quality and the search for an exceptional quality level has always been the way to keep our products leadership. COLVEN owns different brands covering a wide range of products: coolers, engine protectors, tyre pressure systems, sensors, satellite information systems. 

Every model delivered has a quality above what ISO 9001 certification can prove and it also allows us to count with the approval of the European community standards (CEE) and homologations (CE). The design quality, the components and the manufacturing process of COLVEN products are tested in the hardest conditions and they always provide safe and high performance, in the transportation of loads as well as passengers, in the industry as well as in the construction and the agribusiness. 

COLVEN offers also a reliable, steady distribution net and technical service in more than 20 countries of 3 continents. COLVEN's mission  today is keeping vehicles going, protecting them and making them more efficient or more comfortable. 

▷ VIGIA engine protector stops the engine when an event of low oil pressure or overheating occurs. 

▷ VIGIA tyre pressure system automatically and constantly maintains the pre-set tyre pressure. Given any pressure fall it automatically activates the inflating process.

▷ VIESA is an ecological cooler that, even with the engine off, diminishes the temperature in the truck cabins, road machines, motorhomes, etc.

▷ RENTAGRO grain loss monitor is a revolutionary system which records, with highly sensitive sensor pads, the percentage of grains lost and thrown out to the stubble together with the waste during the harvesting.

▷ GESTYA is an advanced satellite information system to control in real time the location and condition of vehicles. It can be connected with the VIGIA engine protector and tyre pressure system.

Name: ADASKY
Description: ADASKY is a mature startup from northern Israel, and the leading developer and manufacturer of intelligent autograde LWIR thermal imaging cameras for ADAS and AV. ADASKY’s compact, hi-resolution, thermal camera - is designed for affordability and seamless integration. Its cutting-edge A.I. for complete road awareness enhances AEB functionality and enables autonomous driving capabilities in all weather conditions. Every aspect of the technology is designed and made in-house, from the optomechanics, to its robust perception & image processing algorithms catalog, for superior quality and performance. ADASKY’s life saving technology has been awarded by a global OEM and an L4 AV manufacturer.

Name: Motorcar Parts of America
Description:
Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. is a remanufacturer, manufacturer and distributor of automotive aftermarket parts -- including alternators, starters, wheel hub assembly and brake master cylinder products utilized in imported and domestic passenger vehicles, light trucks and heavy duty applications. 

Motorcar Parts of America’s products are sold to automotive retail outlets and the professional repair market throughout the United States and Canada, with facilities located in California, Mexico, Malaysia and China; and administrative offices located in California, Tennessee, Mexico, Singapore, Malaysia and Toronto.

SAVING RESOURCES FOR FUTURE GENERATIONS.
Remanufacturing is the most efficient process for replacement parts – potentially reducing material and energy consumption by as much as 91% versus traditional manufacturing.*

MPA’s reclaims and reconditions all non-wearing parts during the remanufacturing process. By recovering these components, MPA saves both the energy and material to create new ones - while providing the same dependable performance as new products.

Reclaiming non-wearing parts is another way that MPA ensures quality starters and alternators – providing Pure Energy and conserving resources for generations to come.

*Automotive Parts Remanufacturers Association (APRA)

Name: BGA
Description: BGA is a leading British supplier with 95 years of OEM heritage, delivering premium Engine and Steering parts that are engineered and tested in the UK to meet or exceed OE quality standards.

Name: SIGIT Group
Description:
Sigit Group is a multinational leader in the production of components for the automotive sector, as well as for household appliances and coffee machines. The Group is composed of Sigit S.p.A., founded in Italy in 1966 as Società Italiana Gomma Industriale Torino (S.I.G.I.T.), today recognized as a historic industrial trademark in Italy.

Specialized in the production of thermoplastic, rubber and aluminum die-cast components, Sigit Group supports its customers along the entire production cycle through advanced molding technologies, automated processes and strong engineering expertise.

The Group supplies major European OEMs, including FCA/Stellantis, Ferrari, Maserati, Renault, Dacia, Volkswagen Group, CNH Industrial and Iveco.
In the home appliance sector, Sigit Group collaborates with leading international brands such as Beko, Electrolux Versuni and Lavazza.

Its industrial activities are structured across three specialized product lines:
	•	Thermoplastic injection-molded components
	•	Rubber injection-molded components
	•	Aluminum die-casting

Sigit Group operates through an international network of production plants and three R&D and commercial centers in Europe, also collaborating with major Tier 1 suppliers to ensure innovation and quality throughout the supply chain.

Today, the Group is present in Italy, Germany, Spain, Poland, Romania, Albania, Morocco and Algeria, and participates in two joint ventures in Russia and Serbia, employing more than 1,600 people.

For over 10 years, the Omani Sovereign Wealth Fund (Oman Investment Authority – OIA) has been an equity partner of the Group, supporting its international development and industrial growth.

Name: Magnax
Description: Magnax valorizes yokeless axial flux technology in various markets. The company drives value by strategically investing to strengthen the position of its subsidiaries. These companies focus on specific markets, each requiring a unique approach. One is Traxial, which focuses on ground-based e-mobility.

Name: KYB Europe
Description:
KYB Corporation is a global company with its head office based in Tokyo, Japan.  For almost a century it has specialised in hydraulics, with technology widely used in the aeronautical, rail and maritime industries. KYB is Japan's leading hydraulics company.

KYB began dealing in the automotive aftermarket in 1950 and has today become one of the world's largest manufacturers of original equipment (OE) shock absorbers, with a worldwide market share of around 25%.

The KYB Group, which has over 14,500 employees worldwide, turns over $3.5billion, of which 60% is automotive shock absorbers.

From its 16 factories in Asia, Europe and the United States, KYB has an annual production capacity of more than 75 million shock absorbers.

Name: Vetore
Description:
A Vetore é fabricante de peças automotivas, para as linhas leve, pesada e agrícola no mercado brasileiro e global. Bombas d’água, bombas do óleo, carcaças e peças fundidas em alumínio (sob pressão) ou ferro são parte da linha de produtos. 
Produzimos peças com a mais alta tecnologia em equipamentos CNC, montagem automatizada e total controle dos processos de qualidade, certificados pelas normas IATF 16949 e ISO 9001. Com uma equipe técnica altamente capacitada e com profundo conhecimento dos produtos que fabrica, desenvolvemos soluções inovadoras e projetos com apoio de ferramentas de última geração capazes de projetar, simular, testar e autoqualificar.
Trabalhamos no desenvolvimento de novas tecnologias e na melhoria de produtos para atender as novas exigências e necessidades de nossos clientes, buscando excelência na fabricação de autopeças.
Estamos presente nos veículos das principais montadoras no Brasil e em outros países, e também nos maiores e mais importantes distribuidores do aftermarket.

Name: WAI Global
Description:
WAI keeps vehicles and equipment powered and charging forward with our lineup of rotating electrical, engine management and other solutions. With decades of expertise, we’ve become the global leader in manufacturing quality alternators and starters delivering value for the automotive, heavy-duty, agricultural/industrial, lawn & garden, powersport and marine sectors.

Our parts are designed to meet the demands of today’s vehicles and equipment. We are proud to offer solutions that make a real difference:

-	100% new units with no core handling hassles
-	Easy installation built for durability
-	A global network that ensures rapid delivery and the best customer support

Explore our range of solutions and discover why professionals around the world trust WAI to keep them moving.

Name: Pittsburgh Glass Works
Description: *Please See Vitro Automotive Glass*

Name: Infinit Performance Dubai
Description:
Welcome to Infinit Performance, the trusted force induction and maintenance specialist for high-performance vehicles, supercars, and hypercars. Based in the UK, we have now expanded our operations to the United Arab Emirates.

As force induction and maintenance specialists, Infinit Performance offers a wide range of services designed to enhance the performance and reliability of high-performance vehicles, supercars, and hypercars.

Join us on our journey as we expand to the UAE, delivering top-notch force induction and maintenance services. Connect with us to stay updated on our latest developments and industry insights!

Name: Dongwon Brasil Fabricação de Auto Peças Ltda
Description:
A Dongwon Metal foi fundada pela Daeyoung Steel Trading Company e deu seus primeiros passos no setor automotivo ao desenvolver a moldura da porta do 'Pony', o primeiro modelo de automóvel coreano, lançado em janeiro de 1976.

Desde então, investimos continuamente em inovação, com a construção de um laboratório de tecnologia voltado para o desenvolvimento sistemático de pesquisas. Esses esforços nos renderam importantes reconhecimentos, como o prêmio "Torre de Exportação de 100 Milhões de Dólares", o título de "Fornecedor do Ano", e a certificação como Fornecedor de Produtos de Alta Qualidade da GM.

Com isso, a Dongwon Metal consolidou sua excelência tecnológica e fortaleceu sua competitividade no mercado global. Expandimos nossa presença internacional com unidades nos Estados Unidos, Europa, China, Brasil e México, além da matriz na Coreia do Sul.

Atualmente, colaboramos com grandes montadoras globais, como Hyundai Motor, Hyundai Mobis e GM, seguindo nossa missão de construir uma nova história como uma verdadeira corporação global.

Name: Peasa
Description:
Fundada en 1961, hoy PEASA es líder en Norte América en procesos de tubos estirados en frío para aplicaciones de alta especificación en la Industria Automotriz. 

PEASA produce tubos de acero al carbono e inoxidable de alta precisión y es el punto de referencia en la fabricación de tubo estirado en frío en América del Norte para aplicaciones en la industria automotriz.



Founded in 1961 PEASA produces carbon, stainless steel, galvanized and aluminized high precision tubes and is the DOM tube bench mark in North America for automotive applications.

PEASA is a leader in north america in the process of cold drawn tubes for high specification applications in the automotive industry
Location: San Luis Potosí, San Luis Potosí

Name: DENSO Aftermarket Europe
Description: DENSO’s dedicated Aftermarket and Industrial Solutions Business Unit supplies a continually expanding selection of OE quality parts programmes to aftermarket distributors, wholesalers and garages, including: Engine Management Systems (Mass Air Flow Sensors, Exhaust Gas Recirculation Valves, Fuel Pumps, Exhaust Gas Temperature Sensors and Ignition Coils); Thermal Systems (A/C Compressors, Receiver Driers, Pressure Switches, Expansion Valves and Evaporators); Engine Cooling (Cooling Radiators, Oil Coolers, Heater Cores, Condensers, Intercoolers, Cooling Fans and Cabin Blower Fans); Cabin Air Filters; Spark Plugs; Glow Plugs; Wiper Blades; Starters and Alternators; Lambda Sensors; and Diesel Components (including Common Rail Fuel Injection Pumps, Common Rail Injectors, Fuel Filters and Suction Control Valves). Sales of these programmes are coordinated locally wherever possible. DENSO’s growing European sales network includes national aftermarket sales offices in Germany, the United Kingdom, Italy, Spain, France and Russia; and local sales representatives in a number of other European countries. DENSO After Market also applies its knowledge of automotive electronics technology to develop a diverse range of non-automotive industrial solutions; including Robotics, MovinCool Spot Cooling units and custom-made bus air-conditioning systems.

Name: Automotive Parts Manufacturers' Association (APMA)
Description: The APMA represents Canada's OEM suppliers to the global automotive sector, specializing in volume parts, tooling, automation, software (including AI and machine learning), advanced materials, critical minerals and EV battery technology. Since 1952, the APMA has been at the forefront of promoting Canada’s automotive manufacturing industry both domestically and internationally, supporting OEM suppliers as they lead innovations in an evolving global marketplace.

Name: ERKUNT SANAYI A.S.
Description:
Erkunt is specialized on the production of engine blocks and cylinder heads for tractors, commercial vehicles and off-road industrial vehicles, which can be supplied as machined, honed and assembled depending on the customers’ needs. Moreover, Erkunt has a wide range of production of different kinds of parts such as transmission cases, oil pans, axle housings, flyhweels, flywheel housings, different types of brackets, housings, caps, supports etc. The weight of the parts may vary from a few kgs up to a few hundred kgs.

Erkunt’s sales is ~25% to domestic market and ~75% is exported. Although main export markets are continental Europe and UK, a significant share of sales is to USA, South America, India, China and Japan.

Erkunt is close partners with JCB, Deutz, Agco, Perkins, ZF, Lombardini, Cummins, Mahindra, CAT, Erkunt Traktör, Türk Traktör, Başak, Tümosan, Ford, Hidromek

Name: PT. JTEKT Column Systems Indonesia
Description: Perusahaan Penanaman Modal Asing (PMA) yang berasal dari Negara Jepang dan Begerak dalam bidang Industri Pembuatan Kolom Pengarah Otomotif dan suku cadang ( kendaraan ).

Name: Aspöck Portugal, SA
Description:
Aspöck is Europe’s leading manufacturer of pre-fabricated lighting systems for towed vehicles of all types. Our company has focussed on fulfilling the maximum demands on precision and perfection for over 40 years now.

Aspöck was founded in 1977 as a manufacturer of lighting systems for agricultural vehicles. In 1996, the first rear lamps for automobile trailers were presented. In 2007, the Austrian company took over their longstanding main supplier - Fabrilcar from Portugal, which was subsequently renamed Aspöck Portugal.

The Aspöck Group currently employs approximately 1,400 employees. Our headquarters is located in Peuerbach, where 370 employees are currently active. Further production sites are located in Portugal, Poland and Brazil. Furthermore, our sales subsidiaries are globally distributed. Individual and innovative lighting solutions for Truck & Trailes, Automotive, Motorcycles, Caravan, Agricultural Equipment and Special Vehicles are manufactured in our subsidiaries. From development right up to series production - the Aspöck Group advises, develops, designs, tests and produces according to the requirements of our customers. Innovative LED lighting, but also wiring and plug systems of the highest quality are included in our standard range. Furthermore, our worldwide sales and service network guarantees high customer satisfaction.
Location: Vila de Cucujães, Vila de Cucujães

Name: AEM Performance Electronics
Description:
AEM Performance Electronics is a subsidiary of Holley Performance Products, the largest performance aftermarket company in the world. AEM Performance Electronics is proud to offer ICE and EV control solutions for the performance aftermarket and conversion applications. AEM EV Vehicle Control Units and supporting electronics allow calibrators to create customized torque management strategies applicable to a wide range of EV systems and component combinations. We integrate EV systems to deliver the highest levels of safety and driving satisfaction, and unify the tuning experience by providing motorsports- and conversion-ready features presented in a high-feature, modern and customizable interface. For ICE applications, AEM has a tenured history serving the performance aftermarket and motorsports industry. 

AEM Performance Electronics operates within Holley’s Tuning Group alongside six established tuning brands, APR, DiabloSport, Dinan, Edge Products, Range Technology, and Superchips, as  stewards in performance tuning in the automotive aftermarket. AEM Performance Electronics’ headquarters are in Hawthorne, CA supported by colleagues across multiple locations: Ogden, UT; Sanford, FL; Opelika, AL; and Holley’s corporate office in Bowling Green, KY. 

It takes the brightest innovative minds to keep Holley Tuning Group on the cutting-edge of performance electronics. We regularly recruit team members through colleges and universities to fill positions with the most qualified and dedicated employees. Our team members are known for having a passion for creating the world’s best automotive performance products. Ever growing and expanding, Holley Tuning Group has gone from start-ups to a powerful group within Holley (NYSE:HLLY). Our plans include expanding products into new markets, as well as new geographies, all while remaining dedicated to product innovation and exceptional customer service to the growing number of global enthusiasts.

Name: Ascenso Tires North America
Description:
Effective December 19, 2022, Tyres International, a Mahansaria Tyres Private Limited (MTPL) subsidiary, will be operating under the trade name Ascenso Tires North America. Since its acquisition by MTPL in 2021, Tyres International has been the exclusive importer of the Ascenso brand to the US and Canada. Moving to Ascenso Tires North America trade name reflects the company’s growth in the last two years since the tie up with Mahansaria Tyres Private Limited and its strategic plan and investment to become a leading tire manufacturer.
Mahansaria Tyres Private Limited acquired Tyres International to efficiently bring Ascenso’s innovative and extensive product range of tires to their customers in North America. Ascenso provides premier tires for the following key global segments: Agriculture, Industrial & Construction, Earth Mover, Material Handling and Forestry. They have added more than 350 tire sizes to their portfolio over the last year, offering a wide range of tires across the applications and customizing solutions to suit specific customer requirements or applications.

Name: Sekurit Service Saint-Gobain Brasil
Description: Seu negócio é importante. A Sekurit Service é sua única parada no quesito de produtos e serviços para a sua loja! Conte conosco como seu parceiro de negócios!

Name: TMG Automotive
Description:
TMG Automotive is a business unit of TMG Group – a private family-owned and operated company founded in 1937. Focused on the auto industry for the global high-end markets, TMG Automotive thrives in the supply of flexible polymer interiors with over 50 years of expertise and a wide range of products.

As a manufacturer of interiors for the automotive industry, TMG Automotive is supplying major OEMs (Original Equipment Manufacturers) since 1971. The company started with SAAB and the Swedish market but rapidly has grown to other OEMs, being currently the second biggest supplier in the European market. TMG Automotive’s resilient long-term business strategy has sustained a continuous market share increase in the premium markets.

TMG Automotive is celebrating its 50th anniversary of producing and delivering worldwide automotive Industry.
Location: S. Cosme do Vale, Vila Nova de Famalicão

Name: ALTAY OTOMOTİV A.Ş.
Description:
Altay Automotive is one of Turkey's most powerful companies in the automotive spare parts industry; has been operating since 1982 with its rich product range, high availability and fast service principle.
Altay Automotive assumes a determining task in market conditions and delivering to its customers with its widespread sales network for automobile and light commercial vehicle brands of both Asian and European origin all kinds of spare parts they need, especially mechanical, body shell , electrical and electronic components.

Altay Automotive provides wholesale service to every region of Turkey with more than 50,000 product types, more than 40 international brands and more than 200 expert personnel and a total of 30.000 square meters of storage space in the İzmir, İstanbul, Ankara, Diyarbakır and Kocaeli branches.
With the principle of "Your business is our business" of Altay Automotive; keeps price, quality and service performance at the highest level. "Altay Automotive has been bringing the MAHER brand, which is produced by the important manufacturers of the industry in accordance with international standards and strengthening its strength in the market with its product quality, since 2007.

Description:
Micro Turners Group, founded in 1969  is one of the largest integrated automotive component manufacturers in India. The Group companies are TS 16949 and ISO 14001 certified. The Group has specialization in operations across Forging, Machining and Sub-Assemblies. It has world-class facilities across India. Catering our services to giant OEMs mainly 2 - 4 wheeler industry.

 To further our expansion we have our OWN Logistics Division (since we transport app. 70,000 Tons of our own manufactured goods to our customers & within our plants). Also, Micro Industrial Mart is Operational and we are in a process to make it Completely Online just like eCommerce Trading.

Promoted by professionals with over 36 year’s experience in Industrial sales, who have in depth understanding of customer needs. We just don’t sell, but sell right. The hall mark of our expertise is providing application-specific right product and right solution to our customers.
Apart from our Trading house, we have 13 manufacturing plants spread across the geography of India & are OE supplier to 2 Wheeler & 4 wheeler Industry

Name: Autoliv Türkiye
Description:
Otomotiv güvenlik sistemlerinde dünya lideri olan Autoliv, yan kuruluşları ile beraber dünyadaki tüm büyük otomotiv üreticileri için hava yastıkları, emniyet kemerleri, direksiyon simidi ve yaya koruma sistemleri gibi koruyucu sistemler geliştirmekte, üretmekte ve pazarlamaktadır.

Name: India Pistons Ltd
Description:
India Pistons Limited (IPL) is the oldest and one of the largest producers of Pistons, Piston Rings, Gudgeon Pins & Cylinder Liners and allied components in India. Founded by the late visionary Mr. S. Anantharamakrishnan in July 1949, India Pistons is one of the flagship companies of the highly successful Amalgamations Group. The company maintains its leadership position in the domestic automotive market and expands its customer base by consistently scaling up its engineering prowess and performance standards.

In its successful journey spanning over 6 decades, IPL has established world-class benchmarks of engineering excellence through its robust adherence to quality-oriented processes, wide range of application-specific products, and application of cutting-edge technologies. This in turn has helped maintain enduring customer relationships by consistently delivering value.

IPL's major OEM customers include Hyundai Motor Company, Maruti, Ashok Leyland, TATA Motors, Eicher Motors, Simpsons & Co., TAFE, Mahindra & Mahindra, Greaves etc..

In addition to the OEM segment, IPL continues to be a leading company in the domestic replacement market. IPL products are the preferred choice of the most of the re-conditioners in India. IPL continues to make impressive strides in the export market and is among the top exporters of auto components in the country.

Driving Innovation. Expanding Possibilities.

Name: Ditas Dogan Yedek Parca Imalat ve Teknik A.S.
Description:
Ditaş Doğan Yedek Parça İmalat and Teknik A.Ş. was established in 1972 for producing steering and suspension system parts such as rod ends, ball joints, drag links, track control arms, torque rods, stabilizer links and V- Torque rods and became operational in 1978. Today, Ditaş is the biggest OE rod producer in Turkey with a production capacity of 7.800.000 pieces per annum. DITAŞ, of which the majority of shares is owned by Doğan Şirketler Grubu Holding A.Ş., with its more than 50 years of successful experience has been supplying high quality original products not only to the local but also to the overseas vehicle manufacturers. 

DITAŞ, owing to its high quality products, integrated facilities and experience, is protecting its leader position in the Turkey market which is shared also by some of the biggest OE rod producers of the world. It has taken important steps on the way of becoming both a supplier of Genuine OEM Parts and a recognized trade mark in automotive spare part market in the world. 80% of Ditaş domestic OEM production is for commercial vehicles and 15% of it is for passenger cars. 

DITAŞ, running its production with about 340 experienced and well trained employees in the facilities located at Niğde on a total area of 155.000 m² of which 20.000 m² is built-up, keeps on providing its high quality products based on its design capability to satisfy the customers’ demand in time, its prototype testing facilities providing simulation under field conditions, its modern and new machinery and equipment pool and its flexibility in the production processes. DITAŞ, a company that carries its operations based on the 6 Sigma Quality management philosophy, has been accredited important certifications such as ISO 14001, IATF 16949:2016, ISO 45001, ISO 50001, ISO 27001, TISAX and Ford Q1 Quality Certificate and, at the same time, it is an “A” category supplier of the biggest vehicle manufacturers in Turkey.

Name: Apex Wheels
Description: Apex Wheels is a close-knit team with a burning passion for anything that can set a lap time on a race track. We’ve been in business since 2007 and our core competency is designing and distributing lightweight performance wheels. We wake up every day with a mission to eliminate compromise from our enthusiast customers’ pursuit of maximizing vehicle performance. We begin by educating our customers on the fundamentals and then guide them towards the purchase of products that solve their true needs. The growth of our team and the maturing of our company has opened a new chapter where we expand beyond the BMW market and grow into every active enthusiast community that attends track days.

Name: Makersan Inc.
Description:
Makersan has a long tradition, starting from foundation on 1978, of providing state of the art, reliable solutions for developing and managing mechanic and electronic innovative products through trusted customer relationship in the areas of developing, designing and manufacturing reliable advanced operation controllers and sensors for commercial, construction, defense and agricultural equipment applications.
Our renowned legacy in the automotive industry, makes us your excellent partner in the endeavor to stay ahead of the quality & cost competition on the field of sensing, controlling and actuating applications within the scope of quality certified by TS 16949, ISO 14001, ISO 9001 and OHSAS 18001.


1978 yılında otomotiv sektörünün ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda sac mekanizmalı parça üretmek amacı ile kurulan Makersan Makine Otomotiv’in ürün grubu son 10 yıldır mekatroniğe yönelmiştir. Sürekli yenilikçi ve kendi ürünlerini geliştiren firma olarak cirosunda her yıl %20 artış sağlamayı, yeni mekatronik ürün grubunu Türkiye’de ve dünyada mümkün olduğunca çok müşteriye ulaştırmayı ve kendi marka değerini yükseltmeyi hedeflemektedir. Markanın patenti kendisine ait olan yeni jenerasyon ürünleri Türkiye’de ilk defa üretilmektedir. Hall effect teknolojisine sahip poziyon sensörleri ve basınç sensörleri ile projelerini tamamlayan Makersan Makine Otomotiv, üretim ve satış konusunda ilerlemeye devam etmektedir. Yeni projeleri olan, iş makinesi ve traktörler için joystickler, traktörler için hidrolik kaldırma üniteleri ve genel olarak kontrol üniteleri ile ilgili Ar-ge faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.

Name: ADM Group
Description:
ADM Group is a forward-thinking engineering partner dedicated to innovation & excellence in the automobile sector & beyond. With nearly two decades of experience, our robust team of 1,200+ professionals, 10 dynamic sub-brands, & 7 advanced manufacturing facilities across 8 countries, positions us as a comprehensive solution provider for our customers.

Our in-house capabilities in engineering, testing, & validation ensure a superior customer experience. Our flagship enterprises & global joint ventures, including brands like ADM Realty, ADM Joinflex, ADM USA, Sogefi ADM, ADM Foundation, Yinlun ADM, ADM Autotech, ADM Mobitech, enable us to offer a wide range of products tailored to meet diverse needs.

Innovation is at the heart of our culture, driven by a dedicated team that embraces a culture of growth, agility, & collaboration. We deliver efficient & scalable manufacturing solutions through our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility & skilled expertise. We constantly innovate our processes while adapting to new technology. Our intelligent & flexible manufacturing lines allow us to deliver on-demand, from single to six-digit volumes, meeting the diverse needs of our global customers, surpassing industry benchmarks.

Ethical practices & environmental stewardship are integral to every facet of our business, as we strive to leave a lasting positive impact that transcends generations. We are 100% compliant by Governance under ESG, adhering to principled practices like centralized digital monitoring, data integrity, server best practices, among others, ensuring sustainability is a priority for all stakeholders. Through the ADM Foundation, we are also committed to making a positive impact on our customers, our people, & society – striving to create a safer, healthier, stronger, & happier future for all.

At ADM Group, we empower our people & customers to drive progress & unlock limitless possibilities, moving forward together toward shared success.

Description:
Vignal Systems is specialized in designing, manufacturing and marketing of lighting and signalling products & systems for commercial & industrial vehicles. Vignal Systems is a subsidiary of Vignal Group whose headquarters are in Lyon-Corbas, France.

Vignal is well known as a top quality brand, designed and produced to respect the most severe manufacturers specifications.

A true specialist and leader in signalling products for commercial vehicles. From Tail lights to position lamps, Vignal offer all of the signalling products which will allow your vehicle to be seen by on and off road users. This implies a total respect and knowledge of international regulations to come to a product which will enhance the safety and security of everyone involved. Vignal has proven to be an expert regarding design, photometrical and optical requirements and accompany through the whole life of a project creation.

Name: Relats
Description:
Founded in 1957 in Caldes de Montbui (Barcelona) by Vicenç Relats Arimon, we are a multinational Catalan family company with a proud tradition of innovation and sustainability.

 Our global presence includes manufacturing plants in Spain, China, Mexico, Morocco and Vietnam, covering more than 60 countries.

We partner with companies that supply the main components for global brands across the automotive, mass transport, aerospace, electrical appliance, electric power, and renewable energy sectors.
We design and manufacture flexible sleeves for a broad range of applications, including thermal insulation, electrical, mechanical, sound reduction, impact protection, electromagnetic shielding, and a new product range for EV, HEV, and PHEV.

 At Relats, we understand that the world is constantly evolving—technologically and environmentally. That is why we work to provide solutions that are not only optimized for today’s needs, but for tomorrow’s too.

 Committed to excellence and sustainability, Relats holds ISO 9001, IATF 16949, and EN 9100 (Relats, SAU) certifications, which guarantee our quality in manufacturing, e-mobility and automotive, and aerospace respectively. Our environmental commitment is reflected in the ISO 14001 certification for all our production plants.

 Our purpose: We are in pursuit of trusted innovation in order to provide tested & sustainable solutions to make people's lives safer.

Description:

L., based in Campo de Criptana, is a Spanish multinational manufacturer of components and electronics, apart from developing advanced diagnostics solutions, remote diagnostics and connectivity for commercial vehicles, agricultural equipment, off-highway equipment, material handling equipment and vessels, as well as ISOBUS compatibility solutions for tractors and implements.

Thanks to the wide expertise in the development of on-board and workshop technology solutions, Cojali is actively working on data processing and analysis, being this a strategic business activity, which enables the implementation of improvement processes and the release of new products onto the market.

Awards and Recognitions:

2. Won the Birla Global Innovation Challenge 2020 organized by AIC Bimtech, in association with Startup India, amongst 874 Startup Innovations from 7 different countries.

Name: TREROC
Description:
Basée à Tanger, Maroc, depuis 2004, Treroc est la filiale marocaine du Groupe Trèves. l'équipementier automobile mondial et familial, designer et fabricant de solutions d’isolation acoustique et thermique pour l’industrie automobile, et guidé par le même esprit d’entreprise depuis sa création en 1836.

Treroc est partenaire d’un large nombre de constructeurs automobiles mondiaux et continue de renforcer ses positions sur les territoires de croissance.

Le champ des possibles est large pour des personnalités passionnées par les défis de la mobilité, prêtes à se challenger au quotidien, à imaginer de nouveaux matériaux, produits et solutions, et pour qui saisir des opportunités de développement dans un groupe international et en croissance fait sens.

Treroc offre des opportunités de carrières dans divers métiers (production, achats, logistique, projet, commerce, qualité, RH, finances...) et Elle affirme sa volonté d’attirer des compétences et savoir-faire internationaux.

Pour plus de détails, n'hésitez pas à consulter notre site web

Name: Schrader Pacific Advanced Valves
Description:
C’est au cœur du Haut-Doubs (25), dans un cadre de vie préservé, réputé pour ses activités de pleine nature, riche pour son tissu industriel et son savoir-faire centré autour de la microtechnique, que notre aventure industrielle a été lancée, en 1898.
Leader sur le marché des fluides dans les secteurs de l’automobile, l’industrie et l’aéronautique (valves de roues, injection, climatisation, régulateurs de pression, …), le site de Pontarlier (70 M€ de C.A – 400 collaborateurs) produit près de 200 millions de pièces par an, livrées dans 80 pays. Réputé pour notre forte culture d’innovation, nous apportons à nos clients des solutions innovantes et adaptées aux enjeux de la mobilité de demain (systèmes de dépollution, véhicules électriques…)
Nous produisons plus de 200 millions de pièces par an :  
valves de roues, d'injection, de climatisation, régulateurs de pression...
Nos métiers: usinage, décolletage, assemblage automatisé, injection plastique et caoutchouc...
Process maîtrisé de la conception à la mise en production. 

Profils recherchés: 
- Ingénieurs BE et Méthodes
- Ingénieur commercial
- Chef de Projet
- Techniciens Méthodes et Maintenance
- Automaticien

Name: Besmak Components Private Limited
Description:
We, BESMAK COMPONENTS PVT LTD are an IATF 16949:2016 certified manufacturers of injection moulds and Precision Plastic Components for Automobile and other industries. Besmak Components was established in the year 1994. Besmak is one of the leading manufacturers of wide verity of automotive connectors and has had a sustained growth in the past 15 years.
 Our Quality system has certified to QS 9000 standard in 2000 and upgraded to ISO/TS 16949:2002 standard in 2005 and we certified to ISO/TS 16949:2009 standards in 2010.
 
The Company was started by Technocrats well qualified and experienced in Injection Mould Design and Manufacture. Late Mr C.N Hari a qualified expert in Tool Manufacturing set the directions for the Company. With his Marketing skills and excellent Customer relations he built a strong brand image for BESMAK. This also gave the Company a very good edge in localization and more than 250 types of connectors were developed to catering to the needs of the customer. From a sale of Rs.25 lacs in the year 1994 the sales grew to Rs.22 Crores in the year 2010. The Company is currently headed by Mrs Hemahari wife of our founder Late Sri CN Hari, graduate, in the capacity of CMD.

Description:
Líder a nivel mundial en la fabricación de productos para Automoción, en Maflow Spain Automotive formamos parte del grupo internacional BORYSZEW GROUP.

Somos proveedores de primer nivel, homologados por los principales fabricantes de automóviles: Grupo Volkswagen (Audi, Seat, Skoda), Nissan, Renault y PSA ( Peugeot, Citroen, Opel…)

La compañía está volcada en su visión de desarrollo hacia nuevas oportunidades de negocio que le brindan una ventaja competitiva. 

Apostamos por la diversificación de actividades aprovechando nuestra matriz, actualmente cuenta con cuatro líneas de negocio:

-MAFLOW: Expertos en la fabricación y producción de Tuberías de aire acondicionado y líderes en la fabricación de productos de refrigeración móvil. Más de 20 años de experiencia en la producción de Tuberías de caucho y Racores Fastclic y Reusables para aire acondicionado de autobuses. 

-BORYGO: Con una experiencia casi centenaria y bajo el paraguas de la marca de reconocido prestigio, en Borygo producimos líquidos anticongelantes-refrigerantes, líquidos limpiaparabrisas y de frenos para la gran mayoría de los fabricantes mundiales de automoción. También, refrigeración industrial y cosmética para el automóvil. Calidad, Tecnología y Garantía para mantener la temperatura optima de tu motor.

-MAFLOW 3D: La fabricación aditiva 3D es una de las apuestas del grupo para fomentar la innovación. Maflow 3D es fabricación aditiva FDM y MJF. Aplicamos la impresión 3D a tus necesidades, desde el concepto hasta el producto final. Nuestro equipo de ingeniería le acompañará en todo el proceso. Para Maflow 3D la complejidad no implica coste adicional.

-BORYGO HIDROALCOHOL: Nueva línea de líquidos cosméticos y antisépticos “High Quality”. Líquidos hidroalcohólicos desinfectantes con efecto virucida. Válido para la desinfección de manos, higiénica y quirúrgica y uso en cualquier superficie, e instalación. Productos destinados a uso general. Estándar OMS Nº1. UNE 14476.

Name: VIGNAL GROUP
Description:
Vignal Group is a global player, partner of major manufacturers of commercial and off-road vehicles.
We design and manufacture innovative lighting and safety solutions with respect for the environment and regulation by deploying an ambitious Corporate Social Responsibility policy (CSR).

Our strategy: global design for local production. Our manufacturing facilities on three continents enable us to serve our customers locally at the highest level of global competitiveness while reducing our environmental impact.

Name: Swoboda Technologies
Description:
Swoboda develops and manufactures high-precision, innovative components and systems for the automotive future. For many years, the family-owned company has been one of the world's leading development and system partners in its sector, supplying well-known international automobile manufacturers (OEM) and automotive suppliers (Tier). With more than 3,500 employees at 12 locations, the company generated sales of more than 450 million euros in the last financial year.

Swoboda manufactures on three continents in six countries: Germany, Romania, Czech Republic, Mexico, USA and China. German locations are Wiggensbach/Allgäu, Schorndorf/Stuttgart, Fürth and Karlsruhe.

Our expertise and experience in the fields of sensors, electronics and actuators, as well as our determination to always deliver the best performance, are a decisive building block for mobile progress.

More than one million finished parts leave our plants every day.  With our know-how and our specialized production, we are one of the world's leading companies in our product area. In this way, we make a contribution to automotive safety, driving comfort and energy efficiency.

Name: Angstrom NA LLC
Description:
Angstrom Automotive Group (AAG) is a leading full-service supplier of components and assemblies for the Transportation, Industrial, and Commercial sectors. Founded in 1999, the Group is privately held with global headquarters in Southfield, MI, USA. Angstrom offers a diverse product portfolio concentrating in three segments: Metal-formed components (Steel and Aluminum), Resin based parts (Plastic, Fiber and Polyurethane Foam), and Electrical (Wire Harness, Battery Cable, and Lighting). There are 31 locations across 15 companies, including the USA, Mexico, Canada, Brazil, Germany and Hungary. Angstrom supports over 4000 employees worldwide across all its held companies.
Company History:

1999 – Established Angstrom USA – Taylor, Michigan USA

2005 – Started Driveshaft Tubes, Stainless Tubes, Universal Joint Bearing Assembly

2010 – Started Driveshaft Assemblies, Power Telescopic Steering Tubes

2010 – 2015 Acquired Metal Formed businesses including: Stamping, Machining, Forging, Casting (USA/Europe)

2015 - Launch of Steering Systems for Light Vehicle OEM market.

2018 – 2020 Acquired Resin product businesses including Plastic Injection and Polyurethane Foam products (USA)

2020 - 2022 Acquired Electrical and Lighting businesses, Battery Cables & Wire Harness (USA/Mexico/Brazil)

2022 – 2023 Acquired Resin product in Compressed Fiber products (USA/Canada)

2024 – Acquired Metal Formed business for Aluminum Castings (USA/Mexico)

Angstrom Automotive Group now consists of 15 individual companies across three continents, globally supplying more than 200 customers.

Name: Autopromotec
Description:
Autopromotec is the international exhibition of automotive equipment and aftermarket industry held every two years at Bologna Exhibition Centre (Italy). 

Founded in 1965, the event is organised by Promotec, a service company owned by AIRP - Associazione Italiana Ricostruttori Pneumatici (Italian Tyre Retreaders Association) and AICA - Associazione
Italiana Costruttori Autoattrezzature (Italian Automotive Equipment Manufacturers Association). Its exclusive trade exhibition formula is based on specialisation, professionalism and quality of the exhibited products, a true meeting point between manufacturers and users. 

The trade show - which includes more than 580 product categories, covering all sub-sectors of the aftermarket - takes the form of a selection of specialized fairs, where visitors can easily plan personalized itineraries based on their professional interests. Through intensive promotional activities supported both at an institutional level and by trade associations, over the course of 30 editions Autopromotec has experienced a continuous increase in international growth.

Name: Bovenau
Description:
Fundada em 1989, a Bovenau começou com o objetivo de fornecer macacos hidráulicos para montadoras de caminhões na América Latina. O nome da empresa homenageia a cidade alemã de origem dos ancestrais dos fundadores, preservando a memória de suas raízes.

Em 35 anos de constante transformação, a Bovenau consolidou-se como referência no mercado e tornou-se a maior fabricante de macacos e equipamentos hidráulicos do Ocidente. Atualmente, fornecemos para 95% das montadoras de caminhões na América Latina, além de atender o exército e a marinha brasileira, bem como as maiores empresas do país.

Os equipamentos Bovenau são projetados para uso profissional, oferecendo alta performance e durabilidade até 10 vezes superior à concorrência. Nosso rigoroso padrão de qualidade é certificado pela IATF 16949, que garante a excelência em desempenho funcional, durabilidade e segurança dos nossos processos e produtos.

Presente em mais de 40 países nos cinco continentes, a Bovenau é reconhecida globalmente por sua qualidade, profissionalismo e inovação. Comprometida com a gestão ambiental, a empresa possui a certificação ISO 14001, que assegura práticas sustentáveis em nossos processos.

O Grupo Bovenau também inclui a marca Riosul Tools, especializada em ferramentas e equipamentos profissionais para diversas necessidades. Nossa linha especial de bombas e cilindros de alta pressão atende a variadas aplicações na indústria, construção civil, naval, mineração e muito mais.

Além disso, contamos com uma extensa rede de parcerias comerciais e estratégicas com os maiores distribuidores de peças automotivas, ferragens e ferramentas em todo o mundo.

Bovenau – Movemos tudo.

Name: M&D Group
Description:
M.E.A.T. was established in 1945. In the early 50s it started the production of the first carburettor spare parts. In 1985 D.O.RI.A., a company producing fuel filters, was incorporated. From that moment, the company developed in two directions: carburation, today evolved into spare parts for fuel injection; and filtration, improved with the production of advanced filters that meet the requirements of UNI EN ISO 9001. At the end of the 90s, the brand HOFFER PRODUCTS was created, outlining the ambition of  the Company in becoming a reference point for the electrical parts. Since 2010, the Group has been producing EGR valves, creating close collaborations with Tier 1 suppliers and car manufacturers, and it has been consolidating its business in several countries through the establishment of local branches.
Today, thanks to its experience, the Company operates on the market with more than 25.000 items available on stock.

Name: FIEV
Description: Agir pour le futur de l’automotive en défendant une mobilité durable, vectrice de liberté et respectueuse de l’environnement La FIEV (Fédération des Industries des Équipements pour Véhicules) est le syndicat professionnel des équipementiers, des fabricants d’équipements de garage et de tous les autres apporteurs de solutions automotive. Elle représente et défend les intérêts d'une industrie dont les acteurs contribuent à 85% au prix de revient d’un véhicule, réalisent près de 15 Mds€ de chiffre d’affaires, dont 55% réalisés à l’export, et rassemblent 57 388 emplois. 130 groupes d’entreprises, et leurs 300 sociétés adhérentes de la FIEV, bénéficient d’un large accompagnement (conseils, veille, formation et études), indispensable à leur performance sur un marché en perpétuel mouvement. Actionnaire majoritaire d’EQUIP AUTO, la FIEV contribue activement à faire de ce salon le rendez-vous international de l’après-vente automobile et des services pour la mobilité en France.

Name: Moss Motors, Ltd
Description:
Since its start in 1948 Moss Motors has strived to be the go-to resource for all classic British car owners. Our customers drive and maintain vehicles that reflect golden days of British motoring and sports cars, and many of these dedicated individuals have been our customers for decades.

Moss Motors' commitment to our customers and their cars runs deep. We make substantial investments into quality and support for the parts we provide. We are the most trusted name in classic British car parts for having the breadth of offering for such a large magnitude of vehicles, supported by our wonderful, passionate staff. These women and men, many of whom have been at Moss for over 20 years, are some of the best in the business.

At Moss we work to provide you with the best parts and service at competitive prices. When you partner with Moss for the restoration or upkeep of your vehicle, you are assured of reliable, accurate and helpful assistance every step of the way. Moss Motors hosts a warehouse and sales staff in Petersburg, Virginia, as well as in Goleta, CA. Our Virginia location welcomes visitors—we love to meet our customers in person!

In 1994 an experiment in diversification led to our highly successful Mazda Miata accessories program. The Miata, very British in concept, attracted an involved and enthusiastic customer base and Moss replied with a range of enthusiast products.

See also Moss Europe for our UK and European business.

Name: Turbo Tires

Building brands that build your business.

What sets us apart is our dealer-first approach. Through selective distribution and our industry-first Associate Dealer Program, we protect margins while providing dealers with exclusive access to high-quality, high-profit tire lines that their customers actually want.

With 300,000+ square feet of manufacturing and distribution facilities, our Product Innovation Center driving next-generation development, and a leadership team bringing 100+ combined years of experience from industry leaders like Pirelli, Goodyear, and Continental, we control every aspect from design to delivery.

We don't just make tires, we build brands that empower dealers to increase margins, stand out in their markets, and succeed in today's competitive landscape.

Name: D-Composites
Description:
D-Composites, a premier Lithuania-based manufacturer since 2011, is a global leader in custom composite manufacturing, large-scale 3D printing, small-scale 3D printing, and precision CNC machining, serving the automotive, aerospace, and marine industries. 

Operating from our advanced production facility in Lithuania, we deliver innovative, high-performance solutions through custom and serial production to clients worldwide.Our composite manufacturing expertise produces lightweight carbon fiber parts, glass fiber composites, and Kevlar components engineered for durability and performance. 

We cater to diverse applications, including automotive lightweighting, aerospace carbon fiber components, and corrosion-resistant marine composites. Our large-scale 3D printing services enable rapid prototyping and production of custom composite parts, while small-scale 3D printing ensures precision for intricate designs. 

Complementing these, our CNC machining services deliver high-accuracy components for complex geometries, meeting the stringent demands of industries like aerospace and automotive.We provide cost-effective advanced manufacturing solutions, from fuel-efficient vehicle composites and autoclave-processed aerospace parts to marine composite panels and custom parts for electric vehicles. 

By employing innovative technologies like additive manufacturing and precision machining, we ensure superior quality and efficiency. Whether you need lightweight materials for aircraft, durable composites for boats, or custom 3D-printed parts, D-Composites is your trusted partner.

Contact us today to explore how our composite manufacturing, 3D printing, and CNC machining services can drive innovation and bring your vision to life with unmatched precision.

Name: Berco Car Carpets & Berco Truck Components

De producten van Berco worden exclusief voor de auto-industrie ontwikkeld en geproduceerd en alleen geleverd aan autofabrikanten. Berco bekleedt een unieke positie door voortdurend te streven naar optimale samenwerking met klanten en leveranciers, zodat de beste oplossingen en producten worden bedacht. Het succes blijkt vooral uit de groei van de organisatie: in de afgelopen 5 jaar is de capaciteit van de afdelingen Productie en Onderzoek & Ontwikkeling verdubbeld. Ook de centrale ligging van Berco in West-Europa is belangrijk voor onze voorsprong op het gebied van technologie en de kennis van onze medewerkers over producten en productiemiddelen. 

Berco is een onderdeel van de ECA-groep: ECA België / TISCOTEX België / I.M. KELLY Engeland / BRC Brazilië

Berco verzorgt de hele logistieke keten voor haar producten, inclusief het management van TIER2-leveranciers. Wij willen voor onze klanten meer een partner zijn dan een leverancier; met deze filosofie en ons assortiment willen we onze klanten echt "waar voor hun geld" bieden.

Voor meer informatie ga naar: www.berco.nl

Name: Induction Motors Platform
Description:
This multi-stakeholder platform aims to develop advanced technologies in the field of induction motors applied to e-mobility through a collaborative approach between its members. 

Induction drivetrains don’t need magnets, nor rare earths, with the subsequent advantage in terms of supply risk, cost, market uncertainties, environment and LCA. 

Induction is a suitable technology as 2nd motor in passenger cars and as the main drivetrain in heavy duty vehicles.

The platform has multiple purposes:
1) regularly exchange on activities carried out, 
2) share intelligence on technology improvements and market developments, 
3) identify potential cooperation opportunities (bilateral / multilateral), 
4) launch joint initiatives (application to EU / national funding), 
5) communicate about the technology and the activities of the platform.

Core partners have already joined efforts to develop advanced induction machines in the context of the www.refreedrive.eu project (2017-2021). We are now taking forward our activities in this field and we invite your company to join. 

Just let us know your expertise! We are looking for
* OEM / TIER 1
* Motor design experts
* Drivetrain manufacturing
* Supply chain (e-steel, windings…)
* Academia

Name: deloovi.com
Description:
Kompanija DELOOVI doo Beograd, sa sedištem na Voždovcu, osnovana u Septembru 2022. godine, bavi se prodajom novih karoserijskih delova, hladnjaka , branika , retrovizora, farova, stop lampi, sijalica , amortizera, alata i dodatne opreme na našoj internet prodavnici www.deloovi.com.

Mladi tim zaljubljenika u automobile, kao i u samu industriju, nakon detaljne analize svih nedostataka srpskog tržišta, odlučio je da svoje višegodišnje radno iskustvo u vodećim kompanijama za nabavku i prodaju karoserijskih delova, sa posebnim akcentom na  iskustvo uvoza delova iz svih krajeva sveta, iskoristi kako bi kupcima novih auto delova pojednostavili pretragu i olakšali kupovinu istih.

Zahvaljujući ogromnom lageru sa preko 150.000 hiljada delova za sve modele automobila, dobrom kvalitetu, pristupačnim cenama i timu eksperata, u mogućnosti smo da našim kupcima obezbedimo kvalitetnu i sigurnu kupovinu, odatle i potiče naš moto „Ooozbiljno dobra ponuda karoserijskih delova”.

Premda je fokus naše kompanije trenutno baziran na Internet prodaji i isporuci danas za sutra, takođe posedujemo i poslovni prostor na adresi Maršala Tita 220, Dobanovci. Prijem stranaka je od ponedeljka do subote, u vremenu od 08:00 do 16:00, dok će naš call centar kupcima biti na raspolaganju u vremenu od 08:00 do 20:00.

Naša internet prodavnica www.deloovi.com sadrži pažljivo kreiranu bazu podataka, koja omogućava korisniku brzo i jednostavno snalaženje, a detaljna kategorizacija će dovesti korisnika do traženog artikla u par klikova.

Detaljnom obradom svake pristigle porudžbenice – zahteva za nabavku, naš tim će proveriti svaki parametar i potruditi se da kupcu isporuči adekvatan deo u što kraćem vremenskom periodu.

Proizvode sa naše prodavnice šaljemo brzom poštom na adresu koju kupac unosi, isto tako kupac može fizički podići delove u našem poslovnom prostoru.

In addition to its core offerings, Flexi Springs provides its customers with an extensive selection of spare parts for heavy-duty and industrial vehicles and offers a repair and brake workshop to support the maintenance of their vehicle fleets.

Name: Diesel Büchli
Description:
Since 1971, Diesel Büchli has been the specialist in fuel injection systems for diesel engines. With in-depth technical expertise, modern facilities and a passion for craftsmanship, we offer a complete service: from diagnostics and remanufacturing to supply and exchange systems.
We remanufacture and supply diesel fuel pumps, injectors and diesel particulate filters (DPF) for a wide range of applications: from passenger cars and commercial vehicles to trucks, marine engines, agricultural machinery and industrial equipment. Thanks to our international network, we deliver parts quickly and reliably throughout Europe and beyond.
Our strength lies in combining precision and efficiency. In our advanced testing and remanufacturing laboratories, highly trained specialists remanufacture each component according to the strictest quality standards. We use the latest technologies and original manufacturer specifications. This ensures performance equivalent to new.
In addition to remanufacturing and supply, we offer an exchange system that allows customers to receive a remanufactured part immediately, while the old part is returned for circular use. This minimizes downtime, maximizes continuity and contributes to more sustainable use of components.
Reliability, craftsmanship and circularity are at the core of our brand. We believe that high-quality remanufacturing not only saves costs, but also makes an important contribution to reducing resource consumption and emissions. This positions us as the trusted partner for every organization focused on quality and sustainability.
Whether you need fast delivery, technical support or a circular remanufacturing solution, Diesel Büchli is the specialist that helps you move forward.

-	Sustainability focus: LLMZ is aware of the need to improve the environment and is therefore launching new activities with the aim of having a green footprint.
