Description:
Adin is a subsidiary company of Diniz Adient producing seat trim covers. It was estabilished in 2016 in Gönen and is among the leading industrial companies in the area. Adin has developed and implemented all the processes of Diniz Adient and is producing with the expertise accumulated over the years by Diniz Adient and Adient. 

Adin has all the necessary departments and activities in a manufacturing plant. Raw materials (including roll fabrics, plastic profiles, threads, extruded listings… etc) of trim covers are received and stored in incoming material warehouse Roll and plate fabric, vinyl, foam, carpet materials are transfered from incoming material warehouse to cutting process. 

Cutting process is the start point of manufacturing process which starts with spreading process. All the materials to be cut are firstly spread in the long tables for the preparation of cutting. Spread fabrics are transferred to cutting machines. 

Cutting is made in high technology CNC Cutting machines and press machine.Product packaging is one of our best business practices that for each customer we realize different kind of packaging that takes into account product quality and cost efficiency.

In every phase starting from early stages of development we work in close cooperation with our customers with transparent communication.

Name: Tribo
Description:
Founded in 1979, 𝗧𝗥𝗜𝗕𝗢 is the largest manufacturer of friction products in Ukraine — and one of the few in Europe with a full in-house production cycle. From mold-making to a final product, everything happens under one roof. Why? Because control means quality.

Our portfolio includes over 800 brake products for:
 Commercial vehicles (disc brake pads, linings, drum shoes)
 Rail transport (UIC-compliant pads and blocks)
 Agricultural and special-purpose machinery

𝗧𝗥𝗜𝗕𝗢’s R&D and testing lab features a high-speed dynamometer that simulates real-world conditions — up to 320 km/h and 700°C — to ensure performance when it matters most.

We export to more than 20 countries across Europe, Asia, and Africa. Among our customers: Škoda Transportation, Irish Rail, Alstom, Skinest Rail, Estonian Railways, Georgian Railway, Ukrainian Railways, Skuba Ukraine, METINVEST, and others.

Name: GENERAL CAB GROUP
Description:
General Cab Group, founded in 1982, is an independent OEM supplier serving automotive, HVACR and industrial markets, with strong expertise in thermal management and electromechanical manufacturing.
The Group designs and manufactures high-performance electric fans for a wide range of applications, including radiant systems, heat exchangers, battery cooling, internal combustion and electric engine cooling, as well as oil and liquid cooling systems. Both standard and customer-specific solutions are developed to meet OEM requirements, from design and validation to industrialization and series production.
Alongside complete fans, General Cab Group supports OEMs and Tier suppliers with the development and production of plastic and electromechanical sub-assemblies. Capabilities include overmolding and co-molding, integration of metal inserts, electrical and electronic materials, overmolding on cables and wiring, resin potting, and manual-intensive assembly, supporting applications where functional integration, reliability and repeatability are critical.
General Cab Group operates on serial production, managing complex assemblies and variants through controlled industrial processes, supporting customers across automotive and industrial applications.
Quality systems include:
IATF 16949:2016
ISO 9001
ISO 14001

Name: Sacel Group
Description:
Sacel was founded in 1975 in Ozegna at the beginning just as tool shop for progressive dies and single stroke dies construction with small production of parts, but in 2000 Sacel has expanded by adding two new plants in San Giorgio Canavese and in Lusigliè in order to start up the production department which has enlarged and enriched with several technologies as metal stamping, plastic injection, over molding, laser welding and assembly.

In 2005 was built the Slovak facility of SacelEst which opened a new path towards east Europe and increased the competitiveness of the whole group on the market by offering metal stamping, plastic injection and assembly operations with an excellent quality-price ratio. www.sacelest.com

Sacel Group is composed by four facilities for a total of 10.800 m2 area, of which 6.500 m2 dedicated to the production departments, equipped with a copious and well-advanced machinery fleet, 2.700 m2 assigned to warehouse and offices and 1.600 m2 dedicated to the construction and maintenance of tools and dies.

Sacel is working mostly for the automotive branch, but all along the years has diversified successfully its working branches to which it can offer its technologies and know-how: nowadays Sacel is also active and well integrated in branches like medical, hobby, household appliance, and semi-conductor.

The kind of parts produced by Sacel, mostly for automotive industry, are: bulb holders assembled, bulb shields, heat shields, motor supports, brackets of any type, rails for sliding car windows, oil cooling nozzles, components for radiators, circuits, bus bars for electronics junction boxes, fuse holders, heat sinks, glass supports, roof frame assembled, components for shock absorber, support brackets and electric connectors.

The materials that are worked by Sacelgroup to become finished products are steel, plastic (PA, PP, PBT), copper, brass, bronze, aluminum, titan and stainless steel.

3S - Smart Slide System is the solution you've been looking for! This groundbreaking cargo management system is brand new in the market  It allows you to effortlessly slide the system out of your cargo room

 Provides flexibility in how you organize your workday
 Leaves a smaller environmental footprint

The system was developed by entrepreneur Christian Nordaas. Along the way, he has received support from Innovation Norway, the catapult Manufacturing Technology, the business incubator Klar Bedrift, the incubator Industriutvikling Vest, Alver municipality, Bergen municipality, Tysse Tilhengere, KG Elektro, and Energitak.

Description: Braille Battery is an American Company based in Sarasota, Florida that is the world leader in ultra lightweight Lithium-Ion high performance batteries and also distributes and sells the world’s first and only AGM carbon fiber race batteries. The company name, Braille, reflects the concept that advantages of weight reduction and improvement in electrical performance in racing are sometimes only felt, not seen. Braille Battery is the Official Battery in every Indycar, every car in the DTM (German Touring Car: Audi, BWM, Mercedes) and SuperGT (Lexus, Honda, Nissan, Subaru) series, top teams in NASCAR, nearly every team in the American Le Mans (including factory teams of Corvette, Viper, HPD, BMW), most of Formula 1 (Red Bull, Lotus, etc), Grand Am, Open Wheel, Drag Racing, Rally, SCCA, NASA, Drifting, Motorcycle and all levels of competition on both two and four wheels.  Braille products are available through a variety of online distributors in the U.S., overseas, and at local specialty retail outlets.

Name: SCODER
Description:
Scoder offers high precision metal forming solutions to its worldwide customers since 1954.  
Our homemade ultra-precise toolings combined with highest standard of press technologies are producing safety precision parts which are protecting the life of millions of car-users over the world.
We offer a premium co-design service to our customers to guarantee both competitiveness and reliability of the products.
We are producing 100Mo of parts per year in our facilities located in Pirey, FRANCE and in Plzen, CZ.
Our press covers a range from 60 Tons to 1200 Tons and we process raw materials such as high tensile steel S700, cementation steels (16MnCr5), Dual phase (DP1000), Stainless steel, aluminum and copper with thickness from 0.25mm to 12mm. 
Our customers are the greatest OEM’s and our products are delivered in 4 continents.
Our main components (but not limited to) are parts for steering Columns, motor Housings/Cases, alternator fans, latch door, End Shields/Caps,  Electrical Cases,..

Name: Wodeer Technology Europe GmbH
Description:
Wodeer Technology Europe GmbH is a growing German company with a Chinese parent company. We are the European subsidiary of Zhejiang Wodeer Technology Co., Ltd., a global high-tech enterprise with over 3,000 employees worldwide. Our core competence lies in the development and production of electronic components for the automotive industry. Our products stand for innovation, quality and deep integration into the global supply chain of leading automotive manufacturers.

Wodeer Technology Europe GmbH was founded in 2018 and focuses on the development, sales, technical support and production of customized sensor and actuator solutions for OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers. We are actively looking for new team members due to our rapid growth in Europe. Our work environment is international and defined by flat hierarchies, quick decision-making and a strong focus on innovation. In our multicultural team, technical expertise is just as valued as openness and the courage to drive continuous improvement.

Our ambition is to establish a stable and future-oriented corporate structure in Europe. At the same time, we leverage the global resources of our parent company to deliver high performance and tailored solutions for the automotive industry. As part of our long-term strategic expansion, we have been operating at our new site in Adelberg, Baden-Württemberg (approximately 40 kilometers east of Stuttgart) since July 2025. This new location includes our office space and will also serve as our future production base in Europe. Adelberg is a village surrounded by nature, located between the districts of Göppingen and Rems-Murr-Kreis.

Join our team and shape the future of mobility with us!

You’d like to join our team but can’t find a matching position right now? Feel free to send us your application at hr@wodeer.eu.

Name: VOSS Automotive Brasil
Description:
A VOSS Automotive Ltda. é uma empresa do grupo VOSS, um parceiro global da indústria automotiva e de construção de equipamentos. A VOSS possui fábricas e escritórios de suporte técnico próximos aos clientes em diversos países.

O sucesso da VOSS, no Brasil e no mundo, se deve a uma rara e feliz combinação entre sua experiência de mais de 85 anos e a busca contínua pela inovação na fabricação de tubulações e engates rápidos para sistemas de freio, de suspensão a ar, de combustível e de SCR, com aplicação em veículos comerciais, veículos fora-de-estrada e carros de passeio.

Líder mundial no segmento, a VOSS em parceria com a engenharia das montadoras desenvolve soluções otimizadas e sob medida, através de um avançado centro de pesquisas onde desenvolve a tecnologia de integração de sistemas fluídos.

Sua matriz é na Alemanha, país extremamente rígido na elaboração e no cumprimento das normas de segurança e qualidade, o que justifica algumas das principais características de seus produtos: confiabilidade, segurança, defeito zero e facilidade de montagem.

Os produtos que levam a marca VOSS são os mais duráveis e mais seguros no seu segmento, o que proporciona maior tranquilidade àqueles que os utilizam.

Name: Domar SpA
Description:

The products’ efficiency, the automation of manufacturing processes, the competitive prices, the deliveries’ punctuality, the high technical specialization and the care for the environment and safety standards, lead Domar to be one of the most active companies worldwide.

Name: Pricol Precision Products Private Limited
Description:
Pricol Precision Products Private Limited, formerly called as (Sundaram Auto Components Limited), started its operations in 1988. Since inception we have grown into a full-service provider of injection-molded plastic solutions to the automotive industry.
At  P3L, our endeavor is to strive for uncompromising commitment to overall customer satisfaction by meeting stringent quality standards, challenging technical requirements and meeting customer program timelines. We strongly believe that our growth philosophy is – “being the first choice for all stakeholders”. We achieve this through our passion for automobiles and our continual endeavor in using plastic as a medium to provide innovative solutions to meet the requirements of automobiles. We are able to achieve this through the experience gained over 25 years in developing plastic parts and solutions for automobiles and establishing seamless integration of processes from design, engineering to manufacturing ensuring that best practices are deployed across locations.
Operating from 6 locations – Hosur, Chennai, Nalagarh, Mysore, Bhiwadi and Sanand. We cater to diversified portfolio, designing and manufacturing products for two-wheeler, commercial vehicle, passenger vehicle and three-wheeler segments in the automotive industry. Our focus is on value added products, services and innovative solutions to enhance quality and reliability and provide the best value proposition to our customers. To ensure this focus, we practice Total Quality Management (TQM) at all levels.
The people that make up P3L work in an environment of shared ideas, efforts and responsibilities. The Company’s history, marked by long-standing relationships, is testimony to the fact that people have found careers with it and not just jobs. We address everyone who needs to grow professionally and personally. Strong emphasis on employee welfare and systems for continuous training have allowed us to attract, retain and develop outstanding talent.

Name: TJM 4x4 Equipped
Description:
Since 1973, TJM have earned a reputation for delivering tough 4WD equipment throughout Australia and the global market. From design and engineering to manufacturing and distribution TJM produce an extensive range of premium 4WD aftermarket accessories. TJM is proud to be a longstanding household name in Australia, synonymous with strength, quality and 4WD adventure.

TJM’s vision includes a strong focus on exceeding customer expectations, providing ‘best in class’ products, developing and nurturing strategic partnerships, and striving for continual innovation in all aspects of the business. A new advanced, purpose-built facility at the Brisbane Head Office is at the spearhead of this forward thinking.

At the heart of TJM’s product range is vehicle protection, suspension and recovery equipment. This range has expanded to include vehicle performance, electrics, canopies, camping gear and more. TJM has almost 100 retail outlets across Australia in addition to a global network of distributors. As part of the Aeroklas Group TJM is backed by sizeable manufacturing capabilities and a diverse international presence.

Name: S Riko Automotive Hose

Na S Riko Automotive Hose, não apenas fornecemos tubos para condução de fluidos automotivos—criamos soluções que impulsionam o futuro da mobilidade. Como referência na América do Sul, entregamos excelência em sistemas de tubulação para combustível, freio, ar-condicionado, direção hidráulica, SCR, TOC e filtros para vapores de combustível (CANISTER).

Nosso compromisso? Qualidade inquestionável, segurança absoluta, confiabilidade impecável e tecnologia de ponta. 

Orgulhamo-nos de ser uma parceira estratégica das principais montadoras do Mercosul, contribuindo para veículos mais eficientes, sustentáveis e inovadores.

Com um olhar voltado para o futuro, seguimos conectando tecnologia e engenharia para um mundo em movimento.

Name: PETLAS Tire Corporation
Description:
Established in 1976, Petlas Tire Corporation is one of the leading producers of consumer and commercial segment tires. Started production at early 1990’s, Petlas is now running on the roads and fields at more than 130 countries.

After becoming a part of AKO Group in 1997, Petlas has remarkable achievements in Turkey such as being the first producer of Aviation Tires, Agricultural Radial Tires, OTR Radial Tires, and Run-Flat Tires.

Petlas Tire Corporation keeps on moving forward with 4.000 employee strong workforce which is dedicated to produce and serve best possible quality to customers all over the world.

Name: NSK Group ROTA
Description:
We are a manufacturer of steering, suspension, hydraulic and forged parts for commercial, agricultural, and construction vehicles as well as some other industries. Our company has 2 factories in Karacabey, Bursa (Turkey), and sales and marketing offices in Istanbul (Turkey), New Jersey (USA) and São Paulo (Brazil).

Our product range includes tie rod end, ball joint, outer tie rod, inner tie rod, steering cylinder rot, axial tie rod, centre rod, rod-strut stabilizer, axial joint, v stay arm (v-rod), torque rod, repair kit, hydraulic top link, hydraulic steering cylinder, open-die forged parts, closed-die forged parts, machined forged parts, rubber-metal parts.

Name: LNG Automotive Parts

A LNG Automotive Parts é fabricante, importadora e exportadora de autopeças, atuando nas linhas leve, pesada e agrícola. Com mais de sete mil itens no portfólio, buscamos constantemente melhorias para atender às necessidades dos clientes.

Oferecemos produtos das linhas de acabamentos, bombas, bombas hidráulicas & caixas de direção, freios, cardans, polias & tensores, e mais! Todos selecionados com rigor para garantir qualidade e eficiência.

Acreditamos que a inovação é fundamental para o sucesso no mercado automotivo em constante evolução. Por isso, investimos em pesquisa e desenvolvimento para nos manter à frente das tendências e demandas do setor.

Estamos comprometidos com a satisfação dos clientes e expandindo nossa atuação no Brasil e no exterior, sempre com qualidade e atendimento de excelência.

Name: Ajusa
Description:
Ajusa is a company specialized in the manufacture of internal combustion engine components for both automobiles and industrial vehicles. The main components that it manufactures are cylinder head gaskets and gasket sets, cylinder head bolts, hydraulic lifters and camshafts. 

Ajusa also has a line of turbo components, which includes both the development of turbo fitting kits and the production of oil feed pipes.
In addition, Ajusa has chemical products: Ajusil (silicone sealant), Ajustick (anaerobic sealant), AjusEV (electric and hybrid vehicle sealant), Ajulock (thread locker) and Ajulube (engine assembly lube).

The company began its activity in 1972 and, since its inception, has maintained its production center of more than 43,000 m2 in the city of Albacete (Spain). Currently, it exports to more than 80 countries and has branch in USA, Great Britain, Mexico, Brazil and France.

------

Ajusa es una empresa española con sede el Albacete, especializada en la fabricación de componentes del motor de combustión interna tanto de automóviles como de vehículo industrial. Los principales componentes que confecciona son juntas de culata, juegos completos de juntas y tornillos de culata.  

Ajusa también cuenta con una línea de componentes de turbos, que incluye tanto el desarrollo de juntas como la producción de tubos de engrase para turbos. La empresa albaceteña tiene una línea de productos químicos con sellantes, lubricantes y fijadores de roscas para el motor.  

La empresa inició su actividad en 1972 y, desde su origen, mantiene su centro de producción de más de 43.000 m2 en la ciudad de Albacete (España). En la actualidad, exporta a más 80 países y tiene filiales en Estados Unidos, Gran Bretaña, México, Brasil y Francia.

Name: Dalgıç Kalıp A.Ş.
Description:
Dalgıç Kalıp, 1988 yılında metal ve plastik üzerine kalıp ve seri ürün imalatı yapmak üzere kurulmuştur. Sektörün öncü firmalarından biri olarak uluslararası standartlara sahip tesislerinde üretilen ürünleri ve teknolojileri dünyanın dört bir yanına ihraç etmektedir. Başta otomotiv sektörü olmak üzere beyaz eşya, elektrik-elektronik ve savunma sanayine hizmet eden, kurulduğu günden bu yana bünyesine 3 farklı şirket daha kazandıran Dalgıç Kalıp, grup olarak 8 farklı lokasyonda faaliyet göstermektedir. Tuzla K.O.S.B'da bulunan Kalıp Fabrikası'nda 100% oranında otomotiv sektörüne progresif sac kalıbı ve plastik kalıp üretimi yapmaktadır. Tuzla İAYOSB'de bulunan Metal İşleme ve Seri Üretim Fabrikası'nda %50 Otomotiv %50 Beyaz Eşya sektörü olmak üzere metal parça işleme, montajlama ve seri üretimleri gerçekleştirmektedir. 35Ton'dan 500Ton'a kadar bulunan H tipi ve Laminasyon preslerinde TS 16949 standartlarına göre üretim yapmaktadır. Zonguldak Çaycuma'da bulunan Plastik Enjeksiyon Fabrikası'nda Elektrik & Elektronik sanayisine plastik parça üretimi gerçekleştirmektedir. Ayrıca grup bünyesinde hizmetlerine Ümraniye'de devan eden Tel Erozyon ve CNC makine parkuru açısından Türkiye'nin en büyük tesisine sahip olan işletmesinde de hem kalıp sektörüne hem de havacılık ve savunma sanayisine parça tedariği gerçekleştirilmektedir. 01.01.2017 tarihi itibariyle grup bünyesinden fiziksel olarak ayrılarak Bursa KAYAPA OSB'de kurulan ve 100% oranda otomotiv sektörüne plastik parça, metal aksam montajı ve detaylı ürün montajları gerçekleştirmek üzere DLG Plast Otomotiv faaliyetlerine başlamıştır. Sürekli gelişen ve büyüyen bir kuruluş olarak bünyesinde 200ü aşkın istihdamla ve Türk Sanayisi için üretimlerine devam etmektedir. 

Bir Dalgıç Şirketler Grubu kuruluşudur.

Name: Indústrias Mangotex LTDA
Description:
A Indústrias Mangotex fornece produtos para a Indústria Automobilística desde 1965. Com esses mais de 50 anos de experiência, atingiu alto nível de Qualidade para suprir a demanda do mercado. Experiência, gerenciamento, alta tecnologia de produção e eficiente Sistema de Gestão Integrado, são assegurados pelas Certificações IATF 16949, ISO9001, ISO14001.

A Mangotex é altamente dedicada à pesquisa e ao desenvolvimento de novos produtos e processos , utilizando-se de laboratórios próprios, profissionais gabaritados e técnicas avançadas. O sistema de trabalho caracterizado pelo conceito da Qualidade Total, Lean Manufacturing, fez com que a Mangotex conquistasse importantes prêmios e certificações em função de sua performance dentre os quais destaca-se o “Q1” concedido pela Ford em 1996, QSB da Stellantis em 2012, VDA 6.3 da Volkswagen e BIQS da General Motors.

Name: Farina
Description:
A Farina S/A Componentes Automotivos foi fundada em 1886 pelo imigrante italiano Giuseppe Farina,produz peças sob encomenda em ferro cinzento, nodular e austemperado.

No início funcionava como uma oficina de consertos, a partir de 1915 além de consertos mecânicos em geral, ferragens para moinhos, engenhos para madeireiras e fundição de ferro fundido cinzento, passou também a fabricar esmagadeiras, garolas e prensas manuais para uva, bombas manuais e motorizadas para vinho e mosto de uva foram acrescentados à linha de produtos, incrementando suas atividades com ênfase especial para o setor de fundidos.
 
A partir de 1940 os consertos foram abolidos e a empresa passou a incrementar atividades como: fabricação de fogões e estufas de lenha, “tire founds“ para o Departamento Nacional de Estradas de Ferro, peças e equipamentos para a agricultura. 

E de 1970 até os dias de hoje, passou a dedicar-se ao ramo de autopeças, fundidos e usinados. Seus principais produtos são os tambores de freio, os cubos de roda e outros conjuntos para indústria automotiva.

Entre os seus principais clientes estão os grandes fabricantes da indústria automobilística, de caminhões e de máquinas agrícolas, exportando regularmente para países da Europa, América Latina, Ásia e África.

Name: Rotex Automation Ltd. (Automotive)
Description:
Rotex is leading brand in Fluid Control and Automation business. To the automotive world we offer solution that help increase efficiency, eliminate waste, reduce harmful emission, improvise safety & comfort. 
We have range of fluid control Solenoid Valves for Powertrain system,After treatment system, Tipping, Suspension and Thermal management in all kind of vehicles and sub systems. 
Rotex is IATF 16949 certified, VDA 6.3 Compliant facility is complimented with in house solenoid manufacturing and extensively error proofed assembly lines in clean room.

Name: HORPOL
Description:
HORPOL – Automotive Light Manufacturer since 1979
HORPOL is a trusted, family-owned business with over four decades of experience in the automotive lighting industry. Established in 1979, we specialize in the design and production of lighting systems, reflective devices for commercial and agricultural vehicles. Our portfolio includes advanced lighting solutions for trucks, trailers, delivery vans, buses, special vehicles, and farm machinery.

With a fully equipped in-house design office, photometric laboratory, and tool department, we maintain complete control over product development and manufacturing - from concept to final production. All processes are ISO 9001:2015 certified, and our products meet stringent European certification standards.

HORPOL’s lighting products are distributed through a broad network of OEMs, automotive suppliers, and retailers both in Poland and internationally. At HORPOL, quality, innovation, and long-term partnerships are at the heart of everything we do.

Discover more about us and explore our product range at https://horpolautomotive.com/

Name: KALE OTO RADYATÖR
Description:
KALE Oto Radyatör A.Ş. was established in Istanbul in 1966. The small-scale production which started with engine cooling and heating radiators for automobiles increased after 1980s rapidly. The company has become the leader producer in Turkey in its area of specialization.

KALE, has been offering its services to variety of OEM customers with its wide range of products. The company has been supplying products to the personal car producers, agricultural machine and equipment producers, industrial machine and equipotent producers within the stated group.

KALE’s growth in production was significant in 1980s in parallel with both the growth in Turkish Automotive Industry and developments in export and spare parts markets.  In 1985, KALE established a new and modern production facility with a total indoor area of 20,000 m2 and 60,000 m2 industry area in Çayırova-GEBZE region which is at the 55 km Southeast of Istanbul to respond to the increasing business volume and request increase.

In 1994, KALE added 5000 m2 indoor area to its production facility in Çayırova to activate the new manufacturing technology called as “Aluminum Brazing (CAB)”.

Today KALE has been rendering its services to Turkish Automotive Industry, spare parts and export markets with its factory based in Çayırova with total 600 employees including experienced engineers and the production team. The company has been offering wide range of products covering engine cooling radiators, heating radiators, condenser, intercooler (Air conditioning radiators), oil coolers, complete engine cooling modules, HVAC ( Heating-Ventilation and Air Conditioning) systems, complete air conditioning systems to the mentioned customer groups.

Name: GHIAL SPA
Description:
Ghial produce getti in alluminio per conto terzi, avvalendosi dei processi di pressofusione (dispone di macchine fino alle 4.000 Ton.) e di fusione a gravità.

I getti vengono forniti al mercato dell’Automotive a seconda delle richieste del cliente: grezzi, finiti di lavorazione meccanica, assemblati, verniciati.

Ghial offre ai propri clienti un servizio che consiste nell’industrializzazione dei getti, nella fornitura dei campioni, nella produzione in serie, anche per elevati volumi di fornitura.

Name: ATC
Description:
ATC Reman is a world leader in remanufacturing solutions for light, medium, and heavy-duty vehicles, providing remanufacturing solutions for powertrain and drivetrain products regardless of the technology powering the vehicle.

This includes batteries, electric drive units, engines, transmissions and transfer cases for ICE, Hybrid and Electric Vehicles.

ATC also offers engineering services that include warranty root cause analysis and testing, quality audits and production rework.

ATC serves the global automotive industry from its facilities in the USA, United Kingdom and China and supports automotive OEMs for both in-warranty and out of warranty products, IAM distributors and individual consumers.

Name: ZB - Zanettini, Barossi S/A Indústria e Comércio
Description:
Há 8 décadas, entregando peças, conjuntos metálicos e injetados plásticos para o Setor Automotivo.
Em 1944, os amigos Rodolpho Zanettini, Roberto Barossi e José Vera Vidal estabeleceram uma oficina com o objetivo de produzir pequenas peças. Devido ao grande crescimento, em 1969 a companhia mudou-se da Rua D. Leopoldina para a sede atual, na Avenida Carioca, 446. Depois dessa mudança, novas linhas de produção foram introduzidas e todos os departamentos foram expandidos e modernizados tecnologicamente. Buscando novos mercados, em 1996 a Zanettini Barossi começou a operar na área de termoplásticos, ligada à indústria de eletrodomésticos. Da época de sua fundação, ela preserva o espírito do trabalho que transformou a pequena oficina na companhia atual, em completa sintonia com as demandas presentes no mercado mundial.

Founded in 1969 by Mr. Luigi Termignoni, TERMIGNONI S.p.A. is a Company that designs and creates motorbike exhaust systems for race and road use at the highest levels.
The experience gained in these years on the race tracks has been transferred also to the aftermarket products giving a high level perfomances. 
The company's object is to develop exhaust systems that offer always an increase of performances in terms of power and/or weight. The R&D department that create the racing exhaust systems for MotoGP, Moto2 and SBK, is the same department that create for the aftermarket.

Name: Federal Mogul Powertrain Turkey
Description:
Dereli Holding A.Ş., whose incorporation dates back to 1967, laid the foundation of today's Federal Mogul Powertrain Otomotiv A.Ş (“Federal Mogul Turkey”) in 1995 by entering into a joint venture with the multinational company T&N Plc. under an equal shareholding structure. Having changed its tradenames various times after Federal Mogul Corporation's takeover of T&N Plc., the Company assumed its current tradename in 2014.

Federal Mogul Turkey is a leading manufacturer in its products range is the controlling company of its public company subsidiary, Federal Mogul İzmit Piston ve Pim Üretim Tesisleri A.Ş. and Federal  Mogul Dış Ticaret A.Ş. which has export company status. It has manufacturing facilities in Izmit, Sapanca and Arslanbey. The plants utilize high technology including Nüral technology in pistons and Goetze technology in piston rings and cylinder liners using state of the art machinery with utmost precision.

Federal-Mogul Turkey has invested so far 278 million € in technology and capacity. These investments has upgraded the manufacturing facilities as per the state-of-the art benchmarks in the world.

In 2018, with the acquisition of Federal Mogul LLC by another multinational conglomerate Tenneco Inc,; the company continues its activities as a joint-venture with 50% Dereli Group and 50% Tenneco Group shareholding. The Company currently has a consolidated turnover above 335 million Euros.

Name: GDBR Toyoda Gosei 豊田合成
Description:
A GDBR é a primeira fábrica do grupo Toyoda Gosei na América do Sul, atualmente fabrica produtos de plástico, borracha e sistemas de segurança para automóveis. 

No Brasil, a GDBR atende atualmente fábricas da Toyota no Brasil (Indaiatuba-SP e Sorocaba-SP) e Argentina, além das unidades da Honda Brasil (Sumaré-SP e futuramente Itirapina-SP).

A história da GDBR em Itapetininga, começou em 2012, com a aquisição do terreno. E em 2013, no ano a seguir, iniciou a construção das estruturas, aquisição das máquinas, montagem das linhas de produção e o planejamento do cronograma de contratações. A empresa iniciou os testes dos equipamentos em 2014, junto com as primeiras contratações. E durante todos esses processos, desde os primeiros anos de GDBR, inúmeros testes de confiabilidade, qualidade e eficiência foram efetuados. Com a inauguração oficial da empresa em 2016, logo em 2017 fomos certificados na ISO 14001 buscando constantemente aprimorar a proteção ambiental e mitigar os problemas que sua cadeia de produção poderia trazer para os stakeholders e a sociedade. Em 2020, recebemos a certificação da ISO 9.001 garantindo a qualidade nos nossos produtos e processos, sendo um provedor de classe mundial que busca a satisfação do cliente, de forma sustentável, levando em consideração todas as partes interessadas e com os seguintes objetivos:

- Atender os requisitos aplicáveis priorizando a segurança e o meio ambiente.
- Zero defeito em produtos entregues.
- Pontualidade na entrega.
- Buscar a melhoria continua.

Como RH, buscamos inovar e atrair os melhores talentos, garantindo um excelente lugar para trabalhar, onde pelo segundo ano, obtivemos a certificação da GPTW.

Sobre o Grupo Toyoda Gosei:

A palavra gosei, ou “gossei”, como é pronunciada pelos japoneses, significa “sintético” no idioma natal da empresa. Com cerca de 35 mil trabalhadores em 67 unidades instaladas em 18 países, o grupo Toyoda Gosei desenvolve tecnologias e produtos feitos de polímero, borracha e semicon

Name: Al Khateeb
Description:
47 YEARS TRUSTED GLOBAL BRAND
Al Khateeb is a group of companies established in 1971 in the Emirate of Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. The group was originally created to provide high quality car accessories and meet the growing demand in the car parts trading industry.

The Biggest Car Accessory Manufacturer & Distributer 
Today, our company is a global manufacturer and distributor of car parts and accessories with offices and business partnerships throughout the Middle East, North Africa, Europe, and Asia. 

WHO WE ARE:
Car Parts & Accessories - Global Manufacturer & Distributor
Largest one-stop car accessories provider offered in multitude of distribution channels
Over 400 dedicated customer oriented employees
Over 30 branches in over 4 continents
Over 50,000 product ranges
Over 30 Brands under one umbrella
Luxury to commercial products
Innovative & on-trend products, technology & service

CUSTOMIZED AND WIDE PRODUCT RANGE & BRANDS 
All of our items are manufactured to the highest standard of excellence within our own quality-controlled facilities, wherein we have created thousands of product ranges, as well as, our own exclusive brands 
under our group and trademarks.

We provide and incorporate features in our tailor-made auto parts and accessories, as well as, versatile car repair services, which are continuously adapted and improved based on current demand to suit even the large international companies leveraging their wide-scale clientele base. 


Innovative & On Trend 
Our priority is for innovative, quality, durable, reasonably cost and trendy products at par with the market trend and technology but competitively priced that allow for a superior profitability margin. 

We have a wide variety of product categories ranging from luxury car brand body kits to commercial items like car alarms, air fresheners, bumpers, DVD players, car seat covers, body kits, lights, filters, and more.

Name: Basso S.A.
Description:
Basso S.A. forma parte del Grupo Basso que, caracterizado por su constante crecimiento y por una marcada interacción entre cada una de las empresas que lo componen, se ha consolidado hoy como uno de los emblemas empresariales de nuestro país. Conformado por más de 1.100 personas, el grupo, compuesto por nueve firmas, se ha desarrollado en sectores tan diversos como el autopartista, los sectores comerciales y logísticos, la construcción, el sector de bienes raíces y la producción agropecuaria.

Entre las empresas autopartistas, se destacan las productoras de válvulas para motor: Basso S.A. y Motor Parts S.A. La primera, con base en Rafaela, emplea a aproximadamente 700 personas en su planta de 21.548 metros cuadrados.

En cuanto a Motor Parts S.A., instalada a 13 kilómetros de allí en la localidad de Lehmann, posee dos plantas dedicadas casi exclusivamente a la fabricación de válvulas para motores de competición y alta performance, con un dotación de 250 personas. En la segunda planta, ubicada en el Parque Industrial de Rafaela, Motor Parts S.A. produce y repara además las máquinas herramientas utilizadas en los otros dos grandes centros de mecanizado.

La producción total de piezas asciende a 20.000.000, mientras que la dotación de personal de ambas empresas pertenecientes al Grupo Basso es de 900 personas.

Name: UTIL
Description:
UTIL was founded in 1959 and rapidly became a go-to company for the production of parts for brake systems for the automotive sector, earning a significant share of the global market.

In 2019, we embarked on an extensive project to diversify our portfolio of solutions, developing technology and innovative products for other sectors, such as agricultural and earthmoving machines, construction, household appliances, electrical mobility and mobility on two wheels.

We now have manufacturing facilities and research centers in Italy and China and commercial offices in Germany and the United States.

Name: POMMIER
Description:
Présent sur le marché des véhicules industriels depuis 1945, POMMIER est aujourd'hui un leader, reconnu comme spécialiste dans son métier d'équipementier pour la carrosserie industrielle.

Avec pas moins de 23 familles de produits, plus de 7000 références, POMMIER propose aux carrossiers la plus large gamme du marché. Composée majoritairement de produits conçus par ses Bureaux d’Études, et fabriqués dans ses usines, elle propose aussi quelques produits d’autres marques de renom.

_____________________________________________________________________________________

POMMIER has had a presence on the commercial vehicle market since 1945 and is now a leading player and recognised specialist in the manufacture of original commercial bodywork equipment and accessories.

With no less than 23 product families and more than 7,000 products, POMMIER offers coachbuilders the widest choice on the market. Consisting predominantly of products designed by its Engineering Departments and produced in its factories, it also sells a number of other well-known brand's products.

Name: Sundram Fasteners
Description:
Sundram Fasteners Limited is a renowned manufacturer and supplier of top-notch engineering products, including fasteners and bearings, with a rich history of 50+ years. As a trusted partner to diverse industries such as automotive, aerospace, defence, agriculture, and construction, we are committed to innovation and excellence.

Our dedication to customer focus, quality, productivity, delivery, and cost-effectiveness has been recognized with several national and international awards, including the Deming Award for TQM, TPM Award, and Supplier of the Year Award from esteemed partners such as Cummins and GM. We take pride in our responsibility as corporate citizens and strive to build a sustainable future for our customers, employees, and communities.

Join us in our pursuit of manufacturing excellence.

Name: IONETIC
Description: IONETIC is a battery pack technology company. We use a software-accelerated approach to decrease development cost and time to market, for tailored battery packs.

Name: Kromberg & Schubert Kénitra
Description: Kroschu Kénitra est une filiale du groupe allemand Kromberg & Schubert. Implantée au sein de la Zone d’Accélération Industrielle  Atlantique Kénitra, l’usine répond aux standards internationaux d’excellence industrielle et spécialisée dans la fabrication des faisceaux électriques utilisés pour équiper l’industrie automobile.

Name: ALUDEC SA
Description:
GLOBAL SUPPLIER FOR THE AUTOMOTIVE INDUSTRY
By working closely with the world’s car manufacturers, ALUDEC engineers and manufactures original exterior and interior decorative parts.

ALUDEC oversees all industrial and manufacturing operations involved in the making of the products that leave our premises, thus having developed unprecedented proprietary expertise.

Name: TAB Spain
Description: Delegación para España y Portugal del fabricante de baterías TAB, d.d. con sede en Eslovenia. Forma parte de un grupo de empresas presentes en distintos paises de Europa. En España, la plantilla de TAB se compone de 60 personas con 2.000m2 de almacenes y 250m2 de oficinas. Nuestros principales clientes son distribuidores de recambios par la automoción, empresas de carretillas elevadoras y de aplicaciones de energía solar. Nuestras principales divisiones, siempre de baterías son: arranque, tracción y estacionarias.

Name: Faurecia South Africa
Description:
Faurecia is a world's leading automotive tech company designing solutions for a safe, personalized, connected and sustainable mobility.

Faurecia is a company of the Group @FORVIA.

If you are willing to contribute and create value for tomorrow’s mobility, join us.

Join www.careers.faurecia.com
Visit www.faurecia.com for more information.

Name: Kite Magnetics
Description: Kite Magnetics is a pioneering B2B cleantech startup that has developed Aeroperm, an advanced materials technology developed at Monash University in Melbourne, Australia. Aeroperm significantly enhances electric motors, making them 25% smaller, lighter, and more efficient.

Name: Teijin Automotive Technologies Europe
Description:
Teijin Automotive Technologies Portugal has more than 40 years of experience in the automotive industry. 

At the beginning, we produced sheet metal components as Inapal,S.A. on our first, and still in function, Plant and Headquarters at Leça do Balio. 

Then, in the 80's, we started to produce SMC, GMT and G-LFT components. On the first decade of this century, we started to use the D-LFT technology and also started to produce Class A SMC components in the then new Palmela Plant.

At the moment, the two manufacturing units, the Leça do Balio Plant in the north of Portugal and the Palmela Plant in the south, inside the VW Autoeuropa industrial park, are both equipped with modern equipment, which we highlight the two fully automated SMC production lines and the two D-LFT fully automated production lines as well.

Once our focus is the automotive and industrial businesses, producing body modules, structural and technical products, the list of our clients is extensive and all over the world, delivering Portuguese high quality products and technology to Europe, North and South America and Asia.

Our knowledge and experience in the field of composites and plastics allowed us to stay on the market as a preferred supplier for the biggest automotive and industrial OEMs.

Name: Kach Motors Pvt Ltd
Description:
Kach Motors Pvt Ltd was incepted in the year 1996 with the luminary vision of eminent promoters, having penetrating knowledge and experience of over three decades, with the spirit of managing large scale engineering corporations.

We manufacture a wide range of high precision-fully machined and heattreated automobile, engineering parts and assemblies, high tensile U bolts, carburised/ induction/ through hardened components, steel bright bars, pins, spacers and alike, for Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMS) across the globe. Our industrial buyers trust us for our excellence in total quality, commitment and service.

We are suppliers to major OEMs like VECV, Daimler, MAN, Force Motors and reputed tractor manufacturers like John Deere, Tafe etc.

Kach Motors is also certified with IATF 16949, ISO 14001, ISO OSHAS 18001, ISO 9001.

Name: LKQ CZ
Description:
Společnost LKQ CZ je předním distributorem a jedničkou na tuzemském trhu s náhradními díly pro automobily, užitková a průmyslová vozidla. Obsluhuje na 12 000 autoservisů a téměř 300 000 zákazníků B2B a B2C. Provozuje síť více než 111 poboček, více než 300 smluvních servisů v síti Auto Kelly Autoservis a Partner ELIT, e-shopy, call centrum a dva centrální sklady. 

V roce 2021 firma dokončila proces postupného slučování s největšími tuzemskými hráči v oblasti náhradních dílů: Auto Kelly a ELIT. Všechny pobočky LKQ CZ dnes nesou společné označení, kde kromě mateřské značky LKQ jsou nadále viditelné oblíbené značky Auto Kelly a ELIT. Nová firma tak navazuje na dlouhou a úspěšnou historii svých obou předchůdkyň.

Name: GUD Holdings Limited
Description:
Amotiv Limited (formerly GUD Holdings Limited) has been listed on the Australian Securities Exchange since 1958. Today, it is included in the ASX200 index (ASX:AOV).

We own a portfolio of companies specialising in providing high-quality automotive products and solutions that meet the evolving needs of our customers worldwide.

The company’s origins lie in the automotive aftermarket. During the 1990s and 2000s, Amotiv (then GUD) acquired iconic Australian brands to create a diversified portfolio of businesses. In recent years, the company has refocused the portfolio on its roots in automotive. 

In 2023 Amotiv divested the final non-automotive business to create the largest automotive pure-play wholesaler in Australia and New Zealand.

The company’s recent history is marked by a strategic decision to move the portfolio of businesses towards the automotive aftermarket and symbolised with a name change to Amotiv (formerly GUD). Pronounced 'Amo-tiv,' the name is a creative play on the word 'Automotive' and marks a pivotal moment in the company's journey, signifying its evolution back to a dedicated automotive pure play group. 

The rebranding to Amotiv underscores the company's unwavering commitment to the automotive sector and our ambition to be at the forefront of industry innovation. It carries the weight of our legacy and propels us into an exciting future.

Amotiv is the company behind future-ready brands; clever ideas turned into technical products and services that people count on every day. We are committed to making a positive impact and creating value for all stakeholders.

For more information
www.amotiv.com
ASX:AOV

Name: SD SERVICES
Description:
Ce sont plus de 400 collaborateurs à travers un réseau de 17 agences et d’un site industriel qui travaillent chez SD Services. 
Nos solutions d’aménagement s’adressent aussi bien aux artisans, PME/ETI ou grandes entreprises sur tout le territoire. 
Nous proposons des solutions clés en main alliant sécurité, qualité et services associés, pour faciliter l’équipement de vos utilitaires.

Nos engagements :
- La sécurité au cours de vos déplacements est au coeur de nos préoccupations. Nos aménagements, conformes à la NS 286, sont installés grâce à un kit de fixation spécifique validé CRASH-TEST.

- Qualité : La rigueur de nos contrôles garantit un processus d’équipement répondant aux normes les plus strictes. Impliqués dans le secteur de l’aménagement de véhicules utilitaires depuis plus de 30 ans, nous développons sans cesse des solutions innovantes.

- Solution clé en main : Standard ou sur-mesure, les aménagements sont fabriqués et posés dans nos ateliers ou directement chez nos clients, grâce aux équipes itinérantes. Nos accords avec certains constructeurs automobiles nous permettent également de réceptionner les véhicules neufs en sortie d’usine. Une fois équipés, les véhicules sont livrés aménagés, logotés et plaqués, prêts à la route. 

- Étude sur-mesure : chaque métier, chaque usager est unique. Nos équipes commerciales vous conseillent sur les solutions les plus adaptées à votre activité ; un cahier des charges détaillé est défini, prenant en compte aussi bien votre manière de travailler que le matériel utilisé. Nous choisissons les matériaux adaptés et nous intégrons les outils ou tout matériel vous permettant d’exercer votre métier dans les meilleures conditions.

Name: Pneurama Maroc
Description:
PNEURAMA, spécialiste de la distribution des pneumatiques, est une entreprise Marocaine, filiale du groupe Français GBH. 

Pneurama, est l’importateur et le distributeur exclusif de la marque Pirelli au Maroc. 
 
Nous disposons de 7 succursales dont 3 à Casablanca, Agadir, Tanger, à Marrakech et à Nador

Name: Diniz Adient Türkiye
Description: Diniz Adient is an unconsolidated joint venture company between Diniz Holding and Adient PLC. It was established in 1994. Serving 4 different facilities in Bursa, Gebze, Gölcük and Gönen locations. Diniz Adient is among the leading industrial companies in Turkey with more than 3,000 employees, also, ~35% Automotive Seating market share in Turkey.

Name: ACV Suspension Systems
Description:
ACV Suspension Systems Inc., established from the AYD Automotive Industry and has been in operation since 1975, currently employs 6000 people and exports to many countries around the world.
It was founded in 1985 as the Commercial Vehicles Division and moved to its 40,000 m2 factory in 2019. It established its own identity as ACV Suspension Systems Inc. in 2023.
It has three distinct manufacturing facilities and produces 3.5 million steering-suspension parts, air bellows, and air tanks.
It exports to nearly 100 countries, including Asia-Pacific countries, with 50% going to EMEA and 40% to North America.
With the responsibility that "the one who loves his country the most is the one who does his job the best", it has effective staff who are knowledgeable, skilled, creative, and productive; who do not hesitate to blend their traditions with the needs of the modern world, who are enthusiastic about the sector and, more importantly, who attach importance to customer priorities.
In addition, ACV Suspension Systems Inc., which draws its strength from its history and achievements, is a leader in the production of steering-suspension parts, pioneers and brings innovation, produces different suspension equipment under a single roof, is a Tier-1 level partner to original equipment manufacturers and direct vehicle manufacturers, and is also a prominent actor in the global aftermarket market.

Name: Al-Rashed
Description:
Welcome to Al-Rashed, an organization built up in 2021 acing the integrated mobility solutions. We at Al-Rashed consistently endeavor to give our clients Integrated Mobility Solutions that fulfill their changing needs while guaranteeing ideal quality and well-being administrations through our solid and expert workforce. At Al-Rashed, our people live the brand. Working at Al-Rashed is all about helping people feel that they can benefit from new experiences, achievement, recognition, and responsibility.
we believe being different is good. It is the main center for Mercedes and Range Rover

Name: ParkMyFleet
Description:
ParkMyFleet provides fully staffed, secured, and gated Mobility Hubs, supporting fleets with full life cycle managed services. 

From in-fleeting to de-fleeting, preemptive maintenance, key handoffs, and on-site digital vehicle inspections. Off-season storage, active fleet overnight parking.  Staging for Remarketing and carshare, full reconditioning, and online ready CR’s. 

Our nationwide network of hubs utilizes our digital ParQ.ai inventory control and market place, keeping you informed and your fleet in motion.

Name: Visteon Tunisia
Description: Visteon is advancing mobility through innovative technology solutions that enable a software-defined and electric future. With next-generation digital cockpit and electrification products, Visteon leverages the strength and agility of its global network with a local footprint to deliver a cleaner, safer and more connected vehicle experience. Headquartered in Van Buren Township, Michigan, Visteon operates in 18 countries worldwide, recorded approximately $3.9B annual sales.

Name: Yash Group of Industries
Description: We are a leading manufacturer supplier of Machined Casting, Sheet Metal Assy and Hot Forged components to OEMs(Vehicles Manufacturers)and Global Tier1 companies. Currently, we are manufacturing Companion Flanges, Gear Carrier, Rear, and Front Wheel Hub, Case Differential( Integral as well as Split), Tube Yoke, Flange Yoke, Brackets and many more parts for various applications such as Tractors, SUV, MUV and Car segments in various grades from 450 to 800 and developing in 900 grade also. Now Group is having 8 plants across India and total sales turnover is 4000 Million INR For Financial Year(2018-2019)

Name: ArcelorMittal Tailored Blanks Europe
Description:
ArcelorMittal Tailored Blanks, is a world leader in providing tailored products and solutions for the mobility sector. The automotive industry faces two major challenges today: reduction in emissions and improvement of safety standards. 

Reducing vehicle weight by using lighter materials is an obvious way to cut emissions, but steel offers unbeatable crash protection. 
ArcelorMittal Tailored Blanks answers both these demands with innovative approaches. 

From advanced engineering services (full body-in-white review, simulations: crash load cases, joining, stamping, etc.) to tailored laser-welded blanks, working hand-in-hand with our customers by developing lighter, stronger, low-carbon emissions steel that offer unbeatable crash protection and reduce in-use emissions.

For over 25 years, our priority has been to provide products and services with excellence by always putting our customers’ requirements and needs at the centre of what we do.

Connect with us if you're driven to play a role in advancing the journey towards a more sustainable world! #SmarterSteels #safetyfirst

Name: Group SYL
Description: Group SYL has offered a complete line of brake pads and shoes for the past 26 years. Our hi-tech products assure the safety of passengers and charges.

Name: GTE Engineering LLC.
Description: GTE Engineering is a leading specialist in European exotic and SuperSport vehicles, with decades of hands-on experience in Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati, Aston Martin, McLaren, and other high-performance marques. We provide advanced parts development, precision manufacturing, complete rebuilding services, clutch rebuild, programming and replacement, parts sales, and technical support for clients across the U.S., Canada, and worldwide.

Description:
Amotiv Limited (formerly GUD Holdings Limited) has been listed on the Australian Securities Exchange since 1958. Today, it is included in the ASX200 index (ASX:AOV).

www.amotiv.com
ASX:AOV

Name: ROHTAS FASTENERS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description: ROHTAS FASTENERS PRIVATE LIMITED is an ISO 9001:2015 & IATF16949:2016 certified Automotive components and Fasteners manufacturing company based at 18th Milestone, Delhi-Rohtak Road, Ismaila, Rohtak-124001, Haryana, INDIA. We are leading  supplier to domestic and international customers.

Name: Maflow Do Brasil Ltda.
Description:
Maflow do Brasil Ltda., located in Curitiba - PR, is one of the production units of the Maflow Group — one of the largest global manufacturers of air conditioning hoses for cars and trucks, as well as a leader in the production of rubber hoses.

Our products supply the main automakers in the world market, such as: Volkswagen Group, General Motors, Renault Nissan, Jaguar Land Rover, PSA Peugeot Citroën, Volvo Car Corporation, BMW, FCA, as well as truck manufacturers, such as Volvo GTT (Volvo Truck, Renault Truck), Daimler Truck, Scania, Paccar Group (DAF, Leyland).

The Maflow Group is part of Boryszew S.A., one of the largest industrial groups in Poland, with a global presence and a focus on innovation and quality.

Name: PFI Fersa
Description:
PFI Fersa is an American company with over 25 years of experience manufacturing high-quality bearings, with a strong focus on light-duty automotive applications, passenger cars, and electric vehicles.

We operate a global network of strategic distribution centers across the Americas, Europe, and Asia, allowing us to provide fast, efficient service to customers in more than 70 countries.

Our products are manufactured to the highest international standards in state-of-the-art facilities, combining OEM quality, innovation, and specialized solutions for the automotive market. Our portfolio includes over 2,000 SKUs, featuring bearings for alternators, starters, A/C compressors, clutches, transmissions, electric motors, differentials, tensioners, and wheels.

Since 2022, PFI Fersa has been part of the Fersa group, strengthening our global reach and our commitment to excellence.

Name: Autoparts
Description:
Over 50 years ago Harvey Edwards gave a helping hand to a local battery firm, Celtic Batteries. He delivered and sold batteries from the back of an Austin A30 van. At the time he didn't have the faintest idea where it would lead, but by sticking to his philosophy of ‘always look after the customer and the business will look after itself’ the company has blossomed into what it is today.

Established in 1962, Autoparts (South Wales) Ltd has become renowned for offering quality branded Car parts, Car accessories and Car paints at competitive prices. Now into the third generation of ownership and still offering the personal service Mr.Edwards based the foundations on.

Name: FAE
Description:
At FAE, we manufacture electrical and electronic components for the automotive sector, specializing in the design, development, and production of IAM and OEM products. With over 5,000 references, we export 75% of our production to customers in more than 100 countries worldwide.

We strengthen our position in the industry through the design of multilayer ceramic applications, the development of ceramic substrates, and the implementation of microelectronic systems, supported by our ISO-7 cleanroom spanning 700 m². Additionally, we have a 180 m² ESD room dedicated to manufacturing our electronic components, including GPS (Gear Position Sensor), pressure sensors, and exhaust gas pressure sensors.

At FAE, we manufacture electrical and electronic components for the automotive sector, specializing in the design, development, and production of IAM and OEM products. With over 5,000 references, we export 75% of our production to customers in more than 100 countries worldwide.

We strengthen our position in the industry through the design of multilayer ceramic applications, the development of ceramic substrates, and the implementation of microelectronic systems, supported by our ISO-7 cleanroom spanning 700 m². Additionally, we have a 180 m² ESD room dedicated to manufacturing our electronic components, including GPS (Gear Position Sensor), pressure sensors, and exhaust gas pressure sensors.

Name: PT Autocomp Systems Indonesia (YAZAKI Group)
Description:
We are parts of Yazaki Corporation, one of the largest companies producing Automotive Wire & Wiring Harness.  Yazaki Corporation is an independent automotive component maker established in 1941. As well as automotive wire harnesses, our core product for which we command large share in the global market, we develop and manufacture meters, electronic components and a host of other products for automotive use. 

Since our first overseas production site was established in Thailand in 1962, our global development and manufacturing network has continued to grow, along with our relationship of mutual trust with car manufacturers around the world.

Name: Middle East Battery Company (MEBCO / CLARIOS)
Description:
Middle East Battery Company has the latest and largest advanced technology plant in the region engaged in manufacturing automotive sealed maintenance free batteries for all types of cars. The plant was constructed in 1997, and it’s the only plant in the region producing ACDelco maintenance free batteries.

With strict quality standards and advanced production methods, the company was able to observe the most stringent environmental requirements, and to provide a competitive product locally and globally. The company has obtained multiple quality certificates, including ISO14001, ISO9001, and OHSAS 18001 all of which are related to the quality standards in the automotive field.Since its inception, the company has targeted mainly the GCC, Middle East and North Africa markets, and has succeeded in many years in achieving sales in China, USA, Europe and South Africa.

Name: SumiRiko Ohio, Inc.
Description:
SumiRiko Ohio, Inc., SumiRiko Tennessee, Inc. and S-Riko Automotive Hose de Chihuahua, S.A.P.I. de C.V. manufactures and sells a wide variety of anti-vibration rubber products such as hydraulic and conventional engine mounts, body mounts, engine drive lines, exhaust isolation mountings, and body isolation products.

Name: DUOBBRAK
Description:
DDUOBBRAK: Revolutionizing Road Safety, Protecting Automotive Heritage, and Driving Sustainable Growth.

Rooted in decades of Italian mechanical ingenuity, DUOBBRAK represents a paradigm shift in global road safety. Our patented, purely mechanical system demonstrably reduces stopping distances by up to six times, offering unparalleled safety and ensuring a functional braking system even in the event of primary brake failure. This inherent redundancy addresses the critical issue of brake-related vehicle recalls, safeguarding drivers and passengers worldwide.

Beyond its life-saving potential, DUOBBRAK champions industrial sustainability. By significantly decreasing the reliance on expensive and environmentally impactful rare earth materials crucial for modern braking and electric vehicle technologies, we offer a pathway to a more stable and ethical supply chain. This also directly protects the historical automotive manufacturing sector, allowing it to adapt and thrive during the ongoing ecological transition without sacrificing its invaluable expertise and infrastructure.

Our vision extends to fostering robust and sustainable economic growth. DUOBBRAK’s design prioritizes ease of integration into existing vehicle architectures, offering manufacturers a cost-effective solution to enhance safety standards and reduce production complexities. Furthermore, the reduced environmental impact aligns with global sustainability goals, paving the way for a greener future for generations to come.

DUOBBRAK is more than just a braking system; it's a commitment to a safer, more sustainable, and economically sound future for the automotive industry and the world. We are braking the limits of current technology to create a tangible and impactful difference.

Name: Safety Engineering International (SEI)
Description: After 10 years of vehicle rollover crash research and investigation, the Principles at SEI determined that severe injury was occurring in rollover crashes primarily when the A-Pillar and Windshield Header collapsed under the forces exerted on the roof and intruded into the Occupant Compartment such that the victim was hit in the head or suffered a broken neck or spinal injury. The Principles then designed and built the Jordan Rollover System (JRS) to dynamic test vehicles under these real world circumstances. Over 300 tests were performed on more than 50 different vehicle types. This solidified our hypothesis and we proceeded to design and build a device that would prevent the roof from crushing in that pattern. The goal was to redistribute the loads rearward and across more of the surface area of the vehicle structure and to specifically reinforce the B-Pillar to prevent bending at the Occupants head area. From our research and prototype testing we successfully designed a device that does just what we wanted. Named the HALO (High Attenuation Load Offset), this device is the State-of-the-Art in Rollover Damage Minimization Devices (RDMD) for Light Vehicles including trucks, suv's and vans as a Rollover Occupant Protection System (ROPS). HALO is easy to install, unobtrusive, strong and light weight. HALO stands alone: by significantly reducing roof crush and crush speed, (testing results) the HALO saves lives by preventing roof collapse without interfering with internal safety devices or significantly modifying the vehicle. To date, the HALO has saved hundreds of lives in more than 20 countries around the world. Photos can be found on our website at www.safetyei.com or www.HALOROPS.com

Name: Modal Motors
Description:
We are Modal Motors, and we are raising for our Seed Round funding.  We are a Michigan corporation spun-out from Veolectra, Inc. and have a patent-pending advanced electric motor technology that is ready for commercialization for e-Mobility applications, and we need funding to launch the prototyping phase for our early customers. 

Our patent-pending electric motor technology is unique and harvests all of the magnetic flux developed inside the electric motor enabling us to achieve the highest torque density and average efficiency direct drive motor on the market.  Our motors will have the highest full speed range efficiency due to the fact that our motors do not require back irons for the magnets and are yokeless, which are the source of the highest losses for our competitors electric motors.  Our motors can even be made without permanent magnets and can utilize aluminum coil windings instead of copper.

Our motors are designed for manufacturing in the USA with low capital costs and low to no touch labor making them the most cost-effective solution for our customers and the mobility market.  The modular and scalable architecture enables fully automated cell-based manufacturing that is also scalable as volumes and motor sizes increase.  Our motor technology has been developed over the past 12 years with numerous prototypes designed, built and tested to bring us to the technological state that we are in today.

VARTA aküler daha uzun ömür, daha az korozyon ve daha düşük sahip olma maliyeti gibi gelişmiş Start-Stop otomotiv yelpazemizden profesyonel motorbot ürünlerimize dek tüm ürünlerimizde bulabileceğiniz nitelikler sunmaktadır. VARTA'yı seçtiğinizde, sınıfındaki en iyi üretim teknolojisinin kullanıldığı güvenilir, hassas teknolojiyi seçmiş oluyorsunuz.

Amaca Yönelik Yenilikler – VARTA aküler, Start-Stop motorlar gibi yakıt tasarrufuna yönelik yeniliklerin ardındaki itici güçtür. %20'ye kadar daha az emisyonla üretilen bu aküler, aracınızın motorunu tekrar tekrar çalıştırırken yakıt tüketiminizi önemli ölçüde azaltabilirler.

Üstün bir Deneyim – Mükemmel bir değiştirme servisi deneyimi için aracınızı VARTA ile çalışan bir servise götürün.

Güçlü Bir Geçmiş – VARTA markasının 130 yılı aşkın bir geçmişi vardır. VARTA aküleri, başlıca otomobil üreticileri tarafından fabrikada monte edilir ve dünya çapındaki sürücüler tarafından güvenle kullanılmaktadır.

Name: Termo Stampi | Termoplast
Description:
Termo Stampi è stata fondata nel 1981 da Renato Terraroli e vanta un’esperienza di oltre quarant'anni nella costruzione di stampi per materie plastiche e pressofusione.

Termo Stampi, con sede in provincia di Brescia, ha sin da subito iniziato a operare con successo realizzando stampi a iniezione per il mercato "bianco" (elettrodomestici e arredamento). La normale evoluzione dell'azienda è stato il settore Automotive considerato il settore di eccellenza a cui si rivolge l'azienda.

La realtà di Termo Stampi si è negli anni strutturata e ha allargato la propria offerta; il processo è culminato nel 2007, quando sono nate le divisioni di Termoplast e Termo Stampi Design. Da allora Termo Stampi opera come gruppo con 3 divisioni altamente specializzate:

●	Termo Stampi Design: progettazione e co-design;
●	Termo Stampi: costruzione di stampi per materie plastiche e per pressofusione di alluminio;
●	Termoplast: stampaggio materie plastiche, bimateriale, trimateriale e con Gas

Con la creazione delle 3 diverse aziende e l’internalizzazione della parte di progettazione e di stampaggio, il gruppo Termo Stampi ha voluto facilitare il flusso domanda - offerta e il rapporto con il cliente, che usufruisce così del vantaggio di un unico interlocutore e dello stesso fornitore per l’intero processo.

Description:

Para a Gauer, qualidade é prioridade.

Com a produção de lanternas, lentes e produtos personalizados, está presente na rotina dos caminhoneiros, ganhando credibilidade pela tecnologia de ponta utilizada no desenvolvimento de soluções, treinamento constante de seus colaboradores, permanente aperfeiçoamento dos itens fabricados e lançamento de novos componentes, bem como pela utilização de matéria-prima selecionada, preço justo e prazo de entrega que atende as necessidades.

Nossa Marca: Excelência e inovação nos movem
Nosso mercado está cada vez mais competitivo. Assim, percebemos a necessidade de acompanhar as tendências.

Para transmitir qualidade e profissionalismo que já são nossas marcas registradas, em nosso novo logotipo optamos por um design automotivo e industrial, tendo como referência as lanternas que produzimos. As letras maiúsculas proporcionam imponência, além da simplicidade das formas que transmitem modernidade.

A cor azul marinho traz para a nossa identidade a confiança de quem utiliza nossos produtos, o nosso respeito pelos clientes e a segurança que os componentes proporcionam ao rodar pelas estradas. Já, o laranja transmite dinamismo e energia, que são a essência das lentes dos produtos Gauer.

Tão importante quanto isso, é o símbolo que acompanha o nosso nome: ele remete ao formato das lanternas de caminhão, bem como representa o feixe de luz que elas emitem.

Name: Cramlington Precision Forge
Description:
CRAMLINGTON PRECISION FORGE LIMITED: Forging Excellence, Delivering Innovation 

Located in the heart of Cramlington, Northumberland, Cramlington Precision Forge Ltd (CPFL) is a global leader in precision forging and machining. With decades of expertise, we specialize in producing high-performance gears, shafts, and clutches that require minimal machining—ensuring efficiency, precision, and exceptional quality.

 Unrivaled Forging Capabilities
Our advanced facilities include 1300T, 1600T, and 4000T forging presses supported by cutting-edge induction heaters, enabling us to produce both precision components and standard blank-type forgings with unmatched consistency.

 End-to-End Solutions
From forging to machining, CPFL offers a true one-stop shop. Our comprehensive on-site machining capabilities ensure seamless integration from start to finish, delivering components ready to perform.

 Specialist Finishing
We’ve expanded our expertise with a high-capacity Manganese Phosphate line, catering to medium and high-volume demands for superior surface finishing and wear protection.

 Global Reach, Trusted Quality
Established by Eaton in the 1970s and now proudly part of the TVS Group through Sundram Fasteners Limited, CPFL brings the best of British innovation to the world stage. Our commitment to quality, on-time delivery, and competitive pricing makes us a trusted partner for customers worldwide.

 Why Choose CPFL?
We’re more than just a supplier—we’re a powerhouse of forging expertise, cutting-edge technology, and engineering excellence. No challenge is too big, no destination too far. With CPFL, you’re choosing a partner that delivers on every promise.

 Let’s build the future together. Contact us today to explore how CPFL can drive your success!

Description:

Established in 2010, Gergonne China is located within a European industrial park in Suzhou-Wujiang, the company boasts a dynamic Sino-French team, with cutting-edge production equipment. Gergonne China offers full adhesive tapes and die-cut parts converting capabilities, including production in clean-room ISO8. Specialized in the automotive sector, sector representing 90% of the business, a quarter of its turnover is exported to other Asian countries. Gergonne China proudly holds ISO 9001, ISO 16949, and ISO 14001 certifications, and is fully compliant with Automotive VDA6.3 standard, reflecting its unfailing commitment to quality and excellence.

TwiNNOV Technologies Pvt. Ltd. is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company offering specialized solutions in Wiring harness design and manufacturing, automotive electrical systems integration, and product development services.

Founded in 2016, we bring over 20 years of core experience, supported by a team of 25+ skilled professionals and a 4500+ sq. ft. facility with in-house R&D capabilities.


We are a trusted supplier of 2-Wheeler, 3-Wheeler, Commercial Vehicle, Passenger Vehicle & Electric Vehicle Wiring Harnesses — covering the full spectrum from small pigtail harnesses to complete vehicle-level harnesses.
Our solutions include dashboard Harness, Cabin Harness, Engine Harness, Power Harness, Low-voltage (LV) and High-voltage (HV) cable assemblies, designed to meet stringent safety and performance requirements.


Our Core Services:
 Custom Wiring Harness Design & Manufacturing
 Full Vehicle Wiring Solutions for all Vehicles including Electric Vehicle
 Product Design & Prototyping
 Component & Vehicle-Level Testing
 VA / VE Solutions
 Workshop Manual & Technical Documentation

Why Choose Us:
 Proven Experience with 35+ Satisfied Clients
 50+ Successful Export Shipments
 State-of-the-Art R&D Capabilities
 Commitment to Quality, Reliability & On-Time Delivery


"Whether you need a development partner or a reliable manufacturer, TwiNNOV Technologies delivers wiring harnesses tailored to your specifications and drawings."


Let’s build the future of mobility together.

Name: GABRIL INDUSTRIES PVT LTD
Description:
GABRIL INDUSTRIES has more than 40 years experience in precision part manufacturing. 

Gabril Industries is the brainchild of our founder Mr Hriday Nath Bhat who comes with a vast experience of expertise, knowledge and dedication to the craft. His career started from the extremely high precision field of Horology with HMT Watches. With his 15yr experience in the industry, he started GABRIL.

We specialise in the manufacture of extremely high accuracy turned components in all possible material types. We work on high tolerance production machines such as Swiss Petermann and Bechler. End use of these components we can manufacture can range from is in a wide range of industrial applications such as automobiles, electrical/electronic components, measuring instruments, flow control devices, medical components, defence/airforce/aeronautics components, horology components etc.

Please feel free to drop a mail at kanchan.b@gabril.in for any further information or connect.

Name: Baran A.Ş.
Description:
Founded in 1970 as an automotive textile manufacturer, Baran A.S. has evolved into a leading producer of injection molds, plastic components, sun blinds, textile assemblies, sliding window systems, and PVC doors. Today, we supply a wide range of high-quality interior components and systems for on- and off-highway vehicles.

Baran A.S. is a supplier that operates as an OEM parts manufacturer, delivering customer-specific solutions rather than mass-market products. Our vertically integrated structure and broad production capabilities allow us to act as a reliable, agile, and value-adding development partner.

A major portion of our production is carried out in-house, including:

• Injection mold manufacturing
• Plastic injection molding
• Plastic painting and surface finishing
• Textile production (roller blinds, shifter boots, document bags, tool pouches, storage nets)
• High-frequency welding for PVC door manufacturing
• Metal cutting, bending, welding, and metal coating
• Sliding window system production, including metal frame fabrication and glass assembly
• Assembly and system integration

This integrated approach ensures faster development cycles, consistent quality, and efficient manufacturing processes, while reducing the need for multiple suppliers.

Innovation and continuous improvement guide our way of working. With modern CNC machining centers, high-tonnage injection molding machines, automated paint lines, and advanced measurement systems, we operate with a well-equipped and steadily developing machinery park. To keep pace with evolving customer needs, we consistently invest in new technologies and production capacity.

We define ourselves as an “innovative solutions factory.” With our multidisciplinary capabilities in plastics, textile, metal, HF welding, and system assembly, we deliver functional, reliable, and cost-effective solutions for various vehicle platforms. Our flexibility and problem-solving culture support strong, long-term partnerships.

Description:
Com mais de 43 anos de atuação e produção 100% nacional, a empresa Filtran Andorinha garante o desenvolvimento dos seus produtos com máxima qualidade de padrões exigidos pelos fabricantes mundiais automobilísticos e até mesmo seguindo a responsabilidade ambiental.

Name: NUOVA SIMACH S.R.L.
Description:
NUOVA SIMACH S.r.l., located in Torre Canavese (Turin), Italy, spans 11,000 square meters. 
Founded in 1977, it specializes in cold stamping of metal parts, from tool design to mass production.

The company produces contacts, fastons, busbars, and components for vehicle electrification, focusing on copper, aluminum, and steel parts with thicknesses from 0.07mm to 6mm. They support customers from prototypes to mass production and offer various welding technologies.

As a TIER 1 supplier to Volkswagen (including Lamborghini and Audi) and Ferrari, as well as a TIER 2 supplier for Tesla and BMW, NUOVA SIMACH serves diverse sectors, including automotive, household appliances, electronics, and aerospace.
