Name: Kalibre Boru A.S.
Description:
1978 yılında Köseköy’de temelleri atılan Kalibre Boru soğuk çekim boru üretim tesisi, kısa bir süre sonra tekstil sektörü için çelik bobin üretimine başladı. İnovasyon ve sürekli gelişim ilkesi ile pazardaki talep artışı doğrultusunda 1986 yılında İzmit’teki yeni fabrikasına taşınan Kalibre Boru, gerçekleştirdiği yatırımlar sonucunda yurt dışı pazarına açılarak 1994 yılında ilk ihracatını Almanya’ya gerçekleştirdi. 1998 yılında DIN / EN normlarına uygun kaynaklı boru üretimi faaliyeti sonrasında 2002 yılında otomotiv sektöründeki müşteri ihtiyaçları üzerine küresel otomotiv tedarikçileri ve OEM tedarikçileri ile iş birliğine başladı.Kalibre Boru, çevreye karşı derin duyarlılığı, kalite sistemlerindeki liderliği, çalışanlarına verdiği değer, yenilikçi ve çağdaş yönetim anlayışı ile dünyada boru imalat sektöründe söz sahibi olmak hedefi doğrultusunda sürekli büyümeye ve Türkiye ekonomisine katkıda bulunmaya devam ediyor.

Founded in 1978 in Köseköy, Kalibre Boru cold-drawn pipe manufacturing facility started to produce steel coils for the textile sector in a short while. Following innovation and continuous development principles, and in line with the increased market demand, Kalibre Boru moved in 1986 to its new factory located in Izmit. As a result of the investments it made, Kalibre Boru entered foreign markets and made its first export to Germany in 1994. Right after manufacturing welded pipes in line with DIN / EN norms in 1998, Kalibre Boru started cooperating with global automotive suppliers and OEM suppliers in 2002, upon the customer need in the automotive sector. With its sensitivity to the environment, leadership in quality systems, attitude to value its employees, and innovative and contemporary management approach, Kalibre Boru continues to contribute to the Turkish economy and grow to have a say in the pipe manufacturing sector on a global scale.

Name: Chassis Autonomy
Description:
Chassis autonomy specialises in the ground-up design, development and manufacture of steer-by-wire systems for use in highly automated and fully autonomous vehicles.

Unlike our legacy competitors, we are able to innovate rapidly and develop products that are wholly fit for purpose and that meet the needs of the next generation of mobility.  Our technology is designed from the ground-up delivering true fault-tolerant, fail-operational actuation that is a crucial enabler for the safe and commercial deployment of highly automated and fully autonomous vehicles on the world's roads.

Name: M&D France
Description:
M&D France est un revendeur de pièces détachées automobiles dont la mission est de mettre à disposition des plateformes et des grossistes français, des produits de qualité dans leurs versions originale constructeur mais aussi alternative voire rénovée, à des prix très compétitifs.

M&D France est le distributeur national français des équipementiers Meat & Doria et KRIOS. Meat & Doria, qui fête ses 80 ans est le leader de la pièce technique sur des familles d’une profondeur inégalable, tandis que KRIOS air conditioning est un expert de la climatisation.

Nos clients apprécient notre haute qualification qui nous permet de référencer près de 3 000 nouveaux produits par an, disponibles en stock dans tous les entrepôts de M&D Group.

La notoriété de M&D France s’est rapidement constituée grâce à ses nombreux atouts :

   1) les nombreuses exclusivités de distribution que nous obtenons de fabricants pour la première monte,
   2) nos propres fabrications avec un positionnement tarifaire idéal comparé à notre référence d’origine et à nos concurrents,
   3) une profondeur de gamme impressionnante sur les capteurs, commodos, compresseurs et pièces de climatisation, pompes à carburant, vannes EGR, thermostats, sondes lambda, bobines d’allumage, moteurs d’essuie-glace et interrupteurs de tout ordre,
   4) la haute disponibilité des produits,
   5) la prise de commande jusque 18h,
   6) ainsi que nos garanties de 2 ans, voire 3 ans sur notre gamme certifiée (turbos et machines tournantes).

Depuis notre propre entrepôt de stockage situé au Mans, avec 7 km linéaires de rayonnage, nous sommes en mesure de livrer nos clients de toute la France métropolitaine en une nuit.

Si vous êtes sur le marché du commerce de gros de la pièce automobile, contactez-nous pour étudier la possibilité de travailler ensemble ; si vous êtes garagiste ou particulier, nous vous indiquerons notre distributeur local le plus proche.

Pierre-Loïc OLYMPIE, PDG

Name: Dugale Metalúrgica Industrial
Description:
A Dugale é uma empresa localizada em Curitiba, no Paraná, que desde 1998 atende o mercado de produtos metal mecânico.

Atua no segmento de Corte a laser, Dobra, Solda e Pintura eletrostática, tendo como foco qualidade, produtividade, transparência, inovação tecnológica e respeito aos seus clientes.

Busca constantemente avanço tecnológico e aumento da capacidade produtiva, visando estar entre os melhores fornecedores de seus clientes, através de especialização e melhoria contínua em tudo que faz.

Com fortalecimento do segmento metal mecânico e demonstrando seu compromisso com o mercado e o futuro a Dugale ampliou sua linha de corte a laser para peças de grande porte.
Duplicou seu quadro de funcionário em 2020 e esse crescimento foi resultado dos investimentos em máquinas e equipamentos, como a aquisição de uma linha de pintura eletrostática, preparada para entregar peças pintadas com alto padrão de qualidade. 

Visando sempre a excelência no seu segmento de atuação, a Dugale enfrenta com potência os desafios de um mercado altamente competitivo, com investimentos em equipamentos modernos, foco na qualidade e constante aprimoramento nos processos e pessoas, oferecendo aos seus clientes soluções firmadas e o compromisso com a excelência de seus produtos.

Name: Fundição Batatais
Description:
With almost half a century's experience in the auto parts market, Fundição Batatais is not only a foundry but also a company specialized in the complete manufacturing of auto parts of cast iron and, nowadays we operate in the following segments:
 
Spare Parts Line:
Automotive Line: We produce spare parts for exhaust systems for combustion engines of the lines light, medium and heavy (Exhaust Manifold, Turbines carcass, Curve with Engine Brake, Sleeve of Junction and others), compliant with a wide range of brands available in the market.
 
Agricultural Line: We have a complete/wide line of spare parts for soil preparation and planting. We apply to the agricultural line, the same quality that we use in our automotive line, which guarantees products differentiated from those existing in the market. This enhanced quality has been getting more and more the confidence and satisfaction of the farmer.
 
Original Market (OEM - Original Equipment Manufacturer):
Fundição Batatais manufactures on-demand cast iron components for motor vehicles and original agricultural equipment of the most renowned assemblers of the market.
We have been working for more than two decades in this segment and are constantly renowned as a differentiated supplier, either because of the quality of our processes and products, the accuracy and speed of delivery, or the strong and committed partnership we maintain with our customers.

All this, together with modern chemical, metallographic, mechanical and dimensional testing laboratories, guarantee FB products the quality and accuracy required by the market. In addition, our quality management system is certified in compliance with the requirements of ISO 9001.

Name: Autoven
Description:
Autoven is a leading technology company specializing in the development of advanced solutions for the electric vehicle (EV) industry. Our team of experts is dedicated to providing innovative, intelligent, and cost-effective solutions for li-ion battery management systems (BMS), IoT, analytics, connecting charging stations via OCPP, and motor control firmware.

Our cutting-edge technologies are designed to power EVs and their ecosystems, helping to reduce carbon emissions and promote a sustainable future. We believe in the power of innovation and are committed to making a positive impact on the environment through our products and services.

Our Solutions:

At Autoven, we offer a range of specialized solutions that cater to the unique needs of the EV industry. Our li-ion battery management systems (BMS) are designed to provide optimal performance and efficiency, ensuring maximum battery life and range. We also offer IoT solutions that enable real-time monitoring and analytics of EV performance, enabling vehicle managers to make informed decisions.

In addition, our connectivity solutions allow charging stations to be connected via OCPP, providing a seamless and efficient charging experience for EV drivers. Our motor control firmware ensures that EVs operate at maximum efficiency, providing a smooth and comfortable ride.

Our Approach:

At Autoven, we believe in a collaborative approach to innovation. We work closely with our clients to understand their specific needs and develop customized solutions that meet their requirements. We are committed to delivering high-quality solutions that are both cost-effective and sustainable.

Our team of experts is dedicated to staying up-to-date with the latest industry trends and technologies, ensuring that our solutions are always at the forefront of innovation. We are proud to be part of the EV industry and look forward to continuing to contribute to its growth and success.

Name: Icer Brakes
Description:
Established in 1961, ICER Brakes has solidified its position in recent years as Europe’s leading independent manufacturer of friction material and the best and most solid alternative to the companies that have traditionally dominated this market.

With Headquarters offices in Pamplona and manufacturing plant in Tudela (Spain), today, ICER Brakes produces more than 22,000,000 units and operates in more than 70 countries worldwide.

Name: Arca Retentores

Em 1995, sua sede é transferida para Jaboticabal-SP, com o desafio de ampliar sua infraestrutura. Com profissionais altamente capacitados e o uso de tecnologia de ponta, o resultado passa a ser o desenvolvimento de produtos totalmente compatíveis com o mercado internacional. A criação de novos produtos e a expansão de vendas permitiu a Arca Retentores conquistar o reconhecimento em vários países. Hoje, a empresa participa de diversos eventos nacionais e internacionais, e busca alinhar sua missão com as novas tendências e tecnologias do mercado.
O corpo técnico da Arca Retentores é formado por profissionais competentes e comprometidos, sempre trazendo processos inovadores para a satisfação do cliente. O atendimento próximo e personalizado acontece porque nossos diretores estão sempre disponíveis, analisando e sugerindo a solução mais adequada para cada caso.

Name: Intertruck Benelux BV
Description:
Opgericht in 1963, is Intertruck een van de leiders in OE-kwaliteit onderdelen voor vrachtwagens. Gespecialiseerd in de Benelux-regio, bieden we premium onderdelen die zijn ontworpen, vervaardigd en getest volgens internationale normen. Direct van onze geïntegreerde fabriekscampus van 150.000 m², inclusief een hoofdkantoor en magazijn van 5.000 m² in Hoogvliet, Rotterdam. Ons assortiment omvat onderdelen gemaakt van duurzame materialen, op maat gemaakt voor de Benelux OE-aftermarket.


Established in 1963, Intertruck is one of  leaders in OE-quality spare parts for heavy-duty vehicles. Specializing in the Benelux region, we provide premium parts engineered, manufactured, and tested to international standards. From our 150,000 m² integrated factory campus including a 5,000 m² headquarters and warehouse in Rotterdam,Our offerings include durable parts made with unique materials, tailored for the Benelux OE aftermarket.

Name: Rodaros Indústria de Rodas Ltda.
Description:
A Rodaros Industria de Rodas é uma fabricante renomada de rodas, atuando nos segmentos agrícola e fora-de-estrada. 

Com mais de 40 anos de experiência em fabricação de rodas, é uma das líderes do segmento para fornecimento no mercado brasileiro e sul-americano. 

Seu portfolio atende a diversos clientes OEM.

POLÍTICA DA QUALIDADE:
Desenvolver, produzir e fornecer rodas, aros e componentes de aço com qualidade reconhecida e melhorada continuamente através do seu sistema de gestão da qualidade, num ambiente motivador e preservado, visando aumentar a satisfação de seus clientes.

MISSÃO DA ORGANIZAÇÃO:
Desenvolver soluções voltadas ao fornecimento de rodas e componentes de aço para o mercado veicular industrial, fora de estrada e agrícola, buscando melhoria contínua nos seus processos para atingir sustentabilidade, satisfação dos clientes, acionistas e demais partes interessadas no negócio.

VISÃO RODAROS:
Ser a 2ª maior empresa do ramo no Brasil, atingindo 25% de participação de mercado.

Name: Sankar NP Japan
Description: Sankar NP Japan, one of the flagship companies of the Sankar Group, is a globally recognized leader in gasket and sealing solutions. With an IATF 16949-certified facility and a state-of-the-art Technology Center, we are at the forefront of innovation, consistently delivering high-quality products that meet the ever-evolving demands of automotive technology.

Name: HD Rubber & Metal Co.
Description:
HD Kauçuk, today's stop of a journey that started its journey in the automotive sector in Izmir in 1959, has become a brand that directs the sector with the production of rubber and metal suspension spare parts in the heavy vehicle and trailer group. In 2011, we moved our facilities to Denizli with an annual production capacity of 4.000 tons on an area of 20.000m².

Our strength is the combination of a wide range of products with the reliable service understanding of our young and dynamic staff. The harmonious dance of rubber and metal creates the different and high quality products of HD Rubber. While always keeping customer satisfaction as our priority, we value not only our customers, but also our environment and future generations.

We design our own molds in our own design center using flow simulation programs and 3D drawing techniques. Our design center, which has been approved by the Ministry of Industry and Trade since 2017, has also developed zinc phosphate and chemosil paint lines with robotic technologies brought by Industry 4.0.

With the belief that quality is not a choice but a necessity, we deliver our products to our customers at the lowest cost and on time by fully implementing IATF 16949 and ISO 9001 quality management standards.

While we started our export journey in 1983, today we serve in 7 continents and 72 countries. While HD Kauçuk makes a significant contribution to the national economy, we are proud of the success we have achieved in this process. We aim to be a leading brand in the automotive industry tomorrow as we are today.

Name: Incompol
Description:
Founded in 1987, INCOMPOL has grown to become a certified key supplier of high-precision metal components, serving demanding sectors such as automotive, aerospace, and home appliances.

Our core expertise lies in the production of high-volume, high-precision metal parts using a range of advanced technologies, including stamping, machining, turning, welding, and assembly systems.

Operating from two sites near Lisbon, Portugal, and employing over 100 highly skilled professionals, we process more than 6,000 tons of raw material annually to manufacture and deliver over 17 million components to customers worldwide.

Name: Nichibrás Indústria e Comércio Ltda.
Description:
A NICHIBRÁS é uma empresa 100% nacional que atua no mercado de peças técnicas desde 1985.
Atende a vários segmentos, dentre os quais destacam-se as indústrias automotiva e seus sistemistas, indústrias no segmento linha branca, indústria eletroeletrônica, construção civil, montadoras nos segmentos agrícola e náutica, tecidos para aplicações técnicas, embalagens técnicas e, outras no setor de polímeros expandidos ou materiais de vedação ou isolação térmica e acústica.

Com duas unidades de produção em Embú das Artes/SP, e uma filial em João Pessoa/PB, a Nichibrás está preparada para conferir rápida resposta às diferentes demandas de seus clientes em suas unidades estratégica e geograficamente posicionadas no território nacional.

Name: Maggion Oficial
Description:
Com mais de 90 anos no mercado, a Maggion é a maior empresa brasileira de fabricação de pneus do país.  A companhia oferece produtos modernos e tecnológicos aos mais diversos tipos de veículos: motos, carros, caminhões, agrícolas, industriais, fora de estrada, além de câmara de ar.

A Maggion garante a excelência da sua gestão de qualidade sendo atestada por renomados órgãos nacionais e internacionais espalhados pelo mundo. Sua sede e fabricação de pneus está localizada em Guarulhos (SP).

Name: VHIT
Description:
With over sixty years of history, VHIT is a reliable global mobility partner with a strong focus on innovation, sustainability and the future.

VHIT specialises in passenger cars and commercial vehicles with regard to vacuum braking, lubrication and power train cooling systems for both internal combustion engines and electric applications. VHIT also has years of experience in the field of hydraulic actuators for Off Road braking systems and clutches. For both the Automotive and Off Road markets, VHIT offers solutions for both OE and the Aftermarket.

Through digitisation and artificial intelligence we improve the solutions offered to our customers. We look to the future by transforming our processes and organisation.

Those who work with us live in a dynamic, innovative and constantly evolving environment. We believe that trust and teamwork can help us achieve new and ever more challenging goals. We promote flexibility, fostering a good work-life balance and ensure a stimulating and comfortable workplace. Join our team to plan the future of mobility together!

Description:

Currently supplying to all major OEMs like Suzuki, Honda, Tata, Mahindra, Ford, Tafe (Massey Ferguson) in India
Capability to produce highly precision & critical parts
Largest Shift tower & Shifter rail manufacturer of India
Running a JV (KHM drivelines) with Japanese companies successfully since last 5 years 
Developed extremely efficient mass manufacturing production procedures to ensure better quality product at competitive costs

Name: Vision Techniques UK Ltd
Description:
As one of the longest established companies offering safety-based products, Vision Techniques, founded in 1988, has extensive knowledge that spans over 3 decades.
We have evolved into one of the UK’s largest vehicle safety equipment providers, supplying across a wide range of industries including construction, waste management, quarrying and mining, agriculture and blue light. Specified by some of the largest fleets in the UK, Vision Techniques’ products are influencing and changing safety standards across industries daily.

Description:
SECO, a leading auto parts manufacturing company in South Korea, was established in 1966. With 8 different auto parts affiliates around the globe, ECOPLASTIC emerged as a significant affiliate in June 1984. ECOPLASTIC specializes in the design, development, and production of exterior and interior auto parts for the global automobile industry. As an exclusive 1-tier supplier to Hyundai (HMGMA), ECOPLASTIC AMERICA now extends its innovative leadership in eco-friendly electronic auto parts manufacturing to North America, capitalizing on cutting-edge technologies and a strong reputation for reliability. 
For more information, visit: www.ecoplasticamerica.com

Name: CTVI - Automotive Testing Center of Iracemápolis
Description: CTVI is the most technological Proving Ground in Latin America for trucks, buses, automobiles, light commercial vehicles and agricultural machinery. With five test tracks in an area of 400 thousand square meters, CTVI allows assessments of vehicle safety, energy efficiency and new driver assistance technologies. The complex is available for rental to vehicle and automotive component manufacturers and offers workshop boxes, prototype parking and individual offices, which guarantees complete privacy and confidentiality for projects. With CTVI, Mercedes-Benz do Brasil and Robert Bosch Ltda. deliver a great legacy for the automotive industry in Latin America, with global standards of quality and reliability. Tests with autonomous, hybrid and electric vehicles can also be carried out on site.

Name: Bosch Transmission Technology B.V.
Description:
Bosch Thin Metal Technologies, a tradename of Bosch Transmission Technology B.V., is a specialist in high-tech thin metal components for (electro) mobility and hydrogen technology. The company has its foundations in the development and manufacturing of the metal pushbelt for continuously variable transmissions for passenger vehicles. The pushbelt has been a great success for the past decades: Bosch has produced more than 100 million for customers all over the world (March 2024). With its unique competencies, material expertise, and experience in engineering and mass production gained with the pushbelt, Bosch expanded its product portfolio with new high-tech thin metal components such as E-stacks for electric motors and air foil bearings. Additionally, the company was assigned as the Research & Development center of electrolyzer technology within Bosch due to its experience in the development of electrolyzer stacks and bipolar plates for fuel cells and electrolyzers.

The company is part of the Mobility Solutions business sector of the Bosch Group.

Name: Feka Mold
Description:
Feka Mold manufactures Plastic Injection Molds that appeal to all industry areas by combining its experience and knowledge gained over many years in the plastic injection molding sector with a team specialized in high technology and manufacturing.

Aware of the challenges in today's competitive domestic and global market, our work continues with an innovative, flexible and solution-oriented strategy.

Our company; With the experience it has gained in the automotive sector and its mold productions in the medical sector it is on its way to becoming a well-established company in the sector. Feka Mold has reached advanced levels with its solution partners DMG MORI, GF, NX, MOLDFLOW in the production of 2K-3K molds with the desired precision, tolerance and surface quality.

In addition to our factory located in Bursa/Turkey, we have a representative office in England and we continue to produce molds for companies abroad.

Our product range: 
• Lighting Molds (external lens, bezel reflector, housing, reflex reflector)
• Interior Trim Molds
• Exterior Trim Molds
• Cooling Water And Hydraulic Oil Tank Molds
• Prototype Mold

Name: AUO Mobility Solutions Corporation America
Description:
AUO Mobility Solutions Corporation America is the home of AUO's mobility solutions group for North America. AUO is a global leader for display solutions in every major industry, and AUO Mobility Solutions is leading the way in tapping into the possibilities for mobility applications.

AUO generated $7.9B USD in sales revenue in 2022 and employs more than 38,000 throughout its global operations spreading across the United States, Taiwan, China, Germany, the Netherlands, Vietnam, Singapore, Japan, and South Korea.

AUO’s complete line-up of Gen 3.5 to 8.5 production lines provides a full range of panel sizes and a rock-solid foundation for our integration capabilities. We provide software and hardware system integration, customized products for any shape, size, or diversity, rigorous commitment to quality, and smart services to create even greater value with our customers. AUO has world-class capability in R&D and an extensive patent portfolio, with more than 18,700 global patents approved to date.

"Commit to Care" is one of our core values at AUO. We always care how we can reach a mutually beneficial goal that brings value not just to our partners, but also to culture, the environment, and society at large. We embrace the highest standards in corporate governance, environmental sustainability, and social concern, including being selected to the Dow Jones Sustainability Index (DJSI) for 13 consecutive years.

Reach out to AUO and let's Tap Into The Possibilities, together.

Name: Knorr-Bremse Lisieux – Systèmes pour Véhicules Utilitaires
Description: Le Groupe Knorr-Bremse dont le siège est situé à Munich est le fabricant leader mondial de systèmes de freins pour véhicules sur rails et utilitaires. En tant que pionnier technologique, l’entreprise stimule depuis 1905 de manière considérable le développement, la production, la distribution et le service de systèmes de freins modernes.

Name: Cofle Group
Description:
Cofle Group, founded in 1964, is a multinational company specializing in the design, production, and worldwide marketing of cables and remote control systems for the off-road vehicles, automotive, and automotive after-market sectors.

The Group operates through two distinct business lines: 
• The Original Equipment (OE) business line, which produces cables and control systems for the agricultural, earth-moving machinery, commercial vehicle, and premium automotive sectors on a global scale;
• The Independent After Market (IAM) business line, specializing in the worldwide production of spare parts for the automotive sector. This line offers over 7,000 products, all created and developed based on the expertise gained from the OE business line.
Production is carried out in six plants located in Italy (1), Turkey (3), India (1), and Brazil (1). The Italian and Turkish facilities also include technical centers, logistics centers, and research and development departments. The Group is also present in China and France with a sales office.

Cofle employs over 500 people and sells its products in 38 countries to around 300 customers, including leading companies in the agricultural and earth-moving machinery sectors, such as CNH, AGCO, CLAAS, SDF, Yaris, Tafe, Mahindra, and Argo Tractors, as well as groups active in luxury automotive and commercial vehicles, such as Ferrari, Maserati, Lotus, INEOS Automotive, and IVECO.

Name: LAUNCH Europe GmbH
Description:
LAUNCH Europe GmbH, founded in 2003, is a specialist for automotive workshop equipment based in Kerpen near Cologne.

The parent company LAUNCH Tech Co. Ltd was founded in 1992 and is today one of the world's leading workshop equipment manufacturers with its electronic and mechanical products.

Name: Chargie
Description:
The demand for electric vehicles is booming. For good reason. Zero emissions, lower maintenance costs and longer driving ranges are fueling the switch.

But what’s down the road? For all of us to realize the full potential of EVs, we need more accessible infrastructure that makes charging your car as routine as charging your phone. So we powered up Chargie.

With a background in real estate and an eye toward the future, we’re building the most intelligent, reliable EV charging network by a mile. One that works for modern commercial buildings, multifamily communities and the growing number of EV drivers. Property owners get turnkey installation and management of charging stations, tenants and visitors get simple, intuitive charging.

The road ahead is full of possibilities. And we’re bringing everyone along for the drive.

Name: Circuit Equipment
Description: CIRCUIT is a world-renowned brand that has been operating in the motorcycle and motorcycle accessories and solutions segment since 1984, and stands out for innovation, quality and design. Today, the brand has a complete line of products that meet all models and brands of the two-wheel segment. We exist to facilitate, modernize and give safety to the lives of those who love motorcycles and bikes. We embrace the future with constant and innovative launches, using the highest production technology. We sponsor and encourage athletes and events in different categories, such as: Motocross, Rally, Enduro, Super Moto, Mountain Bike, BMX, Skate and Surf. We are an integrated and totally responsible company in Socio-environmental issues. We thank everyone who is part of this family!

Name: Chitlangia Industries
Description: Chitlangia Industries is the new Manufacturing Verticle of the Chitlangia Group. Chitlangia Industries is involved in high precision engineering and quality fabrications. We have a team of highly skilled engineers and designers who have notable experience in the Automobile space.

Name: Venta Global
Description:
We partner with forward thinking, progressive vehicle and machinery manufacturers, to create quality lighting solutions that deliver genuine benefit. 

Venta has been built on a desire to solve problems and help companies achieve their goals. We thrive on making the impossible possible.  

We provide off the shelf products and can tailor our products for a specific application. But when the ordinary just won’t do, our expertise really lies in designing and manufacturing quality solutions from scratch.  

We work on projects of all sizes, from bespoke solutions with low volumes to large scale production. Our flexible and scalable approach means we can adapt quickly if things change. 

Our refreshing, friendly approach of keeping things simple and doing things quickly is what helps deliver genuine benefit to our clients. We always give honest advice. We form long-lasting partnerships with our clients and create solutions that set them apart from their competition. 

Our owners have been here from the start. They’re at the heart of our values and are embedded in the day to day. The success of our clients’ projects means a lot to the people at Venta.

Name: Hankook Tire Europe GmbH
Description:
Hankook fertigt weltweit innovative, Hochleistungsradialreifen im Premium-Segment für Pkw, SUVs, Geländewagen, Leicht-Lkw, Wohnmobile, Lkw, Busse und den automobilen Motorsport (Rundstrecke/ Rallye).

Das Unternehmen investiert kontinuierlich in Forschung und Entwicklung, um seinen Kunden stets höchste Qualität in Verbindung mit technologischer Exzellenz zu bieten. In weltweit fünf Entwicklungszentren und acht Groß-Fabriken entwickelt und produziert Hankook Tire Bereifungslösungen, die speziell auf die Anforderungen und Ansprüche regionaler Märkte zugeschnitten sind. In Europa findet die Reifenentwicklung für die lokalen Märkte und die Erstausrüstung nach Maßgabe führender Europäischer Fahrzeughersteller im Hankook Technikzentrum Hannover/Deutschland statt. Produziert werden die Reifen unter anderem in der hochmodernen europäischen Fabrik des Unternehmens in Rácalmás/Ungarn, die 2007 eingeweiht wurde und kontinuierlich erweitert wird. Derzeit produzieren dort rund 3.000 Beschäftigte bis zu 19 Millionen Reifen pro Jahr für Pkw, SUVs und Leicht-Lkw.

Die Europa- und Deutschland-Zentrale des Reifenherstellers befinden sich in Neu-Isenburg bei Frankfurt am Main. In Europa unterhält Hankook weitere Niederlassungen in Frankreich, Großbritannien, Italien, den Niederlanden, Polen, Russland, Schweden, Spanien, der Tschechischen Republik, der Türkei, Ungarn und der Ukraine. Hankook Reifen werden direkt über regionale Distributoren in weitere europäische Länder vertrieben. Weltweit beschäftigt das Unternehmen 21.000 Mitarbeiter und liefert seine Produkte in über 180 Länder. Führende Automobilhersteller vertrauen in der Erstausrüstung auf Bereifungen von Hankook. Etwa 30 Prozent des globalen Umsatzes erzielt das Unternehmen innerhalb Europas und der GUS. Hankook Tire ist seit 2016 im renommierten Dow Jones Sustainability Index World (DJSI World) vertreten. Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter  www.hankooktire-mediacenter.com  oder  www.hankooktire.com.

Name: myTVS Accessories
Description:
Within 1 year of the launch, myTVS Accessories has quickly become India's No.1 Car Accessories Brand, awarded by ET Now Modi Awards and Times Network National Awards for Marketing Excellence !

The company offers 120+ Products, sold across India by 5000+ retailers and leading e-commerce marketplaces like Amazon, Flipkart, PayTM and myTVSAccessories.com, company’s self-hosted e-commerce platform.

The brand offers innovative products that range from Infotainment systems, Tyre Inflators, Vacuum cleaners, Mobile Accessories, Wiper Blades, Horns etc. The products offered under the brand are a result of extensive India focused consumer research and product gap in the form of a trustworthy brand largely unorganized auto accessories market.
All myTVS products are quality oriented, value for money and extensively tested and offer upto 2 years of warranty.

myTVS Accessories (formerly Jazzmyride), is a joint venture between the founders of Jazzmyride and TVS Automobile Solutions Pvt. Ltd., part of the $6 billion TVS Group. 

Founded as Jazzmyride in 2011, by e-commerce enthusiast, Sunil Dhingra and co-founder, Mukesh Dhingra, the company started from a capital of mere Rs.10,000 with consistent revenue and profit growth and remarkably the company has been profitable since inception itself.

A young, enthusiastic and fun-loving team of close to 100 people at TVS Accessories is committed to make myTVS Accessories as World’s #1 Auto Accessories Brand soon.

Description:
É uma história simples e, em certa medida, exemplar que relata as  raízes da empresa Corghi. A  história começa no coração de Emilia, uma  área espaçosa e vibrante que, desde o inicio do Período pós-guerra,  confirmou uma tendência interminável para desenvolver uma mentalidade  empresarial moderna, especialmente no setor mecânico.
CORGHI: UMA HISTÓRIA  ITALIANA
Em  1947, os irmãos Erminio e Remo Corghi começaram a colher os frutos de  suas habilidades de negócios e criatividade, construindo rádios e  inventando uma caça específica com gravador. Seis anos depois, em 1954, a  eletromecânica Corghi nasceu. A marca com o rouxinol, que a partir  deste momento passa a ser o símbolo da empresa, começa a ser muito  estimada.
A  empresa desenvolveu suas habilidades mecânicas em um amplo setor:  estabilizadores de tensão Tv, máquinas agrícolas, eletrodomésticos,  equipamentos têxteis. Foram anos em que as ideias prosperaram e  cresceram indefinidamente sem esperar a oportunidade certa por vir.
O  boom dos automóveis explode em 1960 e os irmãos Corghi estavam prontos.  Eles inventam e patetearam a primeira montadora e desmontadora de pneus  do mundo, a melhor maneira de atacar o mercado. A empresa decola e nunca  mais para de subir.
Hoje a Corghi é líder absoluta no mercado italiano e líder mundial no setor de equipamentos de assistência de veículo.

Name: BETSAIDE SAL
Description:
Welcome to Betsaide SAL!
Betsaide SAL is an established iron castings group located in the Spanish Basque Country that supplies mostly nowadays reference customers from the car and truck automotive industry.
Betsaide SAL produces since 1989 ductile iron castings, SG iron castings and austempered ductile iron (ADI) castings up to 15 kg in weight using 3 DISAMATIC moulding machines with the latest generation technology (34.000 Tm in 2023) 

From the early RFQ phase to the final project acquisition, Betsaide launches simulation analysis (MAGMA) to prevent serial defects and to propose design and cost-effective optimizations considering the growing exigence of the casting component requirements. In our own tool shop, we are able to produce rapid prototypes and pre-series castings using full production processes.

Betsaide SAL is certified to IATF 16949:2016, ISO9001:2015 and ISO14001, and we are proud to invest constantly in human resources and capital equipment, looking forward to becoming your preferred partner for cast iron, machined, painted and assembled components.

We are strong, because of our corporate structure and our extraordinarily close-knit workforce. We are technologically advanced, and we have objective capabilities that enable us to provide real solutions to the problems of our customers.

We are versatile and can adapt ourselves to a wide range of technical specifications and conditions of supply and service. 

We are always seeking to satisfy our customers through our character, through our experience, through our technology, through our flexibility and through our quality.

Depuis sa création en 1975, TALENDI (anciennement Bretagne Ateliers) développe un modèle où l’entreprise se met au service de l’homme ; sous statut associatif, L'entreprise adaptée et ses 2 ESAT emploient aujourd’hui près de 500 personnes dont 380 ont une reconnaissance de travailleurs handicapés. Nuestra experiencia de más de 85 años en estampación, soldadura de conjuntos, montaje de componentes y recubrimiento por cataforesis, así como en el mecanizado y fabricación de troqueles de estampación, nos permite ofrecer un servicio integral de alto valor añadido, todo bajo un mismo techo, con las mejoras en el apartado logístico que ello supone.

Las piezas que salen de nuestras instalaciones son entre otras: refuerzos estructurales de carrocería, pilares A, B y C, refuerzos de chasis, largueros, paredes de carga, tapas de batería, aletas, capots o frentes.

La actividad de ORAN está certificada bajo las normas IATF 16949:2016 e ISO-14.001. 

ESTAMPACIÓN:
Contamos con 4 líneas de estampación tándem totalmente robotizadas, con prensas de cabecera de 1.200 toneladas.

SOLDURA Y MONTAJE DE CONJUNTOS:
Disponemos de células de soldadura flexibles tanto robotizadas como manuales, así como capacidades para engatillar componentes por roldanas. 

CATAFORESIS (KTL):
Recubrimiento cataforético en una instalación automática de pintado con capacidad para tratar piezas grandes. 

MATRICERÍA:
Totalmente equipada, con capacidad para la fabricación completa de troqueles de estampación de hasta 6 metros. Nuevos troqueles, modificaciones, reparaciones, adaptaciones, mantenimiento y también dando asistencia a empresas de estampación. 

Si necesitas un socio de fabricación para tus piezas de automoción, cuenta con nosotros! Queremos ser parte de tu equipo.

Name: Toyota Industries Group TACG-TICA-TIES
Description:
Our two operations, TACG and TICA, are members of the Toyota Industries Group and are among the world’s leading manufacturers of automobile air conditioning compressors and component parts in addition to DC-AC inverters for automobile plug-in devices. From raw materials to final product, our manufacturing process involves many roles coming together as one team as part of the worldwide Toyota Industries Group. Beyond manufacturing, Toyota Industries Group companies lead the world in compressor technology and the innovation of new compressor products that are part of a longstanding commitment to our vision of making the world a better place to live, enriching lifestyles, and promoting a compassionate society. Today, TACG and TICA have grown to approximately 1,300 associates working together to supply our products to many of the world’s top vehicle manufacturers. 

We are in the midst of launching a 3rd facility here on our Pendergrass campus, TIES. TIES is Toyota Industries Electric Systems and was established in 2024. TIES will start the production of DC-DC Converters. The DC-DC Converter changes high voltage battery power in electric vehicles to the 12 Volt power required for the auxiliary battery required to power navigation systems and other devices connected to the vehicle. Start of Production is scheduled for November 2025!

Name: Galileo Wheel
Description:
Galileo Wheel is the owner of the innovative TrakWheel tire technology – off-road mobility solutions for central pivot irrigation systems, agriculture and construction. Since 2011 we have delivered enhanced performance capabilities based on a brand-new design concept.   

The TrakWheel technology is an innovative manufacturing process. Our key value is a V-shaped tire sidewall, which completely changes tyre dynamics turning it into a new highly advanced “hybrid type” product. Literally “the tire that works like a track”. 

Our key benefits:

- Larger footprint and with uniform load distribution and surface contact
- Greatly enhanced lateral stability, improving steering action & performance on slopes
- Airless applications for high puncture-risk applications
- Increased traction for enhanced productivity and energy savings
- Run-flat capability, ensuring zero downtime to finish the days’ work
- Famous Galileo ride comfort and safety
- Reduced soil compaction

TrakWheel offers increased efficiency, greater soil protection, lower total costs of ownership and zero downtime. Combining both advantages of radial off-road tyres and tracks.

Our products:

- IrriTrak – tires for center pivot irrigation systems
- AgriTrak– tractor tires 
- SkidTrak – tires for skid steer loaders 

 Visit our website to learn more about our products and dealers in your region
 For USA, Canada, Mexico: 1-888-280-0851
