Description:
Overview

ZF Steering Gear (India) Ltd. (ZF INDIA) was incorporated in the year 1981 as a joint venture ZF Friedrichshafen AG.
ZF INDIA is a Pioneer in Manufacturing and Supply of Ball and Nut Integral Hydraulic Power & Worm and Roller Mechanical Steering System in India, having two manufacturing facilities in one Pune, Maharashtra and other in Pithampur, Madhya Pradesh.   

Pune is a major automotive hub with OEMs like Force Motors, General Motors, Mercedes Benz, Mahindra Trucks & Bus Ltd, TATA Motors, etc. Present installed capacity of the plant is 2,00,000 units of Worm and Roller Mechanical Steering Gears and 3,75,000 units of   Ball and Nut Integral Hydraulic Power Steering Gears.

ZF India invested in a world class New Steering manufacturing unit in 2019 at Pithampur MP with excellency toward 4.0 standard and occupied with the modern mind set of new industrial revolution.
Our new plant is occupied with advance technological testing equipment, well equipped with advance Machine shop, Auto assembly line, World’s first assembly level low bake CED coating plant and continue to increase the capacity along with Modern processes and facility.
In this plant all machine and processes   are running by graduate engineer, now inclination of prestigious customer toward this plant are rapidly increasing.
 
ZF INDIA has state of the art technology in Design & Manufacturing various types of Power Steering Systems and Mechanical Steering Systems based on customer’s needs. It is continuously in the process of widening its product base to meet the increasing demands of automotive market and is keen to diversify in appropriate product lines.
 
ZF INDIA has an established business management system with certification for IATF 16949:2016 It has created service and spare parts network of around 60 dealers uniformly spread all over India, Nepal, Middle East, South Africa and Bangladesh to address to all its customer’s needs.

Name: DELFINGEN
Description:
DELFINGEN is a global automotive supplier and a leading manufacturer of on-board networks protection solutions and fluid transfer tubing, working closely with carmarkers, automotive suppliers and industrials.
DELFINGEN strengthens the synergies between its different activities to fully meet its customers' expectations.

 Key figures: 
- The 3rd generation family-owned since 1954
- 4000+ co-workers worldwide
- Presence on 41 locations in 21 countries
- 423 Millions Euros annual sales in 2024

Name: Preh Group
Description:
As a global automotive supplier, the Preh Group currently employs around 7,000 people and in 2024 achieved sales of around EUR 1.53 billion. Preh was founded in Bad Neustadt a. d. Saale in 1919 and since 2011 has been part of the Joyson Group. Preh’s development and manufacturing expertise includes, in particular, HMI systems for cars and commercial vehicles, as well as e-mobility components in the low-voltage and high-voltage range. As a subsidiary of the listed Joyson Electronics Corp. (600699: Shanghai), Preh is the Automotive Electronics division within the Joyson group of companies, Ningbo (China), which was founded by Jeff Wang in 2004.

(Impressum: http://www.preh.com/impressum/)
Location: Bad Neustadt a. d. Saale, Bayern

Name: BYD Malaysia
Description:
BYD MALAYSIA SDN BHD
Busines Registration No : (1094740-K)
All Rights Reserved.

BYD is a high-tech company devoted to technological innovations for a better life. BYD was founded in February 1995, and after more than 20 years of fast growth, the company has established over 30 industrial parks worldwide and has played a significant role in industries related to electronics, automobiles, new energy and rail transit. From energy generation and storage to its applications, BYD is dedicated to providing zero-emission energy solutions. BYD is listed on the Hong Kong and Shenzhen Stock Exchanges, with revenue and market capitalization each exceeding RMB 100 billion.

Name: UAP Inc.
Description:
UAP is the Canadian leader in the distribution and merchandising of parts and accessories for cars, trucks and heavy vehicles.
We employ more than 5,000 individuals who work hard every day to build a recognized and reputable company.

UAP is a member of the Genuine Parts Company (GPC) family, an international service organization engaged in the distribution of automotive and industrial replacement parts. The Company serves numerous customers in various sectors and has approximately 55,000 employees.

Two divisions, one priority—excellence 
With outlets across Canada, UAP is organized into two main divisions:
   •   The Auto Parts Division, which is mainly involved in the sale, distribution and marketing of replacement parts and supplies for cars and light trucks
   •   The Heavy Vehicle Parts Division, which caters mainly to the needs of the trucking and construction sectors, as well as the mining and forest industries

Name: ZEN S.A.
Description:
A ZEN é o maior fabricante independente de impulsores de partida do mundo, e conquistou importante participação de mercado nos segmentos original (OEM) e de reposição (aftermarket) na América do Sul, América do Norte, Europa, Ásia e África. Fundada em 1960, em Brusque (SC), a empresa mantém ritmo constante de crescimento, atuando nos segmentos de autopeças para as linhas leve e pesada. Líder absoluta na América do Sul, a ZEN produz anualmente cerca de 15 milhões de componentes. Seu portfólio inclui polias de alternador, tensionadores de correias, mancais de alternador e planetárias, além de componentes conformados a frio utilizados em sistemas de transmissão e freio ABS de automóveis e caminhões. Com alto grau de competência em sistemas de roda livre e conformação, a empresa destina cerca de 5% de seu faturamento anual à área de P&D, para o desenvolvimento de produtos inovadores e patentes – a empresa já soma 14. Atualmente, com cerca de 1.000 funcionários, apoiado em seu sistema Lean de produção, a ZEN mantém um rigoroso processo de qualidade, certificado pelas normas ISO 9001, ISO-TS 16.949 e ISO 14.001. 


ZEN is a Brazilian Privately Held Company, worldwide leader in Starter Drive Production. Founded in 1960, ZEN reach the Top in its sector, developing skills and know-how, always concerning about its environmental impact. ISO/TS 16949, ISO 14001, ISO 9001 and FFGA Certified.
Major Products: Starter Drives, Overruning Pulleys, Belt Tensioners, Cold Form Parts and Die Casting Aluminum Parts.
Counting on R&D Laboratory with full capabilities to develop automotive parts, ZEN can provide any kind of Validation in Bench Test with Internet following options.
ZEN exports for more than 60 countries.

Name: Aisin Automotive
Description:
A Aisin Automotive é especializada em produtos relacionados a Carroceria e Motores, a qual possui uma extensa linha de produtos que, além de funcionais, oferecem também design e compactação superior, contribuindo para a redução de peso do veículo e eficiência energética.
Mundialmente, a companhia possui mais de 203 empresas, aproximadamente 120.000 colaboradores diretos e fornece grande variedade de produtos para motores, transmissões, portas e chassis.

Missão: "Por que existimos"
Vamos entregar beleza à nossa terra futura, trazendo liberdade e felicidade ao "movimento".

Visão: “Como vemos o futuro”
Vamos agir de acordo com nossos sonhos e aspirações, mostrar soluções concretas para os desafios ambientais e sociais, com foco na evolução do "movimento" por meio da energia limpa como o núcleo e criar um futuro seguro e confortável para todos.

Valores: "O que nos esforçamos para oferecer”
 Aos nossos colegas, crescimento e felicidade. Seremos uma empresa que respeita a diversidade e as personalidades individuais, que assume desafios, nos quais as pessoas podem agir de forma independente e aspirar a contribuir para a sociedade, onde possam sentir seu próprio crescimento, serem reconhecidos e encontrarem a felicidade em suas vidas.
 Aos nossos clientes, inspiração e confiança. Iremos inovar com mobilidade segura, confortável e conveniente, que proporciona felicidade e inspiração para o "movimento", com um novo valor que exceda as expectativas do cliente.
Para o futuro, um meio ambiente sustentável. Mobilidade e energia limpa que torna eficaz o uso da energia para uma sociedade em harmonia.


Encarregado pelo tratamento de dados pessoais.
Fernando Seiji Mihara
Stüssi-Neves Advogados
dpoaisin@snasp.com.br

Name: Tesca Group
Description: Tesca is expert in Design and manufacturing of automotive textiles and seat components such as headrests, armrests, seat upholstery, padding, and more. The Group has over 3,500 employees worldwide in 15 different locations, in Europe, North Africa, Russia, Asia, Latin America, and now North America. The Group is recognised for its innovative solutions in the global automotive industry.

Name: JTEKT North America Corporation
Description:
JTEKT North America is a global leader in advanced automotive technologies, providing innovative solutions to drive the future of mobility. As a subsidiary of JTEKT Corporation, we specialize in the development and manufacturing of cutting-edge steering systems, driveline components, and bearings (formerly sold as Koyo) for a wide range of industries including automotive, industrial, and energy.

Our commitment to quality, reliability, and customer service drives us to deliver high-performance products that enhance the driving experience and improve lives. With a strong presence in North America, JTEKT is proud to work alongside leading automakers and industrial heavyweights to create intelligent, efficient, and safe solutions that move the world.

Name: ARB Corporation Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1975, ARB 4x4 Accessories stands as Australia’s largest manufacturer and distributor of aftermarket 4WD accessories. Committed to developing the most technically advanced and innovative market offerings, ARB sets a global benchmark in the industry and continues to supply military, mining and government sectors around the world.

With an extensive product portfolio covering all facets of functional and protective four wheel drive equipment, ARB's primary mission is to prepare vehicles and owners alike for the remote and harsh conditions typically encountered off road. 

ARB currently has more than 50 stores and over 100 hundred stockists located across Australia, including a global presence throughout the United States, Thailand and Europe, with an export network serving more than 100 countries around the world.

Name: Brembo do Brasil
Description:
Brembo é uma empresa líder mundial de mercado em desenvolvimento e produção de sistemas de freios e componentes para automóveis, motos e veículos comerciais com produtos genuínos, Aftermarket, de competição e de alto performance.
A Brembo opera atualmente em 03 continentes com fabricas de produção em 12 países; temos áreas comerciais também na Suécia, França e Alemanha, enquanto nossos produtos são vendidos em 70 países do mundo.
Atualmente a Brembo conta com cerca de 6.000 funcionários, sendo 10% engenheiros e funcionários especializados em pesquisa e desenvolvimento.
No Brasil, a Brembo conta com duas fábricas, uma localizada em Betim / MG e outra localizada em São Paulo / SP. Produzindo discos e tambores de freios e volantes de motor para as melhores montadoras do país.

Name: Holley
Description:
More than just parts. Always part of something more powerful.

Holley is a leading designer, marketer, and manufacturer of high-performance automotive aftermarket products for car and truck enthusiasts. Holley offers the largest portfolio of iconic brands that deliver innovation and inspiration to a large and diverse community of millions of avid automotive enthusiasts who are passionate about the performance and the personalization of their classic and modern cars. Holley has disrupted the performance aftermarket category by putting the enthusiast consumer first, developing innovative new products, and building a robust M&A process that has added meaningful scale and diversity to its platform.

Name: SK battery America
Description:
About SK Battery America (SKBA)

As the flagship entity of SK On and a leader in the electric vehicle (EV) battery manufacturing sector, SKBA is at the forefront of advancing high nickel technology. With an impressive revenue of $2 billion and dedicated team of 2,600 employees, we provide high-energy density battery cells to top automotive brands like Ford, Volkswagen, and Hyundai Motors. SKBA's North American expansion is marked by strategic joint partnerships with industry giants such as Ford and Hyundai, underscoring our commitment to the evolving EV landscape.

Since 2019, we have invested a total of $2.6 billion to build EV battery plants in Commerce, Georgia, and created over 3,000 highly skilled jobs. Building a new chapter in automotive history, we are opening new possibilities and taking great pride in the talented people who drive our growth.


*SK Group is one of South Korea's top three industrial conglomerates.
It has about 107 affiliated companies, ranging from energy, telecommunications, finance, and construction.

Name: TUBERFIL
Description:
A TUBERFIL teve início em 1966 com a comercialização de Tubos de Aço e em 1988 passou a produzir seus próprios produtos com excelência de qualidade em Indaiatuba, interior de São Paulo. 

A TUBERFIL é hoje um dos principais fabricantes de Tubos de Aço e Peças Tubulares do país e opera com três unidades, nas cidades de Indaiatuba-SP, Salto-SP e Estiva-MG. Suas unidades fabris contam com um parque industrial com aproximadamente 50.000 m² e capacidade instalada de 100.000 toneladas/ano, além de equipamentos de tecnologia de ponta na fabricação de seus produtos. Certificada com o selo de qualidade ISO 9001, a TUBERFIL atua em diversos segmentos de mercado, tais como: montadoras, sistemistas, sucroalcooleiro, auto-peças, construção civil, equipamentos, entre outros.

Name: AYD AUTOMOTIVE INDUSTRY
Description:
At AYD, we are very proud of our long History & Heritage, which is testimony to our pedigree in providing Braking & Steering & Suspension Solutions. Our 100% Family Owned business was Formed In 1975 and was one of the very first pioneering manufacturers of steering components in Turkey. Our company continues to go from Strength to Strength and we continue to Invest & Build for The Future.

Today we are renowned across the globe as the Industry Leader and We Offer Complete Solutions for all types of Passenger, LCV & CV Heavy Duty applications. Another one of our core strengths is Our Unrivalled Vehicle Parc Coverage for European, Asian & North American applications. We continue to add multiple New to Range Parts on a monthly basis with many of these parts being First to Market.

Our Steering & Braking Product Offering continues to grow and is now more than 50.000 Part Numbers and all our products are produced at our Fully Certified State of the Art Manufacturing Facilities in Konya, Turkey. Our All Under 1 Roof policy is a key cornerstone of what we do in our business today and plays a crucial role in providing our products and solutions to our OE & Aftermarket customers across the globe.

Our product portfolio comprises of Control Arms, Inner & Outer Tie Rod Ends, Ball Joints, Link Stabilizers, Bushes, Pitman/Idler Arms, Drag Links, V Stay Bars, Torque Rods, Air Tanks, Air Springs, Brake Discs, Brake Drums & Brake Pads, and all these products are application engineered and manufactured to meet or exceed OE standards following stringent and robust design, manufacturing & testing processes and procedures.

Sustainability & ESG is also a key focus area at AYD, which plays an essential and Integral part in our current and future investment plans. We have recently equipped our facilities with Solar Paneling. In parallel with this activity, we also recycle vast amounts of our scrap materials generated in our manufacturing sites.

Name: Teknia
Description:
Teknia is a multinational Group specialized in manufacturing metal and plastic components for mobility solutions using a wide range of technologies. The Group is present in 12 countries with 22 production plants and its clients are the main automotive manufacturers worldwide.

Teknia is able to respond to the most demanding needs of its customers as a manufacturing partner for mobility.

Name: MAIER Group
Description:
We are European leaders in the decoration of plastic parts and manufacturer of complex injection moldings for the automotive industry. The technologies we’re working with comprise chrome plating, painting, laser etching and hot stamping.

MAIER Group forms part of the prestigious Mondragon Corporation, one of the biggest cooperative organizations worldwide.

With headquarters in Gernika (Basque Country) and subsidiaries, joint ventures and sales offices in more than ten countries, we are a truly global player, where the world is open to you.

Name: Sailun Tire Americas
Description:
Sailun Tire Americas (STA) is a leading global tire company with a strong reputation for delivering high-performance tire solutions across 180+ countries. Our tires are designed and developed in the United States and Canada to meet the specific demands of North American roads and industries.

With expertise spanning passenger, commercial, and fleet applications, STA is committed to delivering reliable, innovative tire solutions that help businesses achieve greater efficiency and performance. Our expanding network of distributors, retailers, and fleet partners trusts STA to deliver high-quality products with proven reliability.

Explore our robust portfolio of Passenger and Commercial tires, designed to provide tailored solutions that move businesses forward.

Name: KEKO ACESSÓRIOS S/A
Description: Indústria de acessórios para veículos, há 24 anos atuando com as principais montadoras: Ford, Toyota, Mitisubishi, Renault, Peugot, Volkswagem,GM, etc...

Name: L.G. Balakrishnan & Bros. Ltd
Description:
L.G. Balakrishnan & Bros. Ltd is a world-leading manufacturer in Transmission Products with its Automotive Timing & Drive Chains, Sprockets, Auto Tensioners, Guides, Fine Blanked Components, Precision Machined Parts, Belts & Rubber Products.

The core functions like R&D, Machine Building, Toolroom, Heat treatment, and other service divisions operate under the strict supervision of the corporate office as LGB believes that, a high degree of responsiveness can meet the shifting needs of the marketplace.

Name: CIE Automotive India Ltd.
Description:
CIE Automotive India Limited (‘CIE India’) is a multinational company and a subsidiary of the CIE Automotive Group of Spain. It is listed on the BSE Limited (BSE) and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE). CIE India is the CIE Automotive Group's platform to operate all of it’s automotive components business in South East Asia across all production technologies and forging technology worldwide.

CIE India today is a large diversified ‘Tier 2’ auto-components company which manufactures parts, not systems and aggregates, but these parts are complex, and value added thus differentiating it from other ‘tier 2 parts’ companies. CIE India is focused on the automotive market – cars, utility vehicles, commercial vehicles, two wheelers and tractors.

CIE India is a multi-locational and multi-technology business with engineering capabilities and manufacturing facilities in India, Spain, Lithuania, Italy, and Mexico. CIE India has an established presence in each of these locations and supplies automotive components to customers based there and overseas. Our manufacturing locations are generally located close to major automotive manufacturing hubs to facilitate supplies to our customers. In certain instances, we also provide services such as value analysis and value engineering to add value to our customers' products. Our unique combination of specialization in high value-added products, which is usually delivered directly to OEMs and our presence across multiple production technologies, differentiates us from other component suppliers.

Name: Hyundai Mobis Brasil
Description:
A Hyundai Mobis é integrante do Hyundai Motor Group e está no Brasil desde 2012. Atualmente, contamos com mais de 600 colaboradores, distribuídos em nossas unidades operacionais de Piracicaba (SP), Rio das Pedras (SP) e São Paulo (SP).

Desde a fundação, em 1977, a Hyundai Mobis tem o grande intuito de fornecer serviços, tecnologias, acessórios e peças genuínas de alta qualidade para o setor automotivo. Quando você olha para um Hyundai, vê a tecnologia Mobis.

Segundo o portal Automotive News, uma das principais referências no segmento, somos a 6ª maior fabricante de autopeças no mundo.

Name: SPAL Automotive
Description: With more than 60 years of experience and 1,500 employees, Spal Automotive continues its growth and expansion in the automotive sector, bringing Italian technology all over the world. SPAL Automotive develops and markets Axial and Centrifugal Electric Fans, with high performance Brush and Brushless technology, providing state-of-the-art solutions for the cooling of the engine compartment and air conditioning of all types of vehicles.

Name: India Japan Lighting Pvt Ltd
Description:
India Japan Lighting Pvt. Ltd. (IJL) was inaugurated in April 1997. Initially started as a 50:50 joint venture between Lucas-TVS Limited, Chennai, and Koito Manufacturing Company Limited, Japan, in 2019, IJL become 100% subsidiary of Koito Manufacturing Company Limited, Japan.
 IJL is having Automotive Light manufacturing units in Chennai (Tamilnadu), Bawal (Haryana) and Sanand (Gujarat)

Name: CAMACO Brazil
Description: A CAMACO é uma das maiores fornecedoras independente de soluções projetadas de estruturas metálicas de bancos automotivos e componentes, atuando globalmente, a empresa se orgulha de combinar engenharia avançada, experiência, solidez financeira e pessoas talentosas, para oferecer aos fabricantes de veículos produtos de qualidade acima das expectativas.

Name: Eurogrip Tyres
Description:
Eurogrip Tyres is a brand by TVS Srichakra Ltd, leading manufacturer of Two & Three Wheeler tyres and Off-Highway tyres.

TVS Eurogrip is targeted at meeting the needs of the millennial customer and is born out of extensive consumer research as well as significant investments in global R&D, design and technology platforms. As part of the company's endeavor to associate itself with youthfulness and high performance, TVS Eurogrip is designed with global expertise, made in India and sold across the globe.

TVS Srichakra Ltd is part of the TVS Group, which is the largest Auto Ancillary Group in India, with a turnover of over USD 8.5 Billion. The company rolls out around 2.8 Million tyres every month out of its two manufacturing facilities located in Madurai (Tamil Nadu) and Rudrapur (Uttarakhand). The company enjoys a significant market share amongst Two Wheeler manufacturers in India and has a vast nationwide distribution and dealership network to cater to the After Market demand. TVS Srichakra Limited exports to over 70 countries across the world.

Name: Amsted Automotive
Description: Amsted Automotive was formed in 2021 through the integration of Burgess-Norton, Means Industries, Transform Automotive and SMW Manufacturing. With 21 facilities across North America, Europe, and Asia, the company supports global automotive, off-highway, and mining industries — producing over 200 million components and assemblies annually. Amsted Automotive is a leader in advanced metal-forming, cold-forming and powder metal technologies, as well as innovative propulsion solutions for electrified, hybrid and internal combustion engine powertrain systems. With global manufacturing including 13 U.S.-based facilities, Amsted minimizes tariff risks and supply delays through its ability to manufacturer in the customer’s region.

Name: FEKA AUTOMOTIVE
Description:
Feka Automotive is one of the rare companies that have achieved a corporate structure with a family business spirit. The company holds a reasonable leadership position in the industry thanks to its 36 years of experience, entrepreneurial spirit, as well as its global, humanitarian and customer-oriented approach.

Feka Automotive is an automotive parts and systems supplier to OEM and TIER1 companies in Turkey, Serbia and worldwide. The company’s product range includes mainly rearview mirrors, internal and external lighting, water expansion and steering hydraulic oil tanks and assembled trim parts. Feka Automotive’s production capability and product quality are based on its staff, technical and technological equipment as well as production knowhow to develop new products from a conceptual stage throughout design and production stages in line with the demands of its system partners.

Feka Automotive will continue to grow and create value with a visionary mindset and a sustainable competitive approach, differentiating itself from the ordinary market players.









_____________________________________________________________________________________

Name: Webasto Americas
Description:
#WeAreWebasto

A key region for #WebastoGroup, Webasto Americas is headquartered in Auburn Hills, Michigan, and is home to approximately 4,000 employees across the U.S. and Mexico. A top-100 global automotive supplier for roof systems and electrification solutions, Webasto generated over 4 billion euros and employed about 16,800 people at more than 50 locations in 2022. 

Did you Know? 
-  Webasto makes 55% of the world’s sunroofs. 
-  1 in every 6 cars on the road carries a Webasto sunroof.
-  We make the world’s biggest sunroof.
-  Webasto has been a family-owned company since 1901 - that sense of family still runs deep in our daily work and interactions with one another.

Name: GIVI S.P.A.
Description:
Welcome to GIVI S.P.A., a global leader in motorcycle accessories, proudly representing Italian craftsmanship and innovation. Established in 1978 by former motorcycle racer Giuseppe Visenzi, GIVI has built a strong reputation for delivering premium, innovative products to riders worldwide.

Our product range includes top and side cases, designed to provide both functionality and safety for motorcyclists, allowing them to travel with confidence. Additionally, GIVI offers soft bags, an extensive line of helmets, and advanced mechanical parts protection like engine guards and mudguards—covering all rider needs.

GIVI is an international brand operating in over 65 locations globally and employing more than 800 people. Production facilities are located in Italy, Malaysia, Vietnam, Indonesia, and Brazil, as well as logistics hubs in Europe, Asia and the Americas.

GIVI is renowned for its Monokey, Monolock, and Tanklock systems, which showcase our commitment to pushing the boundaries of motorcycle technology. Our expansion into windscreens, spoilers, and aerodynamic protectors further emphasizes our dedication to enhancing the rider experience.

In 2000, GIVI introduced a range of helmets, combining Italian design with cutting-edge technology, quickly gaining recognition as a top player in the segment. We strive to ensure that every rider benefits from both protection and style.

Our mission remains clear: to serve motorcyclists by delivering reliable, advanced, and stylish accessories that ensure every ride is safe and enjoyable.

Name: Visteon Brasil
Description:
A Visteon está no epicentro da revolução da condução de carros conectados, com um dos mais amplos portfólios de eletrônica de cockpit do setor. A Visteon projeta, projeta e fabrica produtos eletrônicos para cockpits de veículos e soluções para carros conectados que proporcionam uma experiência rica e conectada para motoristas e passageiros.

A Visteon está bem posicionada para abordar as tendências emergentes da eletrônica do cockpit, com soluções que incluem infotainment Phoenix, controladores de domínio SmartCore e uma abordagem de direção autônoma que usa inteligência artificial e aprendizado de máquina. Nomeado um dos cinco principais fornecedores de nível 1 para soluções de carros conectados pela ABI Research, a Visteon é orientada para a tecnologia, flexível e desfruta de uma base de clientes diversificada e ampla presença global.

-

Visteon is at the epicenter of the connected car driving revolution, with one of the broadest cockpit electronics portfolios in the industry. Visteon designs, engineers and manufactures vehicle cockpit electronics products and connected car solutions that deliver a rich, connected experience for drivers and passengers.

Visteon is well-positioned to address emerging cockpit electronics trends, with solutions including Phoenix infotainment, SmartCore domain controllers and an autonomous driving approach that uses artificial intelligence and machine learning. Named a top-five Tier 1 supplier for connected car solutions by ABI Research, Visteon is technology-driven, flexible and enjoys a diversified customer base and broad global footprint.

Name: Sailun Tyre Europe
Description: Sailun is one of the top 10 tyre manufacturers in the world. Sailun has established modern tyre production facilities in China (Qingdao, Dongying, Shenyang) and Vietnam, and built distribution networks and logistics centres in North America, Europe, Australia, Asia and other regions to serve markets around the globe. Sailun sells its products in more than 180 markets and regions around the world.

Name: TEXSPIN BEARINGS
Description:
TEXSPIN is one of the major contributors to the automotive industry since 1961 and has carved out a space with its niche Technology products...

A major focus of TEXSPIN products is technological components & systems with customized solutions. As an individual partner to the automotive industry in product development & serial production, TEXSPIN has joined the elite group as a solution provider.

TEXSPIN's continuous growth is supported by its Research & Development center Which Guarantees several innovations to serve the high standard set by the automotive industry. The R&D center is equipped with the latest computation and instrumentation technology to accurately simulate, test, and develop systems for varied applications.

With over 50 years of experience and with the implementation of quality Systems like QS 9000 / TS16949 and over 1000 experienced employees engaged in manufacturing and sales, TEXSPIN would like to be associated as YOUR development partner.

Name: UCAL Ltd.
Description:
UCAL Ltd (formerly UCAL Fuel Systems Ltd) is a Tier 1 Supplier to 35 Automotive OEMs Worldwide. With its headquarters in Chennai, India, the company offers  innovative solutions for the Auto, Aero and Defence sectors. We are the perfect blend of People, Processes & Products.

Our diverse Mechatronics portfolio includes carburetors, pumps, valves & emission control systems, alongside a wide range of commodity and bespoke electronic components.

Offering end-to-end service from concept to supply, and a majority of processes in-house to ensure world class quailty.
 
With decades of knowledge to draw from, our R&D center - the Krishnamurthy Centre for Automotive Technology (KCAT) - located in Chennai, is recognized by the Department of Scientific and Industrial Research, Government of India. 
Our Aerospace Division has won multiple International awards for Research.

The company has two 100% owned subsidiaries, UCAL Polymer India Ltd (UPIL) & UCAL Systems Inc (USA).

You may contact our marketing team at : marketing@ucal.com
You may contact our HR Team at : hr@ucal.com

Name: ITW Automotive - India & SEA
Description:
ITW Automotive India and SEA stands as a powerhouse in the automotive industry, renowned for our relentless pursuit of customer backed innovation, business model and our decentralized entrepreneurial culture. With a diverse lineup of differentiated sustainable and engineered plastic, metal fasteners and components, we blend craftsmanship with technology to deliver unparalleled quality and performance of products and solutions epitomizing the fusion of advanced engineering and visionary design, ITW consistently pushes boundaries towards innovation and setting new industry standards. 
Established in the early 2000s in Pune, our company has redefined industry standards through customer backed innovation and commitment to quality. Over time we established our presence in Chennai, Delhi NCR, Penang in Malaysia and Rayong in Thailand as well. Embracing a customer-centric approach, ITW aims to deliver personalized experiences and top-notch service, ensuring satisfaction at every turn. Our decentralized structure promotes a sense of accountability and autonomy among employees, driving motivation and fostering a dynamic work environment where everyone contributes to organizational success. Innovation is ingrained in our DNA, cultivating a culture where creativity thrives, encouraging every team member to think outside the box which is testimonial to 20,900+ active patents globally. By embracing diverse perspectives and encouraging various ideas, we continuously push boundaries and pioneer new solutions aiming to redefine the automotive industry.
Since our inception, our company has consistently raised the bar in industry innovation and quality. With a relentless focus on customer satisfaction, we have expanded our operations and product offerings to meet the evolving needs of our diverse clientele. As ITW continues to shape the future of automotive industry with forward-thinking solutions, we remain committed to making a profound impact on the automotive landscape and beyond

Name: Streparava
Description:
A flexible and highly reliable company working since 1951 on integrated and complex automotive solutions such as powertrain, drivetrain and chassis components; side by side with vehicles and engines manufacturers.

Thanks to a long experience, a consolidated know how, continuous commitment, massive technological investments and international presence, we are a strategic partner for the development of customized and cost effective solutions able to create a great added value.
Our way, your success.

#additivemanufacturing #streparava

Name: Yazaki Argentina
Description:
En Yazaki Argentina nos dedicamos a la producción de Mazos de Cables (Wire Harness) y Meters (Tablero de Instrumentos) para la industria automotriz.

- Certificada en ISO/TS 16949
- Certificada en ISO 14001
- Miembro de A.F.A.C. (Asociación de Fábricas Argentinas de Componentes).
- Miembro de A.P.T.A. (Asociación de Proveedores de Toyota Argentina).

Name: Universal Soluções Automotivas
Description:
A Universal Soluções Automotivas atua na fabricação e distribuição de autopeças para o mercado de reposição de veículos leves e pesados para todo o Brasil e para mais de 18 países. 

São 49 anos de história de colaboradores apaixonados por mobilidade! Essa paixão tornou a Universal Soluções Automotivas a melhor fabricante e distribuidora de peças automotivas para o aftermarket, apresentando sempre um universo de soluções inovadoras, além de oferecer oportunidades de carreira e de aprendizado para pessoas que buscam grandes desafios.

Conheça mais sobre a Universal e nossas marcas: 

https://www.instagram.com/universalsolucoesautomotivas/
https://www.youtube.com/@UniversalSolucoesAutomotivas/
https://www.facebook.com/universalsolucoesautomotivas/
https://www.universalautomotive.com.br/

Name: Niterra EMEA GmbH
Description:
Niterra (formerly NGK SPARK PLUG) is one of the leading automotive and technical ceramics suppliers. With its corporate headquarters in Nagoya, Japan, the company has sales organisations and production facilities all over the world. The automotive side of the company specialises in the fields of ignition and vehicle electronics technology, supplying Original Equipment customers across the globe. At the same time, the company is transforming its organisation and business portfolio in more sustainability-driven directions. Four business fields have been identified for this purpose: Mobility, Medical, Environment & Energy and Communications. With around 16,100 employees, the company’s automotive and technical ceramics activities generate a total annual turnover of around 3.8 billion Euros worldwide. Niterra’s EMEA sales represent 27% of this global turnover. 

Niterra has seen significant growth across the Aftermarket since expanding beyond motorcycle parts and into the automotive sector in the 1970s. The company is renowned for its outstanding commitment to quality, technology and research & development. The product portfolio of its NGK Ignition Parts brand comprises spark plugs, glow plugs, ignition coils, leads & caps. Its NTK Vehicle Electronics brand offers oxygen sensors (including NOx sensors), exhaust gas temperature sensors (EGTS), exhaust gas recirculation (EGR) valves, exhaust & differential pressure sensors, mass air flow (MAF) and manifold absolute/boost pressure (MAP) sensors as well as engine speed and position sensors. From its regional headquarters in Ratingen, Germany, Niterra serves the Aftermarket across Europe, the Middle East and Africa. In the EMEA region, the company has six regional companies and around 840 employees. 


Imprint: https://www.ngkntk.com/imprint/

Name: XPEL
Description: XPEL is a leading provider of protective films and coatings, including automotive paint protection film, surface protection film, automotive and commercial/residential window films, and ceramic coatings. With a global footprint, a network of trained installers and proprietary DAP software, XPEL is dedicated to exceeding customer expectations by providing high-quality products, leading customer service, expert technical support and world-class training. XPEL, Inc. is publicly traded on Nasdaq under the symbol “XPEL”.

Name: TKG Otomotiv
Description:
TKG Automotive produces and supplies sheet metal stampings and assemblies for the automotive industry. Starting from early development stages of the projects, TKG Automotive provides o complete range of engineering and production services for a wide range of companents. Welding assemblies and a variety of heat shields.

TKG Automotive is able to assume overall responsibility for the products it will produce, from product development to the serial production, including prototyping and product validation processes.
With more then 40 years of the experience in the automotive industry, highly qualified and committed members of our company are always ready and happy to be in the service of its customers.

Name: Nissens
Description:
Highly dedicated and competent employees around the world are the key to Nissens’ success as a renowned manufacturer of high-quality components for the automotive aftermarket within engine cooling, climate systems and efficiency & emissions.

Our employees across Europe, Americas and Asia ensure that Nissens takes the position as the preferred supplier to market leading companies in the world’s most demanding industries. Delivering the Difference to our customers is our ambition and motivation, and our global team of employees turn ambitions into successful results. 

We offer exciting professional challenges within a large variety of functional areas, across three continents and with a clear focus on developing our people and business to match our customers’ expectations.

Name: MotoRad Ltd.
Description:
MotoRad is a global leader in the development and manufacturing of high-quality, reliable and durable thermostats, caps and engine management solutions for the Aftermarket.
All MotoRad Aftermarket products are designed and manufactured to meet or exceed original equipment specifications, with the goal of keeping the engines of millions of cars on the world’s roads cool and operating efficiently.
Established in 1958 by Mr. Joseph Fishman as Fishman Engineering Ltd., today MotoRad is a private company owned by Fortissimo Investment Funds. The company’s headquarters, manufacturing and R&D centers are located at a facility covering more than 25,000 square meters in Israel's Western Galilee. At MotoRad, we strive to provide our customers with innovative high-quality products in a timely manner at competitive prices.

Name: Techking Tires Limited
Description:
Techking is a professional tire solution provider in the mining and construction industry and relies on the growth of professional engineering design, all-around service, and constantly improved quality. As of today, Techking has served 40 heavy equipment manufacturers, such as TADANO crane, Doosan ADT, Liebherr loader, Oshkosh Airport firefighting trucks, JCB loader, and Atlas Copco LHD, etc. At present, Techking OTR tires have also won the trust and recognition of world-class mining and construction companies such as Rio Tinto, GLENCORE, CODELCO, BHP, etc.

Visit our website to discover more about us: www.techking.com
Listed on Beijing Stock Exchange｜Stock Code: 920020

Name: C Electric Automotive Drives
Description:
About Us:
Established in November 2018 and headquartered in Kochi, C-Electric pioneers electric powertrain solutions for 2W and 3W vehicles, specializing in advanced motor controllers. Co-founded by Bavil Varghese and Ratheesh K Nair, both E&E experts, our company houses an R&D facility in Kochi, Kerala, and a manufacturing/testing unit in Mysore, Karnataka.

**Industry Leader:**
C-Electric leads India in electric powertrain solutions, selling 65,000+ controllers to top OEMs and Tier 1 players. Our ability to design and produce parts, except semiconductors and connectors, is unmatched.

**Exceptional Quality:**
We're India's sole indigenous motor controller manufacturer, known for quality and expertise.

**Innovation & Expertise:**
Our visionary founders and in-house team with 15+ years of experience drive innovation. We excel in power electronics, PCB, motor control algorithms, and system-level integration.

**Product Range:**
- Motor Controllers: 24V- 72V, 1.2KW-20 KW.
- Instrument Clusters: Monochrome & TFT clusters with CAN compatibility.* Protostage
- Motors: 48V-60V, 1.2KW-20KW.* Protostage

Join us in revolutionizing electric powertrains and shaping sustainable mobility. Connect with C-Electric today!

Name: Paranoá Indústria de Borracha Ltda
Description:
Fundada em 1963 com o objetivo de oferecer os melhores produtos de borracha para a indústria automobilística.
Atualmente, produzimos compostos de borracha, mangueiras de direção hidráulica, combustíveis, arrefecimento, injetados, revestimento acústico e térmico de borracha, PU ou TPO.
Instalada em uma área total de 60 mil m² e 35 mil m² de área construída. Tem o domínio dos processos de produção e atende aos mais rígidos padrões de qualidade e segurança exigidos pelo mercado.

Name: Taranto Argentina
Description: Taranto es el principal fabricante de juntas y retenes del país. Actualmente fabrica también: juntas de goma, retenes axiales, kits de embragues, pastillas de freno y estampado de piezas de chapa. Cuenta con alrededor de 800 empleados en 10 plantas productivas distribuidas geográficamente distantes.

Name: ART SpA
Description:
ART, acronym of Advance Research Technology, is a company strongly based in research and development, and innovation; developing and building high level, high performance electronics for the automotive, motorsport and aerospace sectors. 
In the past 20 years it has evolved, from developing telemetry systems for F1 to infotainment systems, parking systems and connected telemetry for vehicles in the “luxury car” segment.
A highly verticalized company capable of providing tailor made products and solution.
ART has its headquarters in the recently restored 18th century hamlet of “Il Pischiello”, which has become an ideal place where science and business can meet, between university and company, and research and production. A place immersed in the surrounding countryside, that represents the ambition ART has of creating a workspace harmonious to man, where history, thought and production integrate.

Name: Padmini VNA Mechatronics Limited
Description:
Founded in 1991, PVNA Group is focused on the innovation and manufacturing of cutting-edge technologies for the auto components industry.

The Group operates 3 companies under its brand umbrella: Padmini VNA Mechatronics, Padmini VNA E-Drive and PV Clean Mobility, and supplies over 200+ parts to almost all the leading automakers. 

With a comprehensive technology portfolio for ICE, Hybrid and BEV applications, PVNA Group supplies components to all OEMs in the passenger, commercial, two-wheeler, three-wheeler, and tractor categories. The company operates state-of-the-art manufacturing and R&D facilities in India and has proudly placed Made in India auto components on the global map. 

PVNA Group has filed 100+ patents and continues to be recognized worldwide for its technological capabilities, quality manufacturing and commitment to sustainability.

Name: Caparo Engineering India Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1968 by Lord Swraj Paul, Caparo is a private, diversified, UK based global group, specializing principally in the manufacture and supply of steel and engineering products for industry.

Caparo operates internationally from over forty sites, serving customers from operations in UK, North America, India and Middle East.

Name: CHRIS CINTOS DE SEGURANÇA
Description:
Orgulhosamente nacional, com reconhecimento internacional.

Fundada em 1952 pelo imigrante grego Christos Mitropoulos, a CHRIS Cintos de Segurança se orgulha de ser uma das maiores fabricantes de cintos de segurança da América Latina. Localizada em São Paulo, a empresa ocupa uma área total de 47 mil m², sendo 37 mil m² construídos, empregando 2.100 funcionários altamente capacitados. Hoje, a CHRIS domina 41% do mercado de cintos de segurança na América do Sul, com uma capacidade instalada de produção de 3.5 milhões de car sets por ano.  

Seu sucesso é impulsionado por um compromisso inabalável com a qualidade e a segurança, sustentado por fortes investimentos em tecnologia de ponta. A CHRIS conta com laboratórios de testes avançados, onde seus produtos são rigorosamente avaliados para atender aos mais altos padrões de segurança internacionais. Com uma operação verticalizada, a empresa controla cada etapa da produção, garantindo a excelência desde a seleção de materiais até o produto final.  

Nossa estrutura operacional foi projetada para ser ágil, possibilitando que atendamos de forma rápida e eficiente, sempre de acordo com as necessidades específicas de cada cliente. Nossa localização privilegiada permite uma logística eficiente e ágil, garantindo que nossos produtos cheguem rapidamente aos clientes ao redor do mundo. 

Como uma empresa totalmente nacional, oferecemos produtos que refletem nosso compromisso com a qualidade e a competitividade, valorizando a produção brasileira e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento do mercado local.

Name: EFI Automotive
Description:
EFI Automotive, formerly Electricfil Automotive, is an international Tier 1 and Tier 2 automotive supplier, specialized in intelligent systems for engine, transmission (drivetrain & powertrain), and chassis applications.

We imagine, design, and co-develop with our customers the mechatronic solutions of tomorrow, in line with the highest current automotive standards: speed, position, and temperature sensors, injection actuators, and smart modules. Our developments today equip the world’s leading automakers and their partners.

As we approach our 90th anniversary, we remain a family-owned group bringing together 1,400 employees, achieving a consolidated turnover of €234.4 million in 2024. Our international footprint spans five countries: France, Germany, Turkey, China, and the United States.

Name: Metaltork
Description:
A Metaltork é reconhecida como um dos principais fabricantes de parafusos e peças especiais de fixação para aplicação crítica em diversos segmentos.

Somos certificados pela Comunidade Européia (CE) e nosso sistema de qualidade está de acordo com as normas ISO 9001:2008, ISO/TS 16949:2009, ISO 14001:2004 e VDA 6.3 Nível "A “ adquiridos e mantidos através do esforço e dedicação de nossos colaboradores.

São mais de 58 anos no mercado, se destacando pela diversidade e excelência em processos e produtos, oferecendo soluções nos ramos automotivo, eólico, oil & gas, mineração, construção civil, entre outros

Name: Carbon Revolution
Description:
Carbon Revolution (Nasdaq:CREV) is an Australian technology company, which has successfully innovated, commercialised and industrialised the advanced manufacture of carbon fibre wheels for the global automotive industry. The Company has progressed from single prototypes to designing and manufacturing lightweight wheels for cars and SUVs in the high performance, premium and luxury segments, for the world’s most prestigious automotive brands. Carbon Revolution is creating a significant and sustainable advanced technology business that supplies its lightweight wheel technology to automotive manufacturers around the world. 

Contact us: www.carbonrev.com/contact
Facebook: www.facebook.com/carbonrevolution
Instagram: www.instagram.com/carbonrev

Media Enquries: media@carbonrev.com
Investor Relations: investors@carbonrev.com

Name: Modern Automotives Ltd
Description:
Born with a vision to service the Automotive Industry with efficient and reliable products, Modern Automotives Limited, a part of Modern Group of Companies, came into existence in 2004. With a clear objective, fast research, a robust production process & stringent quality systems; the company primarily aims at “Empowering Mobility”. 

Modern Automotives Limited, ever since its inception, is working towards becoming the preferred solution provider to all major 2W & 4W OEMs in India for forging and machining auto components.

With 1300+ people working extensively towards the same vision, Modern Automotives Limited has achieved an agile, exhaustive product development track record of launching 170 new products and 12 new product lines in the last 3 years. We believe in the Sun Concept of manufacturing at customer locations and reaching to every customer across India, eliminating the need for a longer Supply Chain.

We are an IATF-16949 certified company, a one-stop solution for special steels, precision forging, expertise machining, and customised assemblies. Our consistent focus on creating quality products through extensive research has helped us achieve what we set to do.

Name: TS Tech Brasil
Description:
The TS TECH Group engages in business activities in 13 countries around the world based on goals outlined in our Vision Statement: a company dedicated to realizing people’s potential and a company sincerely appreciated by all. 

In Brazil, we have two plants located in Leme/SP and Ouro Fino/MG, centralized for the manufacture of seats for automobiles, door trim and sewn covers.

Name: Polydesign Systems - Exco Automotive Solutions _Official Account
Description:
Founded in 2001, Polydesign Systems is a vertically-integrated, leading Designer and Manufacturer of interior trim and seating components and assemblies for the Automotive Industry. 
Our high performing teams with full in-house capabilities including Design, Manufacturing, and Customers Care and Support, master a wide range of products including designing and manufacturing: 
-Leather-wrapped Steering Wheels
-Wrapped interior Parts 
-Shift, Brake Boots, and Steering Column Covers
-Automotive Nets
-Trim covers and Headrests 
-Sun Visors and Armrests
-Plastic  Injection-molded components 
Polydesign is 2000 employees strong and ensures weekly deliveries to a diversified customer list including more than 30 Tier 1 and 15 OEM’s Worldwide, out of a 20.000 m² facility strategically located in Tangier Free Zone, Morocco, and directly related to the globally connected Tangier Med Port, which allows us to supply the international market competitively.

Name: DeepDrive
Description:
We are DeepDrive, a high-tech company headquartered in Munich, Germany, offering revolutionary drive units for electric vehicles. 

Addressing the most pressing challenges of today's electric vehicles, our patented Dual Rotor motor topology does not only enable high-volume EVs with >800 km of range but also can save automakers more than €1 billion in costs when deployed at scale. Additionally, it enables EVs to drastically reduce carbon emissions, potentially saving multiple gigatonnes of CO2 emissions over the EV fleet's lifetime. Versatile in design, our technology can be seamlessly integrated into the wheels or employed as a traditional central drive. 

Our experts with extensive experience in large-scale series production and the support of high-profile investors, including Leitmotif, BMW i Ventures, Continental‘s Corporate Venture Capital Unit, UVC Partners,, and Bayern Kapital make DeepDrive the motor of electric mobility. Additional investors include industry veteran Dr. Peter Mertens (former board member and CTO of Audi and Volvo) and top start-up executive Jonas Rieke (COO of Personio).

Name: Rubber King Tyre Group
Description:
At Rubber King, excellence is ingrained in the DNA. Founded in 1982 by visionary Dinesh Ishvarlal Gawarvala, the company began with inner tubes, flaps, and curing bladders—rooted in a deep purpose of serving society. His son, Samir Gawarvala, has further cemented this legacy by instilling a powerful mantra: “One Team, One Dream.” With this unifying philosophy, Rubber King fosters a culture of unity, accountability, and innovation. With an average workforce age of 38 across 1200+ people, diversity and collaboration are our biggest strengths.

Today, under the dynamic leadership of Director Devin Gawarvala, the brand has grown exponentially, with a presence in over 89 countries and a global workforce spanning 12 nationalities.

Under Devin Gawarvala’s leadership, we’ve entered a new era of innovation, expanding our product portfolio with solid tyres (launched in 2018) and pneumatic tyres engineered with cutting-edge technology—robust nylon casings, specialized tread compounds, and unique sidewall lettering. These products cater to Farm-Agriculture, OTR, and Industrial segments across tube type and tubeless in both Bias and Radial technology.

Our Resilient solid tyres meet wide-ranging requirements of the material handling industry through high-quality raw materials, unmatched compounding techniques, and best-in-class machinery imported from global leaders. Our pneumatic tyres further reinforce our commitment to performance and durability, featuring optimized tread wear and brand recognition.

We believe:
“Each tyre is the result of engineering work focused on innovation with the aim of offering the right solution to our customers.”

Rubber King is more than a tyre manufacturer—it’s a team that embraces change, takes calculated risks, and learns from both success and setbacks. We promote trust, ethical integrity, and shared responsibility.

TYRE TRANSFORMATION TRIUMPH isn’t just a phrase—it’s the path we’re on.

Name: Minth México
Description:
Minth Group stands as a global leader in the manufacturing of exterior and structural automotive parts. With a workforce of 22,331 employees distributed across four business units and 77 global plants and offices, our operations span three continents and 14 countries. We take immense pride in serving a diverse clientele, encompassing over 70 automobile brands from all over the world. Leveraging one of the world’s most comprehensive and diverse customer platforms, Minth has made significant investments in the electrification of the automotive industry, positioning itself as the world’s largest supplier of battery enclosures and body structure components.

At Minth Group, our commitment extends beyond business success to the creation of a sustainable society and future for all. We champion green innovations and increasingly adopt green energy in our operations. Concurrently, we are dedicated to providing high-performance, superior-quality automotive parts that adhere to the highest global standards, continually driving innovation within the automotive industry.

Name: Magneti Marelli Parts & Services
Description:
Magneti Marelli Parts & Services is a global company leader in the independent aftermarket and part of Marelli Group. We provide spare parts, automotive components, and know-how to workshops through a network of distributors. 

Our product offer includes both original spare parts and equivalent products for a variety of applications, including electric & electronic, mechanical, body and maintenance products as well as technical equipment, workshop software, technical information and innovative technical, management and marketing courses.

We operate in over 100 countries across Europe, Asia, America, Africa, and Oceania through our partnership with the most important distributors and importers.

Our Magneti Marelli Checkstar network of workshops and body shops across the world offer excellent levels of vehicle servicing, maintenance, and repair to car users.

Our mission is to be the benchmark for the aftermarket sector, with our quality spare parts and innovative services.

Name: The Parts Authority
Description:
Established in 1973, The Parts Authority has become one of the largest aftermarket automotive/truck part distributors throughout the country. Since our founding in New York, we have expanded into Washington DC, Georgia, Maryland, Arizona, New Jersey, California and most recently Ohio. We are known for going the extra mile to put our customers first and also having the right parts at the right time. This has kept a great rapport with our customers and has helped us grow as a company over the years to become a leader in our marketplace. We pride ourselves in not only being #1 in customer satisfaction, but also listening to our team members. We believe that in every great team there are exceptional team members! 

Each and every team member plays a vital role in our success. Our sales team (both inside and outside) ensures that we lead in outstanding customer satisfaction. Our warehouse team (drivers, dispatchers) strives to get the right parts delivered--and fast! Our IT support team provides cutting edge solutions, while our purchasing department helps get the best products for our wonderful customers. Our human resources and financial teams are great in assisting the company to run smoothly on a daily basis. With all these moving parts working together as a team to make us a success, we are rapidly expanding and looking for candidates to join our family. If you or maybe someone you know is looking to join an exceptional leading company, please check out our current opportunities.

And if being this great isn’t enough, check out the amazing benefits Parts Authority has to offer!

Name: Assurance Intl Limited
Description:
Assurance Intl Limited, is a leading manufacturing/marketing company for automotive products known as lubricants, batteries, filters, accessories and spare parts for various global such as Goodyear & STP.  Assurance is having presence in multiple countries like Australia, Bhutan, Brunei, India, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Maldives, Myanmar, New Zealand, Nepal, Singapore, Sri Lanka, Thailand, East Timor, Vietnam Pakistan, Bangladesh, Bahrain, Iraq, Jordan, Tanzania, Sudan, Algeria, Ghana, Egypt, Yemen, United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Lebanon, Kuwait, Zimbabwe, Kenya, Cameroon, South Africa, Ethiopia, Nigeria, Cambodia, Philippines, Libya, Angola, Benin, Botswana, Burkina, Faso, Burundi, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Libya, Ivory Coast, Mali, Mauritania, Mauritius, Morocco, Mozambique, Namibia, Palestinian National Authority, Rwanda, Senegal, Seychelles, Somalia, Togo, Tunisia, Uganda & Zambia

We at Assurance Intl Limited have collaboration with multiple leading brands across the globe to produce, distribute, appoint and authorize distributors or agents, advertise and promote, lubricants, batteries, filters, accessories & spare parts.

Assurance Intl Limited, is duly certified with ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018.

Name: Takao
Description:
A TAKAO é a empresa que possui o maior portfólio de peças para motor do Brasil.

As peças fornecidas pela TAKAO atendem aos padrões de qualidade e às normas e especificações de fabricação (técnicas, dimensionais e metalúrgicas) exigidas pelas montadoras. 

Somos a maior apoiadora do mecânico e acreditamos que seu trabalho é fundamental para sociedade, por isso investimos tanto em produzir as melhores peças do mercado, com a maior variedade e o melhor pós-vendas possível.

Além disso, sabemos que o trabalho do aplicador vai muito além de reparar motores e sua vida vai muito além da oficina, por isso criamos a Academia do Motor – a maior plataforma de ensino à distância para mecânicos do Brasil.

Na Academia do Motor, além dos cursos gratuitos sobre montagem e desmontagem de motores, você também encontra técnicas mais modernas para te ajudar no dia a dia da sua oficina.

Queremos que você alcance todos os seus sonhos na vida profissional e principalmente na vida pessoal.

Estamos à sua disposição. Sempre!

Name: Metalúrgica Paschoal Ltda
Description:
Temos orgulho de ser uma empresa 100% nacional construindo, desde 1966, uma história de crescimento alicerçado em sólidas parcerias com os principais fabricantes de veículos automotores do País. 

Escutamos o mercado e nossos clientes, assim, evoluímos e adequamos nossos processos, convergindo nossa tradição e experiência em EXCELÊNCIA de qualidade e competitividade! Isso é o resultado de investimentos contínuos em pessoas e processos.

Em nosso último grande passo, trazemos ao mercado nossa capacidade de produzir componentes para máquinas agrícolas e outros equipamentos seriados com menores volumes de produção, sem perder nossa já conhecida vocação para a produção de peças para automóveis, caminhões e ônibus.

Name: Pridgeon & Clay
Description:
A GLOBAL LEADER
Pridgeon & Clay is one of the largest independent, value-added manufacturers and suppliers of stamped and fine blanked components for a variety of industries and applications. A global workforce of over 1000 skilled employees contributes to our full service approach to design, prototyping, validation and manufacturing excellence. 

INVESTING IN EMPLOYEES
As a private, family-owned company, P&C offers outstanding benefits to its diverse and engaged employees. From award-winning on-site training and generous tuition reimbursement to premier employer-paid health insurance and Employee Stock Ownership, P&C invests in its employees so that they can live out the P&C Values of Integrity, People, Customers, Safety and Ownership.

SERVING OUR CUSTOMERS
P&C serves a variety of customers in multiple industries around the globe, including both OEM and Tier 1 manufacturers in automotive, heavy truck, alternative energy, and many more. We support our customers through manufacturing facilities and sales and engineering offices in the United States, Mexico, Hungary,  Germany and China.

Name: Grupo GONHER
Description: Grupo GONHER is a specialized group of companies with nternational presence, recognized for a solid history in the automotive industry; its main products are filters, batteries, lubricants, brake pads and industrial chemicals. The values of the group and their experience and background, make GONHER a solid company, recognized worldwide as a market leader specializing in providing the highest quality.

Name: 武蔵精密工業Musashi Seimitsu Industry Co., Ltd.
Description: Musashi Seimitsu Industry Co., Ltd. is a global auto parts Tier1 company for automobiles and motorcycles, whose headquarters is located in Toyohashi, Japan. It has 35 manufacturing sites spreading across Europe, North and South America, China, and South East Asia. Musashi specializes in designing, developing and manufacturing products such as Differential Assemblies, Transmission Gears and Assemblies, and Linkage and Suspension (L&S) products especially for the future automobiles including electric and autonomous vehicles. Musashi is also generating and expanding new businesses through open innovation with global startups to contribute to the SDGs in wider business domains. Musashi AI, a leading-edge AI technology subsidiary to lead Industry 4.0, is one of the examples.

Name: FAGOR EDERLAN | Global Automotive Components
Description:
We are an industrial cooperative enterprise worldwide leader in chassis, conventional and electric powertrain and structural components for the Automotive sector.  Since we were first established, in 1963, we are part of MONDRAGON Corporation, the world’s biggest cooperative group.
We have 16 production plants in Spain, Slovakia, Mexico, Brazil and China and sales offices in Germany, France and USA in order to provide proximity to our customers.
Specialists in iron and aluminium products and technologies, at our Edertek technology centre we work to respond to the sector’s challenges with minimal environmental impact.

Name: AISIN
Description: As one of Japan's leading manufacturer with a complete range of automotive parts, AISIN is pursuing improvements of “Environment,” “Safety,” “Comfort,” and “Convenience” through the development of automotive parts and life & energy related products.

Name: Elastomer Solutions Group
Description:
Elastomer Solutions (previous Diehl Elastomertechnik) is a leading provider of rubber, thermoplastic and rubber-to-plastic (2K) components for the automotive industry.

Elastomer Solutions Group serves 1st Tier and 2nd Tier and also OEM customers by developing, producing and supplying polymeric parts according to their specific requirements. We provide innovative solutions and promote excellence in all our activities in order to ensure sustainable and trustful relationships with all our customers and stakeholders.

As a global partner for high quality polymeric components and assemblies we are offering an increasing range of products, patented solutions and comprehensive development services to our customers.

Having a strong international footprint with a Full Service Development Center in Germany and today four manufacturing plants in Portugal, Slovakia, Morocco and Mexico, it is Elastomer Solutions objective to be close to our main customers and to be part of their success.

Elastomer Solutions together with SFC Solutions are part of Amaneos (www.amaneos.com | Born to move)

Name: Brugola OEB Industriale S.p.A.
Description:
Brugola OEB – Excellence in Automotive Fastening Since 1926

Founded in 1926 in Lissone, Italy, Brugola OEB is a global leader in fastening systems for the automotive industry. We pioneered the Hexagon Socket head bolt, driven by innovation and technical vision of our founder, Egidio Brugola.

Today, we specialize in the design and production of high-performance screws and custom fastening components for critical mechanical and powertrain applications, with deep expertise in cold forming technology. Every day, we produce over 9 million parts across 1,000 different screw types. Brugola components are used in 1 out of every 4 cars worldwide.

We operate five manufacturing plants and a logistics hub in Italy, a production site in the U.S. (Michigan), and a global logistics network with 11 distribution centers, employing over 500 people.

Our Mission
To exceed expectations through innovation, continuous improvement, and customer satisfaction.

What Sets Us Apart
	•	Deep, up-to-date knowledge of the global automotive market
	•	Expertise in both internal combustion and electric powertrains
	•	Cutting-edge R&D labs fueling product innovation

Our Approach: Total Quality
We support customers through the entire product lifecycle—from concept and development to prototyping, validation, industrialization, and after-sales. Our commitment to Zero Defects and sustainable growth drives continuous investment in advanced technologies and environmentally responsible operations.

Our Values
	•	100% Made in Italy
	•	People-Driven Excellence
	•	Zero Defects Philosophy
	•	Customer-Centric Collaboration

Name: KYB Manufacturing Brazil
Description:
Founded in 1919 by Shiro Kayaba, in Japan, KYB is a pioneer in the hydraulic technology sector and brings together tradition, knowledge and precision to offer the best damping solutions to customers around the world.

In more than one hundred years of history in the international market, the company has established itself as a world leader in the supply of shock absorbers for the OEM (Original) market, based on a rigorous world standard and state-of-the-art technology.

Currently, KYB serves the Brazilian market and all of South America, manufacturing shock absorbers for the light and heavy automotive and motorcycle markets, in addition to the railway, aeronautical and maritime lines.

In Brazil, the KYB unit is strategically located in the state of Paraná and operates with the same quality standards as the Gifu unit, the largest shock absorber factory in the world, located in Japan.

Name: Industria Mecânica Samot Ltda.
Description:
Fundada em 1960 pelo atual presidente Tomislav Jancar, a SAMOT iniciou sua oferta de serviços para atender à então recém instalada indústria automobilística no Brasil. A empresa acompanhou o crescimento e desenvolvimento do setor e atualmente fornece soluções com-pletas em usinagem, sob projeto do cliente, com resultados de classe mundial. 

A SAMOT atende a todos os segmentos, princi-palmente, às indústrias automobilística e de autopeças, sempre com foco em qualidade e no total cumprimento de requisitos e prazos de entrega.

Com duas unidades na cidade de São Paulo e outra em São Bernardo do Campo, próxima a grandes montadoras de veículos, a SAMOT conta atualmente com cerca de 1200 colabo-radores e mais de 600 máquinas operatrizes, processando anualmente 6000 toneladas de pe-ças forjadas e 4200 toneladas de vergalhões de aço carbono, ligado e inoxidável, além de 1500 toneladas de vergalhões de alumínio.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Visteon Portuguesa
Description:
A Visteon está no epicentro da revolução dos carros conectados, com um dos portfólios de eletrónica de cockpit mais abrangentes do setor. A Visteon concebe, desenvolve e fabrica produtos eletrónicos para cockpits de veículos e soluções para carros conectados que proporcionam uma experiência rica e integrada para condutores e passageiros.

A Visteon encontra-se bem posicionada para responder às tendências emergentes na eletrónica de cockpit, oferecendo soluções como o sistema de infotainment Phoenix, os controladores de domínio SmartCore e uma abordagem de condução autónoma que utiliza inteligência artificial e aprendizagem automática. Reconhecida como um dos cinco principais fornecedores Tier 1 de soluções para carros conectados pela ABI Research, a Visteon é orientada pela tecnologia, flexível e conta com uma base diversificada de clientes e uma ampla presença global.

Name: ARB 4x4 Accessories USA
Description:
About
ARB 4x4 Accessories is Australia’s largest manufacturer and distributor of 4x4 accessories along with an export network that extends through more than 80 countries around the globe. The North American operations are based in Auburn, Washington. 

Manufacturing
ARB maintains its position as an innovator in the industry by utilizing the most modern, state-of-the-art fabrication equipment and machinery. We meet today’s requirements for more complex designs with highly advanced, Computer Numerically Controlled (CNC) sheet fabrication facilities.

ARB’s production facilities are equipped with a range of state-of-the-art machinery suited to manufacture metal products. Our manufacturing capabilities include laser cutting, guillotining, robot grinding, CNC bending, machining and turning. We’re equipped with MIG, TIG, robot and spot welding facilities and also have powder coating and spray painting centers.

ARB has a very highly skilled and motivated workforce at our manufacturing plants. We have a stringent quality control system, ensuring our exceptionally high standards are maintained. These factors, combined with our level of automation, enable us to produce some of the finest 4WD accessories in the world.

Distribution
ARB products are sold and serviced through an extensive network of authorized distributors worldwide with over 1,300 dealers in North America alone.

Name: Advanced Electric Machines
Description:
Advanced Electric Machines (AEM) designs and manufactures truly sustainable, high-performing electric traction motors.

AEM motors are rare earth magnet-free, reducing supply chain volatility and product cost. By removing permanent magnets, our electric motors have no risk of demagnetisation, making them safer and reducing thermal management complexity and risks. No magnets also means the rotor can freewheel, improving motor efficiency and allowing the vehicle to coast when needed.

This means our range of electric motors allow our customers to go faster and travel further with a lower footprint than other motor technologies.

AEM's motor solutions are designed to meet the demands of all our customers’ applications, from trucks and buses to road trains and trailer-driven axles.

Name: J.JUAN
Description:
J.JUAN is a leading company in the manufacturing and development of hydraulic hoses for brake, steering, shock absorber, and control cable systems, specializing in the automotive and motorcycle sectors.

With production facilities in Gavà (Barcelona) and Jiaxing (Shanghai), as well as offices in the United States, Japan, and India, J.JUAN has established itself as a key player in the automotive industry.

For 60 years, the company has been designing customized products for leading brands, tailoring each solution to the specific vehicle model to ensure a perfect fit for every application. The quality and reliability of its products are the reasons why the most prestigious and globally recognized manufacturers have trusted J.JUAN for decades.

J.JUAN employs over 650 people and is part of the Brembo Group, the global leader in braking technology, founded in 1961 in Bergamo, Italy. With over 16,000 people across 15 countries, 32 production and business sites, 9 R&D centers and with a turnover of € 3,840.6 million in 2024, Brembo is the trusted solution provider for everyone who demands the best driving experience.

Name: Smart Garage by Pikpart
Description:
Pikpart Smart Garage: Your All-in-One Solution for Two-Wheeler and Four-Wheeler Services

Pikpart Smart Garage offers a seamless and affordable digital platform for all your automotive repair and maintenance needs. We specialize in providing end-to-end services for both two-wheelers and four-wheelers, with features like booking, tracking, and approval or rejection of ongoing work—all from the convenience of your device. Additionally, we offer a unique Live Streaming feature, allowing customers to watch repairs in real-time upon request.

With over 250 Smart Garages in 18 states and 2 countries, we serve more than 550 repair jobs daily for petrol and electric vehicles. Since our inception, we have completed over 65,000 customer repair jobs, establishing ourselves as a trusted name in the automotive industry.

Beyond our repair services, Pikpart also offers an extensive range of high-quality two-wheeler spare parts, with 7000+ SKUs backed by a 100% warranty. Our spares are available on the Pikpart app and popular e-commerce platforms like Amazon and Flipkart. Our retail network is expanding rapidly, with over 5000 retail shops, 250 outlets, and a network of 15,000 mechanics.

Our ambitious plans for the next three financial years include creating the largest electric and internal combustion engine aftermarket network, with over 10,000 garages and 50,000 business associates. We aim to achieve this through a combination of new franchise partnerships and the upgrading of existing garages and mechanics within our O2O system.

While our current focus is on two-wheelers, we are committed to expanding our presence in other automotive segments, including four-wheelers. Join us at Pikpart Smart Garage as we redefine the future of automotive service and repair.

For more information, visit our website or download the Pikpart App

Name: Sabelt S.p.A.
Description:
Sabelt, founded in 1972 by Piero and Giorgio Marsiaj, specializes in the development and production of car seats for performance and luxury road cars, racing products for motor racing and seatbelts for aerospace.

The quality of Sabelt products is the result of intense research and development, which allows it to reach the highest levels of performance and safety. Sabelt invests 8% of its resources annually in research and  development and is the only company in its sector to have an internal dynamic test laboratory to perform ECE and FIA tests, aimed at verifying the strength and effectiveness of its products.

Sabelt provides innovative solutions for race car drivers:
ultralight racing suits, carbon fiber seats that adapt to the driver and seatbelts for cars of all types of racing.

From the world of motorsport, Sabelt has developed a range of premium sports seats for the world’s top car manufacturers. It designs and manufactures safety belts and seats for vehicles with a strong sporting connotation, dedicated to an advanced and demanding driver, that is sports oriented and has a particular attention to quality.
Its main partners are: Ferrari, McLaren, Cupra, Alpine, Abarth, Alfa Romeo, Jaguar, Maserati, Hyundai and Aston Martin.

Sabelt is also able to develop and implement new technologies dedicated to various applications of safety seatbelts in niche markets, such as the military, aviation, aerospace, exceptional transport and many other fields where technical products and customized.
Since 2010, Sabelt has been the supplier of Thales Alenia Space Italia for the restraint systems of the Cygnus Orbital-ATK module (belts and nets).
