Name: Thomas Group
Description:
The family-owned company Thomas develops and manufactures electromagnetic and fluidic actuator systems. Our products are used in the off-highway, mobility and healthcare markets. Our mission to support our customers with the products we develop has seen us grow into a leading supplier with four international sites. German Medical Engineering GmbH (GME) has been part of the Thomas Group since 2025. The company specialises in the development of professional therapeutic light and laser systems, complementing our existing markets with healthcare.

Metering pumps, proportional valves, and proportional solenoids are some of our key product ranges. Our core competence lies in design and development of new actuators and system solutions. We currently employ about 900 people.

Our electromagnetically driven products control actuation, switching, on/off, pumping, metering and manifold solutions for hydraulic systems, exceeding ISO requirements. Thomas products are used in automotive, off highway, agricultural, engine, clutch & transmission, pump & motor controls.
Thomas is one of the pioneers in the field of components for clean exhaust gases, particularly when it comes to developing and manufacturing parts for SCR (selective catalytic reduction) systems and for DPF (diesel particulate filter) regeneration. Thomas has extensive experience in supplying products for conveying and regulating fuel, additives, or aqueous solutions such as DEF (diesel exhaust fluid or AdBlue).

The Group currently consists of: Thomas Magnete GmbH (Herdorf, Germany), Thomas Magnete USA, LLC (Brookfield, USA), Thomas Magnete Italia srl (Modena, Italy) and a Representative Office Shanghai (China). 

Welcome to the official LinkedIn account of Thomas.

Name: FARA INDUSTRIALE S.r.l.
Description:
Nata nel 1954 FARA INDUSTRIALE è oggi sinonimo di alta tecnologia e qualità al servizio dell’industria automobilistica.

In oltre 60 anni l’originaria attività di fabbricazione e commercializzazione di accessori per auto si è profondamente evoluta giungendo alla produzione di particolari destinati al primo impianto.

FARA INDUSTRIALE è azienda leader sul mercato della produzione stampi, stampaggio lamiera a freddo e assemblaggio per il settore automotive.

Due importanti sedi produttive, in Italia e in Polonia, il centro strategico per le attrezzature di Fara Stampi a Nichelino (Italia) ed il centro di Atessa (Italia) consentono una pronta risposta alle esigenze del cliente.

Il core business aziendale è rappresentato dalla produzione e vendita di: elementi di lastratura e autotelaio, supporti centraline, cestelli batteria, staffe tubazioni, bretelle di fissaggio serbatoio, ripari calore, staffe oggettivazione, sostegno cavi elettrici, sistemi impianti GPL e metano. L’innovazione delle idee unita all’impegno degli uomini conducono ad una continua crescita del know-how aziendale:

Un moderno sistema informatico integrato s’interfaccia con tutte le aree aziendali permettendo di ottimizzare i processi: dalla ricezione dei programmi del cliente tramite connessioni indipendenti e dedicate, alla pianificazione della produzione, passando per la gestione di tutte le attività intermedie.

L’Ufficio tecnico è in grado di utilizzare i più diffusi formati di progettazione 3D con l’ausilio dei più recenti sistemi CAD.

La Qualità è impegnata a garantire la massima efficienza attraverso un sistema collaudato e suffragato delle certificazioni. ISO 9001 ISO TS 16949, ISO TS 14001, ISO 45001

Forte di tutto ciò, FARA INDUSTRIALE punta con convinzione alla soddisfazione della clientela in termini di competitività, professionalità e qualità; tratti distintivi della mission aziendale.

FARA INDUSTRIALE…la sicurezza in ogni prodotto l’affidabilità in tutte le sue parti.

Protecable vous propose trois catégories de produits : 
     - Gaines annelées (fendues, non-fendues ou refermables) permettant de protéger votre environnement de toutes sortes d’agression : abrasion, écrasement, bruit ou chaleur (protection thermique). 
     - Gaine lisse anti-rongeur étant la solution incontournable pour protéger et lutter contre les rongeurs qui s’attaquent à vos câbles et faisceaux.
      - Gaine textile (auto-refermables, expansibles, thermorétractables) conçue pour protéger les faisceaux électriques mais également les tubes et durites dans l’environnement moteur.

Nous adressons nos produits aux acteurs de la mobilité électrique, et du retrofit. 

Plus d'informations sur www.protecable.com.

Name: ARB 4x4 Accessories – UK
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of ARB UK! We are the leading provider of top-quality 4x4 accessories and off-road gear, dedicated to enhancing your outdoor adventures. With a legacy spanning over four decades, we have become synonymous with innovation, reliability, and uncompromising quality.

At ARB UK, we pride ourselves on designing and manufacturing premium products that withstand the harshest terrains and deliver unmatched performance. From our renowned Old Man Emu suspension systems to our iconic bull bars and rooftop tents, our extensive range of accessories is engineered to tackle any off-road challenge.

We foster a passionate community of off-road enthusiasts, adventurers, and explorers who share our commitment to embracing the great outdoors. Through our LinkedIn page, we aim to connect with like-minded professionals, industry experts, and partners who are passionate about the off-road lifestyle.

Stay tuned for the latest updates on our product launches, industry insights, and exciting collaborations. Join us on this exhilarating journey as we continue to push the boundaries of off-road excellence and inspire others to explore the untamed beauty of nature.

Follow us to be part of the ARB UK family and unleash your spirit of adventure!

Name: Keazy
Description:
Keazy est une solution de clé de voiture numérique qui s’intègre en 15 minutes sur une large gamme de véhicules de loisirs. 

Avec Keazy, un automobiliste déverrouille son véhicule en mains libres, avec son smartphone ou encore des supports physiques tels qu'un badge ou un bracelet étanche. La clé numérique Keazy se duplique et se partage pour donner accès à son véhicule à distance, tout en conservant le contrôle des accès. Robuste et entièrement sécurisée, notre solution constitue aussi un rempart contre le vol de véhicules par voie électronique. 

Notre solution s’adresse aux particuliers, aux aménageurs de vans et camping-car ainsi qu'à toute entreprise détentrice d’une flotte de véhicules, qui souhaite s’affranchir des coûts et des contraintes de gestion interne des clés, retracer les usages d’un véhicule et sécuriser son parc. 

Keazy est une solution développée par la startup Leanvia, basée à Saint Malo. L’entreprise est composée d’experts de la tech et de l’automobile, et membre de la French Tech Bretagne.

Name: Sailun Tire Asia
Description:
Sailun Group grew out of and developed with the support of Qingdao University of Science and Technology (QUST), renowned as the "Cradle of China's Rubber Industry, and has become a company that integrating tire research and development, production, and sales over 20 years. Currently, Sailun Group operates 4 global R&D centers, 10 production bases and 1 production base under construction, with products sold in over 180 countries. In 2024, Sailun Group reported revenue of RMB 31.802 billion, all key operating metrics achieved record highs.

Sailun Group boasts a comprehensive product portfolio spanning 3 major tire categories: Passenger Car Tires (PCR), Truck & Bus Tires (TBR), and Off-The-Road Tires (OTR). It independently developed the world's largest 63-inch industrial radial tire, achieving global leadership. Sailun is the first Chinese tire brand to become an official FIA (Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile) motorsport supplier. Its revolutionary EcoPoint3 tire, made with world-first material, overcomes the industry's "magic triangle" problem—delivering higher fuel efficiency, enhanced wear resistance, and shorter braking distances, earning the highest rating (A/A) under the EU Tyre Labeling Regulations. Additionally, Sailun also launched the world's first rubber industrial internet platform, "Eco-Rubber Cloud." 

While continuously enhancing its product and manufacturing capabilities, Sailun Group has also repeatedly achieved record highs in brand value. Sailun Group ranked 10th globally in Brand Finance Tyres 25 2025 ranking, reaffirming its position as China's most valuable tire brand.

Name: Tower Parts S/A
Description:
Fundada em 1946 como marca IGASA, nossas atividades sempre estiveram voltadas para a produção de componentes estampados e soldados para a indústria automobilística e outros segmentos. Começamos produzindo peças estampadas leves (Tanques de Combustível, Cárteres, Protetores de Motor, Tanques de Ar e Óleo), em uma pequena empresa familiar e hoje, após mais de 75 anos, mantemos nosso foco, produzindo peças estampadas e soldadas e conjuntos pintados para algumas das principais montadoras e fabricantes de caminhões do Brasil. Hoje a Tower Parts é uma empresa S/A, dando grandes passos para o crescimento e desenvolvimento de produtos, sempre focada e utilizando novas tecnologias. Em 2015 depois de quase 70 anos geridos pela mesma família, conseguimos realizar com sucesso o projeto de sucessão administrativa. 
Sem dúvida o maior projeto já realizado pela Tower Parts, tudo para se manter competitiva e apta a atender um mercado cada vez mais exigente!

Missão
Produzir autopeças com qualidade e confiabilidade para os seus clientes, aos menores custos, buscando a liderança deste segmento

Objetivo
Aperfeiçoamento contínuo dos produtos e processos; treinar e qualificar os colaboradores e equipes; responder as solicitações dos nossos clientes.

Política de Qualidade
TOWER PARTS tem como compromisso, fabricar autopeças que atendam as necessidades de seus clientes, proporcionando capacitação de seu parque fabril e a formação continuada de seus colaboradores

Name: Kaleli Holding
Description:
Kaleli Holding ailesi olarak, Türkiye’de otomotiv yedek parça tedarik hizmetlerinde müşterilerimize mutluluk ve ayrıcalık yaratma prensibi ile 2003 yılında yola çıktık. Evren Kaleli öncülüğünde kurulan firmamız, İstanbul Kağıthane’de 55.000 m2 çalışma alanıyla faaliyet göstermektedir. 

Çalışanlarımız, iş ortaklarımız ve müşterilerimizden aldığımız destek ile kamu kuruluşları ve özel sektör için en uygun otomotiv yedek parça tedarikinde kaliteli ve katma değerli hizmetlere imza atıyoruz.

Avrupa, Asya, Latin Amerika ve Ortadoğu’da, 4 kıtaya yayılmış  toplam 16 ülkeden ithalat yapan holdingimiz, bünyesindeki 9 grup şirketi ile geniş yelpazede ürün ve hizmetleriyle müşterilerimizin otomotiv yedek parça ihtiyaçlarına cevap vermektedir.

Sizin ve sevdiklerinizin can güvenliğini teminat altına alan pek çok sigorta şirketi, holdingimizin geniş yelpazede otomotiv yedek parça hizmetlerine güvenmektedir. Uzağı yakın eden araç filo firmaları, global firmalar ve grup şirketler yolda kalmıyorsa bunda tedarik kalitemiz ve hızımız yadsınamaz. 
Uzun vadeli güven ilişkimizde rekabetçi, kaliteli, hızlı ve sürdürülebilir hizmet anlayışından bir an bile tereddüt etmeden otomotiv yedek parça tedarikinde sektöre ve ülke ekonomisine değer katıyoruz.

Name: Villacis Group
Description:
Villacis Group is a global tooling & product development feasibility supporting company, focused solely on the vehicle industry. We partner with OEMs, Start-Ups, and their global supply chains, assisting them navigate through their product lifecycles, from engineering right through to production. With our corporate headquarters based in North America and operations in Asia, we span the globe providing cost effective tooling development, design, and manufacturing solutions for interior, exterior, and lighting products. Villacis Group supports from the smallest of parts such as micro molding, right up to some of the largest parts such as interior IPs and doors to exterior bumpers and front grilles. Villacis Group has the expertise and specializes in class 101 tooling for chrome, painted, and highly critical polished SPI A1 mold surfaces, as well as 2K, 3K molds, optics and reflex. 

Villacis Group works alongside our customers early in the product development and engineering stages, by feasing out concepts, providing a ‘one stop shop’ for all tooling (plastics, stamping, castings), establishing design for manufacturing strategies, validating target manufacturing methods, and developing roadmaps to help spread out tooling costs over build phases as volumes grow, these are just to name a few. It’s imperative we understand clearly our customers final product desired outcome and work towards that goal. With this approach and planning, we are able to help customers save upfront time and costs in the product development process in order to scale up to production in the least amount of time possible.

Globally, you will have access to the following post tool delivery services which include, but not limited to:
1. Uncrating and tool inspection
2. Tool tryouts
3. Graining support
4. Tuning
5. Finalization of mold preparation for SOP
6. Engineering changes
7. Repairs
8. Maintenance

Name: The Hybrid Geek - Hybrid Batteries. Engineered by Geeks. Trusted by Drivers.
Description:
Welcome to The Hybrid Geek – Hybrid Batteries. Engineered by Geeks. Trusted by Drivers.

At The Hybrid Geek, we don’t just work with hybrid batteries—we geek out over them.  We’re the nerds in the garage, the engineers behind the solutions, and the experts who know hybrid technology inside and out. Our passion for innovation drives us to provide smart, reliable, and affordable hybrid battery solutions that keep you on the road without breaking the bank.

Why Choose The Hybrid Geek? 
 Engineered by Geeks, Trusted by Drivers – We’re obsessed with hybrid tech so you don’t have to be. Our team brings deep technical expertise and cutting-edge solutions to every battery we sell.
 Affordable & Reliable – We believe high-quality hybrid batteries shouldn’t cost a fortune. That’s why we offer cost-effective solutions that extend the life of your hybrid vehicle.
 Free Mobile Installation – We bring our geek-level expertise directly to you! No need to visit a shop—our mobile service makes hybrid battery replacement easy and hassle-free.
 Geek-Level Customer Service – We don’t just sell batteries—we educate, inform, and support our customers every step of the way. Have a question? We’ve got answers (and probably a data sheet to back it up).
 Sustainability Matters – Keeping hybrid vehicles on the road longer means fewer batteries in landfills and a greener planet.

 We’ve Been Perfecting Hybrid Tech Since 2016!
Since 2016, The Hybrid Geek has been a small but dedicated operation, serving hybrid drivers in a handful of states. Over the years, we’ve been in the lab, perfecting our hybrid battery remanufacturing process to ensure the highest quality and reliability. Now, we’ve reached a point where we’re confident in our product quality, and we’re ready to expand our service areas and scale our operations.

Follow us on our journey as we grow, innovate, and continue delivering top-tier hybrid battery solutions.

JOYSONQUIN, a world renowned automotive parts manufacturers, our current product portfolio mainly focuses on new energy, high voltage charging and distribution systems, intelligent cockpit parts, and three unique fields of engine intake systems.
JOYSONQUIN started its business in 2003, and in 2005 already had the ability to support the related R&D and following manufacturing needs for our customer. In 2006, JOYSONQUIN became a first-tier supplier of major OEMs in the world.
In the future, JOYSONQUIN will closely focus on the two themes of intelligence and new energy. Our goal is to provide better services for users in “the third space”, constantly improve user experience, and strive to become a premier fashion designer of high-end and intelligent cockpits, as well as pioneer the future of new energy high voltage charging and distribution systems.

Name: Embreagens Jarauto

A Jarauto Embreagens foi fundada em 1990 graças à visão empreendedora do CEO Uirajara Nóbrega, mais conhecido como "Jara". Ele identificou uma oportunidade de negócio no setor de embreagens remanufaturadas.

Inicialmente, a empresa começou suas operações com uma equipe pequena e maquinário limitado. No entanto, ao longo do tempo, a empresa ganhou espaço no mercado devido à qualidade das peças que produzia e à lealdade de seus clientes.Por isso, conquistou uma posição de destaque no mercado de embreagens remanufaturadas, devido à sua especialização nesse produto. Isso permitiu que a empresa consolidasse sua marca e atraísse um número crescente de clientes.

Atualmente, nossa empresa dispõe de equipamentos de última geração e conta com uma equipe de profissionais altamente qualificados e dedicados. Eles estão empenhados em atender de forma excepcional às demandas dos nossos clientes. Além disso, expandimos nossas operações para cinco estados brasileiros: Rio Grande do Norte, Paraíba, Pernambuco, Ceará e Pará. Isso nos permite atender de maneira abrangente e eficaz às necessidades dos nossos parceiros comerciais em toda essa vasta região geográfica.

Name: Karo Coils & Springs
Description:
Karo Coils is a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility operating on a continuous piece flow concept. The plant has a production capacity of 300 metric tonnes of hardened wire per month and manufactures over 1.5 million springs annually.

We specialize in the manufacturing of cold coil springs, handling wire diameters ranging from 0.5 mm to 17 mm. Additionally, we process hardened wires in-house from 3 mm to 17 mm in diameter using our advanced wire drawing and heat treatment facilities.

Our fully integrated operations—including multi-color conveyorized powder coating—enable us to offer cost-effective solutions, flexible production volumes, and rapid sample development.

Our team consists of 100+ experienced professionals, including engineers, designers, R&D experts, and metallurgists, each with over a decade of industry experience. This expertise allows us to customize spring designs and conduct life cycle testing to meet specific application requirements.

Certifications:
* IATF 16949:2016 – Quality Management System (Certified by Quality Austria)
* ISO 14001:2015 – Environmental Management System
* ISO 45001:2018 – Occupational Health & Safety Management System

Name: Parsat Piston A.Ş (Demirören Holding & Licensed By Kolbenschmidt GmbH)
Description: Parsat Piston A.Ş which is the pioneer of Turkish piston industry was founded on 1968 and started production under German Kolbenschmidt licence on 1970. During the foundation, all the molds, toolings and fixtures were acquired from this company. In a short time, Parsat Piston gained the ability to design and manufacture these molds, toolings and fixtures in-house and has reached the highest technological level among the other well-known piston manufacturers in the world. Over 45 years of development, the production capacty of Parsat Piston reached to 3.000.000 pistons and pins annually. By its advantage of producing more than 3500 different types of pistons between the range of 35mm to 185 mm diameter, Parsat Piston exports 75% of its products as well as supplying all new piston types that market needs with the shortest lead time and the best quality. This is the proof of our company’s technological level and our success is the result of great combination of our technology and our professional staff unity. Parsat Piston was founded on 20.000 m2 closed area and includes foundries of piston, liner and ring carrier; machining departments of piston, pin, liner and ring carrier; coating workshop, tooling workshop, mould manufacturing workshop, machine manufacturing workshop, laboratories and quality control departments.

Name: Mingxin New Material

Since its inception in 1995, Mingxin has embarked on a quest to explore the potential of materials, guided by the principle of "For a Better Life."

With a pioneering spirit, Mingxin continuously challenges the status quo of automotive interior materials through innovative research, eco-friendly production, and visionary development. This commitment has given rise to cutting-edge, sustainable products like Mingxin vegetable-tanned leather, Menorca water-based microfiber suede, Verstar water-based microfiber PU, Hurongo water-based PU, and Eivisa eco-PVC.

Today, Mingxin stands as a leading high-tech enterprise in China, recognized for its listing on the Shanghai Stock Exchange (code: 605068.SH) since November 2020. Operating five facilities across China and expanding its global footprint with a new factory in Mexico, Mingxin's reach and impact are on the rise.

Mingxin transcends its corporate identity to become a community devoted to enriching lives with innovative and eco-conscious material solutions. Our commitment to low-carbon, eco-friendly practices is setting new benchmarks for luxury, comfort, and durability in automotive interiors sector. We will keep weaving a sustainable future, honoring our roots while moving forward with integrity and a deep commitment to sustainability.

Quality & Global Reach

IATF 16949:2016 & ISO 9001:2015

ISO 14001:2015 & ISO 45001:2018

Sustainability

Name: Cogeme s&t Group
Description:
Cogeme S&T Group is a medium-sized manufacturer specializing in high-precision machining and complex components. Founded in Italy in 1974, it operates three modern production facilities:

Patrica, Italy (headquarters): ~5,500 m² plant with 94 machines, overseeing sales, R&D and quality control.

Micesti, Romania: ~8,650 m² facility with 154 machines, strategically located near the Dacia plant and set to expand further.

Pune, India: ~6,300 m² site with 172 machines and a hot forging department, serving regional and global markets.

Cogeme S&T focuses on automotive and adjacent sectors, including e-mobility and industrial applications. It employs advanced machining (turning, grinding, milling), assembly, forging and heat-treatment techniques. Emphasizing quality (IATF 16949, ISO 9001), innovation, customer proximity and lean production, the group supports customers worldwide with vertical integration and technological excellence.

Name: Adient Czech Republic s.r.o., odštěpný závod Bor
Description:
Adient Czech Republic s.r.o. odštěpný závod Bor je středně velká společnost, která byla založena v roce 2014. Jsme specialisté na výrobu automobilových sedaček pro špičkové zákazníky, včetně renomovaných automobilových značek jako BMW, Stellantis a Ford. Naší hlavní prioritou je zajišťovat včasné dodávky v požadované kvalitě a množství. Od vstupních komponentů až po konečný produkt -> kompletní sedačku, sledujeme každý krok výrobního procesu s důrazem na detail a preciznost.
V našem pracovním prostředí se klade důraz na férovost, oboustrannou komunikaci a budování partnerského vztahu se zaměstnanci. Jsme hrdí na to, že nabízíme příjemný a milý kolektiv, ve kterém se cítí každý člen týmu respektován a oceněn. Práce u nás je vhodná jak pro muže, tak pro ženy, a vytváříme prostředí, které podporuje rovnost příležitostí a rozmanitost.
Pokud hledáte pracovní prostředí, kde si váží vaší práce a kde je důležitým prvkem přátelský a podpůrný kolektiv, pak Adient může být pro vás to pravé místo.

Name: GAPASA
Description:
Located in Foshan, Southern China, Guangdong GAP Auto Parts (GAPASA) is an IATF 16949-certified leader in manufacturing premium-quality truck and trailer brake parts.

With over 20 years of experience, we specialize in producing slack adjusters, brake chambers, S-camshafts, and many other essential brake system components that meet the demanding needs of commercial vehicles worldwide.

Our manufacturing facility is equipped with advanced forging, casting, CNC technology, and rubber and plastic molding technologies, enabling us to control every step of the production process from raw materials to final assembly.
This comprehensive approach allows us to guarantee consistency, durability, and precision in all our parts.

Supported by a dedicated engineering team, GAPASA maintains strict quality standards through rigorous inspections and testing, ensuring every product meets global safety and performance requirements.

Our commitment to quality and innovation has helped us build a strong and growing presence in international markets, serving fleets, distributors, and OEMs with reliable, cost-effective solutions.

At GAPASA, we understand that the brake system is critical to vehicle safety and performance. That’s why we focus not only on superior product quality but also on transparent communication and responsive service. We’re committed to long-term partnerships that help our customers keep their fleets safe and moving efficiently. Join us as we continue to advance the standards of truck and trailer brake parts, delivering solutions you can trust, every mile of the way.

Name: KOPUR d.o.o.
Description:
We are in a continuous search of cost-effective solutions pertaining to the reuse of residual materials and their application in the automotive industry and other manufacturing sectors. Our eco-friendly products follow the growing global trend which indicates that end product producers are increasingly searching and opting to parts or components with a minimal impact on the environment as early as in initial stage of product development.

Products:
- acoustics fillers made of recycled foam for car pillars, 
- acoustic engine cover
- air ducts
- 3D thermally-shaped elements made of fleece and recycled foam as support to seat backs and cushions
- acoustic floor insulation made of recycled materials
- acoustic trunk fillers
- car back seat panels
- recycled foam spacers
- acoustic elements in white goods, doors and windows, machines, devices and structures with sound-absorbing function.
- Rubber protection slabs / rubber floor tiles
- Designer furniture made of recycled materials: ambient lightning with acoustic function, acoustic and decorative wall panels, designer chairs and tables for congress halls and meeting rooms, felt storage boxes, baskets, bins and organizers.
Our development activities are carried out in line with the planned strategy related to efficient use of recycled materials into products that provide acoustic- and thermal insulation, fire-protection and shock-absorbtion.

By creating new partnerships, we pursue the so-called ‘win-win’ strategy, which brings positive effects for and satisfaction of all the parties involved.

Wir fertigen hochwertige Schlauch- und Rohrleitungen aus Aluminium für Klimaanlagen sowie Stahlrohrleitungen für aktive Fahrwerke. Darüber hinaus verfügen wir über einen eigenen Musterbau und ein Testcenter, in dem wir die Qualität unserer Produkte sicherstellen und validieren.

Xandor bietet verschiedene Ausbildungsberufe an, darunter:
- Mechatronik / Handwerk
- Fachkraft für Metalltechnik 
- Kaufmann/-frau für Büromanagement. 

Wir legen großen Wert auf die Ausbildung von Nachwuchskräften und bieten ein modernes Arbeitsumfeld mit besten Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten. Werde Teil unseres Teams und gestalte die Zukunft der Automobilindustrie mit, als Auszubildende, Angestellte oder Produktionsmitarbeiter.

Name: Celeste Map
Description:
Celeste Map, con sede a Rosolini (Siracusa), è un’azienda leader nel settore Automotive con oltre 60 anni di esperienza nella progettazione, produzione e commercializzazione di soluzioni elettroniche avanzate e servizi di tuning per auto.
La nostra vera forza sono le persone: una grande squadra che lavora in sinergia come una famiglia, unendo collaborazione, unità e affidabilità per costruire ogni giorno progetti di successo.

In Celeste Map crediamo che la professionalità nasca dalla ricerca costante, dalla crescita personale e dall’entusiasmo di un team giovane, dinamico e intraprendente, animato da una forte ambizione.
Vogliamo che ognuno sia libero di far esplodere la propria competenza, mettendo in campo idee e talento per creare soluzioni sempre più innovative.

Con più di 2.000 officine partner in tutta Italia e una presenza in continua espansione in Spagna, Francia, Germania e Grecia, offriamo un punto di riferimento solido e internazionale.
Il nostro tratto distintivo resta un’assistenza tecnica rapida, esperta e sempre disponibile, che garantisce ai professionisti del settore un vantaggio competitivo concreto e duraturo.

Name: Aatomize sheet metal components
Description:
Engineering Solutions for Sheet Metal Components & Precision Parts

Aatomize Manufacturing Private Limited (AMPL India) is a precision-driven manufacturing company delivering sheet metal components, welded assemblies, and precision-machined parts for industries where quality, reliability, and consistency are critical.

With over two decades of engineering and manufacturing experience, Aatomize supports global OEMs across automotive, European truck & trailer, railway, defence, agriculture, pump, elevator, and industrial machinery sectors.

Our manufacturing approach is built on process control, in-house tooling, advanced CNC & VMC machining, laser cutting, press shop operations, and fabrication capabilities, ensuring dimensional accuracy and repeatable performance.

We work with a wide range of materials including Mild Steel, Stainless Steel, Spring Steel, Copper, Brass, and Aluminium, complemented by in-house surface processing such as Zinc Plating, CED Coating, Blackening, and application-specific finishes.

Certified to ISO 9001:2015, ZED Gold, and recognised under Startup India, Aatomize supplies high-precision components to European and Gulf markets, meeting international quality standards and customer-defined technical requirements.

Aatomize Manufacturing Private Limited
Precision. Performance. Progress.

Name: ABM ESTAMPADOS S.A. de C.V.
Description:
ABM Estampados S.A. de C.V. (una división de A.B.M. Tool & Die Co. Ltd.) está a la vanguardia de la tecnología moderna en el diseño y fabricación de piezas metálicas estampadas, ensambles automatizados y de soldadura. Desde la fundación de nuestra empresa en 1969, A.B.M. Tool and Die ha brindado constantemente calidad inigualable, precios competitivos, entregas a tiempo y un entusiasta servicio al cliente.

A.B.M. puede tomar su concepto de diseño y suministrarle un solo componente o un ensamble completo.

Construimos desde complejos troqueles progresivos hasta troqueles de transferencia hasta troqueles totalmente automatizados en nuestras modernas instalaciones de herramientas con todo el personal calificado y el equipo necesario. Otras capacidades internas incluyen la creación de prototipos, construcción de troqueles y diseño y construcción de equipos de automatización.

Nuestras modernas instalaciones albergan prensas de 120 a 1400 toneladas que brindan servicios de estampado por transferencia, progresivo y servo-automatizado, incluyendo soldadura con robots y ensambles automatizados.

Los diseñadores internos de herramientas y troqueles, junto con los programadores de CAD/CAM, ofrecen su experiencia utilizando el software más reciente de la industria para la fabricación actual de piezas metálicas estampadas.

Nuestra división de fabricación está respaldada por Garantía de calidad y control de inventario para garantizar el cumplimiento de todas las especificaciones del cliente, y cumplimos con ISO 9001 y estamos certificados IATF 16949. 

Tenemos 2 ubicaciones convenientes para respaldar su negocio:
* 100,000 pies cuadrados en nuestra planta de manufactura en San Luis Potosí, SLP, México
* 100.000 pies cuadrados en nuestra planta de manufactura en Brampton, ON, Canadá (A.B.M. Tool & Die Co. Ltd.)

Name: DELTAGOM srl
Description:
DELTAGOM nasce nel 1983 con la produzione di articoli in gomma e lavora per primarie aziende operanti nel primo impianto Automotive, nell’after market, nel settore degli elettrodomestici e dell’informatica.

Durante gli anni ’90 l’azienda ha dedicato sempre maggiori risorse ad un settore tanto complesso quanto delicato: il gomma metallo. Ed ha avuto successo: il gomma metallo è diventato lo zoccolo duro della nostra produzione, ed in particolare la produzione dei silent block utilizzati sui braccetti sospensione di tutte le vetture europee è divenuto il vero core business della DELTA GOM.

Accresciuta e consolidata la clientela, DELTA GOM, oggi può vantare a catalogo circa 4000 riferimenti. Nonostante la necessaria industrializzazione dei processi produttivi per le medie e grandi serie, DELTA GOM ha mantenuto la flessibilità della media azienda, che rimane elemento fondamentale per la soddisfazione delle esigenze della clientela.

L’attenzione alla qualità, sia nelle materie prime (le stesse adottate per il primo impianto) che nelle successive fasi di produzione, ha quasi naturalmente portato DELTA GOM ad un programma di riorganizzazione che gli ha permesso di ottenere la certificazione UNI EN ISO 9001:2015.

E sulla scia dei successi ottenuti, sia in Italia che all’estero, ha potuto sviluppare, in aggiunta ai SILENT BLOKS, due nuove linee di prodotto: le BARRE STABILIZZATRICI, i BRACCI SOSPENSIONI e i SUPPORTI CAMBIO/MOTORE

I tecnici DELTA GOM hanno puntato e continuano a puntare sulla qualità, in particolare della gomma, vero cuore del prodotto, fermamente convinti che ciò faccia la differenza sul buon funzionamento, sulla durata e sull’affidabilità. DELTA GOM cresce nella convinzione di poter essere il GIUSTO PARTNER della sua clientela.

Our close collaborative relationship with leading technology companies such as Tyco, Yazaki, Delphi and costal is also very important.
 
In terms of wiring loops, we generally work with small volumes for things such as prototypes or relatively short series of products for low volume manufacturers. 

In the field of troubleshooting and diagnosis, our development work usually runs in parallel with the manufacturer's own product development processes.

Name: AUTOTRACK TECHNOLOGY SYSTEM SRL
Description:
L’ Autotrack Technology System s.r.l. (A.T.S. s.r.l.) nasce nel Gennaio 2013, sulla base di una decennale esperienza nel settore dell’elettronica per l’automotive sviluppando professionalità e competenza per cronotachigrafi – Cluster – Contachilometri – Centraline e tutto quello che riguarda per l’elettrico ed elettronica Truck – Bus.
L’ A.T.S. s.r.l. si pone come target, oltre ai comuni servizi di vendita, anche una continua assistenza alla clientela; il così detto “post vendita”. Grazie ad una valida squadra, formatasi negli anni, la crescita dell’azienda ha superato le aspettative, considerando che oltre a servire direttamente Campania-Calabria-Lazio-Toscana-Piemonte-Sicilia e Puglia è in grado di distribuire i suoi prodotti tachigrafo su tutto il territorio nazionale ed estero.
Difatti un altro punto di forza è l’export che, attualmente, rappresenta il 50% del fatturato prodotto il che significa un ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo tanto da poter competere con i colossi del settore stranieri.
All’interno dell’A.T.S. s.r.l. sono stati realizzati tre laboratori tecnici all’avanguardia, uno per la riparazione e assistenza dei tachigrafi analogici, uno per la riparazione e assistenza dei cluster e l’altro per il service & assistenza tachigrafo digitale.

Name: Scanferla Bruno S.r.l.
Description:
Scanferla Bruno S.r.l. è un'azienda italiana con una consolidata esperienza internazionale nella fornitura di componenti metallici stampati da deformazione a freddo per piccole, medie e grandi serie.
Fondata nel 1981, la Scanferla vanta oltre 42 anni di esperienza nella progettazione e nella costruzione di stampi singoli e progressivi ed è in grado di offrire soluzioni tecniche "chiavi in mano" dallo sviluppo del progetto alla consegna del componente finito e confezionato al cliente.
Gli stampi realizzati per la produzione dei particolari sono progettati internamente da tecnici esperti che utilizzano software 3D come CATIA e VISI PROGRESS 3D.
La produzione comprende lo stampaggio di piccoli, medi e grandi volumi di particolari e componenti metallici in acciaio al carbonio, inox, ottone, bronzo, rame e alluminio (spessore da 0,2 a 6 mm), così come la prototipazione, l’assemblaggio e la saldatura, fino alla consegna in imballaggi su misura secondo le esigenze del cliente.
Con oltre due decenni di esperienza nelle forniture a livello Tier-1 nel complesso settore automobilistico, il team aziendale ha sviluppato capacità di comprensione del dialogo tecnico e rispetto dei processi, delle procedure e delle aspettative di qualità dei OEM del settore automobilistico.
La Scanferla fornisce principalmente il mercato dei settori automotive, agricolo, ferroviario, elettrico, elettromeccanico e degli elettroutensili, distinguendosi per l'alto livello di servizio offerto ai propri clienti: affidabilità, competitività e qualità totale sono i punti di forza su cui l’azienda si basa per affrontare le nuove sfide del futuro.

Name: Sebang Global Battery North America, LLC
Description:
Sebang Global Battery is a Korean company that specializes in the manufacturing of automotive and industrial batteries, exporting products to more than 130 countries worldwide. Since its establishment in 1952, Sebang Global Battery has achieved stable growth through management innovation and technological development, currently holding approximately 43% of the domestic lead-acid battery market share, making it the top player.

Sebang Global Battery established a US corporation in August 2021 to continuously expand its global business, especially increasing its influence in North America, which is the world's largest market for lead-acid batteries. Through the US office, we have made real-time sales activities possible. Sebang Global Battery NA is diversifying supply channels (Auto Parts Chain and Merchandisers) by utilizing its logistics hubs and expanding our in-house brand sales to local markets.

Name: Shri Krishna Forgings
Description: Shri Krishna Forgings (SKF), Rohtak, specializes in closed-die hot forging using flashless techniques to minimize waste, improve mechanical properties, and enhance surface finishes. With forging capabilities ranging from 50g to 4kg, SKF offers in-house die manufacturing, SCADA-supported heat treatments, and precision machining (CNC, VMC, TMC). A state-of-the-art metallurgical lab and standard room ensure global quality standards, delivering durable and high-performance components for OEMs.

Name: Rapitech
Description:
I fissatori metallici Rapitech sono usati in tutti i settori industriali: automobile, elettrodomestici, apparati e macchinari elettrici, quadri, attrezzi da giardinaggio e hobbistica, Hi-Fi e molti altri.
Nata nel 1966, Rapitech è oggi una delle azienda più importanti nella produzione di fissatori speciali.
Nel nostro reparto di sviluppo lavoriamo costantemente su nuove idee per la produzione di tecniche di fissaggio che siano sempre più pratiche per l’utilizzo.
Il nostro reparto sviluppo è anche in grado di produrre prototipi su specifiche richieste del cliente.
Rapitech ha implementato il sistema di assicurazione qualità ISO 9001:2008.

Rapitech metal fasteners are used in all sector of industry: car, electrical equipment industry, electrical appliance, machinery, outdoor equipment, power tools and Hi-Fi.
Setup in 1966, Rapitech is today one of the foremost companies in the production of special fasteners.
In our development department we are constantly working on new ideas for the production of fastening techniques which are more and more practical.
Our engineering department is able to produce prototypes corresponding to customers technical requirements.
Rapitech has implemented a quality assurance system ISO 9001:2008

Name: Sesa Otomotiv San. ve Ltd. Şti
Description: Named from the first two letters of the founding partners, SESA Otomotiv Sanayi ve Ticaret Ltd. Şti. was established in March 1990 in Ankara. Shortly after its establishment in November 1990 began to serve as Turkey's Central Anatolia Region dealer of distributor of JCB Construction for SIF Automotive. Sesa Otomotiv has adopted the principle of being the sole address of all sectorel solutions since ıts inspection and continues to provide maintenance and repair services as JCB special service, supplying spare parts to its domestic and foreign customers, supplying brand registered products that it manufactures within its own structure, and importing them, continues its activites within the framework of quality service in export and maschinery purchase and sale fields.Our company has always given priority to quality and trust in its services, adhering to professional service understanding without compromising on experience with experienced staff and trained technical staff with all the necessary equipment and focused on customer satisfaction since 1990.

Name: Tifec Fábrica de Engranajes
Description: 70 años de experiencia en el aporte de soluciones integrales y personalizadas al sector automotriz, agropecuario, naval, aéreo, entre otros.

Name: MOBIS Corporate Center of America
Description:
As a Tier-1 supplier for Hyundai Motor Group and numerous other global automotive brands, Hyundai Mobis is a pioneering leader in the automotive parts industry. With a focus on innovation and excellence, we specialize in the production of Chassis, Cockpit, and Front-End Modules. Furthermore, our cutting-edge technologies in safety systems and infotainment products are designed to enhance the driving experience and ensure the highest standards of quality.
 
Mobis Corporate Center America (MCCA) serves as Hyundai Mobis’s in-house consulting hub, supporting all affiliated entities across the United States. MCCA delivers strategic guidance and operational expertise, driving cross-functional alignment, business efficiency, and innovation throughout the region.

Name: Hidromas Global
Description:
Netherland based Hidromas Global is a leading Global Investment Company in the Global Hydraulic market. Hidromas Global is the proprietor of the Hidromas Industrial Companies and HIDROMAS brand, which are active in market for more than 4 Decades.

Hidromas products are being used in more than 50 countries around the world. Hidromas Global has initiated its first investment by acquiring the shares of Turkey and Middle East’s most prominent hydraulic cylinder and pump manufacturer company Galipoğlu Hidromas A.Ş. in 2016.

Galipoglu Hidromas India Manufacturing Pvt. Ltd, established in Chennai in 2009. It was acquired by Hidromas Global in 2016 as an ongoing global expansion strategy.

In 2017, HMS Global has entered American market by acquiring  shares of Brazil’s first Telescopic Tipping Cylinder manufacturing company Soprano, who has more than 45 years of experience.

Hidromas Global carries on its investment activities and focuses on new acquisitions in the European market.

Name: Conti3 Automotive Systems
Description:
A Conti3 tornou-se especialista em desenvolvimento e Fabricação de embalagens metálicas e plásticas , racks para linhas automatizadas e equipamentos logísticos para transportes internos e externos.
Ao longo dos anos a Conti3 investiu na produção direta e fornecimento de componentes automotivos focando na excelência da manufatura implementando nos processos ISO-9001 e IATF16949, e garantindo uma eficiente logística devido a localização estratégica com polos automotivo.
O nosso foco é a qualidade através do know how aliado a uma estrutura totalmente equipada, que conta com amplos espaços, equipamentos de solda, solda robotizada, máquinas automáticas para corte de tubos blank e chapas, corte plasma cnc, prensas conformadoras guilhotinas e entre outras.
A Conti3 dispõe de um reparto engenharia que através de softwares avançados esta equipado para entregar soluções pare as mais diversas necessidades industriais.
Executando projetos em 2D/3D cálculos estruturais, simuladores de resistência mecânica, prototipagem CAD/CAM entre outros

Name: AutoFab Engineering
Description: AutoFab Engineering incorporated in 2022, is involved in manufacturing and maintenance of Steel pallets and trolleys. With a focus on the booming automotive sector we aim to deliver constant innovation with impeccable quality to help our customers get cost effective solutions for safe transportation and storage of their valuable parts.

Name: Yutaka Technologies de México
Description:
YUTAKA es una empresa automotriz que se enfrenta al desafío de crear productos que contribuyan a preservar el medio ambiente, tales como Sistemas de Escape, Convertidores de Torque y productos ecológicos de próxima generación para automóviles.

Nuestro propósito es contribuir a la sociedad global con productos de la mejor calidad para posicionarnos y mantenernos en un entorno empresarial en constante cambio, logrando cumplir las expectativas de nuestros clientes colaborando junto con nuestros asociados para construir una empresa con una función corporativa en igualdad y moralidad bajo nuestro lema "Clean for the Future".

Name: Original Indústria Eletroeletrônica Ltda
Description:
Fundada em 1999, a Original iniciou sua trajetória com o objetivo de desenvolver soluções inovadoras em centrais elétricas de placas de circuito impresso e relês automotivos. Com o tempo, expandimos nossa atuação para o segmento de conexões elétricas, seguindo a norma ISO 1185, também conhecida como ‘mão-amiga’. Esse movimento estratégico nos posicionou como a empresa mais promissora no mercado de soluções elétricas, tornando-nos parceiros de confiança dos maiores fabricantes de implementos rodoviários e montadoras de veículos pesados, como ônibus e caminhões. Além disso, atuamos fortemente no mercado de reposição, sempre com o compromisso de entregar produtos de alta qualidade e confiabilidade. 
Na Original, conectamos o futuro da eletrônica automotiva, impulsionando a mobilidade com inovação e excelência.

Name: Tube Emission Systems
Description:
Tube company which was founded in Denizli in 2003, is a long-established family business that specialized in emission systems. Our company was built on the vision and dedication of our founder, and today continues to grow under the management of the second generation.

Our company has gained a place among the respected and trusted companies in the sector by prioritizing quality, trust and customer satisfaction as its basis since the day it was founded. With the products and solutions we offer to various business partners in Turkey and other countries, we have made a name for ourselves not only in Turkey but also in a wide geography, especially in Western Europe, Eastern Europe, Balkans, Central Asia, Caucasus, the Middle East and North Africa.

Driven by innovation, we respond quickly to evolving market needs and develop high-performance products that meet emission standards of European Union. With our wide business partner network, we increase our power in the global market every year and continue to grow.

Our mission is to establish long-term partnerships with our business partners with a quality service approach as a technology-focused and customer-focused company.

Our vision is to be one of the leading companies in the sector on an international scale with environmentally sensitive and sustainable products.

Empowered by our roots, we move forward with confidence towards the future.

Name: Ciosa AutoTodo Costa Rica
Description: Somos una importadora y comercializadora de autopartes con más tres décadas en el mercado de repuestos, especializados en las 3 líneas principales: Fuel inyection, Eléctrico-Mecánico y Frenado. Con presencia y operaciones en México, Colombia y Costa Rica.

Name: MCE Holdings Berhad
Description: MCE Holdings Berhad (“MCE”) and its subsidiaries (“MCE Group” or “Group”) is a leading Original Equipment Manufacturer (“OEM”) specialising in the full spectrum of design, manufacture and supply of automotive electronics and mechatronic parts for the Malaysian and regional markets. The Group’s main facility is located in Johor Bahru, Johor serves as its core manufacturing hub, fully equipped with the latest design and testing facilities as well as doubling as its headquarters. The second facility is located in Pelabuhan Klang, Selangor with extended manufacturing and warehousing facilities, business development, marketing and customer support office providing extensive warehouse and logistics services.

Name: Zendra Systems
Description:
𝗭𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗿𝗮 𝗦𝘆𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗺𝘀 𝗦𝗽𝗮 è un’azienda italiana con sede a 𝗖𝗮𝗶𝗿𝗼 𝗠𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗲 (𝗦𝗩), specializzata nella produzione di sistemi frenanti per il settore 𝗮𝘂𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗼𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲.
Lo stabilimento di Cairo Montenotte vanta una lunga storia: per anni è stato parte del gruppo 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗹, leader mondiale nella tecnologia per veicoli. 
Nell’𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗼𝗯𝗿𝗲 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟱 l’impianto è stato acquisito dal gruppo tedesco 𝗠𝘂𝘁𝗮𝗿𝗲𝘀 𝗦𝗘 & 𝗖𝗼. 𝗞𝗚𝗮𝗔, investitore internazionale focalizzato sul rilancio di realtà industriali strategiche.
Oggi Zendra Systems è un partner di riferimento per le 𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗮𝗹𝗶 𝗰𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝗮𝘂𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗼𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗵𝗲, fornendo soluzioni affidabili e innovative per la mobilità del futuro.

𝗖𝗼𝘀𝗮 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗺𝗼:
- 𝗙𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗶 𝗮 𝘁𝗮𝗺𝗯𝘂𝗿𝗼 𝗶𝗱𝗿𝗮𝘂𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗶 per veicoli leggeri e commerciali, inclusi modelli elettrici;
- 𝗙𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗶 𝗱𝗶 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗼 𝗲𝗹𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗶 (𝗘𝗣𝗕‑𝗦𝗶), integrati con sistemi di sicurezza avanzati.
 
La nostra missione è garantire 𝘀𝗶𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘇𝘇𝗮, 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗲 𝘀𝗼𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁à, con un forte impegno verso l’innovazione e la crescita professionale dei nostri collaboratori.

Name: ITI INDUSTRIALE SRL
Description:
Iti Industriale history started in 1965, year in which is introduced into the market Sunblind for cars with “Filtravedo” brand, worldwide patent which launched Company into Automotive Market.
Our experience of more of 50 years brought us to design and produce sunblinds for different markets. ITI Industriale designs and manufactures products maintaining its own core business into the automotive world, working for prestigious Companies that manifactures Cars, Trucks, Buses, Motorhomes. We are european Leaders since years for Tractors market. Iti Industriale is among the first Companies to be awarded the ISO 9001 certification, a starting point which we consider essential to safeguard our products quality.

A further step, which differ us from not qualified competitors, is the achievement of IATF16949 certification, necessary to enter into different sectors OEM Automotive. Since December 2016 we are certified ISO 14001. An additional guarantee for our Customers and a reason of pride for us.

Name: Farhym Automotive
Description:
Farhym is a system supplier for leading commercial vehicle manufacturers worldwide and has been offering complete solutions for designing the interior of commercial vehicles in Turkey since 2003. Farhym covers all process steps from product design and development to production.

In 2025, Turna Ahsap, one of the leading companies in Turkey’s automotive supply and manufacturing industry, fully acquired all shares of Farhym. This marked the beginning of a new era of domestic and innovative manufacturing under the Turna Ahsap–Farhym partnership.

Equipment for vehicles—especially in the coach and service bus industry—such as air ducts, luggage storage systems, interior lighting, interior trim, and other interior components are produced.

Farhym’s total solutions pursue the intelligent and economical use of limited vehicle interiors, meeting the highest standards of safety, functionality, and comfort while delivering a sophisticated and harmonious design language.

We are a reliable partner for our customers, ensuring the dependable implementation of complex projects and mass production with the capacities we realize in our different locations.

Name: Spicer Ayra Cardan
Description: Spicer Ayra Cardan es una empresa de automoción dedicada a la fabricación de componentes para automoción, producción de transmisiones y juntas para camiones ligeros, vehículos cuatro por cuatro y quads.

Name: RoadActive Suspension
Description: RoadActive Suspension, (RAS) the ultimate assist for vehicles with rear leaf spring suspension. Looking for more out of your truck without negatively affecting ride quality? Manufacturing top of the line rear leaf spring suspension helper for trucks and vans 1 ton and less since 1998, RAS adds strength and stability when you need it the most.

Name: Snap Shades
Description:
Gone are the days where you have flapping faded window shades.
Gone are the days where you can't open your windows or worry about blind spots
Snap Shades are the latest, stylish and affordable car window sun shades. Snap Shades are magnetic, perfectly fitted and vehicle specific. They are designed to help you protect your passengers from harmful UV ray, heat, glare and insects.

Name: Indústria e Comércio de Suprimentos Industriais Carpelã Ltda.
Description:
Fundada em 16 março de 2001, mas atuamos desde 20 de Novembro de 1990 com o objetivo de atuar em parceria com as indústrias automobilísticas, propondo soluções versáteis e fornecendo produtos com qualidade e preços competitivos.
A Carpelã possui um controle de qualidade atuante desde a aquisição da matéria-prima até a entrega final do produto com certificação de seus processos através da ISO-9001

A empresa possui equipamentos para o processo de termoformagem com dimensões de 1570×1070,2000×1000e2400x1400mm e uma gama de espessuras de acordo com a engenharia de aplicação do produto variando de 0,35 à 10mm, tendo como resultado a qualidade, processadas em equipamentos com fornos duplo, contramoldes, sistema de termoformagem balão, controles térmicos, ar e vácuo através de sistemas automáticos.

Fabricamos artefatos de couro, matérias plásticos, peças especiais para uso industriais.
Hoje atendemos vários segmentos a nível GLOBAL, temos uma atuação expressiva no mercado nacional automobilístico.

Desenvolvemos serviços especiais para seguimento de refrigeração, acessórios instrumental, academia, jardinagem, cosméticos, farmácia, luminárias, informática, produtos pets, embalagem e muito mais.

Empenhamos  para aceitar grandes desafios e conduzi los até o fim, assumimos plena responsabilidade dos compromissos, resultados e qualidade. 

Somo apaixonados pelo que fazemos!

Name: OMA S.P.A.
Description:
OMA Spa è un’azienda familiare, solida e dinamica, attiva dal 1995 nel settore dello stampaggio e della lastratura di particolari in lamiera per l’automotive.

Da oltre trent’anni lavoriamo al fianco dei principali player del settore, offrendo soluzioni di qualità e su misura, grazie a un processo produttivo integrato, tecnologie avanzate e un team altamente specializzato.

 Cosa facciamo:
Dallo sviluppo alla realizzazione, ci occupiamo di:

Stampaggio a freddo

Saldatura robotizzata

Assemblaggi automatizzati

Lavorazioni meccaniche di precisione

Controllo qualità e collaudi

 Come lo facciamo:
Con un approccio che unisce esperienza, innovazione e attenzione continua al miglioramento. Investiamo costantemente in tecnologie, persone e formazione, per garantire standard elevati e risposte rapide alle esigenze dei nostri clienti.

 I nostri valori:
Al centro della nostra cultura ci sono le persone e il lavoro di squadra. I valori che ci guidano ogni giorno sono:
rispetto, umiltà, responsabilità e voglia di mettersi in gioco.

Name: OneDrive Portugal
Description:
A OneDrive tem uma larga história no mercado português, de especialização em peças e acessórios para automóveis, com presença em todo o território nacional.

Dispõe de uma oferta abrangente no âmbito da mecânica e carroçaria automóvel, sustentada em peças multimarca de qualidade original, garantindo a melhor relação qualidade-preço.

A OneDrive integra o Grupo NORS, que contém uma área de negócio especializada em aftermarket, a NORS Aftermarket. A NORS Aftermarket centra-se na distribuição e retalho de peças multimarca para automóveis, camiões e autocarros. Nesta área de negócio encontramos também as marcas AS Parts e Civiparts, peças para ligeiros e pesados, respetivamente.

Name: Mubea Aftermarket Services GmbH
Description:
Das Original
Mubea Aftermarket Services GmbH
Mit der Mubea Aftermarket Services GmbH - The original parts company - stellt Mubea seine langjährige Expertise als Entwickler und Hersteller von Komponenten für die Automobilindustrie dem freien Ersatzteilmarkt zur Verfügung. 

Neben den Fahrzeug-, Systemherstellern und der Schlauchindustrie aus dem Automotivbereich finden immer mehr Anbindungen auch bei renommierten Industrieunternehmen und -herstellern Anwendung

Name: F-CRUZ Projetos Automotivos
Description: Somos uma empresa líder na indústria automotiva, comprometida em inovar e promover soluções sustentáveis. Na F-Cruz, focamos em projetos automotivos que não apenas impulsionam a eficiência e segurança, mas também promovem um ambiente mais saudável. Junte-se a nós em nossa missão de transformar a mobilidade automotiva com impacto positivo.

Name: E&P Hydraulics France
Description:
À Propos d’E&P Hydraulics : Fondée en 2005 aux Pays-Bas par deux passionnés de camping-car, E&P Hydraulics est rapidement devenue une référence dans le domaine des systèmes de nivellement hydraulique pour véhicules de loisirs. Forte d’une implantation mondiale au Royaume-Uni, au Benelux, en Allemagne, aux États-Unis, en Suède, en Norvège et en Espagne, l’entreprise s’est développée pour répondre aux besoins d’une clientèle internationale. L’usine de fabrication, située à Nieuw Vennep aux Pays-Bas, garantit une production de haute qualité. En 2017, E&P Hydraulics a rejoint le groupe AL-KO/Dexko, renforçant ses capacités d’innovation et de développement sur le marché global.

À Propos d’E&P Hydraulics France : Depuis 2006, la distribution des produits E&P Hydraulics en France était assurée par un importateur basé dans le Maine-et-Loire. En 2017, pour professionnaliser le réseau d’installateurs agréés en France, une filiale dédiée, E&P Hydraulics France, a été créée. Basée à La Gravelle, en Mayenne, elle s’appuie sur un réseau de revendeurs et de grossistes spécialisés dans les équipements pour véhicules de loisirs. E&P Hydraulics France assure un service de qualité et une expertise technique sur l’ensemble du territoire français grâce à un solide réseau de partenaires et de spécialistes qualifiés.
Location: La Gravelle, Pays de la Loire

Name: Engener Parts Zambia
Description:
Engener Parts Zambia is a trusted supplier of genuine and certified aftermarket spare parts, proudly serving the backbone of Zambia’s economy the energy, mining, agricultural, transport, and industrial sectors.

While our name and branding are inspired by the legacy and strength of the Engen identity, our focus is distinctly technical: we specialize in the critical components that keep heavy machinery, power systems, and commercial fleets running efficiently and reliably.

We go beyond supply. We deliver engineered reliability sourcing high-performance parts that meet strict quality standards, ensuring durability in the toughest operating conditions. From engine components and electrical systems to air management and drivetrain parts, every product we stock is selected for real-world performance.

Our mission is simple: to strengthen Zambia’s operational uptime through quality parts, expert technical support, and responsive supply chains. Whether it’s a mining truck in Kitwe, a generator in a remote plant, or a long-haul fleet on the Great North Road, we’re committed to keeping industry moving without compromise.

At Engener Parts Zambia, we don’t just sell spares.
We support progress , one reliable part at a time.

Name: FRAG - Indústria Metalúrgica
Description:
Com mais de 15 anos de experiência, a FRAG – Indústria Metalúrgica é referência na fabricação de peças metálicas e conjuntos soldados para a indústria automotiva, atendendo as maiores montadoras de veículos pesados no Brasil.


Localizada em Botucatu, São Paulo, contamos com uma planta industrial de mais de 4.000 m² de área construída, equipada com tecnologia de ponta, maquinário completo e uma equipe especializada, garantindo precisão e eficiência em processos de Usinagem, Corte a Laser, Dobra, Estamparia, Soldagem e Pintura.


Nosso compromisso com a excelência, inovação e confiabilidade nos permite atender às demandas mais exigentes da indústria, o que nos levou, desde o início de nossas operações, a atuar como a principal fornecedora de peças para uma das maiores montadoras de ônibus do Brasil, consolidando nossa posição como parceiro estratégico para o setor.


Entre em contato e descubra como podemos agregar valor ao seu negócio!

Name: Tugra Makina
Description:
Tugra Makina founded in 1997 to produce various metal goods, sheet metal, plastic injection moulds and plastic necessaries. In 1998 started to produce LPG Auto Gas Tanks. Tugra Makina proved its importance of quality with ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 16949 certificates. Tugra Makina is working at Free Zone in Kayseri with consumer safeness and environment comprehension of
administration and quality. Tugra Makina produce LPG tanks in 30.000 m2 production plants in Kayseri Free Zone, totally 750.000 pcs of LPG tank capacity in a year.

Tugra Makina is one of more important companies in LPG sector in the world with its production range. Production range has 6 liters to 120 liters and 19 different types and over than 1.000 different size Ipg tank and fastening accessories of tanks, also willing to develop with producing new types and sizes.

Tugra Makina choose raw material very sensitive because raw material chose first factor to effects the quality, the input controls of all raw materials made in own laboratories with own expert staffs.

From raw materials to finished product, technical efficiencies of all materials, input inspections are under control of Tugra Makina. All finished LPG tanks apply one by one high pressure test and leakage test. Also in Tugra Makina laborites, on a tank made radiography test for welds inspections and burst test with high pressure for every each 200 tanks.

Tugra Makina continuous research and development studies with his quality and consumer safety awareness because Tugra Makina is aware of responsibilities for more clean world.

Tugra Makina is exporting to many countries with the inclusion of Europe, America, Middle East, Far East and African countries.

Name: Coligen (China) Corp.
Description:
Coligen (China) Corp. established in 1993. Professional engaged in the research, development, sale and service of

- Camera monitoring system

Coligen aims to provide safety driving solution, focus on intelligent driving and sensing infusion technology.

We have spun-off in April 2022 from LS Electric, which has 40 years of Electrical devices manufaturing experiences. We have built a long-standing trust by winning orders from big automakers such as Ford, GM, Renault, Volvo and Stellantis. We're trying to lead the eco-friendly world every moment.

In addition to designing and producing ECU, BCM, and Instrument Cluster, AEI intends to develop newfangled technology such as ADAS, AEB, ICE, and IVI.

Memiliki spesialisasi dalam bidang metal stamping, progressive stamping dan aplikasi teknologi dalam bidang bending dan gambar desain.Kami juga menyediakan jasa pembuatan tool secara inhouse, meliputi desain dan juga fasilitas pengelasan/welding.

Name: Motorpartes.co

In the area of electrification, Panasonic is catering to the Electric Vehicles(EV) category in form of Li-ion batteries for EVs, Heater Devices, on-board charging systems, etc. 
PASI was established in April 2010, and as of date have a presence across all automotive clusters working with top OEMs in India.  PASI has a vast service network of highly trained and fully equipped service centres across India to support OEMs and end users.

Name: Benzeen Auto Parts
Description:
At Benzeen Auto Parts, our mission is to revolutionize the auto recycling industry through innovation, technology, and exceptional service. With a diverse clientele ranging from mechanical shops, automotive dealership repair centers, resale brokers, warranty companies to collision repair shops and individual car owners, We strive to provide premium quality parts sourced from low-mileage, late-model vehicles. Our dedication to top-tier customer experience is enabled by our cutting-edge online platform and professional team, ensuring accurate, timely, and flexible service. Upholding our core values of Proactive, Ambitious, Responsible, Team Player, and Sincere, we're committed to customer satisfaction and maintain a vibrant, high-energy culture as we process a high volume of transactions.

Our vision is to transform Benzeen Auto Parts from a big little company to a little big company, a leading global player in the auto recycling industry, leveraging our state-of-the-art proprietary software and commitment to excellent service. As we continue to evolve, our ambition is to significantly contribute to a sustainable future by reducing waste and pollution. Looking ahead, we foresee an expansive growth trajectory from our humble origins as a small 5-employee shop to becoming a multinational enterprise. We envision being at the forefront of the industry, consistently delivering on quality, availability, reliability, and rapid turnaround as we reshape the traditional junkyard experience.

Lately, activities in the field of on-board-diagnostics (OBD) for AVL DiTest has started.

Our core competences in Advanced Simulation Technologies:
-	Covering system level software (AVL CRUISE and CRUISE M), structural dynamics (AVL EXCITE) and computational fluid dynamics (AVL FIRE, AVL FIRE M, PreonLab)
-	Software development support
-	Software validation
-	Methodology development 
-	Customer projects
-	Customer support
-	Customer software trainings

and in Engineering Services:
-	Strength & thermal simulations of powertrain component incl. material models development
-	Multiphysics 3D CFD-simulations of powertrain components, engine combustion and complete vehicles with focus on Thermal Heat Protection, Vehicle Aerodynamics and Underhood flow. 
-	0D/1D Simulations & system development of thermal management and HVAC
-	ADAS/AD simulation and verification & validation
-	Electrified powertrain requirements engineering, system design and system simulation
-	Development of electrical systems
-	Functional safety of vehicle systems
-	Project management and sales support

AVL Globally:
With almost 11,000  employees, AVL List GmbH is the world's largest independent technology partner for the development, simulation and testing of all types of powertrain systems (hybrid, combustion engine, transmission, electric drive, batteries, fuel cell and control technology), their integration into the vehicle and is increasingly taking on new tasks in the field of assisted and autonomous driving as well as data intelligence. Name: CSE
Description:
It started 40 years ago — when CSE brought Asia its first remote control car alarm, reshaping how drivers interacted with their vehicles. Since then, we haven’t stopped innovating.

Today, the CSE Group is a powerhouse of connected mobility, leading the charge in telematics, fleet management, automotive electronics and insurance technology. We’ve evolved from a single entity into a regional force — with CSE Telematics, Cobra Auto, CSE Singapore, Science Jet, and regional TSPs under one united vision.

Our partners include global tech giants, telcos, insurers, and automotive manufacturers — all working with us to harness the power of real-time data, intelligent platforms and cutting-edge vehicle technologies.

In 2024, CSE unveiled a refreshed brand identity under the new Cobra logo. The company now stands for Cobra Security Electronics, reflecting a renewed focus on advanced telematics, fleet management, automotive electronics and connected vehicle technologies—continuing its legacy of innovation, safety, security and reliability.

Telematics is no longer the future — it’s the now. And CSE is at the forefront, ready to transform challenges into impact. Join us as we build technologies that save lives and shape the road ahead.

Name: Open Energy
Description:
Open Energy is revolutionizing the electric vehicle (EV) sector with HyperSwap, an innovative, cost-effective, and efficient solution for EV battery swapping. Our technology addresses the core challenges of EV adoption: slow charging times, safety concerns, and high infrastructure costs. With HyperSwap, EV battery swaps are completed in just 3 minutes, faster than refueling a gas vehicle, and each swap is AI-driven to ensure battery health and safety, preventing potential fire hazards.

Our solution is perfect for high-mileage fleets like Amazon, Coupang, KakaoT, and Uber, where vehicle downtime is costly. Traditional charging takes hours, which directly impacts the operational efficiency of logistics and ride-hailing services. HyperSwap offers 10x lower infrastructure costs compared to fast-charging stations, allowing businesses to scale EV adoption without breaking the bank.

We also address grid instability by using our swapping stations as distributed energy storage units. This provides an added benefit of grid stabilization and supports energy companies by storing and redistributing renewable energy during peak demand hours.

Open Energy’s technology is universal, supporting 80% of current EV models without requiring changes to vehicle designs or manufacturing lines. With optimized battery health management, we extend battery life by up to 3x, reducing the total cost of ownership (TCO) for fleets.

Our team combines Silicon Valley innovation and Motor Valley engineering expertise, with mentorship from Sam Altman (OpenAI) and Giorgetto Giugiaro (legendary car designer). We have secured multiple MOUs, recognition from Foxconn’s MIH, KSGC Top 3, Petronas FutureTech, and coverage in The Korea Times. We are now positioned to lead the transformation of EV infrastructure in Korea and beyond.

With Open Energy, the future of EVs is faster, safer, and more sustainable.

#EV #BatterySwap #EnergyStorage #Sustainability #Innovation #CleanTech #FutureOfMobility #OpenEnergy

Sähköasennustöitä ei tarvita, sillä laite kytketään olemassa olevaan pistorasiaan Plug and Play -pistotulpalla. Laturimme ovat yhteensopivia kaikkien sähköautojen kanssa

Parkkipaikan omistajat toimivat sähkönmyyjinä ja hallinnoivat sekä veloittavat sähköautopaikkoja kätevällä hallinta-applikaatiolla. Käyttäjät voivat ladata ajoneuvonsa vaivattomasti, mukavasti ja luotettavasti hyödyntäen yksinkertaista mobiilisovellustamme 

Tavoitteenamme on älykäs ja päästötön liikenne, jossa kuljettajat nauttivat laadukkaasta ja läpinäkyvästä palvelusta. Työskentelemme luodaksemme sähköajoneuvojen lataukseen uusia kestäviä ja yhä innovatiivisempia ratkaisuja ja haluammekin auttaa parkkipaikkanne kehittämisessä!

Meiltä saat nopeasti kaiken sähköverkon kartoituksesta toteutukseen ja lisäksi tukea matkasi joka käänteessä! 

Lue lisää vaivattomasta ja varmasta latauspalvelustamme osoitteessa: www.echargie.com/fi

Tarjouspyynnön voit jättää myös: support@echargie.com

Ps. Aloittaaksesi ajoneuvosi latauksen eChargien latausasemilla, lataa ilmainen eChargie-sovellus sovelluskaupastasi!

Name: Copat srl
Description:
COPAT nasce nell’Aprile 1977 su specifica esigenza di Amp, oggi TE CONNECTIVITY), azienda leader nel settore delle connessioni elettriche, con l’obiettivo di creare un polo automotive specializzato nei sistemi elettrici di connessione destinati all’aftermarket attraverso la tentata vendita che nel tempo si è sviluppata fino ad arrivare a 23 furgoni sul territorio nazionale e 5 agenti per le industrie
Il management COPAT proviene da esperienze mediamente venticinquennali maturate nell’ambito delle aziende multinazionali produttrici e fornitrici di connessioni nel primo impianto auto.
Nel corso degli anni, COPAT, forte della sua competenza specifica nel settore delle connessioni elettriche e nel cablaggio destinato all’automobile, ha incrementato il numero di fornitori specifici del settore fino a diventare oggi un’azienda in grado di fornire al cliente auto il 100% del fabbisogno per la realizzazione dell’impianto elettrico, grazie alla gestione di più di 10000 codici.
Dal 2011 COPAT è partner STELLANTIS per i sistemi elettrici e le relative attrezzature per la loro manutenzione attraverso la modalità di fornitura denominata DFS (Direct From Suppliers). La fornitura avviene attraverso la vendita diretta con furgone (tentata vendita) presso tutte le concessionarie ed officine autorizzate.
La nostra clientela vanta più di 7000 aziende nel settore automotive sia in Italia che all’estero. La presenza dai clienti è garantita da 4 livelli di fornitura: vendita ad officine, a ricambisti di materiale automotive, a cablatori ed industrie ed ultimo, in ordine di arrivo, attraverso il nostro sito di e-commerce.
COPAT è sempre stata all’avanguardia sui sistemi elettronici per gestire al meglio le vendite. Oggi possiamo essere fieri di dire che siamo tra le prime aziende ad adottare dei tablet con una versione portatile del gestionale per poter dare sempre e meglio un servizio ai clienti del III millennio con giacenze, stato degli ordini e contabili.

Description:
Há mais de 140 anos era fundada na Alemanha a empresa FLABEG, nos dias atuais uma líder no processamento de vidro. O investimento contínuo em tecnologia inovadora a coloca em posição de desenvolver soluções ideais para a mais ampla gama de aplicações de vidro e espelhos em todo o mundo. A M2B Automotive assumiu a partir de fevereiro de 2024 as operações da Flabeg no Brasil, na bagagem, toda expertise, mão de obra especializada, colaboradores altamente qualificados e tecnologia de ponta com maquinário alemão, tradição mundial no mercado de vidros.
No Brasil, localizada em Indaiatuba-SP desde do ano 2000, em uma área de 4.400m² dividido em dois prédios, com capacidade produtiva de 3.312m². 
A M2B Automotive mantém as certificações, IATF  16949 e ISO 9001, sinônimo de qualidade e confiabilidade nos processos produtivos. Em seu DNA a M2B Automotive traz consigo na essência, o rígido controle de acabamento e perfeição dos produtos alemães.
Para novos tempos, uma nova era, uma nova marca, M2B Automotive, que também surge para acompanhar todas essas transformações, com nova identidade visual. Novas cores fazem parte da nossa história, o azul foi a cor escolhida para nos representar, com todos os atributos que cercam sua simbologia, como simpatia, empatia, harmonia, colaboração e confiança.
Nosso portfólio diversificado de produtos e serviços abrangem:
Processos de Curvação de vidro; Metalização de vidro; Corte; Fabricação de espelhos; Fabricação de componentes para espelhos retrovisores; Comércio de Vidros, Espelhos e componentes para Espelhos; Subconjuntos, Refil, Comércio de produtos para cuidados pessoais; Espelhos de Segurança (calotas retrovisoras).
Nossos processos resultam da filosofia de gestão Lean Manufacturing, com o objetivo de alcançar o máximo de valor agregado com a melhor utilização de recursos.

SOMOS A M2B, ORIGINAL EM CADA ETAPA!

Thanks to the data and experience matured over more than thirty years of cooperation with the main automotive companies, we are able to follow the customer from the study and development phase of the safety belt, right its type approval through the relative approval authorities, according to the ECE and SAE J386 standards for the M-N-L-QUADRICYCLE-TRICYCLE-SPECIAL VEHICLES,  according to the FIA standard for the racing sector and to the NATO standards for military vehicles. 
Over the years, the production potential has risen steadily up, to where it is now reaching a current level of over  1 million pieces per year.Thanks to our flexible structure we are the best business partners for satisfying the most diverse small or large business needs.

Name: Lazer Star Lights
Description:
Mission Statement – Lazer Star is constantly innovating and looking into the future of lighting technology and trends. Striving to always stay ahead of the curve for today's enthusiasts are taking advantage of LED innovations to create products offered by Lazer Star, with the strong advantages of LED light bar technology Lazer Star feature our LX LED, a full and extensive line of high tech, quality products designed to support that advance in technology. PreRunner LED is our newest line that offers affordable LED options from a trusted Brand.  Lazer Star customers are confident in knowing they have chosen a proven company and product to light their way into the future.

We are know by our flagship brand Lazer Star Lights however our corporate name is Weekend Concepts, Inc. Lazer Star pioneered billet lighting systems with the introduction of the Lazer Star "Bullet" Billet Light in 1993. Our goal is to design and produce, attractive, functional lighting systems for motorcycles of all types, along with UTV's/Side-by-Sides, ATV's, Sand Rails, Jeeps, Tractors, and now our own line of Night Harvesting equipment. 

A look back:
In November 1992, owner and founder Pat Scott came upon a projector type lamp that he knew would work on sand rails. The lamp was put in a crude fixture and tie-wrapped to the front of a sand rail for testing. The lamp performed beyond expectations. Shortly after the first testing sessions, Pat utilized his successful CNC business, NCDI to design what is now known as the Bullet style. The project and its popularity quickly grew, putting Lazer Star on the map with sand car enthusiasts, and beyond.
In 2003, our 10th Anniversary, Weekend Concepts was spun off from NCDI. Lazer Star is currently owned and operated by the Scott Family. We are excited for our 29th year in 2022 at our state-of-the-art facility in Paso Robles, CA.

Description:

Our vertically integrated manufacturing facilities and innovative approach give us the flexibility to deliver the right solution.

Established for 30 years in the automotive sector AcuZorb is a fully sealed product range performing an acoustic absorption and transmission loss function, designed for use in wet under bonnet and under chassis areas.To compliment AcuZorb, continuous innovation has led to our class leading AcuLite product (e.g. E30F, E45F) range employed extensively throughout the automotive industry as a light weight interior trim acoustic absorption medium.
