Name: Alpina Raggi S.p.A.
Description:
Since 1926, Alpina has been crafting high-performance spokes and nipples for bicycles and motorcycles, fully designed and made in Italy. With nearly 100 years of heritage, patented technologies and unique craftsmanship, we partner with leading OEMs and professional racing teams worldwide to shape the future of two-wheel mobility. 

Founded in Italy in 1926, Alpina represents 100 years of continuous production dedicated exclusively to bicycles and motorcycles. From our origins as a family-owned company to our role as a global supplier, we have built our reputation on precision, reliability and innovation. 

Our legacy blends Italian craftsmanship, advanced engineering and patented innovation, including pioneering motorcycle tubeless spoked wheel technology, which set new standards for performance, safety and durability. Every spoke and nipple is entirely designed, engineered and manufactured in Italy, with complete in-house control of materials, processes and quality standards. 

This integrated approach allows us to deliver tailor-made solutions, co-engineering projects and uncompromising performance to our clients. 

Green energy: the electricity we use, the main energy source of our production processes, comes entirely from renewable energy sources. 

Guided by a century of experience and a forward-looking mindset, Alpina is committed to: 

Innovation rooted in tradition 
Long-term partnerships and technical excellence 
Customer-focused engineering solutions 
Responsible and sustainable manufacturing practices 
As we approach our centenary milestone in 2026, our mission remains unchanged: 
to elevate the riding experience through wheel components crafted with Italian mastery, precision and passion. 

One century of Italian mastery in spoked wheel components.

Name: Leva s.p.a.
Description:
Fondata a Torino negli anni ’50, Leva S.p.A. è da sempre specializzata nella lavorazione di Vera Pelle, finta pelle vinilica e poliuretanica, tessuti e reti per i vari settori merceologici.

Negli anni ‘80, grazie anche alla sua strategica localizzazione in uno dei poli automotive più importanti a livello mondiale, Leva S.p.A. entra nel settore dell’automotive interiors specializzandosi nella progettazione e realizzazione di componenti/sistemi più complessi attraverso processi di tessitura, taglio/fustellatura, cucitura e incollaggio/sellatura conquistando nel tempo la fiducia delle principali case automobilistiche.

Ad oggi, si possono ulteriormente aggiungere i processi di saldatura, tessitura, incollaggio, stampaggio ad iniezione e termoformatura finalizzato a verticalizzare l’intera filiera produttiva allo scopo di raggiungere una maggior competitività sui mercati.

Competenza, affidabilità, ingegnerizzazione dei processi, efficienza, flessibilità, estrema cura per ogni dettaglio di lavorazione, visione globale, capacità di innovare, investendo costantemente nella ricerca e sviluppo di soluzioni e tecnologie all’avanguardia, sono i fattori chiave che consentono a Leva S.p.A. di perseguire, spesso anticipando, le tendenze del mercato.

Name: Nifco Korea Inc.
Description:
Start of a challenge
Nifco Korea Inc. was established in 1985 when the Korean economy has dramatically grown: in 1980s, the automobile and electric/electronic industries were emerged as a new driving force for the development of Korean economy as well as production efficiency was prioritized formass production. At that time, we became conscious of minimizing input components into assembly line, proactively developing the products that met the customers’ demands. In particular, the fasteners manufactured with the creative manufacturing knowhow based on the features of plastics that were light-weighted, non-corrosive, and available in precise process drove to simplify manufacturing process and cut costs in the automobile and home appliance industries, largely having contributed to improving production efficiency. As such, the products made with our Fastening Idea were a starting point of quiet revolution in a hidden place in the industry.
Growth and development
In line with the foundation, the company first released the fastener products in Korea, which was followed by the establishment of the differentiated product lines in 1990s such as dampers, latches, and hinges – the functional motion control product – and buckles and adjusters reliable in an extreme environment – the products for outdoor, sports, and fashion, and by the focus on the automobile industry in 2000s developing high-quality built-in parts such as air vents, cockpits, consoles, and facia and supplying next-generation washer systems, etc. cultivating the specialty as an automotive parts manufacturer. In 2010s, the company has expanded its business into high-quality engine and fuel system parts as well as parts for Electric Vehicle and established overseas corporations in major regions around the world, securing the comparable capability as a global manufacturer.

● Soldadura: Es realizada por aportación y resistencia.

● Tratamiento del acabado: en Turnimat S.A. ofrecemos un sistema integral a nuestros clientes. Gestionamos todo el proceso de fabricación del producto, desde la materia prima, producción, montaje, acabado (cincado, cromado, fosfatado, etc), tratamiento térmico, verificación y, por último, la entrega de la pieza terminada.


Turnimat S.A. is a manufacturer of custom-made machined metal parts:

● Precision turned parts: we take care of shaping each one of the parts through a process of machining parts by chip removal.

● Bending and pressing of metal parts: we have modern machinery, made up of 4 presses, which allow us to shape the parts that we manufacture at Turnimat S.A.

● Welding: It is carried out by contribution and resistance.

● Finishing treatment: at Turnimat S.A. We offer a comprehensive system to our customers. Name: TBLOCKER
Description:
A Tblocker nasceu de uma preocupação no mercado de transporte: as tecnologias disponíveis estavam ultrapassadas, o que facilitava o roubo de cargas e deixava todo o setor vulnerável. Diante desse cenário, os fundadores idealizaram uma solução capaz de elevar o nível de segurança e criar uma nova barreira de proteção.

Assim surgiu um dispositivo inovador, desenvolvido para impedir que criminosos acessem o bloco do motor e comprometam a principal tecnologia de rastreamento do veículo.

Além de reforçar a segurança, a Tblocker trouxe também mais transparência para a gestão. Antes, não havia clareza sobre quando e por quem o caminhão era basculado. Agora, esse processo só pode ocorrer mediante autorização da central, garantindo total controle e confiança.

Name: Metro Tow Trucks
Description:
Originally, it was Mr. Wehbe's intention to simply import wreckers from China. These plans failed very quickly when the quality of the top Chinese wrecker manufacturers fell far short of the quality expected in North America and Europe. His only option was to bring manufacturing to China himself. 

Why build tow trucks? 

Mr. Wehbe has been an owner and operator of one of the largest fleets of tow trucks in Canada for more than 36 years. He and his family know tow trucks inside and out. 

When you buy a Metro Tow Trucks wrecker from Metro in Canada or Wehbe Heavy Industry in China, you are buying a product from an actually experienced operator who has a genuine love for the industry. Wehbe Heavy Industry controls every aspect of the manufacturing process. 

We start with our own 3d drawings in Solidworks. These drawings are reviewed, revised, and tested for structural strength using ANSYS finite element analysis. Eventually, drawings are sent to the factory floor for CNC cutting, CNC machining, bending, welding, and assembly. Wreckers are sent out by shipping containers as kits or in roll-on roll-off boats as fully installed units. Chassis are available from North America, Europe, Japan, or China. 

We rely as little as possible on other manufacturers. Anything that we can make in-house is made by us. This allows us to control our quality. Our QC department inspects every single product during every stage of the production and tests completed units before shipping.

Name: Asociación Española de Neumáticos Reciclados
Description:
La Asociación Española de Neumáticos Reciclados (AER) es la entidad de referencia en España que agrupa a las principales empresas del sector del neumático reciclado, incluyendo fabricantes, distribuidores, talleres, gestores y transformadores. Nuestra misión es representar, defender y promover los intereses del sector a nivel nacional e internacional, contribuyendo a una economía más circular, sostenible y competitiva.

Desde la AER trabajamos activamente en la representación institucional del sector ante las Administraciones Públicas, organismos reguladores y entidades del ámbito medioambiental y empresarial, participando en el desarrollo normativo y en foros estratégicos que afectan directamente a nuestra actividad.

Ofrecemos un apoyo integral a nuestros asociados, facilitando información técnica y legal actualizada, asesoramiento personalizado, formación especializada, oportunidades de colaboración, visibilidad en medios y representación colectiva. Actuamos como plataforma de encuentro y cooperación, fomentando las buenas prácticas y la innovación en toda la cadena de valor del neumático reciclado.

Además, impulsamos campañas de comunicación y sensibilización sobre la importancia del uso responsable y sostenible del neumático reciclado, poniendo en valor su papel clave en la transición ecológica, la seguridad vial y la eficiencia de recursos.

En la AER creemos firmemente que el futuro del neumático pasa por la calidad, la seguridad y el compromiso ambiental. Por ello, seguimos trabajando para reforzar el prestigio del sector, garantizar condiciones de competencia justas y fortalecer la voz colectiva de nuestros profesionales y empresas.

GoChargeV continues investing and delivering new value through innovative technology in bi-directional charging, wireless charging, and smart energy management for sustainable development for future generations.

Our mission is simple: make it easy, efficient, and rewarding for suppliers to succeed in Sweden. We manage the full business journey – from first introductions and technical dialogues to long-term commercial relationships.

What sets us apart is our unique position as a trusted local partner. Our team of experienced sales and business development experts brings deep knowledge of OEM processes, requirements, and culture. We don’t just represent suppliers; we actively drive growth. By engaging in both commercial and technical discussions throughout the complete project lifecycle, we help suppliers secure business, build credibility, and establish lasting partnerships with OEMs.

Name: FHS Dynamics
Description:
FHS design and manufacture fluid transfer assemblies for high performance motorsport applications.

Solutions:
Flexible hose (swage and crimp)
Rigid hard-line (direct swage / crimped, formed ends, compression, and welded)
Hybrid (direct hose to hard-line)
Formed polymers
 
Applications / systems in low to high pressure:
Hydraulic
Cooling
Fuel (high pressure PTFE / stainless steel, lightweight silicone / aluminium & in tank ultra lightweight PEEK fuel systems)
Pneumatic systems
Filtration (standard and custom filters available from 3micron / ß2000 depth media to last chance stainless steel mesh)
Braking
Sealing
 
Industries supported:
Formula 1 
WRC
WEC
GT
Test rigs / dynos
Prototype mules
Low-volume niche vehicle
Robotics 

Manufacturing:
Machining within the FHS group as well as a wide network of specialist subcontractors who are used to our pace of work.
Hard-line NC bending ø2.8mm to ø10mm tube and CNC ø10mm to ø63mm tube. Customised tooling allowing us to offer small bend radii and minimal distance between bends.
 
Materials:
Aluminium
Stainless steel
Titanium
PEEK
PTFE
Polymers
 
Design
We offer full design support with our engineering team, from simple fittings or custom seals to complete systems. Through our varied experience over the years, we have come to pride ourselves on taking on challenging inquiries that often stretch boundaries, from tight packaging to hostile or extreme environments, and also delivering with compressed lead times often producing custom tools to facilitate non-standard designs.

Test / Inspection
Every assembly we produce must pass a pressure test, either hydrostatic or pneumatic. Components are 100% dimensionally inspected (contact & non-contact systems), visually inspected (optical & digital), and NDT is applied when required.

Quality
We are ISO9001 accredited. Quality is one of our core values, central to not only our processes but also the quality team are situated centrally within our factory.

* Instrument Cluster / Smart Cockpit: Delivering seamless digital cockpit experiences with high-resolution, customizable displays.

AutoSock was incorporated in 1998, and became a Fred Olsen company in 2001. We are based in the headquarter of Fred. Olsen & Co. in Oslo with additional locations in Spain and Germany.

Name: CELALİ DÖKÜM METALURJİ
Description:
CELALİ METALURJİ Sanayi 1994 yılında Konya Karatay Sanayisinde 130 m² bir yerde kurulmuştur.

Sürekli büyümeyi hedefleyen firmamız 2000 yılı itibariyle Konya Dökümcüler Sitesinde 1000 m2 kapalı alan ve 500 m² açık alanı, 1 adet 500 kg’ lık ve 1 adet 750 kg'lık indüksiyon ocağı, 500 ton/yıl kapasitesi ile üretim standartlarını her geçen gün Türkiye ekonomisine olan katkısını da artırmıştır.

2017 yılına gelindiğinde daha kapsamlı ve nitelikli ürün üretebilmek için Konsan Özel OSB’de 2000 m² kapalı toplam 3000 m² alana sahip yeni fabrikasında, hizmet portföyüne alaşımlı pik ve sfero döküm ekleyerek yıllık kapasitesini 1500 tona çıkarmıştır.

2018 yılının son çeyreğine gelindiğinde kendi bünyesinde AR-Ge çalışmalarına devam etmiş, ürünlerini laboratuvar ortamında kimyasal analiz, sertlik metalografi gibi testlere tabi tutarak kalite kontrole gösterdiği hassasiyetini ön plana çıkarmıştır. Ürün yelpazesini de genişleterek müşterilerine daha iyi hizmet sunabilmek 2000 tona kadar yükseltmeyi başarmıştır.

2023 yılının son çeyreğine gelindiğinde 25 yıl boyunca döküm işi ile uğraşan firmamiz, yeni bir yatırıma imza atmiş dökümü tamamlanan parçaların, fason olarak yaptırılan talaşli imalat işleminde

zaman ve kalite problemlerinin önüne geçilmesi adına talaşli imalatın kendi bünyemizde yapılması için çalışmalara start verilmiştir.

 

Döküm sektöründe yer alan kalite ve verimlilikte sürekli gelişim içinde olan insan ve çevre gibi evrensel değerlere saygılı dünya markası olmayı hedefleyen bir sanayi kuruluşudur.

Kalite politikası gereği; uzun yılların getirdiği bilgi ve birikimi gelecek nesillere aktarmayı, çağdaş yönetim ilkeleriyle bütünleştiren CELALİ METALURJİ sürdürülebilirlik ilkesiyle teknik gelişmeleri yakından takip eden tecrübeli dinamik kadrosuyla otomotiv, hidrolik,makine, gıda, inşaat, tarım gibi Türk sanayisinin birçok lokomotif sektörüne hizmet vermeye devam etmektedir.

Name: TECNOFOR s.r.l.
Description:
For over 30 years, TECNOFOR has been a reference in metalworking and in the production of precision mechanical components for the thermohydraulic and the automotive sectors, working with large national and international Tier One and OEMs. We work with aluminium and brass alloys, using advanced technologies such as HPDC, low pressure casting, shell casting, extrusion, and stamping.

Since 2018, we have strengthened the automotive department with a complete production process, from raw material selection to pre-shipment testing. In the thermohydraulic sector, we are a leading manufacturer of brass ball valves for industrial, food and petrochemical applications, with a production capacity of 120,000 balls per day in 3 shifts. Thanks to a high degree of customization, we realize tailor-made solutions for each customer.

Name: VENSIK ELECTRONICS
Description:
VENSIK ELECTRONICS stands as a premier manufacturer of interconnection components in Taiwan in the realm of mechatronics for global automotive and industrial markets, with market presence in field of :

EV Powering
EPS (Electric Power Steering)
USB Charging
E-compressor
ADAS (Advanced Driver Assistance System)
Air-conditioning
Closure Control
Lighting
Industrial Equipment & Consumer appliances

With headquarters in Taipei city of Taiwan, Vnesik deployed our 4 production plants also in northern Taiwan, with each of them producing different parts. This all-in-house production structure gains us the advantage to provide fully-integrated manufacturing capabilities that spans from tooling to assembling to make parts from concept to completion.

Over the years, we are dedicated to keep upgrading our overall operations in aspects of specialized expertise, manufacturing techniques, and company culture as well. This relentless pursuit of achieving excellence has earned us the trust and confidence among our automotive clients.

Name: Carbonmade
Description:
La volontà di investire costantemente nello sviluppo e nella ricerca ha consentito alla nostra azienda di intraprendere un lungo cammino, durato ormai quindici anni, nella progettazione e lavorazione della fibra di carbonio: un materiale realmente innovativo e tecnologico.
Particolari tecniche nella realizzazione di particolari strutturali, attraverso l'uso dei materiali compositi distribuiti ai maggiori clienti leader a livello mondiale, hanno portato Carbonmade s.r.l. a diversificare la propria gamma di prodotti con successo in diversi settori, acquisendo nuove tecniche costruttive ed una forte esperienza.
Grazie al suo team di progettazione interna specializzato da anni nella lavorazione della fibra di carbonio, Carbonmade è in grado di dare vita ad un'idea dalla bozza iniziale fino all'industrializzazione finale dell'oggetto. 
 Carbonmade realizza prodotti in fibra di carbonio per i seguenti settori: automobilismo, motociclismo, ciclismo, arredamento, design, nautica, aeronautica.

The desire to invest constantly in research and development has enabled Carbonmade s.r.l. to undertake a long way that lasted fifteen years, towards a truly innovative material and technology: the carbon fiber. 
Special techniques in the production of structural parts, trough the use of composite materials distributed to major customers worldwide leader, led the Carbonmade s.r.l. to diversify its product range with success in various areas, sometimes very specific, learning new construction techniques and a strong experience.
Due to its internal design team specialized for years in the processing of carbon fiber, Carbonmade is able to give life to an idea from initial draft to the final industrialization of the product.
Carbonmade works in the following fields: automotive, motorbikes, bikes, interior design, aviation, nautics and robotics.

Name: autoelectric of America, Inc.
Description: autoelectric of America, Inc., is a Business unit of Nexans autoelectric Group. Founded in 2001, autoelectric of America is an U.S. based Company headquartered in San Antonio, Texas. As one of the fasting growing wire harness manufacturing companies in the industry with operations in North America and Mexico, autoelectric of America has received Masters of Quality and Supplier of the year awards. Our drive is knowing that we have taken the responsibility to assembling reliable, high-quality Wire and Engine Harness products that keep the world moving in a safe, environmentally friendly way and will always remain focused on continuous improvement and industry leading process innovation.

Name: MEI Brakes
Description: MEI Brakes is a specialist Commercial Vehicle brake part manufacturer and distributor based in Sheffield, United Kingdom and  Chennai, India. We supply parts to OEM and Aftermarket customers.

Name: PEMEBLA S.L.
Description:
PEMEBLA es una empresa creada hace 30 años. Especialista en recambio original para vehículo asiático y distribuidor global de las marca de mecánica JAPANPARTS, WIX (Filtración), TYC (Espejos e Iluminación), BENDIX (Fricción) y VISTEON -VARROC (Iluminación de primer equipo).

PEMEBLA es una empresa joven, flexible que busca siempre adaptarse al cliente y ofrecerle un servicio rápido y de calidad.

Name: FIMPREMEC s.r.l
Description:
Le aree in cui principalmente la nostra realtà opera sono :

- costruzione di prototipi e componenti di alta precisone
- produzione conto terzi di piccole e medie serie
- industrializzazione del prodotto
- costruzione e progettazione di attrezzature di ogni tipo.

Capacità di lavorare qualsiasi tipologia di materiale 
Acciaio, Inconel, Alluminio, Inox, Titanio, Plastica, Ottone, Bronzo e Rame.

Il nostro Ufficio tecnico é in grado di ricevere Modelli 3D nei formati Catia, Iges, Step, Parasolid e di elaborarli per le lavorazioni avvalendosi di software CAD-CAM come Hypermill e Cimatron.

I nostri principali clienti operano nel settore RACING, AUTOMOTIVE, MOTORSPORT, AERONAUTICO, AEROSPAZIALE, BIOMEDICALE e MACCHINE AUTOMATICHE.

Name: ZLC North America, Inc.
Description: ZLC, founded in 1998, is a rapidly growing Global Automotive Supplier. ZLC North America began operations in 2008 servicing the North American OEM’s and Tier customers. ZLC designs, engineers, and manufactures Chassis & Suspension and Powertrain components (bushings, top mounts, isolators, engine mounts, etc.) for OEM’s and Tier 1 & 2 customers worldwide.

Name: May & Scofield
Description: Our business is electronics. More specifically, we develop and manufacture electronic systems to meet our customer's precise needs.  We have experience of working in the Automotive, Rail, Aerospace, Military, Electric/Hybrid Vehicles and Commercial Vehicle sectors. We can be your trusted Technology Partner and work with you to ensure your products are delivered on time, to budget and to the highest quality

Name: Sherpa Equipment Co.
Description: Sherpa Equipment Company is a Colorado-based manufacturer of modular roof racks and accessories. Founded in 2017, we are driven by the belief that if we can’t build something great, we shouldn’t build it at all. All our products are 100% made in the USA and built to last a lifetime.

Name: Design911
Description:
Design911 is renowned as a leading supplier of dedicated parts for Porsche enthusiasts, catering to a wide range of Porsche models. From the classic 356, 912, and iconic 911s to the cutting-edge Macan, Panamera, and the electric marvel, the Taycan, we've got you covered. 
Operating from strategically located distribution centers in both the United Kingdom and the Netherlands, we are well-equipped to meet your Porsche parts needs. We proudly hold the distinction of being the largest Porsche parts specialist serving garages, workshops, and body shops across the industry. 

Our extensive experience in the Porsche automotive sector is the cornerstone of our commitment to providing our customers with the latest information and comprehensive technical support. Your Porsche deserves the best, and at Design911, we ensure that you get nothing less.

Name: Max Advanced Brakes
Description:
Headquartered in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) Max Advanced Brakes is on a mission to make stopping power simple for consumers. We specialize in brake pads, rotors, and related accessories and have them manufactured to the highest quality of original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications. By investing in technology, our people, consumer education and customer service, we strive to make acquiring quality brake parts simple for customers. 

Established in 2010 with a vision to offer quality and extensively tested brake products, today we remain steadfast to that same vision. Over the years as our customers’ needs have grown, we have scaled and developed an extensive physical distribution presence in Canada and the USA to ensure we meet their demands for brakes in a timely and efficient manner.

Name: General Auto Parts
Description:
General Auto Parts Ltd est l'une des plus importantes compagnies de distribution et vente de pièces automobiles et de poids lourds a Abidjan. Elle a pu en très peu de temps grâce a sa gestion et son personnel a fournir l'ensemble des services requis par le marché, et ce en appliquant les meilleures techniques de ventes, de stockage et de livraison.

La compagnie a étendu son activité récemment avec la vente d'huile et de batterie allemandes et européennes de qualité supérieure, y compris des pneus de toutes tailles et modèles, en fonction de la demande du marché. 

General Auto Parts met a votre disposition un service garage de réparation moderne avec des équipements de dernière génération, nous prenons en charge vos véhicule pour tous type de réparation avec des conseils pratiques et vous propose un large panel de pièces de rechange automobile.
Elle a également ouvert un service d'entretien et de maintenance des pompes a injection diesel de tous type, avec l'utilisation des machines les plus neuves et développes du domaine.

E-Mail: info@general-ci.com

Name: Four Star Industries Pvt Ltd
Description:
Company Overview:
We have been leading Manufacturer and Tier -1 Supplier of Automobile Components, Agriculture Equipment Parts, Defense Vehicle Parts, Mining Equipment Parts, Passenger cars Parts used in Axles, Driveline, Gear Boxes, Brakes & Transmission Assembly since 1972. We are Supplying to our esteem customers of O.E.M. to Domestic & Export to Europe & USA through Tier-1 customer.  We are having total 4 manufacturing plants located in Mumbai & Pune based in Maharashtra, India. We are having extended scope of manufacturing the products with a fully equipped infrastructure for Production, Quality & Testing & for Supply chain. 

Our Products:-
Differential Spider & Cross, Axle & Shaft Nuts, Planet Bolts, Differential Pinion, Diff Case & Drive Flanges, Brake Pistons & Piston Cap, Planetary Pin & Drivers, Gear Wheels, Spring Brackets, Yoke, Housing, Sleeves & Spacers, King Pin, Planetary Pin, Piston Caps & Retainer Pads, Involute Spline Shafts, Axle Rings, Covers, Bush, Shock Absorber Pins, Brake Rotors, Brake Disc, Spider Gear Kit, Eye End, Eye Let, Axle Housing, End Yoke, Yoke Shaft, Drive Flanges, Companion Flanges, Axle Flanges, Diff case Housing, Axle Spindle, Spindle, Sleeves & Spacer.

Name: FONDALPRESS S.p.A.
Description:
Fondalpress Sp.A. is a leading Italian manufacturer of aluminium High Pressure Die-Casting parts,  machined and assembled. We supply  clients  belonging to: automotive, e-mobility, commercial and industrial vehicles, textile and electromechanical machinery, renewable energy and abrasives . 
We work in synergy to the projects of our clients and thanks to our long experience, we  develop and optimize castings to produce complex components and sub-assemblies: e-motors cover, inverter components, battery housing, clutch housing, transmission housing, differential cover, flanges, engine covers, oil and water pumps, chassis components, housings for different purposes .
We apply our know-how  to die-casting tooling and fixtures, cooperating with specialized suppliers, offering the best solutions on the market.
Fondalpress pays a rigorous attention to the quality of the castings,  it is certified ISO 9001:2015  and  IATF 16949:2016.
Our organization is actively engaged to reduce the environmental impact of our industrial activity.         Since 2006 Fondalpress  is certified ISO 14001 .

Name: BIMECC ENGINEERING SPA
Description:
BIMECC è ad oggi l’azienda di riferimento a livello mondiale nel settore delle viti e dadi after market per cerchi in lega, con sedi in Italia, Gran Bretagna e Stati Uniti.

La qualità delle viti è per noi una caratteristica imprescindibile, soprattutto perché garantisce la sicurezza delle auto e delle persone che esse trasportano.

La maggior parte degli automobilisti però non sa quanto sono importanti i nostri prodotti per garantire la loro sicurezza in auto.

Per far sì che scelgano accessori affidabili e di qualità come quelli Bimecc è necessario sensibilizzarli in tal senso. Per questo l'azienda ha attivato una strategia di comunicazione online basata anche sui principali Social Media.

In questa pagina, pubblicheremo informazioni, news e post che mettono in evidenza non solo la viteria e gli accessori Bimecc ma anche un'ampia gamma di tematiche relative alla sicurezza in auto.

Name: Oliva Torras Mount & Drive Kits
Description:
We specialize in auxiliary drive systems for the automotive sector, working since 2005 at the heart of the mechanisms that make it possible to maintain the cold chain in the transport of food and pharmaceuticals. We combine technical precision, operational reliability, and a service that is close, consistent, and designed to ensure continuity in our clients’ projects.
 
Our approach is built on five pillars:
Mount & Drive Relations, our commitment to precise solutions and solid industrial partnerships, supported by end to end service.
Always here, the constant presence and real availability that allow us to integrate into our clients’ value chain with continuous support.
Always ready, the technical and human preparedness that ensures agile, rigorous, and decisive responses, with a service that anticipates needs.
Driven together, a collaborative, synchronized way of working focused on shared goals, where service is an integral part of the process, not an add on.
Going further, the drive to go beyond expectations, contributing knowledge, flexibility, and innovation to support our clients’ technological evolution.
 
More than manufacturers, we are partners on the journey. Every kit we develop is a promise of reliability, and every relationship is a commitment to shared progress. Our service, consistent, close, and committed, is the engine that makes this way of moving forward together possible

Name: ITW Smart Components EU
Description: Wir sind einer der führenden Hersteller für Kunststoffkomponenten und Baugruppen im Automobilbereich und Teil der ITW Automotive Products GmbH.

Name: OFOLUX S.R.L.
Description:
OFOLUX is a family-owned company established 1974, leading in Design and Sustainable Manufacturing of Interiors and Lighting systems for public transport and commercial vehicles.
Thanks to the experience over the years, OFOLUX is able to carry out the projects at various stages:

*    Styling concept
*    Mechanical and Electronic engineering
*    Prototyping & Test
*    Manufacture and supply of high quality products
 
We are ready to support you with our know-how through all the steps of your projects.

Name: Annai Enterprises Private Limited
Description:
Annai Enterprises Private Limited (AEPL) 

Established in 1980 in Chennai, India, Annai Enterprises Private Limited (AEPL) is a leading manufacturer of automotive and engineering components. Serving both Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) and Tier 1/2 suppliers, AEPL has built a strong reputation for quality and innovation in the industry.  

Key Customers:  
AEPL’s commitment to excellence has enabled it to maintain long-standing relationships with prestigious customers, including:  
- Royal Enfield 
- Brakes India Group of Companies  
- Ather Energy  
- River Mobility
- Wipro Infrastructure Engineering  
- Ultraviolette Automotive  
- TI Clean Mobility
- Simple Energy  
- TIDC  
- Turbo Energy Ltd  
- INZI Controls India Ltd ..etc

Core Competence and Capabilities: 
AEPL specializes in machining technology and offers a diverse range of manufacturing operations, including:  
- Turning  
- Milling  
- Cylindrical, Surface, and Centreless Grinding  
- Hot and Cold Forging  
- Thread and Serration Rolling  
- Welding   
- Gun Drilling 
- Punching  
- Laser Engraving  

Additionally, AEPL has established strategic investments and partnerships for supplementary processes such as:  
- Heat Treatment    
- Specialized Plating and Coating  

Diverse Industrial Expertise: 
With extensive manufacturing capabilities and experience, AEPL serves a variety of industrial sectors, including:  
- Automotive  
- Hydraulic Segments  
- General Engineering Components  
- Home Appliances  
- Aerospace  
- Special and Sub-Assembly Components  
- E-Mobility  

Global Presence:
Approximately 25-30% of the components manufactured by AEPL are exported worldwide as part of complete vehicles or sub-assemblies.  

Future Outlook:
AEPL is committed to driving innovation, ensuring reliability, and maintaining agility in delivering superior products. With plans to expand into new industries and enhance its manufacturing services, AEPL aims to sustain its legacy of excellence.

Name: Motus Company
Description:
Kurulduğu 2003 yılından bugüne, kesintisiz olarak ” Yüksek Performans Paylaşılan Güç” sloganıyla sektöründe faaliyet gösteren MOTUS; güçlü altyapısı, gelişmiş makine parkı, yüksek kapasiteli üretimi, geniş ürün gamı, yetkin ve tecrübeli personeli ile ulusal ve uluslararası zeminde büyüyen bir markadır. MOTUS, sektöründe “kural koyan” uluslararası bir marka olmayı hedef olarak benimsemiştir.


Ürünlerinde yüksek kaliteli küresel grafitli dökme demir kullanan MOTUS, uzman metalürji mühendislerinin çalışmaları sonucu ülkemizde ilk kez uygulanan ileri teknoloji ile standart ölçü toleransları içinde dünya standartlarında kaliteli dökme demir krank mili üretmeyi başarmıştır.


MOTUS, Avrupa’dan ithal ederek üretim hattına dâhil ettiği tam otomatik CNC taşlama tezgâhları (robot) sayesinde, çok düşük hata oranında (%0,1) üretim yaparak kalitesini daha da artırmıştır.


Üretimine ağır vasıta, iş makinesi ve ağır sanayi motorlarına uygun krank milleri ile başlayan MOTUS, binek ve ticari araç motorlarına yönelik krank millerini de ürün yelpazesine eklemiştir.


12 000 m2 kapak alana sahip tesislerinde krank mili üreten ve üretiminin yaklaşık %40’ını ihraç eden MOTUS, 15’i Avrupa Birliği üyesi olmak üzere, toplam 50 ülkeye ihracat yapmaktadır.


Standartların üstünde yüksek kaliteli krank milleri üretmek amacıyla sürekli yenilikçi teknolojileri takip eden ve kullanan MOTUS’un ana hedefi müşterileri ve bayileri ile karşılıklı güvene dayak işbirliğini sürdürülebilir kılmaktır. Bu amaçla İstanbul, İzmir, Ankara, Adana ve Konya bölgelerinde, müşterilerinin teknik destek taleplerini karşılamak üzere donanımlı SSH ekibi bulundurmaktadır.

Name: STP Autoparts
Description: For over 70 years, and for more miles than anyone can count, STP has been one of the most trusted names in automotive care. STP, an esteemed American brand now under the umbrella of Energizer Holdings was established by three racing enthusiasts driven by a passion for speed and durability.

Name: Expert Racing Parts
Description:
Expert Racing Parts was born inside the track!

Much before becoming the company we are today, we used to produce high performance parts for our own race cars and some friends that believed in our expertise. But the news was spread: pure quality, high technology, low costs for consumers and absolutely amazing results!

EXPERT RACING PARTS is a company specialized in manufacturing high quality performance parts such as pulleys, main caps, throttle bodies, carters, dry sumps, oil and fuel tanks, intake manifolds, exhaust manifolds, cam gears, tensioners, hubs, main girdles, flywheels, valve covers, among other products.

Beyond producing parts for high performance cars, we also have parts for enthusiasts that wish to have the same quality and technology in their rides with our special product line called Street!

We are also known as a great provider of solutions when customers need special projects and have no partner with our knowledge to build such dream. Yes! We can help you to develop the parts you dream for your car! And it doesn’t matter if it is a drag racing car or a street one! We’ll do it!

See more at:

www.expertracingparts.com.br
www.facebook.com/expertracing/

Contact us:

sales@expertracingparts.com.br

Name: Master Metal Sanayi Tic.Ltd.Şti
Description: Otomotiv Sanayisi başta olmak üzere imalat sektörü için, sac kalıpları (progresif&tandem) tasarım ve üretimi, mekanik ve hidrolik preslerde sac parça imalatı, Rollform makina tasarım,imalat,devreye alma,satış sonrası teknik servis desteği, Rollform Proses sac parça imalatı konularında IATF 16949 kalite yönetmeliğine bağlı çalışmalarımızı sürdürmekteyiz.

Name: AGC Automotive Replacement Glass Europe
Description:
AGC Automotive Replacement Glass Europe (ARG) distributes automotive glazing and related products to spare part dealers, wholesalers and fitting chains, carrying the AGC and NordGlass brands.

ARG uses its Original Equipment expertise to design and manufacture glazing for the replacement market that meets the same high specifications as original products. This applies also to the latest ADAS (Advanced Driver Assistance Systems) windshields.

ARG is part of the AGC Group, headquartered in Tokyo and a leading supplier of flat, automotive and display glass, chemicals and other high-tech materials and components. The group is represented in over 30 countries with regional pillars in Japan/Asia, Europe and the Americas.

Name: Microfinish
Description:
South African component manufacturer, supplying OE products to the global market. 

OE customers: Porsche, MTU, Perkins, Volvo, MAN, Scania, Toyota SA
99% export sales
IATF16949:2016 ISO9001:2015 BBBEE level 1

Name: Nakata UK
Description:
Nakata is a market leader for automotive components that excel in quality and performance and deliver peace of mind.

As a renowned manufacturer of aftermarket parts for passenger and commercial vehicles in Brazil, Nakata products cover a variety of categories including suspension, transmission, and steering components.

Name: Rossi Ricambi SRL
Description:
Distributore pluri-regionale di ricambi automotive per automezzi industriali e commerciali. 
Competenze specifiche relative al rimorchio e al semirimorchio.

Name: GROUPAUTO Southern Africa
Description: We are part of a global Automotive Aftermarket network responsible for region Southern African Development Community (SADC).

Name: Groupe Qualipièces
Description:
Groupe Qualipièces est une entreprise qui conçoit, fabrique et distribue des accessoires de très haute qualité pour les véhicules hors route. 

Groupe Qualipièces se divise en trois entreprises distinctes: 
- Tout d’abord, on retrouve Qualipièces qui se spécialise dans la fabrication et distribution d’accessoires pour les motoneiges de sentiers. 
- Les accessoires pour les motoneiges hors-pistes se retrouvent quant à elles sous la bannière B-PWR, qui saura offrir des produits de qualité inégalée pour tous les mordus d’adrénaline.
- Finalement, on retrouve ASIO evo qui révolutionne complètement l’univers des systèmes d’éclairage pour véhicules hors-route en  proposant des barres d’éclairage intelligentes à DEL.

Name: Ready Parts Egypt
Description:
Ready Parts: Elevating Egypt's Aftermarket Landscape

In a market shaped by rapid change and growing expectations, Ready Parts has solidified its position as a key player in Egypt’s independent aftermarket. Established in 2016 under the umbrella of GB Auto Group—now rebranded as GB Corp—Ready Parts brings a professional, data-driven approach to spare parts distribution and retail.

Name: GREAT AUTO PARTS(GAP) Industrial - Heavy duty suspension control arm and ball joints
Description:
Great Auto Parts specializes in the development and production of three main categories: Chassis Parts CNC Machining, Ball Studs/Pillow Ball Production, and assembled components such as Tie Rod Ends, Rack Ends, Ball Joints, and Stabilizer Links. We are dedicated to manufacturing customized products in both large and small quantities, catering to renowned chassis part manufacturers in Taiwan and globally.
Our primary customers are two of the largest manufacturers of automotive aftermarket products for the international market. Our assembled parts, including Tie Rod Ends, Rack Ends/Axial Rods, Ball Joints, and Stabilizer Links, are developed from OEM samples and adhere to American standards SAE J490, J491, and the quality standards of the German automotive aftermarket. We currently offer models for European, American, Japanese, and Korean vehicles.
With a product range covering over 2,500 different parts and an annual addition of 120 more, Great Auto Parts serves as a major supplier to two of the largest aftermarket product distributors in North America, as well as one of the largest retail stores in the USA.

Name: HASEL Teknik Ahşap
Description:
Hasel Teknik Ahşap İnşaat Otomotiv Sanayi ve Ticaret Ltd. Şti. 2003 yılında Düzce’de kurulmuştur. 2500 m2 kapalı üretim alanı 800 m2 idari bina ve 5000 m2 açık alana sahip olan firmamızda Hammadde Deposu, Ahşap Makine Parkuru, Presleme Bölgesi, Boyahane Ünitesi, Kalıphane ve Sevkiyat Bölgesi bulunmaktadır.
Sürekli gelişim ilkesiyle her geçen gün yenilenen, müşteri memnuniyetini esas alan üretim anlayışımızla dünyanın en büyük şirketlerinden biri olan Mercedes Benz Türk AŞ‘nin tedarikçisi olarak başladığımız yolda bugün içlerinde Otokar A.Ş, Ototrim, Gummi-Welz, TM Teknik  ve Tüvasaş' ın da bulunduğu birçok firmaya yan sanayi olarak hizmet vermekteyiz.

Firmamız 2015 yılı içerisinde yeni bir oluşumla PUR-TEKNİK adı altında ortak olarak kurulan poliüretan tesisi ile PUR sektörüne adım atmış ve alt tedarikçisi olarak PUR ürünleri HASEL güvencesi ile müşterilerine hizmet vermek için gelişme yolunda emin adımlarla ilerlemektedir. 

Üretim sürecimizin başlangıcından sevkiyat sonuna kadar olan tüm süreçlerde kalitenin HASEL TEKNİK AHŞAP ’ın ayrılmaz bir bütünü olduğunu UNITED REGISTRAR OF SYSTEMS ( URS ) sertifikasyon merkezinden aldığımız ISO/TS 16949:2009  / ISO 9001:2008 ve ISO 14001:2004 sertifikaları ile belgelemekteyiz.
Bununla birlikte HASEL ve HASEL ürünlerinden etkilenen topluluğun süreçler boyunca güvenlik, çevre ve sağlık koşullarına uyulmasını sağlamayı asli görevlerimizden biliriz. Bütün bu çalışmalarımız deneyimli ve bilinçli kadromuz sayesinde geleceğe güvenli adımlarla taşınacaktır.

Name: Gradient Machinery India Pvt Ltd
Description:
Gradient Machinery India Pvt Ltd has two segments of businesses :
1. Market leader in sales and service of Gear manufacturing related machines viz Gear Hobbing, Shaping, Shaving and Gear teeth Grinding. These machines are manufactured by M/s Nanjing Machine Tools, China, a Chinese government owned company.

2. In house facilities  of manufacturing fully finished Gears and Shafts including forgings and gear teeth Grinding machine for Automobile and Farm sectors.

Name: Tekay Automotive
Description:
TEKAY is a global brand in the automotive supply industry that combines 70 years of manufacturing experience with the dynamic and innovative spirit of its own team and reflects its self-confidence to its customers with high quality products and services.

TEKAY was founded in 1955 in a 100 square meters workshop in Bayrampasa, Istanbul. Today, production continues in Istanbul- Kırac Industrial Zone in a 12,000 square meters production facility with a professional team of +85 people, meeting the needs of the OEM, OES and IAM with high quality, speed and flexibility.

TEKAY is one of  the world’s leading manufacturers of mechanical & air suspension U-Bolts and Leaf Spring Bushes and also a supplier for various leaf spring accessories.

TEKAY also provides Heat Treatment, Cold drawing, Bar Peeling & Straightening, Decoiling, Length Cutting and Annealing services according to customers requirements in its own workshops.

Tekay’s product range is used in light commercial vehicles, buses, trucks and trailers in the automotive industry. The products also cater to the spare parts and fasteners industry as well as the leaf spring and axle manufacturers.

TEKAY, the “A” Grade supplier of the well-known truck manufacturers in the world, has FORD Q1, IATF 16949 and ISO 9001 Quality Management System and ISO 14001 Environmental Management System certificates.

TEKAY exports about 75% of its production to more than 50 countries, especially to Europe.

TEKAY continues to satisfy the needs and expectations of its customers on time with its high quality products and flexible production processes. Adopting continuous improvement as a waf of life, TEKAY puts all its effort into carrying the trust it created to the future.

Since 1955, proceed with confidence…

Name: GOTEC Brake Disc Coatings
Description:
Gotec Brake Disc Coatings bietet als Experte für die serielle Hartstoffbeschichtung für Bremsscheiben die gesamte Prozesskette als Dienstleistung an: 
Von der Beratung bei der Auswahl des perfekten Schichtsystems für Ihren Anwendungsfall über die Fertigung von Prototypen für die unterschiedlichsten Versuchsaufbauten bis hin zur hochautomatisierten Serienproduktion sind wir für Sie da. Wir sind ihr Partner von der Entwicklung bis zum End-of Line Ihrer Bremsscheibenproduktion. Mit der innovativen und umweltschonenden Hartstoffbeschichtung für Bremsscheiben haben wir ein revolutionäres Verfahren industrialisiert, welches nicht nur die Feinstaubemissionen deutlich verringert, sondern eine langlebige Produktqualität gewährleistet. Gleichzeitig bieten diese verschleißarmen Bremssysteme Leichtbaupotentiale: Durch das deutliche Reduzieren von Verschleißaufmaßen, eine optimierte Wärmeabfuhr sowie reduzierte ungedämpfte Massen können Gewichtsersparnisse von ca. 20-25% erzielt werden.
 
Gotec Brake Disc Coatings ist ein Tochterunternehmen der GOTEC Group. Die GOTEC Gruppe ist der weltweit führende Spezialist für die Beschichtung mit Gummi-Metall-Haftvermittlern sowie für Oberflächenveredelung von kompletten Baugruppen, Rohrabschnitten, Tiefzieh-, Stanz-Biege- und Kunststoffteilen sowie Aluminiumrohren und Hülsen.

Description:
oToBrite Electronics, Inc. is dedicated to developing driver safety system products and artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. With a vision to provide innovative and world-leading vehicle imaging system and advanced driver assistance system (ADAS), oToBrite strives to make driving simpler and safer, and to contribute to the development of automated driving technology.

Established in February 2013, oToBrite bases its R&D and production in Taiwan. The company’s core team members have years of experience in the development of image processing technologies, and proven track record in the manufacturing of automotive products for the original equipment market. oToBrite has targeted the original equipment market since its establishment, and has won collaboration from brand automakers with reliable and customized products.

Given that ADAS products are intricate and highly integrated, oToBrite capitalizes outstanding R&D talents and a comprehensive supply chain (such as automotive lenses, cable, casting, mold, PCB, SMT, etc.) in Taiwan to create innovative and high-quality products. The company also develops its own manufacturing facilities, which not only fabricate customized and high-quality products, but also set entry barriers against competitors.

oToBrite’s products have been adopted by several auto companies. We started shipments of smart camers to China in 2016, and began volume production of ADAS products for auto companies in 2017. In the future, the company will continue to make the best efforts to form long-term partnerships with clients, and to pursue customer satisfaction by developing advanced technology and providing high-quality and value-added products and services.

Name: Seristudio S.p.A.
Description: Seristudio is a modern and innovative company specializing in high-quality decorations for automotive components. Painting and decoration processes involve technical skills and exclusive technologies. Over the years, the company has developed these skills, and today we design, manufacture, and control the most efficient painting systems for flexible productions of the highest quality. Seristudio’s next-generation systems meet even the most demanding customer requests, in compliance with the most stringent applicable international standards (ISO/TS 16949 and ISO 9001). The painting, pad printing, and laser engraving processes are ideal for treating small- and medium-sized components. Our qualified and flexible people make it possible for Seristudio to manufacture over 35 million components every year. Moreover, our painting processes allow us to avoid polluting surface treatments. In fact, we have always worked hard to be in line with the European environmental and energy policies that car manufacturers follow. Our know-how has also allowed us to develop a high engineering level and meet an incredible production rate.

Name: Top Part Motor Factors
Description:
Top Part is Ireland’s leading Motor Factor Group with 20 stores spread across the country and an extensive workforce servicing thousands of trade and retail customers.

Over the past 40 years we at Top Part have grown beyond providing car parts and have evolved to offering an extensive range of services that are required to run a modern professional auto service and repair centre. While our car parts offering has expanded in brand choice and quality, and are still core to our business, today’s car requirements extend beyond a general oil and filter change, a visual check and the odd replacement part.  With over a hundred different oil variations, oil selection alone requires access to vital information and having the correct specific oil recommended by the car manufacturer being available. Diagnostic assessment requiring specific hardware and software is becoming the norm and we now offer both along with the skilled training required for successful operation.  Along with all the traditional motor factor offerings, we now provide an extensive range of tools, garage and workshop equipment ranging from lifts, compressors, oil and fluid handling equipment, tyre changers and valeting equipment. As we move towards hybrid and electric cars and assistive driving, the offering from the service providers has to evolve and change to keep pace. Top Part is to the fore in choice, quality, service, training and on-going support. At Top Part we also provide finance and insurance to complement the purchase of tools, garage equipment and diagnostics.

Name: Drivelock | Alcoholímetro antiarranque inalámbrico
Description:
El alcoholímetro antiarranque inalámbrico de Drivelock es una solución clave para el sector del transporte, proporcionando un plus de seguridad en las rutas y protegiendo tanto a conductores como a empresas. 

Este dispositivo no solo ayuda a prevenir accidentes, sino que también cumple con la normativa vigente, ya que desde julio de 2022, la habilitación de los vehículos para su instalación es obligatoria en empresas dedicadas al transporte profesional.

¿Qué te proponemos?

• Un sistema 100% inalámbrico que no requiere cables ni conexiones físicas.

• Una instalación sencilla: Se instala fácilmente sin modificaciones ni alteraciones en los vehículos.

• Dispositivo de tamaño reducido: Su diseño compacto se adapta a cualquier tipo de vehículo.

• Libre personalización: Permite configurar usuarios y vehículos según las necesidades específicas de cada empresa.

Con Drivelock, puedes garantizar la seguridad de tu ruta y asegurar una conducción responsable, cumpliendo con los estándares más altos de seguridad vial.

-	Zamak Injection

-	Surface and Heat Treatments
-	Components Assembly
-	Chrome Plating
With over 40 new projects per year, 85% of our current turnover has its origins in our past R+D projects.
Grupo Cropu is a family-owned company, located in Burgos (Spain) that was founded in 1975 by José María Basconcillos. Since 2020, it is led by his daughter, María José Basconcillos.

CONFIAMOS en nuestro propósito, vivimos cada proyecto con la energía de quienes son APASIONADOS, pensamos y actuamos como verdaderos FUNDADORES y asumimos cada reto con total COMPROMISO. Estos valores, unidos al TALENTO de nuestros empleados, son el motor que nos impulsa a innovar, crecer y entregar un servicio extraordinario, personalizado y emocionalmente significativo, generando un impacto positivo en cada uno de nuestros clientes y aliados.

Nuestra mirada está puesta en seguir transformando la movilidad y la industria con soluciones sostenibles, confiables y de alto desempeño, siempre al servicio del desarrollo de nuestro país, del mundo y de las nuevas generaciones.

    2. Team-Oriented Culture: Embracing a participatory team spirit, we've evolved from a family business culture to a cohesive corporate entity. Our success is rooted in fostering teamwork and solidarity among our dedicated employees.

    4. Commitment to Quality Management: Our Quality Management System acts as our guide in achieving our goals. We ensure its effectiveness and continuity through continuous improvement initiatives and necessary QMS training for our personnel.

Join us in our pursuit of excellence in friction technology and quality-driven services! Discover how Aydınonat Friction Products is revolutionizing reliability and precision in the global market.

Name: SCC Worldwide Ltd
Description:
Founded by Managing Director Joe Stewart in 1981, SCC Worldwide has been supplying the automotive industry with their brands Xvision and Xdriven for over forty years.  From humble beginnings selling stripes and wheel trims from the back of an estate car, the company is now one of the leading suppliers of proximity sensors to the car and van aftermarket both in the UK and across Europe, supplying companies such as Ford, Stellantis and Jaguar as their aftermarket system of choice.  

The last decade in particular has seen real growth for SCC, due in no small part to their work in the commercial vehicles sector, coupled with the addition of in-house Research & Development and production facilities, as these have allowed the company to further develop its existing products, as well as generate brand new products utilising IT to its full potential.  Using innovation and state-of-the-art technology, SCC’s R&D Division has well and truly brought vehicle safety systems into the 21st century through the development of its unique X-Wire technology.

Name: JVD Performance | Heico Australia
Description:
JVD Performance (Heico Australia) is a dedicated performance parts company focused exclusively on Volvo vehicles, now expanding to serve a global community of enthusiasts.

Formerly known as Heico Sportiv Oceania (2015–2025), we’ve rebranded and built an independent identity rooted in premium quality, aggressive styling, and deep technical understanding of the Volvo platform. Our mission is to push the boundaries of what these cars can be—on the street, the track, and beyond.

We offer a growing product line including custom alloy wheels, coilover and suspension kits, valved and non-valved exhaust systems, ECU tuning solutions, aero components, and select OEM and aftermarket service parts. Every item is tested and curated to ensure perfect fitment and real performance gains across a range of Volvo models, from classic five-cylinder builds to the latest SPA and CMA platforms.

With in-house mechanical capabilities, a dedicated team of Volvo specialists, and years of experience working exclusively with the brand, JVD Performance brings credibility and precision to the aftermarket space. We work with both retail and trade customers, offering made-to-order solutions and platform-specific parts that are often unavailable through larger suppliers.

Our background includes full builds, performance restorations, and supply partnerships with leading manufacturers in the suspension, tuning, and exhaust industries. We also operate a used vehicle division and continue to support a growing base of loyal Volvo owners.

JVD Performance represents the next generation of Volvo tuning—built on experience, engineered for performance, and driven by passion.

Name: AROS EXHAUST SYSTEM
Description:
Welcome to AROS EXHAUST SYSTEM, your premier destination for high-performance automotive and aerospace exhaust solutions. With a legacy dating back to 2005, we have established ourselves as pioneers in crafting exhaust systems that enhance both the performance and sound of vehicles, aircraft, and marine vessels, catering exclusively to the needs of businesses worldwide.
At AROS, we take pride in our commitment to excellence, evident through our rigorous adherence to industry-leading standards. We are proud holders of the ISO 9001:2015 certification, a testament to our unwavering dedication to quality management systems. Our adherence to this standard ensures that every aspect of our operations is meticulously structured and rigorously controlled, guaranteeing the utmost precision and reliability in every product we deliver.

Our range of exhaust systems is meticulously engineered using premium materials such as AISI304, titanium, and inconel625, ensuring not only optimal performance enhancements but also durability and longevity. 

AROS proudly collaborates with businesses across diverse industries, including aerospace, construction, and maritime sectors; from aircraft and helicopters to excavators, trucks, and boats. 

As we embark on our journey to expand our global footprint, we extend a warm invitation to businesses worldwide to explore the possibilities of partnership with AROS EXHAUST SYSTEM. Whether you seek to enhance the performance capabilities of your fleet, aircraft, or marine vessels, we stand ready to collaborate, innovate, and exceed expectations.

Discover the power of partnership with AROS EXHAUST SYSTEM, where precision meets performance, and excellence knows no bounds.

Name: Private Label MFG
Description:
Private Label Mfg (PLM) is the leading manufacturer of high-performance aftermarket automotive parts for Honda, Subaru, and other popular JDM and European vehicles. Founded in 2005, we have become a trusted leader in the design, engineering, and manufacturing of aftermarket automotive performance parts.

Headquartered in South San Francisco, California,  we've dedicated nearly two decades to helping thousands of customers maximize their vehicle performance without breaking the bank.

As an aftermarket auto parts store, we develop, manufacture, and supply some of the highest-quality performance parts, including car performance parts, engine upgrades, and more accessories for cars. We deliver top-quality, performance car parts with patented designs, expert engineers, and award-winning innovation.  Our in-house product designer, Mason Martinez, holds multiple design patents, showcasing our innovation in performance engineering.

We are proud to have been ranked #655 in the Inc. 5000 fastest-growing companies list in 2010.
 With nearly two decades of experience and a team of die-hard car enthusiasts behind every product, we've helped thousands of customers maximize their car's performance. 

Everyone at PLM—from the founders to the factory floor—lives and breathes cars. If a product isn't good enough for our own vehicles, we don't ship it.

Our mission is to provide car enthusiasts with the best performance-per-dollar parts in the market - ensuring quality, value, and reliability in every product.

Our vision is to empower 10 million car owners to unlock the full potential of their vehicles through high-performance, affordable parts.

Name: ASP Seat
Description:
ASP Seat specialises in the engineering and manufacture of bespoke race seating used across the world’s top motorsport programmes. We support teams and drivers competing in WEC, F2, F3, GT, WRC, Asian Le Mans, and leading junior categories.

Our product range is built around a structured three-level system designed to match every performance and comfort requirement:

• Level 1 – Bead Seats
Custom-moulded for immediate fit, providing a fast, precise and fully personalised seating solution.

• Level 2 – Lightweight Seats
Engineered using advanced composite and CAD-refined surfaces to reduce mass, improve ergonomics and deliver a fully optimised final seat.

• Level 3 – Cooling Seats
Our premium solution, integrating patented cooling technology to manage thermal load, improve driver endurance and enhance stint consistency.

From trackside moulding and scanning to engineering development, validation and workshop hand-finishing, ASP Seat delivers a complete end-to-end service. Our focus is simple: maximise driver performance, safety and comfort through world-class seating engineering.

Name: Bombay engineering & moulding works
Description:
M/S Bombay Engineering & Moulding Works Pvt. Ltd, a beacon of excellence since 1969, stands as Agra's largest foundry, a testament to unparalleled craftsmanship and unwavering dedication.

Beginning as an Engineering Workshop, our journey evolved into a powerhouse equipped with CNC and VMC machines.Specialized in the precision engineering of brake drums for two-wheelers, flywheels, and a diverse range of components catering to the automotive sector, including tractors and cars. we expanded our horizons, catering to local markets and exporting to South Asia and the Middle East.

In 1975, a pivotal moment arose with the establishment of our Iron Foundry, setting us on a trajectory of continual improvement. 
In the realm of trading, BEAMW proudly serves as Tata Metaliks Ltd's and Kirloskar Ferrous Industries ltd. Channel Partner for Delhi NCR, Rajasthan, Western UP, and Haryana. Our steadfast partnership has weathered the challenges of the last three months, demonstrating resilience during the COVID-19 pandemic.

As traders of Pig Iron, Imported Scrap, and PVC Resins, we source from Europe and Africa, Korea, Taiwan, and Ukraine. Our commitment to '24X7 availability' of Pig Iron has fortified our market presence, commanding nearly 50% market share in Delhi NCR.

Our enduring success is rooted in continuous availability, superior quality, and a commitment to customer satisfaction. Despite adversities, our partnership with TML has been a source of strength, guiding us through challenging times.

At M/S Bombay Engineering & Moulding Works Pvt. Ltd, we don't just meet expectations; we surpass them, forging a legacy of reliability and excellence in every endeavor.

Name: Hebei Jinao Seiki Manufacture Inc.
Description:
Jinao Seiki, established in 1995, specializes in the production of seamless steel tubes. Operating from an 80,000 ㎡ facility and employing over 320 skilled professionals, the company is dedicated to serving the automotive parts market with high-quality seamless steel tubes.

Our products are trusted by leading automakers, including Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Audi, Volkswagen, Volvo, Porsche, Ferrari, BYD, Toyota, Hyundai, and Honda. We maintain stringent quality standards, adhering to IATF 16949 and ISO 9001 certifications.

Jinao Seiki is equipped with advanced technical teams specializing in processes such as piercing, surface treatment, cold rolling, cold drawing, heat treatment, non-destructive testing, and product finishing. Our state-of-the-art engineering technology center encompasses departments for product research and development, process engineering, mechanical performance testing, and metallographic analysis.

With an annual production capacity of 40,000 tonnes, Jinao Seiki is well-positioned to meet the demands of the global automotive industry. Whether you require rotorshafts, driveshafts, actuating shafts, steering input shafts, hollow piston rods, transmission shafts, hollow stabilizer bars, or any other specialized seamless steel tubes, our team is here to provide expert support. We are committed to delivering tailored solutions to help you achieve greater profitability.

Name: R+Engineering
Description:
We are a global strategic engineering that specializes in vehicle platform development.

Our work extends across from 
E-mobility, where we design and engineer electric Bikes, motorcycles, scooters and small electric powered cars for other OEMs and Start-ups, to 
Motorsport, where we engineer, manufacture and distribute “best in class” racing products for professional and amateur racers across the world.
Our range of racing products includes but is not limited to lightweight F1 style steering wheels, transmission kits and advanced electric power trains than can transform any existing ICE kart into a racing kart within minutes.

Thanks to our team of engineers & developers and our supply chain expertise we are uniquely positioned to handle our clients’ toughest challenges, with assignments that have included to date from strategy development, interim & project management, cost reduction, ad-hoc product development and regulatory compliance.

In addition to our technical consultancy services, we can provide engineering capabilities that enable us to design and deliver high-quality prototypes and low-volume manufacturing of complex products and assemblies, including from power electronics, motors, transmissions, battery packs to complete vehicles.

Name: Elitek Vehicle Safety
Description:
Elitek Electronics was founded in 2003 by a visionary chief engineer with 15 years of experience at Philips. As a leading provider of advanced vehicle safety solutions, Elitek Electronics is dedicated to enhancing road safety with a comprehensive portfolio that includes pedestrian detection cameras, ultrasonic sensors, warning alarms, sensor hubs, and other cutting-edge blind spot detection systems and accessories.

Elitek prides itself on delivering a wide range of reliable, high-quality vehicle safety products that meet the stringent demands of the automotive industry. Our commitment to rapid innovation, superior product quality, and exceptional customer service positions us as the preferred partner for industry leaders.

Our products are independently developed and manufactured, holding numerous intellectual property rights, including copyrights, external patents, utility model patents, and software patents. We ensure our products meet the highest standards of safety and performance with certifications such as CE, UKCA, E-mark and RoHS.

Currently, Elitek Electronics is actively advancing its AI-driven camera-based DVS 2024 safe system kits, aiming for reducing the number of accidents involving HGVs and vulnerable road users, such as pedestrians, cyclists, and motorcyclists. This initiative underscores our commitment to leveraging state-of-the-art technology to improve vehicle safety and compliance with evolving safety regulations.

Name: Kraus Motor Company
Description:
Kraus Motor Company is a design and innovation company dedicated to supporting the Harley-Davidson enthusiast market by offering state of the art performance suspension, braking and ergonomics systems. These Kraus Motor Company parts and systems make the Harley-Davidson ownership and riding experience better - more fun, more precise and more easily controlled. Additionally, these parts and systems have a flawless and beautiful appearance which are guaranteed to enhance the look of any Harley-Davidson machine.

Recognized in the custom Harley-Davidson motorcycle industry as an innovative company, Kraus Motor Co. is one of the leading Harley-Davidson custom shops in North America. Kraus motorcycles win top honors at World Championship shows and those same machines also break land speed records on the Bonneville Salt Flats. 

Seeing a clearly defined need for superior suspension systems and leveraging successes on the bike show circuit, KMC has taken it upon itself to offer a number of parts and systems that can bring an average, stock  Harley-Davidson motorcycle to a whole new level in terms of handling and braking performance.

We’ve stepped away from being a full custom bike shop, to focus our attention and team on manufacturing hi-performance suspension systems. While there are Companies offering look-alikes and variations on the designs we’ve pioneered and adapted to the Harley-Davidsonproduct line, none can match Kraus in terms of fit, finish and service. Me-too’s are never as well done as the original from which they got inspiration, copies are just that - copies.

Kraus Motor Company’s engineering and design efforts are clearly focussed on ergonomics and rider comfort. Respect and appreciation for the history of Harley-Davidson motorcycle design have instilled KMC’s style with classic design cues. 

KMC is not changing Harley-Davidson, it's simply improving on what is already a strong, made in America platform.

Name: Famco Genuine - Fame Automotive Corp.
Description:
Fame Otomotiv, 1967 yılında temelleri atılan köklü bir otomotiv firmasıdır. Bugün dünya genelinde tercih edilen markalar arasında yerini alan Fame Otomotiv sektördeki başarısını, kaliteden ödün vermeyen ve müşteri memnuniyetini odak alan çalışma prensibiyle elde etmiştir.

Fame Otomotiv, 2000'li yılların başında büyük araç grubunda devridaim su pompası üretimine adım atmıştır. Bu süreçte oluşturduğu FAMCO markasıyla dünyanın birçok bölgesine ihracat yapmaya başlamıştır. Müşterilerine güvenilir ve yüksek performanslı ürünler sunan Fame Otomotiv, devridaim su pompası alanında sektörde öncü konumda olan firmalar arasına girmiştir.

Teknolojik yenilikleri yakından takip eden firmamız, sürekli yenilenen makine parkuru ve sahip olduğu ISO 9001 kalite belgesine uyumlu bir şekilde, VOLVO, DAF, SCANIA, MAN, MERCEDES, RENAULT, IVECO, FORD ve DAEWOO gibi önemli araç ve motor üreticilerinin grupları için devridaim su pompaları üretimine devam etmekle birlikte, son dönemde aynı araç grupları için yakıt besleme ve yağ pompaları üretimine de başlamış bulunmaktadır. Bu sayede müşterilerine en son teknolojiyle donatılmış, dayanıklı ve performansı yüksek ürünler sunmaktadır.

Name: E.WINKEMANN GmbH
Description:
E.WINKEMANN GmbH – Präzision und Innovation seit 1938

Hauptsitz: Plettenberg, Deutschland
Mitarbeiter: ca. 350
Produktionsfläche: 21.100 m²
Zertifizierungen: IATF16949, ISO9001, ISO14001, ISO50001

Die E.WINKEMANN GmbH ist spezialisiert auf hochpräzise und hochvolumige Stanzteile für den automobilen Antriebsstrang und bietet ein umfassendes Leistungsspektrum.    

Der Einsatz moderner CAD/CAM-Systeme in F&E und Produktmanagement (technische Kundenberater) ermöglichen maßgeschneiderte Lösungen. Mit unserem Inhouse-Werkzeugbau und Rapid Prototyping Kompetenzen bieten wir höchste Flexibilität und time to market Vorteile. Unsere kontinuierliche Innovationsstrategie führt zu Alleinstellungsmerkmalen, die einen Technologievorsprung für unsere Kunden nachhaltig sicherstellen. 

Durch unsere hochentwickelten Produktionsverfahren zu denen die Verfahren Stanzen, Gleitschleifen, Planschleifen, Wärmebehandlung, Baugruppenmontage, eine automatische und 100% kamerabasierte Kontrolle zählen, garantieren wir höchste Qualitätsstandards. 

Mit modernsten Maschinen und Anlagen produzieren wir jährlich ca. 1 Milliarde Bauteile. Unsere hohe Fertigungstiefe bietet maximale Flexibilität und Geschwindigkeit in der Versorgung unserer Kunden weltweit
 
Zu unseren Kunden zählen weltweit führende OEMs und Tier#1 wie z. B. Mercedes-Benz, VW, BMW, Audi, Porsche, Bosch, ZF, Magna, Linamar. Wir beliefern unsere Kunden mit Produkten passend für alle Antriebsarten (Hybrid-, Elektro- sowie konventionelle Antriebe).

Unser Produktportfolio umfasst Zwischenbleche, Anlaufscheiben, Ausgleichscheiben, Verschlussdeckel sowie Baugruppen, die in Getrieben, Achsgetrieben, Motoren und im Fahrwerk verbaut werden. Highlights unserer Produktinnovationen sind u.a. HSD-Anlaufscheiben sowie Zwischenbleche mit höchsten Anforderungen an Präzision und Leistungssicherheit.

Unser eigner Anspruch einer 0-Fehler-Qualität wird durch präventives Qualitätsmanagement untermauert.

Wir bei E. WINKEMANN sind ein starkes TEAM!

Name: ELESPA HEV PVT. LTD.
Description:
A start-up working in the field of Hybrid Electric Vehicles in Automotive Sector, retrofitting eKit to convert conventional IC engine 2 wheelers into Hybrid Electric 2 wheelers. Petrol per year (40k) + Total Maintenance (20k) is Rs.60,000 . You are wasting money on Petrol and Maintenance of bike. We came up with the innovative idea of converting your existing scooter/mopeds and bikes into Hybrid Electric Vehicles (HEV).  After conversion your vehicle will run in Electric mode as well as in Petrol mode.  As Petrol price, Air and Sound Pollution are rising so 90 vehicle should be run on Electric mode and 10 on Petrol mode that too only as an Emergency Backup. So that you wont stop in between because of Battery drain out and wait 4hr for charging the battery at the charging stations. You can also swap discharged batteries by charged batteries.

We are focusing to eliminate and reduce these problems from our society and the environment.
1)Limited Range

Gerek yurt içi ve yurt dışı siparişlerini zamanında teslim edip ilk seferde doğru ve kaliteli üret inancıyla müşteri memnuniyetini en zirveye taşımaya devam etmektedir.

Firmamız teknik destek danışmanlığı arge departmanı alanında uzman, yeniliklere ve gelişime açık, iç ve dış piyasalardaki müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına hızlı çözüm üretebilme kabiliyetine sahiptir.

Kendisine yeniliği, sürekli gelişimi ve geliştirmeyi hedef alan firmamız ISO 9001 çalışmalarını devam edip bütün üretim prosedür ve proseslerini uluslararası kabul gören standartlara yükseltmiştir.

Müşteri memnuniyetini ve her aşamada sürdürülebilir bir kaliteyi kendisine ilke edinen UYAR Hidrolik üretimin bütün aşamalarında kaliteden ödün vermeden örnek kalitesini güvence altına almak ve müşterilerine uluslararası standartlarda ürün verebilmek için en son teknoloji ile donatılmış Cnc Test cihazları ile son kontrolünü yapmaktadır.

UYAR Hidrolik olarak  önümüzdeki her geçen gün sektörümüze yenilikler katarak kaliteyi her daim yükselterek ürün kalitesini artırmak hedefleridir.

Description:
At Iron Baltic, we’re all about helping people get the most out of their ATVs and UTVs. Whether it’s for work or play, we create tough, reliable equipment that makes off-road vehicles more useful in everyday life. From our premium quality skid plate kits, to snow ploughs, agricultural equipment, trailers, forestry gear, and performance clutch kits, our products are designed to handle whatever you throw at them.

Based in Estonia, we’ve grown from our roots in Northern-Europe to serving customers all across Europe through our extensive dealer network and direct to customer sales websites. Jinao Seiki, established in 1995, specializes in the production of seamless steel tubes. Operating from an 80,000 ㎡ facility and employing over 320 skilled professionals, the company is dedicated to serving the automotive parts market with high-quality seamless steel tubes.

Our products are trusted by leading automakers, including Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Audi, Volkswagen, Volvo, Porsche, Ferrari, BYD, Toyota, Hyundai, and Honda. We maintain stringent quality standards, adhering to IATF 16949 and ISO 9001 certifications.

Jinao Seiki is equipped with advanced technical teams specializing in processes such as piercing, surface treatment, cold rolling, cold drawing, heat treatment, non-destructive testing, and product finishing. With an annual production capacity of 40,000 tonnes, Jinao Seiki is well-positioned to meet the demands of the global automotive industry. Nos próximos nove anos, com investimentos, aumentaram-se o número de produtos em seu portfólio, sempre buscando agilidade e inovação nos processos de produção.

Visando atender as necessidades de mercado, em 2016, a INCOL amplia seu portfólio lançando sua nova linha de produtos, protetores de cárter, no qual são desenvolvidos com maior qualidade e resistência.
Atualmente a empresa tem como foco a comunicação com seus clientes e parceiros, fornecendo qualidade dos produtos e agilidade na entrega dos pedidos, trazendo satisfação e fortalecendo a marca INCOL.

Name: Fara Stampi S.r.l
Description:
FARA INDUSTRIALE S.R.L. GROUP

FARA STAMPI has a fifty-year experience in the construction of dies for metal sheets, mainly in the automotive components industry.

Specifically we take care of:

- Feasibility studies and drawability by Autoform  software in-house.
- 3d design with Parametric Technology with four cad-cam stations UNIGRAPHICS NX, SOLID EDGE, CATIA and VISI CAD.
- Tin fast prototyping and pre-series and composite tooling for low volumes.


The synergy between technical office and workshop is one of our strengths, allows continuous monitoring of the production process of the die and smooth handling of the changes requested by the customer.

Equipment types achievable:

- Progressive dies up to 3 meters in length
- Block dies
- Dies with medium-deep drawing
- Dies with TIG overlay welding (welding department inside)
- Punching dies, simple, step, double-acting
- Simple punching dies
- Double effect punching dies
- Bending dies of all kinds
- Dies by tranfer / manipulator
- Prototypes with pilot equipment

The products are tested with a motorized DEA 3D measuring machine, accompanied by Metrolog.

- Four high-speed CNC milling cutters.
- Wire EDM / plunge
Qualitative control

On June 12th 2015 Fara Stampi was taken as Case History from Autoform software at the presentation of the R6 Plus release.

Name: Ultra Wiring Connectivity System Limited

Name: IntroCar Limited
Description:
Founded in 1989, IntroCar has evolved from a Rolls-Royce & Bentley dismantler to the world's foremost independent supplier of parts for all Rolls-Royce & Bentley models manufactured from 1945 to the present day.

In recent years, we have embarked upon an ambitious program of product manufacture & sourcing, with the result that we now carry the largest range of new components outside Bentley Motors Limited. It should not be unreasonably expensive to run your Rolls-Royce or Bentley. Our manufacturing strategy is to produce new components at the same price or less than you used to pay for your reconditioned, exchange or second hand parts.

- We only use suppliers who are specialists in their field - usually suppliers to the larger car manufacturers
- We produce to drawing wherever possible, or use modern techniques & materials to match or exceed original specifications
- We test our products in the field, using independent experts to make sure they meet our exacting standards
- Where possible, we buy original equipment; where not, we manufacture to the same standards
- We buy in bulk to obtain the best possible prices, carrying 5 years’ inventory or more if that is what it takes to get the right price
- We use modern manufacturing techniques & materials where appropriate to harness efficiency in the manufacturing process
- We source directly from the manufacturer to bypass unnecessary layers of cost in the supply chain.
