Name: Miko Srl
Description:
Established in 1997, Miko S.r.l. is the Italian company which produces Dinamica, made-in-Italy microfiber of high performance for many sectors of application.

Also quoted in the Eurispes Report 2008 among the best Italian Excellence, since the '90s Miko has been partner of Asahi Kasei, a leading Japanese company, which provides the raw base for the production of Dinamica. In July 2018, the group acquired Miko.

In the past years Miko, which started as a producer of non-woven fabrics for the furniture sector, has broadened its product range to respond to the demands of other areas of application including the automotive sector. Today, internal car coverings constitute the 90% of Miko’s production and represent a strong growing market.

In July 2012, Dinamica for automotive applications obtained the EPD certification, the most advanced Environmental Product Declaration for products.

Miko considers the respect for the environment and sustainable development strategic factors in organizing and developing its activities and in consolidating its leadership in the market.

The company has been chosen by some of the most recognized car makers for their car interiors.

With its refined made-in-Italy microsuede Dinamica, Miko has conquered some of the most prestigious car manufacturers at a global level and has been constantly developing many active collaborations in the automotive segment.

Today, although internal car coverings constitute the main sector of use for Dinamica, Miko is active also in the aeronautical, furnishing and contract, marine and fashion sectors.

Name: AGA Tools & Products
Description:
Martin saw the need for an alternative to the standard OEM parts which, at times, were insufficient and cost the customer thousands of dollars in labor and repairs. He wanted to increase performance and improve the quality of the vehicle. What started as a niche market for BMW parts, has quickly grown into patented parts and tools for other German makes as well, including Mercedes, Porsche, Audi, and Volkswagen. 

AGA Tools & Products features custom-made coolant pipes, valve stem replacement tools, as well as other kits, and tools to make once costly repairs cost and time-efficient. Martin Christensen, owner, and founder is an expert on German vehicles and has dedicated his career to providing quality service and unparalleled knowledge to all of his customers. It is this knowledge and expertise that led him to design and produce his own tools and parts for German vehicles.
 
Our products can save customers thousands, and were designed to make repairs easier. With many of our products, like our N62 coolant pipe, we eliminate the need to remove the engine in order to make the repair. A repair that used cost the customer over $10,000 can be done for as little as $3,000 and can now be completed in a few hours compared to a few days—saving both you and the customer time and money spent on labor. 

We have been manufacturing products for over 10 years and all of our products are made right here in the USA. Martin works closely with our local manufacturer to ensure the quality and longevity of everything we produce. Many of our tools and parts are made with billet aluminum and are far superior to the standard, plastic OEM parts.

We offer quality, custom-made products designed by an industry veteran and professional. AGA Tools & Products is your solution to making repairs quicker and easier.

Spécialisée dans le traitement de données de pneus et de roues, nous disposons d’une base de données sur le parc automobile mondial regroupant les informations techniques des véhicules. 
La base de données comprend des solutions de monte pour plus de 100 000 véhicules avec des détails tels que les montes d’origines ou les montes optionnelles, les déports possibles, les différents entraxes (PCD) ainsi que la boulonnerie adaptée au véhicule, valves TPMS, immatriculation…

Fournisseur de tous ces produits et services, nous œuvrons chaque jour pour satisfaire au mieux nos clients et ainsi, proposer une offre adaptée à vos attentes.

Name: 세온이앤에스
Description:
세온이앤에스 | Seon ENS, Inc.

차량 SW 개발, 기능안전·사이버보안·품질인증까지, 고객의 기술 목표를 함께 완성합니다.

세온이앤에스(Seon ENS, Inc.)는 자동차 전장 분야를 중심으로 한 임베디드 소프트웨어 개발, 기능안전 및 보안 컨설팅, 국제 인증 대응에 특화된 엔지니어링 전문 기업입니다.

세온이앤에스는 ASPICE, ISO 26262(기능안전), ISO 21434(사이버보안) 등 글로벌 표준에 기반해, 실질적인 기술 적용과 고객 맞춤형 대응 전략을 제공하며, 단순한 이론이나 문서 작업이 아닌 현장 중심의 문제 해결력을 강점으로 합니다.

*  주요 서비스
 * Automotive SPICE 기반 품질 프로세스 진단 및 개선
   * 현행 개발 프로세스 진단, GAP 분석, 개선 로드맵 수립 및 심사 대응 컨설팅
 * 기능안전 및 사이버보안 컨설팅 (ISO 26262 / ISO 21434)
   * 프로젝트/조직 차원의 안전활동 정의, 안전분석(FMEA, FTA, FMEDA), 보안요구사항 정립
 * 인증 심사 및 기술 교육
   * 외부 심사 대응, 내부 심사 준비 지원
   * 실무 중심의 Automotive SPICE, 기능안전, 보안 교육 운영
 * 임베디드 소프트웨어 개발
   * ECU, 제어기, 시스템 소프트웨어 등 다양한 차량 전장 시스템 개발 수행
   * AUTOSAR 기반 모듈, 드라이버, 응용 로직 등 실차 연계 구현
 * 임베디드 소프트웨어 테스팅
   * 닛/통합/시스템 단위의 테스트 설계 및 수행
   * 테스트 자동화, 커버리지 분석, 정적/동적 분석 등 표준 기반 검증 체계 적용
 
* 강점
 * 실행력 있는 전문가 조직
 * 실무 경험이 풍부한 컨설턴트, 개발자, 심사원이 직접 참여
 * 고객 중심의 연한 협업 방식
 * 절차보다는 실효성, 형식보다는 실질적 결과를 중시
 * 표준 이상의 기준을 지향
 * 일회성 인증 대응이 아닌, 기술 내재화와 조직 성장을 함께 설계

세온이앤에스는 산업계의 시스템/소프트웨어 개발 기업들의 제품 개발 경쟁력을 높이기 위해서, 인생에 걸쳐 끊임없이 성장하는 학습자, 멘터, 동반자로서의 완전한 모임을 비전으로 추구합니다. 단순한 외주가 아닌, 기술 파트너로서 고객과 함께 성장하고 있습니다.

Name: Glide-Rite Products
Description:
Since 1997, Glide-Rite has specialised in air-suspension and hydraulic levelling solutions for the motorhome, caravan and mobility sectors, with additional expertise in specialist transport for wheelchair-accessible vehicles and front-line ambulances. Our goal is simple: enhance performance, comfort and safety with proven, OEM-grade products and support.

As the UK-certified partner for HPC, we supply the advanced HPC automatic self-levelling system, which stabilises a vehicle in around 90 seconds, featuring intuitive touchscreen, manual, and smartphone control. Built-in safety interlocks ensure operation only with the handbrake engaged.

Beyond levelling, our Semi-Air solutions maintain correct ride height under load (leaf-spring and AL-KO chassis, single and tag-axle), reducing rear sag and improving handling. We also provide Full-Air options, MAD replacement/helper coil springs, KONI shock absorbers, GVW uprating, winches for medical/patient transport, and ELM design, prototyping and manufacturing.

What sets us apart is our end-to-end care, which includes specification, training, hands-on technical support, comprehensive warranty, and next-day parts, all backed by TÜV-tested components, clean and reversible installations, and ISO-certified processes. With over 200 five-star reviews.

Our product range includes the following:
– Full Air Suspension (Coil/Leaf Spring)
– Semi Air Suspension (Coil/Leaf Spring)
– Semi Air Suspension (4×4)
– AL-KO Single/Tag Axle Semi Air Suspension
– HPC Hydraulic Self-Levelling Jacks
– MAD Replacement/Helper Coil Springs
– GVW Uprating
– Winches (Medical & Patient Transport)
– ELM Solutions (Design, Prototypes & Manufacturing)

Name: LABUS-Testlab GmbH
Description:
Die LABUS- Testlab GmbH ist ein kompetentes, innovatives und unabhängiges Prüflabor. Akkreditiert nach DIN EN ISO 17025:2018, in vielen Bereichen der Umweltsimulation. 

Durch unsere langjährige Erfahrung sowie unser mittlerweile hervorragend ausgebautes Netzwerk in diesem Bereich wollen wir Sie bestmöglich in Ihren Projekten unterstützen.

Nach dem Motto: "Unmögliches erledigen wir sofort, Wunder dauern etwas länger"... stehen Qualität, Flexibilität sowie Termintreue für uns hierbei an oberster Stelle.

Die Umweltsimulation umfasst Prüfmethoden zur Untersuchung der Wechselwirkung zwischen einem Objekt und seiner Umwelt. Dabei werden komplex vernetzte Wirkungsketten in einer ganzheitlichen Betrachtung modellhaft strukturiert und Kausalzusammenhänge analysiert.

Typische Untersuchungsobjekte sind technische Erzeugnisse, aber auch lebende Systeme. Dabei werden Auswirkungen der Umwelt auf

Leistungsfähigkeit und Funktionsverhalten 
Langzeitverhalten bzw. Lebensdauer
Rückwirkung auf die Umwelt
untersucht. 

Ziel ist das Erkennen von Ursache-Wirkungs-Beziehungen und die anschließende Qualifizierung von Produkten für gegebene Umweltbedingungen. Ein weitergehender Ansatz bringt auch eine umweltbezogene Produktentwicklung mit sich, die im Hinblick auf nachhaltiges Wirtschaften ökonomische und ökologische Vorteile verspricht.

Im Interesse einer möglichst schnell sowie kostengünstig erzielten Aussage spielen Fragen der Zeitraffung und der künstlichen aber realistischen Alterung eine große Rolle, welche eng mit den verwendeten Werkstoffen zusammenhängen.

Unser Labor befindet sich auf dem neusten Stand der Technik. Sehr gerne laden wir Sie ein die Prüfungen vor Ort zu begleiten und/oder nach den Prüfungen gemeinsam die Muster zu begutachten sowie die Ergebnisse zu analysieren.
Gerne beraten wir Sie bei der Auswahl geeigneter Prüfmethoden für Ihre Aufgabenstellung. Sie benötigen Unterstützung bei der Entscheidung welche Prüfungen notwendig sind? Welche Prüfungen passend sind?

Name: SUMOT
Description:
SUMOT develops a technical solution for all designers of electric motorisation systems seeking to make their motors more efficient, economical and sober, whether for e-mobility applications (from e-bikes to electric vehicles and trucks) or industrial applications.

Massive electrification of our means of transport and industrial processes also raises major challenges in terms of energy efficiency, economic cost and environmental impact. Developing electric motors that are more efficient with higher power density, lighter and consuming less materials has become a key technological lock.

 SUMOT is up to the challenge! Our solution: the SUMOT overfluxer 
 
Our power electronics device is connected between the motor and its power supply system and enables the motor to be boosted when it needs to be, without placing additional constraints on the rest of the system.

 Until +70% output power and +50-60% power density obtained on the Tesla Model S induction motor (simulations)
 Until +65% output power (experiments) and /2 of magnets volume (simulations) obtained on an industrial permanent magnet synchronous motor.

This “boost” effect makes it possible to :
 increase power density by increasing the power produced by the motor within the same volume. Over and above the “boost” effect, this also enables to use smaller (and lighter) motors or motor topologies with less (or no) magnets, while guaranteeing the same peak output performances.
 improve the system efficiency by making motor downsizing more accessible, while guaranteeing the same peak performances, leading to less energy consumption over the operating cycle with a smaller motor more optimised for the most frequently reached operating points;
 reduce the cost by using downsized motors or reducing the amount of critical materials used (magnets);
 reduce the environmental impact by consuming less materials and especially rare earth for magnets

To find out more  robin.thomas@sumot.tech

We also help brands bring their concept vehicles to life with interior distinction and style.

At Alea, we recognize our responsibilities toward customers, staff, and the environment. We work continuously with our supply chain partners and manufacturing process on minimizing the impact on the environment and have developed conscientious initiatives for employee education and employee engagement in our community.

Alea Leather is a subsidiary of Sunguard Motors Ltd. Established in 1992 to serve the Asian market, we expanded in 2007 to North America and Europe. We are 100% minority-owned and operated.

Name: Revelectrik
Description:
At Revelectrik, we are revolutionizing the future of electric vehicles. Our passion lies in harnessing the power of the sun and combining it with cutting-edge high-voltage (HV) battery technology. We are committed to creating a sustainable and eco-friendly transportation ecosystem by integrating solar panels with HV batteries.

With a deep understanding of the urgent need to reduce carbon emissions and combat climate change, our team of experts is dedicated to developing innovative solutions that bring together renewable energy and electric vehicles. By utilizing solar panels, we maximize the efficiency and range of electric vehicles, reducing reliance on traditional power grids and minimizing our carbon footprint.

Our advanced technology allows us to seamlessly integrate solar panels into the design of electric vehicles, providing a clean and renewable energy source. Imagine a world where your car is not only powered by the sun but also generates and stores energy while you drive. Our groundbreaking approach ensures that you can enjoy an extended driving range, reduced charging times, and a greener commute.

At Revelectrik, we believe that sustainable transportation should be accessible to all. That's why we are dedicated to creating affordable and scalable solutions that enable a widespread adoption of electric vehicles integrated with solar panels. By making clean energy more accessible, we are paving the way for a future where every journey is powered by the sun.

Join us on this exciting journey as we revolutionize the electric vehicle industry and drive towards a greener and more sustainable future. Together, we can make a significant impact and create a world where sustainable transportation is the norm.

Name: ScratchWrap

We'd all agree, scratches and scrapes suck. They're like those annoying pop-up ads or paper cuts. Our founders have spent over 40 years in the autobody industry and always dreamed of a better and faster way to cover scratches and scrapes for the everyday person. 

That's why we created ScratchWrap. A micro wrap that's sprayed to match the exact color code of your vehicle. ScratchWrap is professionally made in America with the same paint formula used by your OEM.

ScratchWrap is significantly more affordable than getting your vehicle repainted, and the closest you'll get to a flawless finish without breaking the bank. 

So, if you're tired of those unsightly scratches and scrapes on your vehicle, give ScratchWrap a try. Your car (and your wallet) will thank you.

𝟰. Ø𝗴𝗲𝘁 𝗲𝗳𝗳𝗲𝗸𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗶𝘁𝗲𝘁: Med et gennemtænkt mobilt arbejdsmiljø kan du afslutte dine opgaver med det samme, mens du stadig har sagerne friske i hukommelsen. Derved øger du effektiviteten og kvaliteten i dit arbejde.

We specialize in the development and manufacturing of advanced components and systems for buses and commercial vehicles, delivering high-quality, reliable, and innovative solutions while contributing to HAPPICH’s global strength.

Supported by strong engineering, design, and R&D capabilities, we collaborate closely with our partners to deliver tailored solutions that meet OEM standards and project-specific requirements. 
Founded on April 1, 2023, in Adana, Türkiye, our company has rapidly expanded its production capacity and operational capabilities. Today, we continue our manufacturing activities through two production facilities, ensuring flexibility, efficiency, and consistent quality across all processes.

Name: GÜLER TIR MARKET
Description:
Yük Tutucu, 2010 yılında başladığı faaliyetlerinde, lojistik sektöründe kritik bir ihtiyacı karşılamak amacıyla kuruldu. Kuruluşumuzdan bu yana, taşımacılık ve lojistik sektöründe lider bir konum elde etmek için sürekli olarak kendimizi geliştirmekteyiz.

Yük Tutucu olarak, taşıma süreçlerinde güvenliği ve etkinliği sağlamak için yüksek kaliteli kargo kontrol ürünleri sunmaktayız. Ürün yelpazemiz, Firigo trailer, Tenteli trailer, Trailer katlı raf sistemleri ve çeşitli alt ekipmanları içermektedir. Bu ürünlerimiz, her türlü yükü güvenle taşımak ve taşıma sırasında olası riskleri minimize etmek için tasarlanmıştır.

Müşteri memnuniyeti, işimizin merkezinde yer almaktadır. Her bir müşterimizin ihtiyaçlarına özenle odaklanarak, her siparişi büyük bir titizlikle ele alıyoruz. Sektördeki uzun yıllara dayanan deneyimimiz ve uzman ekibimiz, müşterilerimize en uygun çözümleri sunmak için çalışmaktadır.

Akdeniz bölgesinde güvenilir bir tedarikçi olarak tanınmaktan gurur duyuyoruz. Bu başarıyı, müşterilerimize sunduğumuz hızlı teslimat süreleri ve mükemmel müşteri hizmetiyle elde ettik. Her siparişte, kalitemizden ödün vermeden ve güvenilir bir şekilde hizmet sunmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Yük Tutucu olarak, müşterilerimizin tüm ihtiyaçlarını karşılayabilmek için geniş bir ürün yelpazesine sahibiz. Ancak, web sitemizde aradığınız ürünü bulamazsanız, özel ihtiyaçlarınızı karşılamak için özel ürünler de geliştirebiliriz. Müşterilerimizin memnuniyetini sağlamak için elimizden gelenin en iyisini yapmaktan ve her zaman onlara destek olmaktan mutluluk duyuyoruz.

Bizimle çalışmak ve kargo kontrol ihtiyaçlarınızı güvenle karşılamak için bize bir şans vermenizi diliyoruz. Herhangi bir sorunuz veya talebiniz varsa, uzman ekibimiz size yardımcı olmaktan memnuniyet duyacaktır. Yük Tutucu olarak, sizinle birlikte çalışmayı ve başarılı bir ortaklık kurmayı sabırsızlıkla bekliyoruz.

Name: DOĞASAN METAL
Description:
Doğasan, 1964 te merhum Nihat Aydın ın kurduğu şahıs firması olan Naysan olarak döküm sektöründe üretime başlamıştır. 1992 de adı ve yapısı değiştirilerek Doğasan Metal Ltd Şti kurulmuştur.

 

Küçük Balıklı da presli şekillendirme imalatı ile birlikte metal enjeksiyon döküm makinası yatırımı yaparak, ülkemizin önde gelen toplu taşıma firmaları için üretim yapmaya başlamıştır. Aynı zamanda Adapazarı Tırsan Aş ile çalışmaya başlayarak TIR-Dorse pazarına giriş yapılmış ve çeşitli dorse ürünleri imalatı için yedek parça üretimine geçilmiştir.

 

2005 Yılında Bursa Osb bölgesinde yatırım kararı alarak yeni fabrika binası inşaatına başlanmıştır. 2008 Yılında inşaatın tamamlanmasıyla birlikte yeni makina yatırımları ile geniş bir üretime hacmine ulaşmıştır.

Sonrasında hız kesmeden teknolojik yatırımlarına devam etmiş ve sırasıyla hava kavramalı presler, 160-750 ton arası metal enjeksiyon makineleri devreye alınmıştır. Müşteri talepleri ve hızla büyüyen yapıyle beraber lazer lesim, abkant, kaynak robotları, matkaplar, diş çekme makinesi, kumlama makinesi, polisaj makinelerinin kurulumu yapılmış, yeni üretim ve montaj hatları devreye alınmıştır.

 

2019 Yılında Tırsan ile yapılan anlaşma ile Tır-Dorselerinin yemek ve takım dolaplarının prosesleri devreye alınmış, PVC boya ve montaj hatları kurulup taşıma sektörüne çeşitli dolap ürünleri yapılmaya başlanmıştır.

 

Kendi Fabrikasında  ISO 9001, ISO 10002 ve ISO 45001 entegre yönetim sistemiyle toplu taşıma ve tır-dorse grubuna üretim yapmaya ve ülkesine hizmet etmeye devam etmektedir.

Sport Truck USA - America's leading suspension and aftermarket accessories company operates several divisions, including BDS Suspension, Fox Shocks, Zone Offroad, JKS and Crawltek.

SuperSprings International - a product we fell in love with after navigating our own hassles with airbags. Their signature product, the SumoSprings are an airless airbag, providing you with the ultimate support and reliability regardless of the terrain you're driving in.

Titan Fuel Tanks - Military grade cross polymer plastic long range fuel tanks are a must for those who are touring Australia. We have had a long standing relationship with Titan that spans over 6 years and their product is unbeatable.

ClearLidz - for the Jeep enthusiast, why hide from the Australian sun when you can have a clear roof that protects you from the elements and keeps your Jeep cooler in the summer months. These are an amazing product!

Outback Kitters is a company that thrives on innovation and new products. If your business is looking for representation in the Australian market, we look forward to hearing from you!

Name: Niagara Brake International
Description:
Niagara Brake International is the leading global producer of OEM disc brake caliper pistons. Over the past 40 years we’ve grown our footprint globally and now serve a diverse, worldwide customer base. We’re proud to stand alone in the industry as the only manufacturer to specialize in both steel and phenolic products as well as our ability to completely form, machine, grind and plate our pistons under one roof.

We’re innovators and problem solvers, helping the world’s best brake manufacturers respond to their customers’ demands for safety, quality and value. We manufacture our pistons from the steel blank or phenolic compound right through to the finished product, maintaining complete control over the process for optimum quality, efficiency, cost-effectiveness and environmental responsibility. This optimized production process has allowed us to achieve an industry-lowest PPM defective rate and helps solidify our position as the first choice of Tier 1 companies.

I Nostri Servizi:

 Protezione del furgone: La nostra gamma di pianali e pannellature proteggerà il tuo vano di carico dai danni e dall'usura, garantendo una lunga durata del tuo veicolo. Inoltre, i lucchetti esterni garantiscono la sicurezza degli strumenti e del carico anche quando il furgone è lasciato incustodito, prevenendo furti indesiderati.

 Organizzazione degli attrezzi: i nostri scaffali portautensili ti aiuteranno a tenere tutto in ordine, dai piccoli utensili alle attrezzature più ingombranti, migliorando la tua efficienza sul campo.

 Aumento della capacità di carico: Con l'ausilio di barre portatutto, portapacchi e portascale, è possibile trasportare attrezzature voluminose come scale e tubi, liberando così spazio prezioso all'interno del vano di carico.

 Officina mobile: Equipaggiata con banchi, cassetti, scaffali, generatori, compressori e altro ancora. Ideale per meccanici, gommisti e tecnici con servizio di pronto intervento.

 Gancio traino: Offriamo servizi di montaggio ganci traino per autovetture e furgoni.

 Rimorchi: Forniamo anche vendita e revisioni per rimorchi e carrelli appendice, assicurando che siano sicuri e pronti per l'uso.

Vieni a trovarci e scopri la nostra ampia gamma di soluzioni di allestimento personalizzabili, progettate appositamente per soddisfare le tue esigenze specifiche. Dall'organizzazione degli attrezzi alla protezione del vano di carico, offriamo una selezione completa di prodotti di alta qualità.
Con il nostro supporto, aumenterai la tua produttività e l'efficienza nel lavoro e manterrai un ambiente ordinato e pulito.

Contattaci oggi stesso per scoprire come possiamo ottimizzare il tuo lavoro!

Name: WoWMat Store
Description:
Made for Canadian Weather, made with Canadian Sensibilities - WoW Mat was established to provide car lovers quality floor liners & mats at affordable prices. Universal mats are economical but fails to protect interiors of the vehicle from water, snow and spillages.
WoW Mat covers the largest possible carpet area in your vehicle, especially the vertical dimensions. Also, WoW Mat is designed to match your vehicle’s interior panel texture, so your vehicle’s floor will look just as luxurious. 
Established custom car mat brands charge $250 without taxes and Universal Car mats being only a temporary cheap solution, Wow Mat are priced realizing frugality to abridge this need. Keeping quality and aesthetics as our priorities, we offer you customized car mats & floor liners at affordable rates and same-day production.Our all-season car mats are shipped Canada-wide using Canada Post.
Our custom car mats are made of TPO (Thermopolyolefin). A material that is resistant to heat, dust, drink spills, snow and texture wear. It retains shape and luster through the years. These car mats are designed to have a bucket-like design, they are elevated from the sides to protect the car floor from dirt or water overflow.You need not worry about the curling near brake and accelerator pedals, we have reinforced them with hooks to prevent that.
As we focus on your satisfaction, we wish to provide the best value for your money.
That said, these custom mats fully cover the entire carpet area, especially in the vertical dimension. Designed to match your vehicle’s interior panel texture, makes the floor look just as luxurious.

Desde o início, nos dedicamos a criar produtos intuitivos, rápidos e precisos, com foco no cliente, simplificando a instalação, configuração e entregando resultados excepcionais em termos de potência, torque e eficiência.
Nossa ideia não é ser a injeção programável mais barata, mas sim, a que entrega o melhor custo benefício.

Mais do que clientes, temos uma família de entusiastas e competidores que compartilha conhecimentos sobre injeção eletrônica, preparação de motores e vibra com as conquistas uns dos outros. Quando perguntamos o que os levou a escolher a Octtane, a resposta é sempre a mesma: "Eu não sou todo mundo". Essa frase resume o espírito dos nossos clientes e da nossa empresa, que busca oferecer produtos cada vez mais eficientes.

Nosso slogan "Você no controle" reflete nossa missão de dar ao cliente total controle sobre o gerenciamento eletrônico de motores, com soluções personalizadas para cada desafio. Além de termos um time comprometido em oferecer o melhor atendimento e suporte técnico.

Name: We Lease Wheels
Description:
WELCOME:

The MECCA of true, uncompromising, aftermarket embellishment accessory, for your ride!

For the first time ever in South Africa, We Lease Wheels, a one-of-a-kind, Forged Exotic Wheel Leasing service, delivers our range of FEWL 82 luxury wheels.

This State-of-The-Art Forged Technology allows for the widest array of sizes, designs, construction assembly, colors, finishes and details.

With thousands of designs released annually, why commit to one?

ABOUT US:

Founded in 2023 by Llewellyn Moodley. Just another regular die hard, grass rooted car enthusiast as many of us living in South Africa. A nation evident for its growing car culture.

For me, the passion ignited 3 decades earlier when my dad purchased his first BMW. A 316i – E36 or dolphin shape commonly known as. He upgraded the 15” entry level steel wheels with plastic wheel caps to after – market 16” 5- spoke “Mags”!!

For those of you who remember the term “mag’s”, this was short for magnesium. Once the king of the hill in the after-market wheel scene. In recent times, aluminium material became the material of choice for a number of reasons but mainly due to improved strength and lighter weight.

It was later that same year when South Africa, a nation evident for its unshakeable car culture and community,  welcomed its first generation E36 ///M3 since the E30 ///M3 sadly did not make SA shores, having been produced in left hand drive only.

As passionate as I’ve always been for these German Masterpieces and being an overall Petrol Head by nature, I personally don’t believe any OEM wheel, does any car, any real justice it deserves.

Name: GARNESA RACING TEAM
Description:
Garnesa, itulah sebutan Electric Vehicle kita yang berarti Garuda Unesa. Kenapa kita menamakan Garuda Unesa??karena kita ingin nama Electric Vehicle kita dapat membumbung tingi layaknya burung garuda yang mampu terbang tinggi diantara burung-burung lainnya. Akhirnya muncul suatu nama tim yang terinspirasi dari nama Electric Vehicle kita yaitu Garnesa Racing Team.
Pertama kali Garnesa Racing Team (GRT) berdiri atas dasar Tugas Akhir para mahasiswa D3 Teknik Mesin oto yang dilatar belakangi oleh suatu kompetisi di Bandung yaitu KMLI (Kompetisi Mobil Listrik Indonesia). Selama pengerjaan Electric Vehicle ini bukan hanya mahasiswa D3 yang berkonstribusi dalam pembangunan Electric Vehicle namun banyak pihak yang ikud serta seperti mahasiswa S1 Teknik Mesin, Lab Mekatronika selaku penyediaan tempat selama 24 jam, Fakultas Teknik dan banyak lagi.
Pembangunan awal desain Electric Vehicle kita bisa dibilang gagal karena konstruksi dari rangka dasar tidak mampu menahan beban keseluruhan mulai dari sektor kaki-kaki, motor, battery, driver, beserta komponen pendukung lainnya. Setelah itu sempat kita putus asa karena hampir satu bulan semenjak desain awal kita di bulan November 2011 gagal kita belom menemukan desain rangka dasar yang mampu menopang semua komponen. Ide pencarian refrensi pun kita jalankan, mulai dari rangka go-cart, pencarian refrensi dari perguruan tinggi di Surabaya maupun dokumentasi dari Kompetisi Mobil Listrik Indonesia (KMLI) di tahun 2010. Setelah 2 minggu pencarian refrensi, kita berkumpul untuk membuat desain rangka yang cocok dengan kebutuhan kita. Akhirnya pembuatan rangka dasar kedua kita dimulai, mulai dari pemilihan bahan, pemilihan komponen yang sesuai, mulai dari sektor Electrical, maupun sektor Mechanical.
Hampir 5 bulan kita membuat Electric Vehicle kita agar mampu berkompetisi dan mensukseskan Tugas Akhir para mahasiswa D3 Teknik Mesin oto. Banyak komponen yang mesti dipikirkan tingkat kepresisiannya agar mobil dapat berjalan dengan baik, bisa

Name: Swan Automotive Parts
Description:
For over two decades, the Swan brand has established a formidable reputation in the automotive spare parts industry.

Since our beginning, we have been driven by the ambition to forge a brand that is known for excellence. This led us to form partnerships with World-Leading Automotive Part Manufacturers known for their supply to Original Equipment Manufacturers (O.E.M.) and renowned brand names in the aftermarket industry. 

This collaboration was the catalyst for the inception of SWAN Ignition Coils, our first product under the Australian Trademark brand SWAN.

Encouraged by the success of our ignition coils, we seized the opportunity to broaden the SWAN brand’s horizons. Our expanded range now includes vehicle fuel pumps, brake pads, and wiper blades, again, all manufactured by an O.E.M. Supplier.

In addition, we are the proud owners of another Australian Trademark brand, Pistol Automotive Aerosol Cleaners. This line has grown to encompass a trio of specialised variants: Brake Cleaner, Throttle Body & Carby Cleaner, and Engine Degreaser.

We are also the Australian distributor of Sealwel Cooling System Cubes.

SwanZone Pty Ltd. unifies our entire diverse product range. Each item stands as a testament to unparalleled durability and quality.

Name: DeltAts Srl
Description:
DeltAts oggi è una realtà importante nello stampaggio materie plastiche in provincia di Torino. Ha una produzione diversificata e specializzata, destinata in massima parte a prodotti ad elevata tecnologia per il settore automotive.

L’attività viene svolta in due unità produttive attigue, per un totale di 7.000 mq. coperti su un’area di 30.000 mq.
DeltAts si propone come partner ideale nella progettazione, ingegnerizzazione e prototipazione veloce di nuovi prodotti; nello stampaggio e co-stampaggio plastica/metallo; nell’assemblaggio manuale ed automatico di prodotti metallo/plastici; nella costruzione di stampi per stampaggi termoplastici. Si avvale inoltre di tecnologie esterne specializzate nella costruzione di stampi per lamiera e relativa tranciatura a freddo.
Grazie alla nostra tecnologia e flessibilità, siamo in grado di soddisfare ogni esigenza dei nostri clienti e produrre svariati prodotti per il settore automotive, tipo: frame, valvole controllo pressione, valvole antideflusso, canister per filtri carbone, controllo devio luci, oil cup-filler.

La capacità di affrontare le diverse richieste dei clienti e la ricerca continua di innovazione rappresentano da sempre i punti di forza di DeltAts. Alta produttività ed efficienza combinate a elevata versatilità, ci permettono di essere partner affidabile per i maggiori produttori di componenti auto italiani ed esteri.

Name: IXsound Pro
Description:
BRING THE FUN BACK IN DRIVING WITH A SPORTY SOUND TO YOUR CAR.

The speakers. Our speakers are rectangular in shape - 363x110x115mm and 363x120x145mm. They fit under the rear bumper and are invisible from the outside. The drivers are designed for maximum protection from moisture and system’s reliability. The high performance speakers offer enhanced performance and a wide frequency range to reproduce the sound of sports car exhaust systems as accurately as possible. We can identify the optimum configuration for your particular vehicle.

The electronic module. It acquires the information required for the sound reproduction from the car's on-board network, and communicates with a mobile app for sound tuning. Now the system has 15 powerful and loud V8 exhaust sounds, misfires and a dynamic start option.

Connecting wire. It connects the electronic module, the vehicle’s system and speakers. The default wiring always goes to two speakers, so if you buy one speaker first and still decide to put in a second one later on, it's easy to connect it.

Warranty. The package comes with all fasteners, wiring instructions. Our system’s warranty is 2 years.The lifetime is unlimited.

Loud sounds, powerful misfires and dynamic start

Our media library now consists of 15 powerful and loud exhaust sounds. All these sounds were recorded from real cars and reproduce the sound of the exhaust system as closely as possible. Select the sound, add kick-ups and dynamic startup if you like, adjust the tone and volume of the idle speed, adjust the dynamics of the sound when revs are ramped up. And enjoy the powerful sound of legendary cars:

Name: ECOGAS
Description:
Sektörün önde gelen isimlerinden ve 20 yıllık tarihe ve tecrübeye sahip ECOGAS Alternatif Yakıt Sistemleri'ni yakından tanıyalım.

Ecogas Alternatif Yakıt Sistemleri 2000 yılında Ankara‘da kuruldu.
 
2001 yılının başında , ilk venturi sistem LPG Regülatörünü üretti.
 
2002 ECOGAS, enjeksiyonlu araçlar için ilk Lambda Kontrol Sistemi'ni piyasaya sürdü.
 
2005 yılında ECOGAS , Türkiye ‘ nin en çok bilinen Karbüratörlü LPG Kiti markası oldu.
 
2007 yılında ise ECOGAS , Faster Sıralı Enjeksiyon LPG Dönüşüm Sistem Kitini üretmeye başladı.
 
2018 yılında yönetim ve üretim tesisinde değişikliğe gidilerek ECOGAS; İzmir merkezli Özsoy LPG bünyesinde üretim ve Ar-Ge faaliyetlerine devam etmeye başladı.
 
2020 yılında ise ECOGAS köklü Ar-Ge ve inovasyon çalışmalarını hayata geçirdi. Otogaz dönüşüm sektöründe uluslararası ve yerli teknoloji, üretim çözüm ortakları ile güçlü bir tedarik organizasyon alt yapısı oluşturdu.
 
2021 yılın da ECOGAS; yenilenen alternatif yakıt sistemleri ve bileşenlerini Türkiye pazarına oluşturduğu satış ağı ile yeniden sundu.
 
2022 yılında ise ECOGAS Xoce, Faster, MAGIC, Tiger Sıralı Enjeksiyon LPG Dönüşüm Sistem Kitini üretmeye başladı.
 
2023 yılında ise Iraq, İran, Lübnan, Mauritius, Afganistan ülkelerin de alternatif yakıt sistemleri pazarına teknolojik olarak en gelişmiş çözümleri sunmaktadırlar.

2024 yılında ise ECOGAS Xoce, Faster, MAGIC, Tiger. Energy, AfrTeam Sıralı Enjeksiyon LPG Dönüşüm Sistem Kitini üretmeye başladı.

2025 yılında ise Iraq, İran, Lübnan, Mauritius, Afganistan,
Yemen, Romanya, ülkelerin de alternatif yakıt sistemleri pazarına teknolojik olarak en gelişmiş çözümleri sunmaktadırlar.

Join us on a journey where style, performance, and individuality converge to redefine automotive excellence. Discover what it means to ride with CruiseRims.

Name: Bruiser Conversions
Description:
Bruiser Conversions is an authority on performance V8 engine integration kits for Jeep Wrangler JK, JL, and Gladiator JT. Enjoy an entirely new level of driving experience with a V8 engine conversion kit in your Jeep.

Bruiser Conversions evolved from necessity. The Greek Philosopher, Plato, has been credited with the proverb, ‘Necessity is the mother of invention’. Jeff Garland established Jeff’s Jeep Yard in 1984. As the business evolved, Jeff was repeatedly faced with the need to invent solutions to rebuild and reconfigure Jeep vehicles with V8 engines. Consequently, necessity turned into a passion, Jeff used his engineering mindset to create standardized conversion kits to provide powerful, easy to integrate, and reliable powertrain systems.

Form and function are the foundations of a great vehicle. Jeff started specializing in conversions using General Motors’ Chevy small-block V8 engines with modern electronic control systems. Moreover, integrating them into the Jeep Wrangler CJ models of the era. As a result, expert V8 engine integration for Jeeps grew from there. Accordingly, he developed and refined a process to create reliable, high-power engine kits for his repowered Jeep projects. Jeff also felt the need to help others with their Jeep projects and provide them with his fully-integrated V8 engine conversion kits. Bruiser Conversions’ clients love the peace of mind knowing their Jeep project has an integrated powertrain solution and the time they save because it’s a complete bolt-in conversion.

Almost four decades, and Bruiser Conversions is as passionate about our work as ever! We’re excited to help professionals and home-builders complete their V8 projects. The seamlessly integrated, factory-style, functionality complements the bolt-in installation and kick-ass performance making our V8 engine conversion kits for Jeeps trusted worldwide.

Our Mission

Our Vision

Description:
CHCD is a leading rotating electrical OEM manufacturer in Asia, specializing in rotating electrical products for New energy vehicles, Fuel vehicles, Motorcycles, Agricultural machinery, Construction machinery, Forklifts, Marine, and so on. Providing our partners with competitive products such as Alternators, Starters, Lithium batteries, Wiper Assy, is what we have been doing. Established in 1966, CHCD currently employs over 1,500 qualified professionals and provide dozens of famous automotive factories with OEM service.

CHCD is committed to social responsibility, environmental protection, and sustainable development. We focus not only on the economic benefits of our business but also on the positive impact we have on society and the environment. Our vision is to promote sustainable business practices through innovation and collaboration, foster comprehensive community development, and create a better future for generations to come.

Type III alternators are highly efficient, compact devices designed for vehicles with small-displacement engines to convert mechanical energy into electrical energy to support electronic systems such as ignition, lighting and air conditioning. With high power density and stability, these alternators are adapted to severe working conditions and can ensure continuous power supply. The design takes into account anti-vibration and high-temperature characteristics to ensure stable operation in various driving environments.

The RA starter motor is an electrical component designed for extreme working environments, with a fully enclosed structure to ensure stable operation in harsh conditions such as high humidity, dust and strong vibration. Its compact design makes it easy to install in space-constrained areas, and it has a highly efficient conversion capability from electrical energy to mechanical energy. It can quickly provide the necessary starting torque for all types of engines.

Name: VAIS Technology
Description:
VAIS Technology was founded in 2003, at a time when vehicle technology was evolving. We have a passion for both automobiles and technology, so our goal is to provide consumers with tech features that automakers haven’t yet embraced or have implemented only on higher trim packages.

In 2004, VAIS Technology pioneered iPod and SiriusXM integration into factory Toyota and Lexus radios. VAIS also developed USB music streaming, iPhone/Android phone mirroring, and Navigation/Video Unlock bypasses.

Currently our products are:

SEER – Passive Keyless Entry
Push to Start with Smart Keyless Access
Interior Ambient Lighting
SiriusXM Satellite Radio Add On adapters
iPod/iPhone/Android Bluetooth music streaming add on adapter

The complete line of VAIS products is designed in-house to meet OEM spec requirements and to ensure one of the lowest defect rates in the industry. Every single product is bench-tested before it’s shipped to deliver the ultimate experience to both dealers and end users. We proudly serve as an aftermarket and OEM supplier, offering desirable vehicle enhancement products for consumers.

VAIS products are offered at car dealerships, 12V expeditors, and mobile electronics installation shops. We also make our products accessible to DIYers who have the expertise to install the product on their own. We’re proud to offer great customer service and expert technical support to guarantee correct product fitment.

Since 2003, we’ve grown to offer our products to over 2,000 dealers and have our products available at over 30 stocking distribution warehouses in North America.

Today, VAIS Technology continues to keep pace with the demand for cutting-edge technology while delivering the high-quality products our customers have come to expect. We believe that, with our talented in-house engineering resources, we can match OEM quality, create user-friendly products, and release products to the marketplace when they’re most desired.

Name: Fostek Corporation
Description:
Fostek Corporation specializes in developing and providing high-quality engineered foam materials for automotive and industrial applications. With over 20 years of experience, we are known worldwide for our exceptional quality and outstanding performance. Our IATF 16949:2018 certified facilities ensure the highest standards of quality for OEM automotive products as well as our non-automotive offerings.

At Fostek, we prioritize customer satisfaction and offer customized solutions tailored to specific applications. Our team of experienced chemists and technicians are dedicated to developing foam formulations that meet the most demanding specifications. Fostek’s EPDM family of Semi-closed cell/Closed-cell technical foams, added to our PVC/Nitrile Rubber+Neoprene Blends, are formally recognized/approved by OEM’s, JOEM’s, & Tier 1’s. 

In addition to automotive applications, our foams are utilized in various industries including retail, construction, and athletics. Our commitment to continuous improvement drives our research and development efforts to optimize processes and reduce costs for our customers. 

Our processes are tested and monitored from beginning to end to ensure consistency and quality to minimize variability from run to run. The Fostek team’s experience and proven ability provides our customers with a trusted resource.  We take the time to listen to our customers and understand their needs based on the application, the “fit for use” demands of the very end customer, and desired foam physical properties. We highly value direct communication and strive to provide outstanding customer service for all of our customers.

Thank you for your interest in the engineered foams offered by Fostek Corporation. 

For more information on any of our products, please visit our website to contact us or call our sales office at (574) 284-1000.

Name: Anroi Indústria
Description:
Somos uma Marca pioneira na fabricação de Bombas de Óleo atendendo ao mercado de reposição.

ANROI tem inicio em 1927, com a perseverança, empreendedorismo e trabalho dos irmãos Roda; como uma ferramentaria especializada na fabricação de equipamentos industriais, com a razão social “ANGELO RODA & IRMÃOS”.

Na década de 40, a Anroi se destaca como fabrica de tornos mecânicos, com a logomarca “ARI”, que permanece nas décadas de 50, 60 e 70, porem com o foco na fabricação de autopeças para as montadoras de veículos que se instalam no Brasil.

No início da década de 70, é criada a marca “ANROI” com objetivo no mercado de reposição, com as linhas de bombas de óleo, bombas de vácuo e tensores de distribuição.

Hoje, se aproximando dos 100 anos de sua fundação, a Anroi permanece como uma empresa familiar e reconhecida em seu pioneirismo na fabricação de bombas de óleo.

A busca pela inovação e a preocupação com a excelência de seus produtos faz com que a Anroi invista constantemente em novas tecnologias, novos projetos, ferramentas especiais e matrizes de fundição; além de manter uma equipe de profissionais experientes e altamente qualificados. Testamos individualmente 100% dos produtos, devido ao alto grau de desempenho exigido na reforma dos motores e, também por esta razão, contamos com serviços especializados de pós-venda e assistência técnica.

Agora é o início de uma nova fase, sob o conceito “UM NOVO OLHAR PARA O FUTURO”, que representa o agradecimento e respeito pelo passado, ações concretas no presente, sem perder de vista nosso objetivo; com lançamentos de novos produtos, modernização de embalagens, site e novos serviços.

ASFIR started as a small family business to become what it is today – a global off-road vehicle accessories manufacturer. After discharge from military service with the Israeli Special Forces, ASFIR founders decided to use the experience and knowledge they acquired during their service and apply it to a big love in life – off-roading and traveling in Israel.
 
This is how Asfir 4x4 came to be. Based on lifelong experience, knowledge, and deep understanding of the off-roading driving needs Asfir develops and models its products to be the best product needed – both functionally and economically. 
 
The integration of the expert departments at ASFIR: research & development, production, import & export, service, and sales creates a unique human mixture, which contributes to the company’s innovation and professionalism.
 
The company's plant is equipped with the latest machinery and advanced technology, including specially built dedicated machines, which enable the company's development team to design and produce a considerable variety of products. ASFIR leads the Israeli off-road accessories market for over 35 years with in-house engineering design and manufacturing.
 
Our skid-plates are made from 1/4" quality aluminum and laser cut for accuracy. We design our skids so that no drilling, welding, or cutting is required. Being a tailor-made mass-production company, we have the experience to manufacture top-quality products to fit your car perfectly.
 
We work under the close supervision of the Israeli Standard Institute & Ministry of Transportation and uphold the highest quality standard ISO 9001:2015.
 
We deliver our Israeli-made products all over the world via our online shop at asfir.com. Don't see your home-country on our list? Contact us and we'll do our best to find a solution

A KersTech TwinTorq(TM) system increases overall system energy efficiency.  That translates into:
  1) Increased range,
  2) Slower battery aging,
  3) Faster recharge cycles (smaller charger infrastructure),
  4) Better cold-weather energy usage, 
 5) Option to use e-motors without Permanent Magnets (strategic sourcing),
  6) Lower Total Cost of Ownership.  

KersTech works with vehicle manufacturers and drivetrain up-fitters of school and city transit buses along with a range of truck types including refuse/recycle/garbage, beverage, freight/delivery, and port hostlers depending on drive cycle profiles.

KersTech has been granted 4 patents for hydraulic-hybrid drivetrain configurations, drivetrain control systems, and innovative electric motor-brake architectures.

Established in 2002, Hangzhou Skyrich Power CO.,LTD. (formerly Hangzhou Wanma High-Energy Battery CO.,LTD.) is a pioneering force in eco-friendly new energy industries. Specializing in the research, production, and sales of premium Li-polymer batteries, Skyrich Power has emerged as a national high-tech enterprise, spanning 10,000 square meters across its Hangzhou banshan and Deqing xinshi plants. In 2015, it entered the capital market by listing on the National Equities Exchange and Quotations.

Skyrich Power's Li-polymer batteries find applications in electric toys, tools, E-bikes, motorcycles, electric vehicles, and more. Notably, their motorcycle engine start lithium battery has revolutionized the industry, garnering partnerships with prestigious motorcycle manufacturers like KTM and DUCATI. The company played a pivotal role in setting industry standards, evidenced by its leadership in drafting the automobile industry standard for lithium-ion batteries.

Moreover, Skyrich Power has excelled in developing NCM and LiFePO4 batteries for E-bikes and electric construction machinery, respectively. Its commitment to meeting client demands is reflected in its advanced production equipment, stringent quality control measures, and first-class service. The company's quality management system, combined with ERP and OA systems, ensures efficient and stable operations.

With ISO certifications and numerous patents to its credit, Skyrich Power stands as a beacon of innovation and quality. Its dedication to continual improvement and technical prowess has earned it accolades and recognition both domestically and internationally. Upholding a quality policy centered on innovation and perfection, Skyrich Power embodies the spirit of dedication, integrity, distinction, and innovation.

In essence, Skyrich Power is not just a manufacturer; it's a pioneer shaping the future of green power solutions worldwide

Name: Dr Batterie
Description:
Dr. Batterie ist ein Autobatterie-Fachgeschäft in Frankfurt am Main. Wir bieten hochwertige Batterien mit kostenloser professioneller Montage – ganz ohne Termin.

Unsere Produkte stammen direkt von SEBANG, einem der größten Batteriehersteller weltweit, der u.a. BMW und Hyundai beliefert.

Wir bedienen sowohl Privatkunden als auch freie Werkstätten im Raum Frankfurt – schnell, fair und zuverlässig.

Name: Glory Friction
Description:
Established in 1986, with its headquarter locating in Zhuhai, Zhuhai Glory Friction Material Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as “Glory”) is a professional friction material manufacturer integrating R&D, production, sales and service. The main products of Glory are disc brake pads, drum brake shoes, backing plates and related accessories. The application experience includes passenger cars, commercial vehicles, heavy duties, light railways and racing cars. The main sales footprints included China, South-east Asia, Europe, Mid-east, Africa, North America and South America.

Glory attaches great importance to R&D, and has a friction material R&D team led by top domestic and foreign technical experts. Glory emphasizes the accumulation and inheritance of technology, and the research team consisting of four generations continuously improves their expertise in the R&D for basic material, friction material application, brake noise, testing standards, and other fields. After years of effort, the company has become a Chinese private brake pad enterprise with mature solutions for automotive applications and global experience in OEM. The project history includes localization of Mercedes Benz, and continuous supply of OEM brake pad products to multiple domestic car makers such as the Great Wall, GAC, Changan, BYD, JMC, Ford, Chery, Geely, etc., winning a good reputation in the industry.

Adhering to the vision of “create value and achieve win-win”, Glory will be always in pursuit of helping our customers in realizing their dreams in friction industry. Starting from the solid foundation, we aim to become a leader in this field.

Name: Fulltech Casting Group
Description:
Fulltech Industry (Kunshan) Co., Ltd, serving as the production headquarters for the China region, was established in 2007 with a registered total capital of 17.5 million US dollars. The company has factories spread across various locations including Mexico, Hungary, Taiwan, and Kunshan. It is committed to the production of precision die-castings made of aluminum, magnesium, and zinc alloys.

The company possesses full-process production capabilities, including product design, mold development/design/manufacturing, die-casting production, CNC machining, painting and other related surface treatments, as well as final assembly. Its products are sold throughout markets in the Americas, Asia, and Europe. The company aims to provide one-stop service for its customers and to build a global economic development strategy.

Name: Culasse Et Moteur

Nous travaillons avec les leaders équipementiers tels que Bosch ou Valeo et sommes en mesure de répondre à toutes vos exigences tant en terme de pièces neuves que de pièces auto recyclées, outillage ou équipement d’atelier. Culasse & Moteur, dispose d’un stock permanent de pièces auto pour répondre aux besoins de la plupart des véhicules. Et si la pièce que vous recherchez n’est pas disponible, nous pouvons vous la commander avec une livraison 24H chrono à Saint-Égrève dans le département Isère, en région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes.

Name: SPRAY BAR HOLDINGS PTY LTD

Our range of services includes custom paint jobs, body work, vehicle maintenance, accessories and merchandise, tire and wheel services, and vehicle security systems.  
Our industry is thriving, with a growing demand for high-quality auto repair and product retail services. Customers are increasingly looking for convenience and reliability when it comes to maintaining and enhancing their vehicles. With our expertise and dedication to customer satisfaction, we are well-positioned to meet these needs and exceed expectations

Name: Fams Otomotiv Aksesuarları
Description:
In 2016, our company, which entered the vehicle chrome accessories sector in Bursa / Turkey as "Fams Automotive" with 14 employees and 4 machines, has achieved great success with more than 30 employees and high-tech production tools.

Our experienced designers in our field carry out the R & D process in the best way with our latest technology production tools. By keeping up with the changing and developing technology, we complete all the processes of thousands of products starting from modelling and design processes until they are delivered to the final consumer. We are proud to offer our products, which we develop without sacrificing quality at affordable prices by minimising the profit margin and at the same time always prioritising our customer satisfaction.
 
Today, our company, which has adopted the mission of contributing to the national economy by exporting to more than 10 countries, is getting closer to its targets every day with an export rate of 80% of its production. As Fams Automotive, our vision is to take the first steps forward in the ever-developing automotive sector and to revitalise the sector in line with changing customer demands.

Name: SW-MOTECH s.r.o.
Description:
Společnost SW-MOTECH působí v oblasti strojírenství. Díky našemu technickému know-how, vyspělým technologiím a kvalifikovanému personálu plníme sny naších zákazníků.

Výroba dílů pro motocykly započala ve Vojkovicích ve dvou lidech v roce 2001. Tehdy byl současný jednatel společnosti, pan Richard Pirmajer, osloven mladými nadšenci z Německa, kteří si v německém Rauschenbergu teprve dva roky předtím založili společnost pro vývoj a výrobu motocyklového příslušenství.

Během neuvěřitelně krátké doby si Vojkovická firma získala renomé u světových značek výrobců motocyklů jako např. KTM, BMW, SUZUKI, MOTO GUZZI, HONDA, KAWASAKI, YAMAHA, DUCATI a dalších. Je také úspěšná v dalších průmyslových odvětvích jako např. výroba dílů pro kolejová vozidla. Po 17 letech existence vybudovala společnost moderní výrobní prostory naplněné špičkovými výrobními technologiemi a dává zajímavou práci více než stovce zaměstnanců. Dnes již nevyrábí pouze příslušenství k motocyklům, ale také díly samotných motocyklů pro mnoho renomovaných značek.

Příznivá atmosféra a dobré pracovní podmínky přispívají k pocitu jistoty a spokojenosti zaměstnanců. Díky tomu se ochotně a aktivně podílejí na rozvoji firmy. Jsou motivováni a chtějí se sami rozvíjet.

Name: Bista Bilinredning, Bista Group AB
Description:
Vi på Bista Bilinredning erbjuder på byggnationer utav transportbilar och fordon.   
Det vi gör unikt är att vi till en högre grad erbjuder anpassning för våra kunders fordon. 
Vi Skräddarsyr fordonets inredning, belysning och system mot kundens specifika krav och ändamål, vi kan även flytta befintlig inredning från ett äldre fordon till en nytt fordon, där vi då kan utrusta det nya fordonet med nya produkt detaljer men behålla den äldre inredningen.
Det unika med vår höga kompetens är att vi kan erbjuda mer
komplicerade lösningar till våra kunder. 
Och vår geografiska position gör det enkelt för oss att hämtar och lämna fordonen till våra kunder.
Vi samarbetar tillsammans med Våra leverantörer från System Edström, Modul-System, Sortimo och Loyds System.

Är ni intresserade utav våra tjänster hör av er på: rasmus.blome@bista.se

Name: Rampage Race Products
Description:
Welcome to Rampage Race Products, your ultimate destination for cutting-edge racing solutions. As a global leader in the industry, we specialize in creating and distributing top-of-the-line drink systems and quick connections to enhance your racing experience.

Our drink systems are meticulously designed to provide drivers with optimal hydration during intense races. We understand the importance of staying focused and energized, which is why our innovative products ensure a seamless supply of fluids, giving you the competitive edge you need to excel on the track.

In addition to our renowned drink systems, we pride ourselves on our expertise in developing custom-made coolsuit systems. These state-of-the-art cooling solutions are tailored to meet the unique needs of each driver, providing maximum comfort and preventing overheating in high-pressure racing situations. Our coolsuit systems are meticulously crafted using the latest technologies, guaranteeing exceptional performance and reliability.

At Rampage Race Products, we don't stop at physical products alone. We also specialize in the creation of cutting-edge racing simulators that bring the thrill of the track into your home or training facility. Our simulators are designed with precision and attention to detail, offering a realistic racing experience that allows drivers to hone their skills and improve their performance.

With a commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in the racing industry. Whether you're a professional driver, racing enthusiast, or team owner, our comprehensive range of products is designed to meet your specific needs and elevate your racing endeavors.

Take your racing game to the next level. Contact us today to explore our exceptional lineup of drink systems, quick connections, coolsuit systems, and racing simulators. Unleash your full potential and dominate the track with our high-performance solutions.

Name: Nitromac
Description: Genel merkezi İzmir’de konumlandırılan ve sektörde uzun yıllardır hizmet veren Nitromac, yenilikçi ve genç kadrosu ile sektörün ihtiyaçlarını karşılamayı hedeflemektedir. Kaliteli ve doğru hizmeti ilke edinen Nitromac, her zaman üst düzeyde çalışarak Cnc makinelerle, lazer teknolojiyle, elektrostatik toz boya ve son sistem montaj hattıyla üretilen %85 yerli üretim makineleri 62 ülkeye ihraç etmektedir.  %15’lik üretimini İspanya Leon’daki yabancı ortaklı şubesinde 4300 m2 kapalı alanda, elektronik ve elektromekanik ar-ge çalışmalarını son sistem cihazlarla ve üst düzey İspanyol mühendislerle gerçekleştirmektedir. İspanya’da Avrupa ve Latin Amerika için satış, servis ve satış sonrası eğitim hizmetleri de verilmektedir. Hidrolik jant düzeltme makineleri, jant temizleme parlatma makineleri, hidrolik platform liftler, far ayar cihazları, balans makineleri, nitrojen jenaratorleri ve lastik sökme takma makineleri başlıca ürün grupları arasındadır.

Name: AUROTEC PAYE GROUP 5 EKSEN KALIP İSLEME MERKEZİ AS
Description:
Aurotec Paye Group 5 Eksen Kalıp İşleme Merkezi kurulduğu 2018 yılından bu yana Türkiye ve dünya piyasasına metal kalıplarının işlenmiş çeliklerini, plastik ve kauçuk kalıbı imalatı yapan köklü Paye Makinanın bir kuruluşudur.

Almanya ve Türkiye deki iki farklı fabrikasında işlenmiş kalıp çelikleri, parçaları, montajlı ürün gruplarını Avrupa'ya ihraç etmekte ve Türk Otomotiv Sektörüne parça ve işlenmiş kalıp çeliği tedariği sağlamaktadır.

Aurotec Paye Group olarak, gelişen Türkiye'de üretim kalitesinden ödün vermeden, tedarikçisi olduğu kurumlar için "Kaliteli ürünler, Güvenilir Hizmet" anlayışı ile sektörüne ve ülkesine değer katan şirketimiz, müşteri memnuniyeti ile birlikte büyümeye devam edecektir ve en önemlisi de kurucumuzun öğüdü olarak ilke edindiğimiz "Çalışan memnuniyetinin önemi " tüm operasyonlarımızda uygulanmaya devam etmektedir.

Name: Golden Friction
Description: Somos una empresa 100% Méxicana, localizada en el estado de San Luis Potosí, contamos con más de 2 décadas de experiencia en el mercado de autopartes. Name: R.H. Downing Inc.
Description:
Since 1945, it’s been our mission to provide best in class sales and marketing support, category management, data analytics, and updated industry insights to our partners. We’re constantly striving to maximize sales and profitably goals for both the supplier and the customer.

Our corporate office is located in Akron, Ohio along with offices in Detroit, Michigan; Tulsa, Oklahoma; Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania; Indianapolis, Indiana; Rochester, New York; and Shanghai, China. We offer coverage to both Regional and National accounts throughout North America.

For three generations, the company has serviced both Customers and Suppliers in the Automotive Aftermarket with the highest level of sales and marketing support. Give R.H. Downing a call. We’re ready to help you!

Name: Garagistic
Description:
Garagistic is an aftermarket automotive part manufacturer that designs, produces, and distributes BMW parts worldwide.

Garagistic was built upon the sheer passion of working on cars; specifically BMW E30's. Our love lead to a life of building and modifying then tracking and auto-crossing which lead to more modification and building; a vicious cycle really. We at Garagistic have a simple mission really; we are out to make BMW E30's, E36's, E46's, E21's, E24's, and even Datsun S30 a threat to the supercar world. The supercar world will always have beautiful cars, but more often than not, they lack the pride and dedication that goes into modifying and building your own car. We dedicate our efforts to providing parts to the people who build their cars with pride, to those who build with no boundaries, to those who want to compete with the best, and to those who see no limits in what they can build in their own garage. We have the parts to allow you to build your supercar! 

Garagistic means a lot of things to a lot of different people, in essence, Garagistic is the bond we all share in the hobby we all share; working on cars every hour of the night, the endless dedication, the sheer perseverance to accomplish a task that you've set out to achieve. Garagistic, to us, is the spirit of the garage-built, proud, persevering, and brave car enthusiast who dedicate their time to achieving automotive excellence through hard work and constant improvement of their vehicles.

We believe in a simple principle; quality in all that we do. Whether it the smallest odometer gear or a complete motor-swap kit, quality and innovation is the foundation for our products. The Garagitic seal will always mean quality, great pricing, and great customer service. We love what we do and could not do it without you. Give Moderns Hell!

"EVAMCSG is a unique platform for EV manufacturers and component suppliers to form a strong bond." A member can access immense potential of EVAMCSG. Our aim is to develop a technology based ecosystem that enables all stakeholders and support service providers in EV value chain across the globe to be brought under the EVAM Component Supplier Group (EVAMCSG).

Na Slovensku pôsobíme ako stabilný a inovatívny zamestnávateľ, ktorý spája špičkovú technológiu, kvalitné výrobné procesy a ľudský prístup. Vyrábame komponenty, ktoré sa používajú v automobiloch najznámejších svetových značiek, pričom kladieme dôraz na presnosť, bezpečnosť a udržateľnú výrobu.

Sme hrdí na to, že podporujeme profesionálny rast, vzdelávanie a férové pracovné prostredie. Našim ľuďom dávame priestor rásť – osobne aj odborne – v modernom a bezpečnom prostredí s rodinnou atmosférou.

Handtmann Slovakia a Handtmann Kechnec spoľahlivý partner, moderný výrobca a tím, ktorý drží spolu.
Inovácie, kvalita a ľudia sú základom nášho úspechu.

Elbir Oto Yedek Parça İmalat ve Tic. A.Ş. 1986 senesinde İstanbul /Türkiye de kurulmuştur. Elbir Oto, (after market) yenileme pazarında binek ve hafif ticari araçlar için direksiyon ve süspansiyon parçaları olan, Rotil (Ball Joint), Rotbaşı (Tie Rod End), Rotmili (Axial Joint), Askı rotu / Z-rot (Stabilizer Link), Salıncak (Track Control Arm), Burçlar ve kauçuk parçalar üretmektedir.

Bütün binek araç gruplarının (Avrupa – Japon & Kore – Amerikan araçları) süspansiyon parçalarının imalatını yapan firmamızın ürün yelpazesinde yaklaşık 13.000 çeşit ürün bulunmaktadır. Yapılan AR-GE çalışmaları ile de her ay bir çok yeni model üretimimize dahil edilmektedir.

1992 yılında ihracata başlamış olan şirketimiz müşterilerimizin Steering & Suspension parça taleplerini karşılamak için zamanla ürün yelpazesini geliştirmiş ve bugün 25.000 m2 lik kapalı bir alanda ayda 350.000 adetlik bir üretim kapasitesine ulaşarak 70 den fazla ülkeye ihracat yapmaktadır.

Tecrübeli ve konusunda uzman personel, ileri teknoloji, en yüksek kalitede hammadde kullanılması ve küçük detayların hassas bir şekilde değerlendirilmesi ETS ürünlerini mükemmelliğe taşımaktadır. Bu sebeple ETS, bulunduğu yenileme after market pazarında her konuda sürekli lider olma hedefiyle, dinamik, kurumsal kimlik yapısını geliştirerek çalışmalarını dünya otomotiv endüstrisine bağlı olarak ISO TS (IATF) 16949 kalite yönetim güvencesi standartlarında gerçekleştirmekte ve üretim kapasitesinin %80 ‘ ini başta Amerika, İngiltere, Almanya, İtalya olmak üzere diğer Avrupa ülkeleri ve bir çok Asya & Afrika ülkelerine ihraç etmektedir.

Name: Mistral Special Parts
Description:
A Story of Work and Family

After several years in the Research & Development department at Lafranconi Silencers, Romano decided to start his own venture, turning the expertise he had gained into a personal project. Like many Italian artisan businesses, it all began in the family garage, transformed into a workshop: here the first prototypes, experiments, and experiences came to life, marking the start of a journey as humble as it was a source of great pride.

Romano was the first to introduce stainless steel into silencers for Moto Guzzi motorcycles, which had previously been made of iron, bringing an innovation that became the hallmark of his production. Growing demand led him to move to a small workshop in Mandello del Lario in 1993. Year after year, orders increased, requiring long days and nights of work to meet production needs.

In the early 2000s, Antonella, Romano’s wife, joined the company to manage documentation and shipping. Thanks to Moto Guzzi gatherings and customer word-of-mouth, the brand quickly gained international recognition. In 2013, Alex, their son, also joined the company: after a period of apprenticeship, he developed a strong passion for his father’s work, bringing new ideas, innovative processes, and continuous collaboration that contributed to the company’s growth.

Over the years, the business expanded, moved through three locations, and welcomed new team members who became part of the Mistral Family. The company is the result of everyone’s daily commitment, with the constant goal of delivering the very best to its customers.

Description:
HMF utilizes decades of experience to develop off-road exhausts, bumpers, guards, racks, and accessories that strengthen protection, enhance durability, and increase performance during all of your off-road ventures. 

Since the early garage days, HMF has been developing high-performance exhausts that increase horsepower and torque on ATVs, UTVs, and motorcycles. Our exhausts have a deep, aggressive sound that fattens up the overall tone of the machine, keeping higher frequency pulses down to a minimum. We manufacture various exhaust series that have a specific volume output to make us one of the most versatile off-road exhaust systems on the market.

Today, HMF is a leading worldwide supplier of performance exhausts for the Powersports Industry. Pushing the limits in our research and development is how we come up with new ways to solve the needs of off-road riders. HMF is on the front line of Powersports engineering to keep riders, like you, moving ahead towards the next adventure.

Using our decades of engineering experience, we began to develop parts for more protection and functionality during the ride. From bumpers and racks to exo-bars and sliders, every machine that came into the shop created the need for a new piece of equipment. Our line of fabricated products rapidly grew and, now, features various equipment for over 20 different off-road vehicles.

Looking ahead towards the future, we may see our off-road vehicles evolve into something even more significant. However, one thing will remain the same; We as a species will always look to getaway. Families and friends are loading up their ATV and side by side vehicles, heading towards big adventures and further destinations. Wherever it is you're going, we're here to get you there.

HMF
Equipped to Perform

Nosso compromisso é oferecer produtos de alta qualidade, testados e aprovados pelos melhores profissionais do setor.
A Mandala foi fundada em 2006 e é pioneira na fabricação de panos de microfibra no Brasil. Com o tempo, expandimos nosso portfólio, desenvolvendo novos produtos voltados para o universo automotivo. Hoje, contamos com uma vasta linha de car care, abrangendo desde compostos polidores até acessórios essenciais para o dia a dia do detailer profissional.

O portfólio Detailer:

• Microfibras premium – desde panos de alta absorção até toalhas específicas para remoção de ceras e finalização do polimento,secagem e detalhamento
• Pulverizadores e Snow foam para lavagem e detalhamento automotivo.

• Acessórios e equipamentos profissionais – escovas, aplicadores, e ferramentas diversas essenciais para um detalhamento eficaz.

Estamos sempre trazendo novidades para o mercado, investindo em pesquisa e desenvolvimento para garantir que nossos produtos acompanhem as necessidades dos profissionais mais exigentes. Além disso, participamos dos principais eventos do setor automotivo, como o SEMA Show e feiras nacionais, consolidando nossa presença como referência no mercado de estética automotiva.
Com a Detailer, você tem qualidade, inovação e performance, garantindo resultados profissionais e a máxima proteção para o seu veículo.

Detailer – Detalhamento em outro nível desde 2006

Tres generaciones de experiencia en el sector de los rectificados.

Dos ubicaciones estratégicas en Aljucer y San Javier, Región de Murcia.
Atención personalizada y soluciones adaptadas a las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

A VANCARGO nasceu com o propósito de atender frotistas, transformadores, concessionárias e profissionais autônomos que buscam mais proteção, eficiência e valorização do veículo.
________________________________________

Missão
Oferecer soluções inteligentes de proteção para veículos utilitários, com qualidade, tecnologia e praticidade, agregando valor e aumentando a vida útil das frotas.
________________________________________

Visão
Ser referência nacional em revestimentos plug-and-play para vans até 2027, expandindo nossa atuação no mercado latino-americano.

Valores
•	Inovação contínua
•	Compromisso com a qualidade
•	Respeito ao cliente e às parcerias
•	Sustentabilidade nos processos
•	Ética e transparência em cada entrega
________________________________________

Produtos

•	Assoalho em material antiderrapante

________________________________________

Mercado de Atuação
Atendemos desde pequenos empreendedores que utilizam a van como ferramenta de trabalho, até grandes frotistas e concessionárias. Nossos kits já estão preparados para os principais modelos do mercado, como Fiat Ducato, Renault Master, Peugeot Boxer, Citroën Jumper, Fiat Scudo, entre outros.

Name: Laadhouder
Description:
Nederlandse huishoudens beschikken over steeds meer elektrische voertuigen. Van alle nieuw verkochte auto’s is al meer dan 25% elektrisch. En geschat wordt dat meer dan 15% van alle fietsen in ons land e-bikes betreft. Ook de elektrische step, scootmobiel en scooters zijn aan een opmars bezig. Internationaal wordt Nederland daarom gezien als een grote speler op gebied van elektrische mobiliteit. Dat betekent ook dat we steeds meer opladers in huis hebben. Die liggen vaak op de grond. Daar liggen ze niet alleen stof te vergaren, maar vormen ze ook een risico op struikelen. Dat is makkelijk te voorkomen! Een opladerhouder biedt de ideale uitkomst voor losliggende laders en kabels. Opgeruimd staat netjes! Met onze handige opladerhouder zijn rondslingerende opladers van uw elektrische auto, fiets, scootmobiel, step of scooter verleden tijd. Name: Multi Top Auto Supplies Sdn. Bhd.
Description:
Founded on 1st October 1994 as Multitop Auto Trading, we began as a small trading house driven by a vision to provide reliable automotive replacement parts with integrity and dedication. Over the years, we have grown into one of Malaysia’s leading auto parts distributors. Today, we operate as Multi Top Auto Supplies Sdn. Bhd. (447809-V), widely recognized as Multi Top or MT.

To strengthen our commitment to quality and innovation, we have established subsidiaries to oversee various aspects of our manufacturing operations. These subsidiaries produce MT Auto Parts branded products under stringent quality control and continuous product development, reflecting our dedication to delivering reliable and innovative solutions for the automotive replacement parts market.

Additionally, we founded MT Synergy Sdn. Bhd. (563159-M), another wholly-owned subsidiary specializing in Original Equipment (OE) and premium aftermarket brands. MT Synergy also offers its own label of products, sourced from trusted partners to ensure consistent quality and reliability.
Our journey of growth and excellence is underscored by our expansion into representing a range of trusted brands and offering over 20,000 auto parts. We have built a reputation for delivering high-quality solutions compatible with leading automotive brands, such as Proton, Perodua, Toyota, Honda, Nissan, Mazda, Ford, Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Hyundai, Kia, and emerging Chinese brands.

At MT, we are committed to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction. With over 2,000 dealers across all regions of Malaysia and a growing international presence, we are proud to be a trusted leader in the automotive replacement parts industry.

With the vision for expansion and serving more, In 2010, Yashgreen International (UAE) tied up with Bajaj Auto Limited in UAE and started supplying its spare parts to its clients across Africa and Latin America. Recently, Yashgreen successfully tied up with HERO & TVS with a similar arrangement. 
Our mission is to be able to serve and provide the best quality products across the globe as the leading exporter in the automotive sector. 
We assure to aggregate and meet the aspirations as well as expectations of our international customers in the worldwide market. Apart from that, we believe in maintaining strong customer relationships and coalescing.

Our vision is to become the leader in the export industry with every automotive product in 2-wheeler and 3-wheeler, along with 4-wheeler batteries.

Name: EngineQuest LLC
Description:
EngineQuest has served the engine and transmission remanufacturing market for over 70 years. Providing remanufacturing solutions since 1987, we specialize in hard-to-find or hard-to-salvage parts, as well as parts that make one item work in a different application. 
	In the restoration market, EngineQuest has become a leader in making replacement parts that OEMs have obsoleted, such as the FE Ford Rocker Assembly, V8 Pontiac Timing Cover, and Small Block Chevy Oil Filter Adaptor. We continue to expand our product line, adding new parts regularly to help engine remanufacturers.
	For hard-to-salvage items, it often means buying from the OEM, where the prices might not be logical, or the OE doesn’t sell the part you actually need. EngineQuest will make these items so our customers can get what they need, for the best possible price, when and how they need it. 
	EngineQuest was part of A&A Midwest, which began selling engine & transmission cores in 1949. In 2020, the Las Vegas location became a separate company. Over the years, the product line 
has grown to include engine component cores, as well as transfer cases, and torque converters. With nearly 10,000 engines, 2,000 transmissions, and thousands of component parts in stock, EngineQuest is ready to serve your core needs.
	When our buyers are working with auto salvage yards, we buy their scrap items, such as radiators, batteries, harness wire, and aluminum wheels. In addition, we serve the Las Vegas local business community for their scrap metal recycling needs. By specializing in automotive and non-ferrous scrap, we can offer our customers better prices, as well as top-notch service, which has allowed us to become one of the largest business-to-business recyclers in the west.

Name: ELAV 13 Group SRL
Description:
ELAV 13 Group è un'azienda giovane e dinamica, situata a Concesio, in provincia di Brescia.
L'azienda offre servizi di prototipazione rapida servendosi delle migliori tecnologie esistenti sul mercato al fine di soddisfare pienamente e in tempi molto rapidi le esigenze del cliente. Tra i prototipi realizzati annoveriamo prototipi in nylon, prototipi in alluminio e prototipi in acciaio ma i materiali a disposizione sono svariati.
L'officina effettua lavorazioni meccaniche con varie tipologie di macchine a controllo numerico tra le quali centri di lavoro a 5 assi e torni a controllo che ci permettono di lavorare con rapidità e precisione nelle varie fasi di produzione. Tutte le macchine da noi utilizzate sono altamente attendibili e flessibili, in modo da garantire la massima qualità del prodotto. La tornitura CNC e la fresatura a controllo numerico consentono di produrre componenti meccanici a disegno con tolleranze ristrette e rifiniture di qualità.
Si effettua la costruzione di stampi per fonderie in pressofusione adatti allo stampaggio di vari materiali, come, per esempio, l’alluminio e la realizzazione di stampi per stampaggio di materie plastiche, gomma e silicone a iniezione. Realizziamo inoltre contenitori e sifoni per la pressofusione. 
L'azienda si occupa inoltre di progettazione meccanica e si pone al servizio delle industrie facenti parte del settore, impegnandosi ad assistervi durante l'intero progetto.
