Name: Bacci Romano
Description:
Bacci Romano è un’eccellenza italiana nel settore delle trasmissioni meccaniche per automotive e motorsport, con oltre un secolo di esperienza. Specializzata in componenti ad alte prestazioni, l’azienda unisce artigianalità e innovazione tecnologica, mantenendo la sede storica a Tavarnelle Val di Pesa (Firenze).
Principali settori di attività
	•	Differenziali autobloccanti: Progettati per modelli come Ford Gruppo A 9 e Dacia Sandero, quest’ultimo lanciato nel 2024 come soluzione dedicata.
	•	Cambi sequenziali: Include il cambio 7 marce per Fiat 500 Abarth e Volkswagen, tra i prodotti più richiesti dagli appassionati.
	•	Partnership strategiche: Collaborazione con Erreà dal 2023 e distribuzione attraverso reti specializzate come Officine Pellegrino.
Innovazione ed eventi
	•	Espansione globale: Dal 2025 presenza in Nord America e Canada, con partecipazione a fiere internazionali come il Professional MotorSport World Expo.
	•	Master Show Bacci: Evento annuale al circuito di Napoli, vetrina di novità tecniche e networking.
	•	Sviluppi digitali: Lancio del nuovo sito web nel 2024, pensato per migliorare l’interazione con clienti e appassionati.

Valori e prospettive
Con un approccio che spazia dalla competizione (52° Trofeo Vallecamonica 2023) alla ricerca ingegneristica, Bacci Romano rappresenta un ponte tra tradizione meccanica e soluzioni all’avanguardia, puntando su formazione (master tecnici) e sostenibilità produttiva

Name: MOMO Technology Corp.
Description:
MOMO Technology Corp. was founded in 2018 by a team of experienced automotive professionals with a shared mission: to transform internal combustion engine systems through advanced component innovation. The company originated from deep industry knowledge and a bold startup spirit, aiming to solve efficiency and performance challenges at the core of automotive engineering.

Backed by early-stage innovation funding and headquartered within a leading university tech incubator, MOMO rapidly transitioned from concept to certified prototype. Within our first year, we secured strong interest and pre-orders from international customers in Germany and Italy—validating both the technical promise and commercial potential of our solution.

As the automotive industry’s momentum shifted toward electrification, we adapted by channeling MOMO’s capabilities into broader product strategy, pricing intelligence, and sourcing advisory across global automotive categories. Though operations concluded in 2020, the company’s impact continues through the strategic work and insights of its founding team.

Highlights:

Engineered and certified a breakthrough powertrain component within 12 months

Established commercial traction in European markets (Germany & Italy)

Built partnerships across manufacturing, R&D, and distribution

Informed global pricing, sourcing, and category strategies through real-world innovation experience

MOMO’s story represents the resilience, timing, and technical depth that define high-impact ventures—an experience now fueling forward-thinking innovation and analytics in new markets.

Name: SunCoast Performance/SunCoast Diesel/SunCoast Gas/SunCoast Converters
Description:
SunCoast Performance was established in 1989 initially as a two-man operation in beautiful Fort Walton Beach, FL. SunCoast was started with a yearning to answer the demand for high-quality aftermarket torque converters, transmission assemblies, and parts. Since that time, SunCoast has identified, tested, and corrected numerous failure points within the realm of OEM transmissions and torque converters. SunCoast uses its extensive test data in real-world scenarios, along with the latest technology in design methods to help formulate solutions to correct these failures. These processes have propelled SunCoast to the forefront of its competitors in not only quality of craftsmanship, but also extending well past the winners’ podium for its customers and sponsored vehicles. The SunCoast research and development team, in conjunction with years of experience in the transmission and torque converter industry, is unparalleled in the automotive community today. 

American made with unmatched pride in design, manufacturing, technical support, and customer satisfaction has always been the primary goal of SunCoast Performance. The company bi-annually holds a research laboratory to help educate its customers and suppliers as to the changes technology is bringing to the industry today and in the future.

Today, at the pinnacle of automotive performance in design, engineering, and manufacturing, SunCoast has grown to over 45 employees and more than 75,000 climate-controlled square feet. These facilities are used for not only manufacturing, but SunCoast also leases out 20,000 square feet to their in-house metal supplier National Aluminum & Alloy. Carrying upwards of $2,000,000 worth of readily available raw materials, National Aluminum allows SunCoast to maintain complete manufacturing control of their products from inception to completion.

Name: metior consulting
Description:
A good methoding design often determines the ease with which the casting can be manufactured and the final quality of the casting. Methoding design plays an important role in all the stages of casting production. METIOR Consulting supports in everything related to methoding, for an efficient, effective and faster solution for casting development.

Our areas of support for 
CASTING BUYERS
Casting Design analysis for foundry production: The most economical way to make castings is to first get the casting DESIGN right. This starts at the design stage itself. We can support is making the castings more foundry friendly to develop faster, minimise development and production costs, ensure better quality. We can also support casting buyers in….
o	trouble shooting at vendors, improvement projects
o	faster casting development
o	training programs on casting defects, analysis and trouble shooting

FOUNDRIES
Casting methoding – design of running system, risering, simulation,
o	automotive castings
o	Castings made on any kind of advanced automatic moulding lines

Application of products - selection, application and optimisation of methoding products likes sleeves (exothermic/insulating and high density) , direct pour units and filters.

Improvement projects
o	Yield improvement
o	Reducing casting rejections
o	Casting development

Training programs on iron methoding with various options, including customization to suit individual needs, depending on the process, type of castings, application of consumables, and casting simulation
o	Running systems
o	Risering
o	Simulation program – Magmasoft
o	Making sense of simulation results
o	Solving casting defects

Em 2013, disposta a ampliar seus negócios e aumentar sua participação no mercado, investiu na verticalização de sua produção para atender a demanda com considerável redução de custos. Com o objetivo de facilitar sua movimentação e agregar mais valor ao serviço prestado, a empresa estabeleceu sua área comercial na capital de São Paulo, fortalecendo os trabalhos de relacionamento e pós-vendas, para a fidelização de clientes.

Name: Ogab Invent
Description:
We are a small Research and Development team specialising in aerodynamics, thermodynamics, and sustainable technology. Our operational sectors span the automotive, rail, aviation, motorsport, and energy industries.

Located in Somerset, in the South West of England, our mission is to enhance performance, safety, and environmental impact across the transport and energy sectors. Through our work, we have developed an extensive portfolio of patents focused on boosting efficiency through sustainable innovation.

Our expertise has resulted in a number of patents—both granted and pending—covering aerodynamics, thermodynamics, applied physics, and engineering.

Introducing Ogab Sustainable Braking: the pioneering brake technology that increases safety, improves performance, extends longevity, and captures harmful brake pad dust particles. Key features include:
• Controlled brake temperature – reducing brake disc average volume temperature by up to 80.89%, even under high-demand conditions
• Captures up to 95% of brake wear particulate matter
• No moving parts – easy to install and maintain
• Enhanced safety and performance – by maintaining optimal brake temperatures
• Improved aerodynamics – reduces drag by up to 12%, lowering energy consumption and boosting fuel efficiency
• Lower maintenance, reduced waste, and environmental impact – by extending the life of disc brakes and pads
• Reduced risk of mechanical failure and brake fade

Join the revolution with OGAB Invent for a greener future!
We don’t just imagine a sustainable future—we’re creating it.
Start a conversation with us today and discover how our expertise and patented technology can drive your business towards a greener tomorrow.

Karnataka Turned Components Pvt. Ltd.

Sri Chakara Engineering

Beyond machining, we are also committed to training and nurturing fresh talent. We actively offer opportunities to freshers and CNC trainees, helping them develop skills in machine operation, engineering drawing interpretation, and precision inspection using standard measuring instruments.

Company Type: Proprietorship

MSME Category: Micro Unit

Industry: CNC Machining / Precision Job Work

Name: NAR Group.Ltd
Description:
NAR Group Ltd is the Premier manufacturer in the UK specialising in cooling components. This ranges from the automotive industries such as Aston Martin and Jaguar to commercial, plant and military defence. In 2006 we entered the Defence sector working closely with the UK MOD and prime contractors such as BAE Land systems. We designed a complete cooling upgrade for the CVRT range of fighting vehicles. Since then we have designed, manufactured and supplied cooling products across the military sector.

Our experience has been gained from over 50 years designing, building and repairing radiators, and improving on performance over the original parts. We can make any radiator, oil cooler, intercooler and more for any car from a drawing or supplied pattern. The shop shows our comprehensive range of Jaguar, Aston Martin and Healey replacements which are mostly available from stock. All our cores are hand-built in our own factory, designed and developed to perfectly suit the vehicle they are fitted to. All our radiator tubes are internally clad with 7072 corrosion resistant material to radically improve life in-service and our oil coolers all have internal turbulators to ensure maximum strength and heat rejection. If you have a cooling query for your vehicle we will most certainly have the solution. Give us a call or drop into our workshop in Northampton to speak to one of our experienced engineers.

We, as a team, truly hope to change the auto part industry and set a standard for the service expected from auto part retailers in the future. We are always open to new members applying for sponsorship to the 10 Second Racing crew as well as fans looking to stay up to date with the events we will be attending in your area. As our original club motto stated, we ask you, our loyal fan, ‘What’s your 10 second car?’.

Established in 1980 we have continuously developed and improved our range and manufacturing methods and remain second to none for quality, safety & personal service.

The company first set up near Macclesfield in Cheshire in the 1970s as Specialised Automobile Services (SAS) and began by manufacturing the steel rim types and wheel centres which were no longer available at that time. The Turrino range of alloy rims was first developed in the 1990s and these are manufactured in England on our own tooling. New sizes and types are being added all the time and we have recently taken out patents on new manufacturing methods for our 3 piece wheels for modern cars & hotrods.

Description:
L’Officina Meccanica Bertè nasce nel 1975.

L’attività principale è costituita dalla produzione di terminali e minuterie metalliche per il settore automotive, tramite l’ausilio di macchine speciali e personale specializzato.
Col preciso scopo di soddisfare esigenze di produzione e particolari richieste del mercato, ha adattato negli anni il proprio organico sia in termini di personale che di mezzi ed attrezzature, elevando la quantità dei macchinari e la qualità degli stessi.
Sebbene l’attività principale sia rimasta negli anni la stessa, al mercato di riferimento dei produttori di primo impianto e ricambisti Italiani si è aggiunto l’analogo settore relativo ai produttori di alcuni paesi esteri.

L’elevata esperienza nel primo impianto garantisce inoltre, una maggiore affidabilità delle produzioni destinate al settore del cosiddetto “after market”, destinato alla fabbricazione di autoricambi, essendo queste produzioni approcciate con lo stesso rigore delle partite di primo impianto.

Attualmente l’azienda dispone di un organico ben assortito su tutte le specializzazioni di lavorazione e svolge la propria attività in un moderno capannone di 2500 mq.

Firmamız 2007 yılından itibaren CORA GEAR markası ile birlikte hedef odaklı, kaliteli, yenilikçi, dinamik, sürekli gelişen ve başarma arzusu yüksek çalışma prensibi doğrultusunda üretimine hız kesmeden devam etmektedir. 
CORA GEAR uluslararası satış faaliyetleri ile en iyi ürün ve hizmeti sunarak iletişim, satış ve iş geliştirme becerileri sayesinde Asya’dan Amerika’ya, Avrupa’dan Afrika’ya kadar dünya pazarında etkin ve saygın bir marka olarak yer almaktadır. 
Gelişmiş stok sistemi sayesinde üretmiş olduğu her ürünü en hızlı şekilde ulaştırabilmektedir.
Her müşterimizin dostluğunu ve memnuniyetini kazanmayı hedefliyoruz. Bu sayede günden güne büyüyen ailemizle üretim kapasitemizi ve ihracat hacmimizi geliştirmeyi sürdürüyoruz. 
Sizlere kaliteli, kalıcı ve güvenilir hizmet sunmak adına çıktığımız bu yolda, bizi tercih etmeniz dileğiyle…

Name: TBFIL Brasil
Description:
A TBFIL BRASIL é uma empresa 100% nacional idealizada em setembro de 2002. O início de suas atividades ocorre em outubro do mesmo ano em uma área de 650 m² onde foram produzidas as primeiras unidades de Elementos Filtrantes para Ar.

Inicialmente, o objetivo era nacionalizar filtros para veículos importados, porém devido ao alto índice de qualidade de nossos produtos e o comprometimento com nossos parceiros, além de mantermos a produção de filtros para veículos de passeio e utilitários, fomos direcionados para o mercado de filtros para Caminhões, Máquinas Agrícolas e Motores Estacionários.

Em agosto de 2004 seguindo a nossa política de foco na qualidade dos produtos, na contínua melhoria de nossas técnicas e o alto grau de comprometimento com nossos parceiros, mudamos para um novo prédio, onde passamos de 650 m² para 3600 m² de área construída em um terreno de 6000 m².

Firme em nossos objetivos e buscando um crescimento contínuo e sustentável para empresa, já no ano de 2008 a TBFIL BRASIL entra para o seleto grupo de empresas certificadas pelas normas da série ISO 9000.

O trabalho se mantém desde então mantendo as diretrizes apresentadas em nossa Política da Qualidade.

Na BRW, também estamos comprometidos com práticas sustentáveis. Buscamos constantemente maneiras de minimizar nosso impacto ambiental, desde a escolha de materiais até os processos de fabricação e distribuição. Acreditamos que é possível produzir rodas de alta qualidade de maneira responsável.

Valorizamos a nossa relação com clientes, parceiros e colaboradores. Acreditamos que o sucesso é alcançado através de colaboração e confiança mútua. Estamos sempre abertos a novas parcerias e oportunidades que nos permitam crescer e inovar ainda mais.

Se você compartilha da nossa paixão por rodas, siga a BRW Rodas no LinkedIn. Aqui você encontrará as últimas novidades sobre nossos produtos, lançamentos, eventos e oportunidades de carreira. Estamos sempre à procura de talentos que queiram fazer parte de nossa jornada rumo à inovação e excelência no setor automotivo.

Smarter Eye’s stereo vision systems have been successful delivered and mounted on over 100,000 vehicles. Up to 2023, We have contracted with over 450 customers and won over 20 exclusive agreements with commercial and passenger vehicle companies. We also provide solutions for L2-L5 intelligent driving to lead the technological innovation.

Smarter Eye now has 200+ talents including core members coming from CAS (Chinese Academy of Sciences), Microsoft, Toyota, Delphi, Nokia etc. with average over 15 years experience in the R&D of stereo vision technologies. With proprietary intellectual property rights, Smarter Eye has a fully functional team for the stereo camera system design, production, QC, and development of algorithms & software. Our capable R&D and engineering team are also available for any customized requests from different customers.

Today, We have over 300 patent filings/grants of which 80% are patents for invention. For ‘The World of Perception, AI-enabled Future’, Smarter Eye will constantly develop more competitive products to the diversity driving demands,  maintain industry leading of the safe and intelligent transportation market.

Name: FM Auto Technic
Description:
FM Auto Technic strives to offer solutions to complex problems in your automotive equipment. We deliver high-grade Aftermarket/OEM spare parts compatible with mining, infrastructure, and construction equipment that run specific tasks in harsh environments. With years of experience working with top companies across India, China, Dubai, and Africa- our team of experts and technicians consult and understand the problems in your foreign trucks and imported equipment, helping you source the spare parts required to fix the problem.
We entered the business in 2011 as traders of parts for buses and trucks in Chennai, India, and ventured into equipment and machinery spares as well. This was a time when the number of vehicles from foreign manufacturers in the country was relatively less or non-existent. We expanded our business by setting up a new headquarters in Dubai, expanding our horizons to the Middle East, Africa, and China. We also extended our portfolio into the design and manufacturing of parts by understanding the market and customer needs. This is possible thanks to our team of technicians and engineers who scout global markets and venture into the corners of the world to visit our client locations, usually remote mining areas or infrastructure development sites.
Our range includes spares for engines, gearboxes, suspensions, and other critical parts to fit well-known European and Chinese commercial vehicle brands. 
Our team seeks quality and timeliness from procurement to supply and after-sales assistance so your business runs like a well-oiled machine.

Name: Off Road Central
Description:
For the 4WD enthusiasts out there who are sick of travelling from shop to shop. Off Road Central provides a wide range of big brand 4x4 accessories in a one-stop shop. We help customers set up their 4x4 with the ultimate protection to take on any adventure.

We’ve been kitting out 4x4s all over Australia since 2014. We started with one salesperson selling second-hand 4WD parts on eBay and Gumtree -- now, we’re the go-to 4x4 shop online, stocking premium brands like MCC, Hamer and HSP 4x4 Accessories. From bull bars and rear bars to canopies, roof racks, vehicle protection and suspension products, lights, camping accessories and more, we have all the off-road equipment you need to veer off the beaten track.

We stock 4x4 accessories for: Ford, Isuzu, Toyota, Mazda, Nissan, Mitsubishi, Volkswagen, Holden, Mercedes, Ram, LDV, Great Wall, Land Rover, Jeep, Suzuki.

Find the perfect accessories and kit out your 4x4 with Off Road Central! We offer flexible payment options like Zip Money and Afterpay as well as fast and affordable shipping throughout Australia. Alternatively, come and visit us in-store at Lot 3 Morris Road West, Rothwell QLD.

Description:
Há mais de 42 anos, a Sá Mourão é especialista em flexíveis de freio a ar para caminhões e carretas, seguindo rigorosamente a norma SAE J1402 para máxima segurança e durabilidade. Certificada ISO 9001:2015 e em processo de IATF 16949, somos a única fabricante no Brasil a atender todas as normas exigidas, garantindo conformidade total e performance em condições extremas de temperatura.
Nascida dentro de uma das maiores fabricantes de implementos rodoviários do mundo, fornecemos itens diretamente na linha de produção para revendas, distribuidoras e principais marcas nacionais. Nossos flexíveis são rastreados com etiquetas exclusivas, permitindo rastrear matérias-primas e fornecedores para total transparência e qualidade.
Oferecemos linhas premium (100% borracha, reforço têxtil, certificada DOT) e reposição com o melhor custo-benefício, além de terminais ajustáveis à mão em aço maciço com O-ring para conexões sem folgas. Nossas mangueiras possuem maior espessura e tramas reforçadas, superando 2x as normas, ideais para desafios como canavieiros. Com presilhas para organização e durabilidade, e usinagem personalizada com agilidade e precisão, conectamos indústrias com soluções em mangueiras robustas e eficientes.
Garantimos agilidade na entrega de comprimentos personalizados, mantendo estoques para demandas específicas. Seja parceiro da Sá Mourão e eleve a segurança de sua frota! Visite samourao.com.br ou entre em contato: vendas@samourao.com.br | (54) 3771-6229.
#FreiosAutomotivos #SAEJ1402 #MontadorasDeCaminhoes #ImplementosRodoviarios #OEMSuppliers"

Name: STREET TRACK LIFE LTD
Description:
Street Track Life began in 2010 as a motorsport and car culture blog. Today, it’s evolved into a globally recognised brand at the forefront of the automotive aftermarket industry.

We specialise in designing, sourcing, and delivering premium parts for niche performance vehicles, 4x4s, and lifestyle builds. Operating from our UK and EU warehouses, we ship hundreds of orders each week to enthusiasts around the world; from wheels and suspension to overland gear and outdoor equipment. Our in-house fitting service also offers expert installation for selected parts.

Alongside distributing leading brands like Front Runner, Evo Corse, and Bradley Wheels, we've built a strong portfolio of in-house sub-brands:

JimnyStyle - a global leader in Suzuki Jimny parts, upgrades and styling

Magpie Wheels - our bold, functional alloy wheel range for road and off-road use

HIGH PEAK - an outdoor lifestyle brand shaped by rugged design and automotive heritage, featuring UK-made gear and Italian-built wheels trusted by adventure drivers worldwide, including rally team, Team Gazzetta!

Driven by quality, innovation, and a genuine connection to the community, we combine trusted global brands with our own product developments to meet the needs of a fast-moving market. Delivering outstanding customer service remains at the heart of everything we do.

With a commitment to precision, quality and innovation, the company specializes in producing high-performance parts that meet international standards.

Equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and a skilled workforce, Munish Forge Limited ensures superior craftsmanship, durability and reliability in every product. From JCB cutter kits to custom-engineered solutions, the company plays a vital role in powering industrial progress.

Description:
No ano de 2010 nascia a Jetta Componentes, uma empresa familiar, criada a partir da tradição e da vivência no transporte. E foi na Capital do Caminhoneiro, em São Marcos, na Serra Gaúcha, que levamos adiante o desejo e fabricar peças e acessórios inovadores para caminhões.

A empresa cresceu, se tornou referência no Brasil e, em 2021, se transformou em Venka Componentes. Mudamos nosso nome e identidade visual para acompanhar o mercado global, ressaltar nossos atributos e consolidar nossa história.

Assim, estamos cada vez mais fortes para mostrar que cada caminhão pode ter seu estilo!
Location: São Marcos, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: METALÚRGICA VALCLA LTDA

seu próprio negócio descobrindo seu talento no desenvolvimento de peças para
motocicletas. Em pouco tempo a Metalúrgica Valcla começa a se tornar referência no
segmento. 
Em 2007, a Valcla realiza a conquista de sua sede própria instalada na cidade de Ferraz

implantação de novos processos de fabricação.
Acreditamos que com equipamentos de primeira linha, fornecimento das melhores
matérias-primas e treinamento constante dos colaboradores a Valcla está preparada para
dar mais um grande salto em sua jornada de sucesso, por isso em 2020 iniciamos nossa
reestruturação aprimorando processos, atendimento e qualidade dos produtos visando
consolidar as parcerias conquistadas e atuar cada vez mais forte no segmento de moto
peças.
Com 21 anos de fundação a Metalúrgica Valcla é destaque por sua determinação e
ousadia em oferecer produtos de qualidade e preços competitivos, nosso maior objetivo
é contribuir e alcançar a excelência.

Name: All Automatic
Description:
For over 30 years, All Automatic has been a leader in automatic torque converter rebuilding. We specialise in delivering high-quality transmission parts and services. Based in Staffordshire, England, we proudly serve a wide range of clients, including HGV and forklift repair specialists, rebuilders, and car garages across Europe.

Our expertise spans vehicles from historic models to modern cars and industrial forklifts. No matter the vehicle, our team of skilled engineers rebuilds and reconditions automatic torque converters with precision and care. We combine decades of experience with cutting-edge techniques, ensuring every torque converter is restored to optimal performance.

At All Automatic, we offer more than just parts. We deliver peace of mind. Whether you're maintaining a small garage or handling heavy-duty HGV repairs, we know how critical reliability is. That’s why our re-manufactured torque converters are designed to meet the highest industry standards.

From local garages to large-scale rebuilders, our clients trust us for fast, dependable service. We maintain a vast inventory of transmission parts and components to support their needs. Our goal? To be the partner you can rely on for all your transmission and torque converter solutions. Long-lasting, high-quality, and tailored to you.

When it comes to automatic torque converter rebuilding, All Automatic is your trusted specialist. Wherever you are in Europe, we’re ready to keep your vehicles running smoothly.

Description:
A Roadline é uma empresa especializada na importação e distribuição de rodas e componentes para veículos pesados, com mais de uma década de experiência no setor. Ao longo dos anos, consolidamos uma trajetória marcada pela qualidade, confiabilidade e compromisso com o transporte rodoviário brasileiro, atendendo frotas, oficinas e empresas em todo o país.

Nosso portfólio inclui uma linha completa de rodas de alumínio e de aço, além de ajustadores manuais, cuícas de freio, pés mecânicos e diversos outros componentes essenciais para o bom desempenho de caminhões, carretas e ônibus. Todos os produtos Roadline são cuidadosamente selecionados junto a fabricantes parceiros internacionais, que atendem aos mais altos padrões de engenharia e produção.

As rodas de alumínio Roadline são reconhecidas pelo brilho superior, leveza e resistência, enquanto as rodas de aço oferecem durabilidade e excelente custo-benefício. Nossos processos de seleção e controle de qualidade seguem rigorosos critérios técnicos, garantindo que cada item comercializado possua certificação INMETRO e desempenho comprovado nas estradas.

Mais do que uma fornecedora de produtos, a Roadline é uma parceira estratégica do transporte pesado, comprometida em oferecer soluções que unem tecnologia, segurança e eficiência. Atuamos com responsabilidade, valorizando nossos colaboradores, clientes e parceiros, e mantendo um compromisso contínuo com a sustentabilidade e o desenvolvimento do setor.

Com uma equipe qualificada e um propósito claro de servir com excelência, seguimos firmes em nossa missão de conectar qualidade, inovação e confiança em cada quilômetro percorrido.

Roadline – O seu caminho é aqui.

Hyundai Steel Slovakia distributes steel (coils, sheets) especially for the automotive industry within Central Europe.

Name: FARET AUTO RADIATOR
Description:
With over 20 years of expertise in automotive cooling management, FARET Group is a recognized leader in the research, development, and manufacturing of innovative thermal management solutions. Our diverse product range covers automotive radiators, condensers, large machinery radiators, power battery liquid cooling plates, and advanced energy storage cooling systems.

FARET serves more than 60 global automotive brands, offering over 17,000 product models and exporting to 110+ countries worldwide. We are proud to operate three major production bases in Guangzhou (Panyu District), Zhaoqing High-Tech Zone, and Tianjin (Wuqing District), with a total area of 300,000 square meters.

As the chair of the Heat Exchanger Branch of the China Association of Automobile Manufacturers and a National "Specialized, Refined, and Innovative Little Giant" Enterprise, FARET leads the industry with 145+ core technology patents and AEO advanced certification. Our commitment to quality, intelligence, and low-carbon development has made us a trusted partner in both traditional automotive and new energy sectors.

FARET’s innovative technologies are frequently featured on CCTV and major media, reflecting our dedication to excellence and ongoing contributions to the global automotive industry.

Our commitment is not just to excellence, but to flexibility, ensuring that every service we provide is tailored precisely to meet our customers’ unique needs.

Name: Mahajak Autoparts Co. Ltd.
Description:
【Background of Establishment】
In 1969, Mahajak Industry Co., LTD., one of Mahajak Gr , was established to manufacture high-quality fastening products, which have been well known in the domestic and international markets. In 1989, passionate demands from customers led to the establishment of Mahajak Autoparts Co., LTD. (MAP).

【What is Mahajak Gr】
Mahajak Gr, which includes MAP, consists of more than 30 companies led by Mahajak Development. Mahajak Gr has contributed to Thailand's economic growth for more than 30 years by actively establishing joint ventures with Japanese companies that are world-renowned for “Made-in-Japan”, such as MACO(Mitsubishi Heavy Industries-Mahajak Air Conditioner Co., Ltd), a joint venture with Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, Ltd., which has led Japanese industry in air conditioner manufacturing, and KCH(Kobe CH Wire (Thailand) Co., Ltd), a joint venture with Kobe Steel, Ltd., which produces high-quality steel.

【What is our Business】
We have been supplying forged parts (hot forging/cold forging) to the automotive and motorcycle industries, which are famous for their strict quality requirements, as well as bolt products for airports, buildings, bridges, and other infrastructure. We have supplied to all automobile and motorcycle companies such as TOYOTA/ HONDA/ MITSUBISHI/ HINO/ KAWASAKI, and also to Rama IX Bridge/ Suvarnabhumi Airport/ Queen Sirikit National Convention Center/ One Bangkok. Our clients in a wide range of business fields are satisfied with our business.

【Future】
With the support of many clients and strong competitiveness, we have been in business for more than 30 years. On the other hand, companies are required to pursue environmental conservation and economic efficiency, as in the trend toward carbon neutrality worldwide.
We recognize that this major turning point of the era is a huge business opportunity, and then commit to further business development and contribution to society.

At Hybrid Auto Cast, we embrace lean manufacturing, preventive maintenance, and continuous improvement to ensure reliability, precision, and cost-effectiveness for every customer.

Our vision is to expand capacity with advanced CNC and VMC machines and automation, strengthen process efficiency, and create long-term value for our employees, customers, and stakeholders.

We are based in Randburg: Johannesburg & Bedfordview: Germiston.

From establishing South Africa’s first Bosch Truck Service Centre to introducing the first aftermarket turbocharger brand via Masterpower Turbochargers South Africa, innovation has always been part of our DNA. By 2007, we shifted focus to importing high-quality components under Precision Power Components, later rebranding as Turbo Diesel Group.

• Turbo Diesel Services (TDS): specialists in repairing and remanufacturing turbochargers and diesel injection systems.

• Turbo Diesel Components (TDC) is a distributor of new and remanufactured components and repair parts.

• Independent Aftermarket Marketing (IAM) and other strategic property investments.



Our mission is clear: deliver quality products, innovative solutions, and reliable support to South Africa’s automotive, commercial, and off-highway sectors.

Name: Dumarey Powerglide Bouthéon
Description:
Dumarey Powerglide Bouthéon specializes in the manufacturing of manual, automated, and automatic transmissions, as well as their components for commercial vehicles (conventional, electrified, or electric). Established in 1970 by Berliet, it came under the management of Renault Véhicules Industriels in 1978, and subsequently, under the ownership of ZF in 1997. In October 2023, the facility was acquired by the Dumarey Group.
 
Dumarey Powerglide Bouthéon's product portfolio includes high-precision transmissions and mechanical components (gears, shafts, and housings), as well as sub-assemblies tailored to the specific needs of commercial vehicles (medium and heavy-duty trucks, as well as coaches).
 
The company continues to supply ZF with the historical transmissions of the site for end customers such as MAN, Iveco, Volvo/Renault Trucks, DAF, Mercedes-Benz, Hino, Leyland Trucks, and others. This unique expertise facilitates the expansion of the customer base, particularly with OEMs, notably in the field of contract manufacturing.
 
Situated in the central-eastern region of France, in Andrézieux-Bouthéon, the site employs over 300 people.

Name: Frauenthal Airtank
Description:
Frauenthal Airtank is a trusted manufacturer of high-quality air tanks used in various industries. We hold a market share of over 80% and are by far the largest air tank manufacturer in Europe. Our production plants are located in Elterlein (Germany) and Hustopeče (Czech Republic).

Our tanks are known for their reliability, durability, and performance. The tanks are covered with the highest quality corrosion protection from the inside and out. In addition to powder coating, we also work with special zinc phosphating to meet our customers’ high demands. Air tanks developed at Frauenthal Airtank are treated with this patented formula and are therefore characterized by a longer service life and greater safety. With a wide range of sizes and configurations, Frauenthal Airtank always offers customized solutions for compressed air storage needs. Our commitment to quality and innovation has made us a preferred choice in the industry.

Acabamento Premium: Serviços de revestimento e acabamento em couro e vinil para interiores de automóveis, barcos e aeronaves.

Compromisso com a Qualidade: Na Speed Fusion, nos dedicamos a oferecer soluções inovadoras e eficazes para impulsionar a mobilidade. Nosso compromisso é proporcionar serviços de alta qualidade, atendendo às necessidades dinâmicas de nossos clientes.

Visão de Futuro: Nos próximos cinco anos, almejamos consolidar-nos como referência em qualidade, pontualidade e preço, redefinindo os padrões do setor e proporcionando experiências excepcionais aos nossos clientes.

Nossos Valores:

Inovação: Soluções criativas e pioneiras para atender às demandas do mercado.
Qualidade: Produtos e serviços que superam as expectativas dos clientes.
Pontualidade: Cumprimento rigoroso de prazos, proporcionando confiança.
Transparência: Comunicação aberta e honesta, construindo relacionamentos baseados na confiança.
Sustentabilidade: Práticas sustentáveis para minimizar o impacto ambiental.
Orientação ao Cliente: Atendimento personalizado e experiência positiva em cada interação.

Grupo FS Tatuí: Solidez e excelência parte do grupo, criado em 2014 e consolidado no cenário financeiro. O grupo é guiado pela excelência, qualidade, pontualidade e sustentabilidade financeira.
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Geniş ürün yelpazesi, güçlü lojistik ağı ve rekabetçi fiyat stratejisiyle ağır vasıta ve hafif ticari araçlar alanında fark yaratan yedek parça çözümleri sunan OREX, bir dünya markası olma vizyonuyla yoluna devam etmektedir.

“Kalite, rekabetçilik ve sürekliliği” kendine misyon edinen OREX, bugün 20.000+ referansıyla MAN, Mercedes-Benz, DAF, Volvo Trucks, Renault Trucks, Scania, Ford ve Iveco marka araçların yedek parça tedariğini sağlamaktadır.

Ürün gamıyla dünyanın en büyük motorlu araç veri tabanı olan TECDOC sisteminde de yer alan OREX, sektörden gelen talepler doğrultusunda yeni araç gruplarını da kapsayacak şekilde portföyünü genişletmeyi hedeflemektedir.

Gücünü deneyimli iş ortaklarından alan OREX, Türkiye ile Avrupa’da uluslararası ve OE hizmeti veren üreticilerle çalışmakta, gerek ürünlerinin kalitesi gerekse satış sonrası hizmetler alanındaki ‘müşteri odaklı yaklaşımı’ ile tam not almaktadır.

“Sürdürülebilir büyüme” ilkesini benimseyen OREX, tüm paydaşlarına artı değer katacak adımlar atmaya devam edecektir.

TR:

Firmamız hem yurtiçi hem de yurt dışı satış yapmakla beraber zengin müşteri portföyüne sahiptir.
Bununla birlikte ISO 9001:2015 Kalite yönetim sistemi standartlarına uygun olacak şekilde üretim yaparak satışlarını gerçekleştirmektedir.
Kaliteli imalat ve kurumsal iletişime oldukça önem veren firmamız aynı zamanda disiplinli çalışmanın getirdiği hızlı sevkiyatı ile ön plana çıkmaktadır. 
İşçi sağlığı ve İş güvenliği alanında tüm önlemleri alan firmamız, ISG sistemine uygun olarak yönetilmektedir. 
EN:
Euro Kalıp Automotive, established in 2022; It continues its sales activities and auto spare parts production in its factory located in Adana, which is developed in the field of industry. 
Our company has an exhaustive customer portfolio as well as making both domestic and international sales.
In addition, it produces and sells in accordance with ISO 9001: 2015 Quality management system standards.
Our company, which attaches great importance to quality manufacturing and corporate communication, also stands out with its fast shipment brought by disciplined work. 
Our company, which takes all measures in the field of occupational health and safety, is managed in accordance with the OHS system. 
While 70% of our products are offered domestically, 30% are exported. Among our products; Filter plastics, water tanks and caps, radiator tank jar and caps, fog lamp, front grille, glazing opening handle, exterior door opening handles, bumper brackets, bumper reflectors, mirror signals, engine oil covers, engine oil rods, gear knobs, ceiling lamps, plate lamps.

Name: NEU AUTOMOTIVE
Description:
NEU Automotive was established in 2025, built upon over four decades of sectoral experience and shaped by a renewed brand and vision. Operating with high-precision forging technology, NEU has secured its place in the automotive spare parts industry through a modern production infrastructure and an independent organizational model.

From the outset, the company has focused on the production of essential automotive safety components such as lug wrenches, tie rod ends, and ball joints, placing quality, durability, and engineering excellence at the core of its manufacturing processes. Equipped with advanced forging lines and precision machining technologies, the production facility operates in full compliance with current international quality and safety standards.

In addition, NEU’s in-house tooling and mold design capabilities allow for the production of custom parts based on specific customer requirements. This flexibility positions NEU as a reliable manufacturing partner not only for standard products but also for tailored, application-specific solutions.

NEU Automotive’s mission extends beyond manufacturing: it aims to blend a deep-rooted engineering legacy with a modern production mindset to deliver a locally powered, globally competitive, and sustainable brand. Striving to be a trusted solution partner in both domestic and international markets, NEU carries the strength of experience into the future with a forward-looking vision.

Description:
Desde su sede en Barcelona, HAPPICH RIU S.A. destaca por su compromiso continuo con la calidad y su sólida presencia en los mercados internacionales, rasgos que definen su identidad como empresa.  


Junto con todos los productos que ofrecen las empresas del grupo HAPPICH, somos el proveedor líder de equipamiento para vehículos de servicios públicos y especiales. 

Después de más de una década de la adquisición por parte de Pelzer Swiss Holding AG, y con la mejora de instalaciones en nuestra nueva sede, podemos ofrecer una mayor capacidad de producción y la flexibilidad necesaria para respaldar el crecimiento futuro. Podemos decir que estamos en disposición de optimizar nuestras operaciones, garantizando una mayor eficiencia y capacidad de satisfacer las crecientes demandas del mercado. Hemos mejorado nuestras capacidades actuales y estamos reafirmando nuestro compromiso con nuestros clientes y con el grupo HAPPICH en los años venideros.

El grupo HAPPICH es una empresa familiar con una clara orientación estratégica. Persigue objetivos a largo plazo y es un actor sólido, reconocido y experto en el mercado.

En HAPPICH RIU S.A. somos plenamente conscientes de nuestras mayores fortalezas y cualidades, vamos a poner nuestra marca en los próximos desarrollos de vehículos industriales.

Estamos reforzando nuestra presencia en Sudamérica y Francia. Nuestro centro de atención está siempre en ustedes, nuestros clientes, que han puesto su confianza en nosotros, y esperan a cambio la mejor respuesta. Trabajando bajo sus propuestas, nuestras ideas, y mejorando con el uso de nuevas tecnologías, intentamos mejorar los productos y vehículos que ustedes fabrican. Este es el desafío que nos impulsa hacia adelante.

The Gledj family, along with our dedicated co-workers, have transformed our company into a global entity, which currently operating in 40 countries worldwide.

Gledring d.o.o. is committed to leading the car rubber and trunk mats industry. Our brand is synonymous with a passion for cars and lifestyle, driving us to continuously strengthen our products and introduce innovations to the market. As leaders in innovation and design within the car rubber mats industry, we pride ourselves on delivering new, high-quality designer products to the market

Consumer satisfaction is at the core of our operations. We continually enhance the quality, appearance, and functionality of our products to exceed consumer expectations and deliver exceptional value.

Our vision is to maintain our position as industry leaders while fostering a culture of continuous improvement and innovation. We aspire to remain the go-to choice for premium automotive accessories worldwide.

Thank you for taking the time to learn about Gledring d.o.o. Join us in our journey as we continue to innovate, evolve, and drive excellence in the automotive industry. Connect with us on LinkedIn to stay updated on o

Bandenspanning is van grote invloed op het brandstof verbruik, de CO2 emissie, de bandenslijtage en de verkeersveiligheid. Dat geldt voor ieder soort voertuig. Een TPMS systeem is een belangrijke hulp om permanent en eenvoudig uw bandenspanning te controleren. Ons assortiment TPMS systemen is zeer breed en loopt van verschillende modellen voor bussen, trucks, trailers en OTR-voertuigen door tot specialistische truck systemen.
Naast stand-alone systemen hebben wij ook aan telematica koppelbare TPMS systemen in ons assortiment. Merk onafhankelijk te koppelen aan elk TMS systeem.

Airodyne's contributions have had a lasting impact on fuel efficiency and performance for heavy trucks.
Well designed Roof Fairings (closed top and sides extending to back of cab) remain the single most important fuel-economy device, with Savings up to 15%! Independent Fleet Tests Report Fuel Savings Up To 14% with Airodyne Roof Fairings.

With three advanced manufacturing bases in Ningbo (Zhejiang), Jinshan (Shanghai), and Thailand, EBI maintains strict quality control and operational efficiency. The company’s product portfolio includes wheel hub units (Gen.1, Gen.2, Gen.3), bearing kits, air-conditioning compressor bearings, tensioner bearings, clutch release bearings, EMQ ball bearings, and high-precision bearings—serving both OEM and aftermarket needs.

Certified under ISO/TS16949, EBI combines advanced production technology with continuous investment in innovation to meet the evolving demands of the global automotive industry. Guided by the principle of “quality first, customer first,” EBI is dedicated to delivering value through dependable products and responsive service.

Name: Threeway
Description:
Taizhou Threeway Vehicle Catalytic Converter Co., Ltd. was established in 2007 and completed its shareholding system reform in August 2023, lt is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in the research, development,production, and sales of automotive exhaust after-treatment devices. lt is also a provincial-level research and development center for vehicle exhaust purification technology. 

It’s products are mainly used for controlling vehicle exhaust noise and emissions pollution,included various types of universal and directly fit catalytic converters (such as auto-motive three-way catalytic converters, diesel particulate filters, NOx selective reduction catalysts, and exhaust silencers,etc) 

After years of development the company has obtained multiple independent intellectual property rights and has become equipped with core technologies such as "nano-precious metal catalysts" and "controllable coating processes." The developed products fully meet emission standards in regions such as the United States and the European Union. lt is currently one of the earliest domestic manufacturers of automotive exhaust treatment products in china to have officially obtained certification from the united States Environmental Protection Agency (EPA).

There are currently 1200 catalytic converters available for direct installation,covering over 8000 models in use.including popular models overseas in recent years. 

The company currently including "THREE-WAY" and "TWCAT", with over 80% of its products sold to various countries and regions worldwide.

Com forte presença nas competições, a GRS se destaca pelo desenvolvimento constante de produtos com alta performance e qualidade. Em 2022, mudou seu nome para GRS Racing, marcando sua expansão para o mercado de motopeças com o objetivo de se tornar uma das 10 maiores distribuidoras do Brasil.

Name: AGR Autogas Group
Description:
VIZIUNEA GRUPULUI AGR este sa daruiasca tuturor conducatorilor auto, placerea de a conduce.

CONCEPTUL AGR se regaseste  in calitatea si diversitatea produselor care acopera toate segmentele de piata putând oferi satisfactie maxima prin reducerea cheltuielilor de transport oricarui conducator auto indiferent de tipul autoturismului.

Conceptul AGR face posibila servirea cat mai multor clienti care au ales pentru autoturismul lor o instalatie GPL, prin promovarea unei game largi de produse, personalizate pentru fiecare tip de autoturism, ajutându-i in acest fel sa-si reduca cheltuielile de transport.
Conceptul AGR ne conduce la modul in care produsele sunt proiectate, fabricate, transportate, omologate, comercializate si instalate pe autovehicule.

Toti acesti factori vor contribui la transformarea Conceptului AGR in realitate.

Sistemul comercial al firmei AGR este construit pe baza unor principii considerate ca fiind cele mai importante pentru împlinirea viziunii noastre.

 

PRINCIPIILE AGR:
    Sa asiguram o gama larga de produse care sa acopere toate exigentele clientilor nostri si sa putem echipa cu GPL orice autoturism pe benzina, având o disponibilitate permanenta pentru toate produsele noastre astfel încât partenerii nostri sa redea satisfactie maxima conducatorilor auto care doresc sa faca economii.

Sa investim permanent in cercetarea si testarea noilor produse pentru a raspunde provocarilor domeniului auto mereu inovativ din punct de vedere tehnic si îndreptat catre reducerea noxelor si a consumului de carburant.

Sa dezvoltam continuu sistemul nostru operativ si rapid de preluare, elaborare, livrare si montaj pentru toti partenerii AGR oferind satisfactie maxima clientilor nostri din toata tara.

 Sa asiguram permanent asistenta tehnica, scolarizare de calitate pentru dezvoltarea nivelului tehnic al part

Name: Vesna Auto
Description:
Vesna-Auto - це унікальний досвід, який поєднує в собі інноваційність, розвиток та відданість справі. З моменту свого заснування в 2010 році, компанія постійно розширювала свої горизонти, пропонуючи співробітникам можливості для професійного та особистісного зростання. В Vesna-Auto, ми пишаємося нашою широкою мережею представництв. З метою забезпечення легкого та швидкого доступу до широкого асортименту деталей, ми є у всіх обласних центрах України, а також в таких важливих містах, як Київ, Чернівці, Івано-Франківськ, Хмельницький, Львів, Дніпро, Одеса, та нашому рідному Тячеві, де все почалося. Наш склад, що налічує понад 80 000 деталей.

Наша команда, яка налічує понад 250 професіоналів, працює в умовах, де інновації та вдосконалення є щоденною нормою. Кожен співробітник має доступ до величезного каталогу з понад 80 000 деталей, що постійно поповнюється, що робить нашу роботу не лише цікавою, але й динамічною.
  Міжнародне співробітництво з країнами Європейського Союзу, Туреччиною, Індією, Китаєм, та Бразилією. Особливо пишаємось ми нашим брендом Zilberman, що об'єднує близько 60 заводів по всьому світу, включаючи країни, як-от Туреччина, Польща, Україна та США. Це не тільки розширює наші професійні горизонти, але й надихає на нові досягнення.
Місія компанії Vesna-Auto полягає у наданні високоякісних, інноваційних рішень у сфері автозапчастин для легкових та комерційних автомобілів. Ми прагнемо бути лідером на ринку, постійно розвиваючи наш асортимент та підтримуючи неперевершений рівень обслуговування клієнтів. 
Наша мета - забезпечити швидкий та зручний доступ до широкого спектру якісних запчастин, розширюючи мережу представництв по всій Україні.  Важливою складовою нашої місії є створення і підтримка стабільного та мотивуючого середовища для наших співробітників, де кожен має можливість рости та розвиватися .

Name: Pro-M Racing, LLC.
Description:
Here at PRO-M we manufacture mass air meters in various sizes, shapes, and styles, as both direct bolt-in replacements, and in universal designs, to maximize your engine's horsepower potential, by allowing your engine to breathe to its fullest potential. Each mass air meter is individually calibrated on one of our in-house flow benches specific to your particular application, and fuel injector size, eliminating the need for time consuming and expensive dyno tuning.

Others make claims, but only Pro-M Racing possesses both the intellectual and physical properties necessary to calibrate your mass air meter to within two percent of what the OEM considers the perfect baseline. (In comparison, OEM meters are typically held to within 6 percent). Quite simply, despite their claims, no other company even knows what this baseline is. For those who choose to have their vehicle professionally tuned, all of our meters are supplied with a flow data sheet. The flow data sheet provides extremely accurate and invaluable information for tuners, greatly reducing the time needed to properly tune your vehicle. All of our mass air meters can be installed in a matter of minutes, and will provide immediate results. 

To this day, no other aftermarket company has succeeded in duplicating our process. Many have tried, (and are still trying!) but no other company comes close to duplicating our quality, or our accuracy, because no other company possesses the product knowledge, and/or the equipment necessary to do so, and they never will. No other company has access to our intellectual resources, or to our processes. No other company possesses the product knowledge we have to support you in your quest for power, performance, and drivability. Our company, and our products, have always been, and always will be, the standard by which all others are judged.

Name: INDYMETAL SAS
Description:
La fabricación y el comercio de partes, piezas y accesorios para vehículos automotores es una actividad económica importante en muchos países del mundo, incluyendo Colombia.

Esta industria se dedica a la producción de una amplia variedad de componentes para vehículos automotores, Algunos ejemplos de productos fabricados por esta industria incluyen Indymetal S.A.S. fabrica accesorios para frenos, divididos en tres grupos importantes: Graduaciones para Freno, Kit Mordaza y Pistones Mordaza.

¿Qué son los accesorios para frenos?:  Son componentes supremamente importantes para el buen funcionamiento del sistema general de frenos de cualquier vehículo automotor, aplica en conjuntos de frenos:  hidráulicos, mecánicos o manuales.

más información https://www.indymetal.com.co/productos/

La fabricación de partes, piezas y accesorios para vehículos automotores es una industria altamente competitiva, ya que los fabricantes deben cumplir con estrictos estándares de calidad y seguridad. Además, esta industria es altamente regulada y requiere la obtención de certiﬁcaciones y permisos.

La industria de la fabricación de partes, piezas y accesorios para vehículos automotores en Colombia es una industria emergente, con un gran potencial de crecimiento, gracias al aumento de la producción de vehículos y la inversión en infraestructura de transporte. Sin embargo, esta industria enfrenta retos, como la competencia extranjera y la falta de inversión en investigación y desarrollo.

En general, la fabricación de partes, piezas y accesorios para vehículos automotores es una actividad económica importante que proporciona empleo y contribuye al crecimiento económico de un país.

T.T.A. S.L. es la primera empresa creada exclusivamente para la reconstrucción y reparación de cajas de cambio automático hace más de 30 años.

T.T.A. S.L. capaz de solucionar cualquier problema en su caja de cambio automático.

T.T.A. S.L. tiene acceso directo a los fabricantes de cajas de cambio que montan casi todas las marcas de automóviles. Nuestro stock y nuestra facilidad de acceso a los fabricantes nos permite ofrecer soluciones rápidas y económicas.

Los avances tecnológicos, la adecuación a la demanda y nuestra política de aprovisionamiento nos permite OFRECER soluciones en cajas de cambio, convertidores, cajas de válvulas, transmisiones y embragues en VEHÍCULOS CLÁSICOS.

Con T.T.A. S.L. ahora es el turno de la especialización en cambios automáticos, con el objetivo de dar un servicio profesional ágil y con un precio justo.

El primer taller de la cadena está ubicado en la Avda. Vallcarca, 61 de Barcelona con unas instalaciones de 400 m2, equipadas con máquinas de diagnóstico de última generación, así como todo el utillaje y la maquinaria necesaria para realizar cualquier operación de la forma más eficaz posible, lo que redunda en un beneficio para el cliente en el ahorro del tiempo a facturar.

Aunque es ahora cuando se han puesto los cimientos de esta nueva red de talleres especializados, T.T.A. S.L. cuenta con una importante experiencia en el servicio técnico de cambios automáticos gracias al trabajo que se viene realizando desde hace más de 10 años en el taller con sede en Granollers.
Con una superficie de 2.000 m2, las instalaciones de Granollers son referencia en todo el país con un equipo humano de 15 técnicos formados y certificados por ZF-Saarbrücken, 20 bancos de trabajo, 2 bancos de prueba, un robot soldador... Incluso realizan formación técnica externa, colaborando con organismos oficiales y sectoriales desde 1999.

Por las instalaciones de Granollers pasan más de 600 transmisiones automáticas al año, una cifra que crece año tras año.

PREMIER group of company POWER MASTER INDUSTRIES is one of the leading manufacturer of world class quality anti friction bearings with automotive & industrial rolling components & also rubber seals with exclusive range under brand name PREMIER.


At present the company has established its name in OEMs genuine engineering industries with replacement market & also in export market in South Asian, European & African countries.

The company  offers its customer world-class products as so import substitutes. The companies have a developed full infrastructure facilities for developing up to 500 mm Dia of bearings as per customer's requirement. 

Vast experienced team of young and energetic technocrats manages the company project and control department.
QUALITY STANDARD

Quality has always been and integral part of our organization culture and every effort is made to assume that customers get value for money. PREMIER name the stands for quality are made under strict quality control to obtain international standard. We make design of bearings with the help of advances calculation programs. The raw material selection and applying advances manufacturing techniques with computer controlled process give dimensional accuracy & durability. Also quite running high speeds and long life with energy saving of our product
We select material is vacuum degassed micro cleanliness alloy steel grade SAE 52100 Clean materials and apply controlled heat treatment process give more fatigue strength/ Toughness with high reliabilities and superior performance with services life. A detail flow process chart for all operation of manufacturing process help to maintain  close geometric parameters of components, Which ensure about excellent running accuracy life of PREMIER bearings. Also special attention is paid to the internal designing of bearings. Surface finish of the rolling surface to create optimum loading condition and maximum load capacity.

Name: INDUSTRIAS GES

Además, ofrecemos procesos complementarios que aportan valor añadido: soldadura, roscado, remachado, control de uniones y acabado por desengrase al vacío, garantizando piezas limpias y listas para procesos posteriores.
 
Nuestra experiencia como proveedor Tier 2, junto con la certificación IATF/TS 16949, nos permite asegurar procesos robustos, innovación continuada y una respuesta ágil a las necesidades de cada cliente. Desde el diseño del útil hasta la producción en serie, proporcionamos soluciones eficientes, fiables y de alto nivel técnico.

Name: Aisan Industry Czech s. r. o.
Description:
Společnost Aisan se více než 80 let zabývá vývojem a výrobou funkčních dílů, které naleznou své místo v palivovém systému, systému sání vzduchu a výfukového systému automobilů a motocyklů. Díky specializovaným dovednostem a znalostem našich zaměstnanců jsme se stali pro naše zákazníky spolehlivým partnerem a dodavatelem prvotřídních výrobků. V České republice působíme od roku 2001 a patříme k významným zaměstnavatelům v Ústeckém kraji. Jsme odpovědným investorem, kterému není lhostejný náš region – pravidelně věnujeme část našich zisků na jeho rozvoj.

U nás se setkáte s unikátní kombinací technologií – tlakového lití hliníku, vstřikování plastů, obrábění hliníku, oceli a plastů, montážními linkami a propracovaným systémem kontroly kvality. Díky tomu nabízíme stabilní zaměstnání, kde najde uplatnění téměř každý.

V rámci globální skupiny Aisan definujeme naši vizi „Beaming future is in our hands“ – vytvářet nové hodnoty pomocí osvědčených technologií a kvality, obohacovat společnost, z níž jsme součástí, a usilovat o trvale udržitelný rozvoj.

S ohledem na stěžejní témata jako dekarbonizace, technologií vodíku, elektromobility či digitální transformace se zaměřujeme na čistou, bezpečnou a komfortní mobilitu a na rozvoj budoucí společnosti, která je šetrná vůči Zemi i člověku.

V globálním měřítku pokrývá Aisan Group síť 11 zemí a 28 společností, přičemž naše produkty nacházejí uplatnění téměř ve třetině vozidel na celém světě.

Zavazuje nás to být aktivním hybatelem změn v našem podnikání – rozvíjet se v souladu s principy ESG, hledat udržitelná energetická a palivová řešení a budovat firemní kulturu založenou na rozmanitosti, inkluzi a digitálním rozvoji. V našem působení v ČR, zejména v regionu Ústecka, naplňujeme tuto globální filozofii s respektem k místnímu prostředí a s důrazem na dlouhodobou udržitelnost.

Přidejte se k nám a staňte se součástí budoucnosti udržitelné mobility a hodnotově orientované výroby.

Name: Centerforce Clutches
Description:
Centerforce, known for its patented Pressure Plate design, offers better grip and smoother engagement than traditional clutches. Our clutches are engineered with a unique centrifugal weight system, which enhances clamp load as engine RPM increases. This means the clutch provides greater holding power under high-performance conditions, making it ideal for street, track, or off-road use. 

2. Performance and Durability
Centerforce clutches are designed with performance and durability in mind. Our products are tested under extreme conditions to ensure they can withstand the stresses of high-torque applications. Whether you have a heavy-duty truck, a performance car, or a race car, Centerforce provides consistent performance and longer-lasting components. 

3. Motorsport Legacy
Centerforce has a rich history in motorsports, particularly in road race, off-road, and other high-stress automotive disciplines. Our products are trusted by professional drivers and enthusiasts alike for their ability to perform under extreme conditions. 

4. Wide Range of Products
Centerforce offers a variety of options tailored to specific needs. Our line-up includes everything from single-disc, street-performance clutches to multi-disc, race-ready options. This extensive range ensures you can find the perfect fit for your driving style and power requirements.

5. Customer Support and Reputation
Centerforce is highly regarded for its customer service and strong reputation within the automotive community. We stand behind our products, providing comprehensive warranties and support for troubleshooting and installation. 

Choosing Centerforce means investing in a clutch that offers innovative technology, exceptional performance, and lasting durability. Whether for the street, the track, or heavy-duty applications, Centerforce delivers a product that’s engineered for the most demanding conditions.

Name: AusMotion
Description:
AusMotion is a modern, dynamic business based in Western Australia. With a range of products designed to suit a range of vehicles, AusMotion specialises is bespoke locally manufactured solutions using the highest quality materials.

Whilst there may be other products on online auction sites that are cheaper than ours, we pride ourselves in only supplying the highest quality products that will last the lifetime of your vehicle, even in tough Australian off-road conditions.

All of our products are manufactured using the latest in manufacturing techniques.

Bent parts are formed using a CNC press that is fully programmed from the 3D CAD model, ensuring that every bend is in the same place and to the same angle, every time that product is made.

This methodology is common in large scale automotive parts production but less common in bespoke vehicle accessory manufacture. By bringing these techniques to the market we are able to push the limits of what’s possible, with some products in the range being made from a single piece with no welding, bolting or riveting required.

Name: Schuldt Safety
Description:
Jedes Jahr führen Ablenkung durch Smartphones am Steuer und Gaffen an Unfallstellen zu zahllosen Unfällen mit oft tragischen Folgen. Schuldt Safety UG entwickelt deshalb das weltweit erste Fahrerassistenzsystem, das die Smartphone-Nutzung am Steuer sowie das gesellschaftliche Problem des Gaffens aktiv unterbindet.

Unsere Lösung ist modular, skalierbar und funktioniert unabhängig vom Fahrzeugtyp oder Infotainmentsystem – DSGVO-konform und geeignet für sämtliche Fahrzeugarten, ob privat oder gewerblich genutzt: vom Pkw über leichte und schwere Nutzfahrzeuge bis hin zu Bussen und Sonderfahrzeugen.

Neben der technischen Lösung setzen wir auf Aufklärung und Prävention:
Unsere praxisnahen Workshops mit Fahrsimulatoren sensibilisieren Teilnehmende für die oft unterschätzten Gefahren digitaler Ablenkung – in Unternehmen, Fahrschulen, bei Fahranfänger:innen, in Schulen und öffentlichen Einrichtungen.

Die Fakten sind alarmierend:
– Bis zu 36% aller Verkehrsunfälle sind auf Handynutzung am Steuer zurückzuführen (Quelle: Haufe)
– 65% der Verkehrsteilnehmer:innen nutzen regelmäßig das Handy am Steuer (Quelle: Allianz)
– Bei den 18–29-Jährigen sind es sogar 85% (Quelle: Polizei NRW)
– Die Nutzung eines Handys am Steuer erhöht das Unfallrisiko um mehr als das 50-Fache (Quelle: Allianz)

Unser Ziel: Nicht nur Technik zu liefern, sondern ein gesellschaftliches Umdenken anzustoßen – für mehr Verantwortung im Straßenverkehr.

Sicherheit ist keine Option, sondern eine Verpflichtung.
Jetzt vernetzen oder mehr erfahren unter www.schuldtsafety.com

Name: Tizbin Pishro Koosha - تیزبین پیشرو کوشا
Description:
About Tehran Part
Tehran Part Group started its activity in 1353 in the field of production, import and restoration of American car parts under the management of Mr. Hassan Salmani under the name of Tehran Chevrolet. Mr. Salmani started his activity with an entrepreneurial attitude with individual work, and then with the passage of time, by making the necessary changes, he expanded his activities and increased the human resources of his group.

They believe that the criterion of success is not the size or smallness of an economic enterprise or the number of human resources and the type of activity, but the ability to be flexible and make changes in accordance with the changing economic environment is a necessary condition. For this reason, in spite of years of production, import and restoration of American car parts, when the market of these types of cars lost its prosperity, the group, taking into account the current conditions, turned its work field to the domestic car production of "Iran Khodro" and named Tehran Part, under the management of Mr. Omid Salmani, continued its activity and development since 2001.

In line with the development of the above activities, Tehran Part Group has registered several patents and registered several industrial designs, and by producing more than forty types of parts, creating innovations in the design of parts and providing special services to its customers, it has become a well-known name in the automobile market. It has been adhering to its constant slogan "TPKO, New Tipi" and is trying to realize it by recruiting efficient and innovative specialists. Currently, this complex with an area of about 2,400 meters and more than forty employees is still engaged in the preparation and production of high quality parts.

Our remanufacturing process is uniquely suited to OEM Reman's looking to use OEM valves, without the OEM prices. We are a Tier 2 supplier to the automotive industry and a Tier 1 supplier to the diesel OEM's. Our process is robust, proven, and creates significant savings for our customers. Not to mention lead times 1/4, or less, of OEM and aftermarket valve suppliers.

Our automotive customers get extra benefits by using oversize valve stems which can save the existing valve guide further reducing costs and speeding up the overall process. 

Beyond this we offer contract manufacturing with a specialization in centerless plunge grinding.

We'd love to help speed up your process, shorten your supply chain, and save you money.

Além disso, abraçamos a responsabilidade ambiental. Nossas suspensões são projetadas para melhorar a eficiência de combustível e reduzir o desgaste dos pneus, contribuindo para a redução do impacto ambiental.

Entendemos a importância da confiabilidade na logística e, portanto, nos comprometemos a entregar nossos produtos de alta qualidade pontualmente. Sabemos que veículos pesados em movimento são essenciais para o sucesso de nossos clientes.

Junte-se a nós em uma jornada rumo a viagens mais suaves, controle total e confiabilidade incomparável. A Fortes Suspensões é a escolha certa para suas necessidades de suspensão de veículos pesados.

Name: Moto Cinch, LLC
Description:
Moto Cinch tie downs were borne from a need to simplify the daily task of loading and unloading motorcycles.  For a lot of daily and weekly riders, the routine is the least fun part about riding.  After a lot of trial and error and help from friends, we came up with the patented Moto Cinch tie down system.  The name was derived from the ease of loading and unloading bikes (you know, “it’s a cinch”).  Moto Cinch is super versatile including unlimited setup options.  You can have multiple setups in trucks and trailers whether you are hauling one bike or when you have a trailer full.  

I had various truck and trailer setups to haul 2-4 bikes and a RZR or side-by-side.  It was always a hassle getting everything loaded and secured, not to mention the occasional strap coming loose or fork seals leaking (even when using plastic fork protectors). Moto Cinch is the perfect solution for that problem!

Not only cultivating the professional sales teams, today SCI but also makes every endeavor toward digital transformation gradually. Our goal is to provide in-time and intimate service to our customers. Trust SCI will be your best partner ever!

Owing to the persistence of eco-friendly policy, SCI is dedicated to developing Pb-free and diverse LED innovative products, in order to decrease CO2 emission and energy consumption. Name: CoreX Platform
Description:
Our three-component platform, CoreX SoftCore, CoreX HardCore, and CoreX CloudCore, offers precise battery state estimation and enhances automotive and stationary battery pack performance and reliability.

CoreX SoftCore:
CoreX SoftCore is a versatile software framework designed for battery management. It incorporates a robust library of advanced algorithms for real-time battery state estimation. It also includes toolboxes for accuracy prediction, parameterization, and validation, allowing customization for various applications.

CoreX HardCore:
CoreX HardCore is our hardware solution, a plug-in board with a specialized controller. It executes highly accurate battery state estimation algorithms from CoreX SoftCore, providing real-time insights and control over battery pack performance. It seamlessly integrates with battery systems, making it adaptable and scalable for various industries.

CoreX CloudCore:
CoreX CloudCore is our cloud-based platform for remote battery pack management and analytics. It enables real-time remote monitoring, in-depth data analysis, and advanced battery state estimation. The platform houses evolving algorithms in the cloud and offers predictive analytics for proactive maintenance.

In summary, our three-component platform, CoreX SoftCore, CoreX HardCore, and CoreX CloudCore, delivers precise battery state estimations, enhances performance, and enables predictive maintenance. It empowers organizations to optimize energy storage solutions for reliability and efficiency.

Explanation summary of TPR CNT absorption sheets

TPR's electromagnetic wave absorption sheets maximize the characteristics of CNTs, so a small amount of CNTs has a high noise-absorbing effect.

■General absorbent materials use inorganic absorbent materials; TPR's absorbent sheets contain only a small amount of CNT,
which makes them lighter in specific gravity, flexible, and pliable
compared to other companies' products.

■Similarly, inorganic absorbers tend to have lower absorption
capacity on the high frequency side (commonly referred to
as the Snoek's limit law).
Conversely, TPR electromagnetic wave absorbing sheets have high absorption capacity at high frequencies due to
the properties of CNTs.

Name: Koide Poland Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Koide Poland Sp. z o.o. is the European manufacturing and supply hub of Koide Group, delivering precision tube processing, metal forming, and cold-forged components for automotive and industrial customers across Europe.

While Koide Poland provides flexible local production such as tube cutting, chamfering, sandblasting, punching, knurling, and CNC machining, our customers also benefit from the full capabilities of Koide Group’s global manufacturing network.

Through close collaboration with Koide Group’s manufacturing sites across Asia and the Americas, we support a wide range of processes including:
• Cold forging 
• Press forming and stamping
• Complex CNC machining
• Tube bending and end-forming 
• Surface treatment and heat treatment
• Robotic laser cutting and 5-axis laser processing

This integrated supply chain allows us to combine competitive cost manufacturing from our overseas operations with fast, reliable local support from Koide Poland—providing the right balance of quality, delivery, and cost for European customers.

Key product categories:
• Sleeve parts (steel & aluminum)
• Cold-forged parts
• Hooks (solid / hollow / welded assemblies)
• Special-shaped long tubes
• CNC machined components
• Functional metal parts
• Fluid line components (HVAC / oil systems)

We also support sourcing of low-carbon “Green Aluminum,” utilizing recycled material and renewable energy.

Koide Poland delivers precision, quality, and reliability by combining European local responsiveness with Koide Group’s global manufacturing strength.

Name: Metro Moulded Parts
Description:
Four generations. One mission. Classic cars done right.

In 1918, John Hajicek started the Hutchinson Rubber Company in Minnesota, one of the first rubber manufacturers west of the Mississippi. In 1962, his son Donald discovered just how hard it was to find quality rubber parts while restoring an L29 Cord. That frustration sparked something: if you can't find 'em, make 'em.

Today, that same drive lives on with Alex and Blane Hajicek, the fourth generation of our family to lead Metro Moulded Parts. They grew up around classic cars and quality craftsmanship, and they're committed to keeping that tradition alive.

Their mission is simple: bring you the highest quality classic car parts, made right here in the USA, with no shortcuts and no excuses.

Running a 100+ year family business isn't easy, but Alex and Blane are all in. They're focused on honoring what their great-grandfather built while pushing the company forward with fresh energy, better technology, and the same dedication to fit and finish that's defined Metro for over a century.

What we make:

Premium weatherstripping & door seals
Trunk seals, window seals, and gaskets
Rubber moldings and restoration kits
15,000+ parts for classic Chevy, Ford, Mopar & more
What sets us apart:

Made in the USA: always have been, always will be.
 Family-owned, four generations strong
 SUPERsoft proprietary technology for superior fit
 Up to 30-year warranty, because we mean it
We're not some faceless corporation. We're a family that loves classic cars as much as you do, and we're here to help you keep yours on the road for another 100 years.

Let's keep the classics alive. Together.

Name: OptiCam
Description:
At OptiCam, we believe that safety is a top priority when it comes to driving. That's why we created our patent pending camera lens, sensor and infotainment screen protector.

We know that your vehicle cameras and sensors are an important tool for helping drivers see what's behind them when they're reversing their vehicles. But we also know that these cameras can sometimes become foggy, which can obstruct the driver's view and make it difficult to see what's behind them.

To help prevent this problem, we developed our OptiCam backup camera lens protector. Made of a clear, hydrophobic material, this protector is designed to fit over the lens of your backup camera and help prevent fogging, repel rain, and standup to the most extreme weather conditions. This means that you can enjoy a clear view of what's behind you, even in challenging conditions.

We created our OptiCam because we believe that every driver deserves to have a clear view of what's behind them when they're reversing their vehicle. We're confident that our protector will help you stay safe on the road and avoid any potential accidents.

Name: FILMEC STAMPI
Description:
Partner di fiducia per la fabbricazione e lo stampaggio di articoli in plastica. Siamo qui per dare colore, vita, suono e voce alle tue prospettive. Siamo costruttori impegnati sulla valorizzazione delle tecnologie informatiche come infrastruttura ideale per gli scambi tecnici, economici e commerciali. I nostri professionisti engineers, designers lavorano insieme per creare vivaci soluzioni integrate, mirate al conseguimento dei tuoi obiettivi, che ti valorizzeranno e ti daranno risalto. Conosciamo la meccanica e la trasformazione delle materie plastiche, dalla creazione e il mantenimento del prodotto finale e i suoi possibili sviluppi. Naturalmente, ti aiuteremo a scegliere le soluzioni migliori per diffondere il tuo prodotto al tuo pubblico migliore, rispettando il tuo budget. IDEAZIONE: Ogni singolo progetto che avviamo qui nella divisione engineering di FILMEC inizia con un lavoro di progettazione accurato e spesso intenso. Coinvolgiamo tutti i nostri esperti interni ed esterni di cui abbiamo bisogno, per garantire che il tuo piano sia valido e abbia successo. 
FILMEC è un punto di riferimento per l'engineering e la realizzazione di stampi e tutte le fasi che hanno a che fare con l'ideazione, lo sviluppo e la creazione di un prodotto. Un solo partner, dall’idea alla produzione, in grado di risolvere ogni problematica attraverso una soluzione ottimale in termini di costi, tempo ed efficacia del risultato. SOLUZIONE: Una presentazione perfetta non darà alcun risultato se non viene lanciata e testata al momento giusto e nel luogo giusto. Vista la varietà di soluzioni disponibili, la decisione non è facile. Possiamo però garantirti che ogni euro speso contribuirà al tuo ROI. PRODUZIONE: Desideri un prodotto in grado di far colpo sul mercato? Lo desideriamo anche noi e sappiamo che cosa serve per trasformare questo desiderio in realtà. Ti aiuteremo a liberare il potenziale del tuo marchio e a infonderlo nella maniera più corretta.
