Name: Avus Italia
Description:
Nel mondo dei cerchi in lega, AVUS Racing è più di un semplice marchio ed incarna l'essenza della passione italiana per l'automobilismo. Fondata nel 1979 a Castelfranco Veneto, AVUS Racing si è affermata come sinonimo di eccellenza e innovazione nel settore.
Il nome "AVUS" trae origine dal leggendario circuito automobilistico di Berlino, uno dei primi tracciati cittadini al mondo, intriso di una storia affascinante. In questo contesto, AVUS Racing ha avuto l'onore di supportare team prestigiosi di Formula 1 tra cui Red Bull, Toro Rosso e ING Renault, a testimonianza della qualità e delle elevate prestazioni dei suoi prodotti.
Ciò che rende AVUS Racing davvero speciale è la sua costante ricerca di innovazione per rispondere alle esigenze dei suoi clienti. Ogni cerchio rappresenta una prova tangibile di dedizione e passione.
AVUS Racing propone cerchi eleganti e versatili per ogni tipo di veicolo: dalle auto di uso quotidiano, ai potenti SUV, fino ai veicoli commerciali. Progettati e prodotti interamente in Italia, i cerchi AVUS riflettono una cura meticolosa in ogni fase del processo: dal design alla produzione, fino al controllo finale di qualità.
I vantaggi di AVUS Racing sono molteplici: affidabilità, innovazione e un'estetica che consente di conferire uno stile unico a ogni veicolo.
La distribuzione di AVUS Racing è affidata ad AVUS Italia, una struttura commerciale che si distingue per un servizio clienti dedicato e professionale, sempre pronto a rispondere a ogni richiesta e a fornire supporto, sia durante l'acquisto che nel post-vendita.
Inoltre, attraverso il marchio Easy Kit, AVUS Italia offre una vasta gamma di soluzioni, tra cui: Ruotini di scorta di sua produzione per auto e trasporto leggero, Calze da neve, Copricerchi e Sensori di pressione.

Nosso controle de qualidade está presente em todas as etapas de produção, seguindo os mais elevados padrões do mercado, contemplando toda a rastreabilidade do produto, desde a chegada do material até a expedição.

Name: Integrated Electric drives, inc.
Description:
Integrated Electric drives, Inc. (IEdrives) designs, manufactures, integrates, sells, and supports electric hybrid drivetrain systems and transmission components for the medium, and heavy-duty truck and bus markets.  The company focuses on both the on-Highway and off- Highway applications of this global market.

IEdrives' proprietary gear technology has been and can be tailored to meet customers' requirements for high-power and high-RPM within a relatively compact size that fits between the frame of most trucks, allowing the motor and transmission to be in a protected place away from vibration from the axles while leaving space for batteries and other systems in the engine bay.  

As compared to other e-axle, direct drive and lCE units, results include:

•  Substantial improvements in battery consumption and range
•  Reduction in maintenance costs and improved serviceability
•  Reduction in total vehicle weight
•  No added weight to the axles
•  Reduced operation noise
•  Improvements in vehicle performance and gradeability
•  Improved driver satisfaction

Name: Shiftworks, Inc
Description:
Shiftworks has been in business for over three decades, and when we started in 1991, we wanted to help our customers more easily restore and upgrade their classic cars and trucks. Our mission is to help clients get rid of complications so they can return to enjoying their ride.

The age of “numbers matching” is behind us, especially for those who want to enjoy and drive their classic hot rod. The typical Powerglide and 3-speed automatics like the TH350 or TH400 are simply no match to the performance and drive-ability of modern automatic transmissions.

The use of more forward gears, with some having overdrive capabilities and even lending themselves to easy shift point changes through simple means of a computer, results in better fuel economy, gentle highway RPMs, and significant gains in overall vehicle performance.

One of the core issues car enthusiasts face when swapping newer transmissions into their classic vehicles is that the shift pattern of the transmission no longer matches that of the shifter or gear indicator.

Our products all focus on achieving proper shifting without taking away from the original look of your interior. Offerings range from cable & rod linkages, console and column indicators, premium conversion kits for factory floor shifters and even entirely new “stock appearing” shifter packages.

Don’t let shifter or linkage issues slow you down. Check out what we have to offer for your classic ride today!

Name: AVANTI D.O.O.
Description:
Firma AVANTI d.o.o osnovana je 1988. godine sa sjedištem u Sarajevu.

Od samog osnivanja, poslovna orijentacija firme je ponuda visoko kvalitetnih proizvoda, uvoz i distribucija rezervnih auto djelova, ulja i maziva za sve vrste putničkih i lakih komercijalnih vozila. Svoju djelatnost zasniva na direktnom kontaktu sa renomiranim svjetskim proizvođačima auto dijelova visoke kvalitete. Stalnim usavršavanjem uposlenih, firma Avanti je opravdala povjerenje mnogobrojnih poslovnih partnera, kako na domaćem, tako i na inostranom tržištu, a profesionalnim Odnosom ka svojim kupcima postala pouzdan partner.

Strateška težnja preduzeća je maksimalna orjentisanost ka kupcu, pokrivanje što većeg broja potreba širokim asortimanom proizvoda, jednostavnost pri kreiranju narudžbi i brzu isporuku. Kvalitet usluga koje pružamo, zahvaljujući dugogodišnjem iskustvu i stručnosti naših uposlenika, te profesionalnim odnosom sa kupcima, ključ su naše visoke pozicije na tržištu auto dijelova.

Kompanija je direktan uvoznik rezervnih djelova proizvođača iz USA, Evrope i Azije, čime održava bogat asortiman proizvoda sa više od 80 000 artikala, a čiji kvalitet garantuju ISO 9000, ISO 14000, ISO/TS/16949, BER i drugi neophodni certifikati. Svi naši dobavljači isporučuju homologovane proizvode. Zahvaljujući direktnoj nabavci od proizvođača autodijelova prve ugradnje, snadbijevamo naše kupce autodijelovima najviše kvalitete uz povoljne cijene, što nam omogućava brzo i tačno zadovoljenje potreba naših kupaca.

Vršimo besplatnu dostavu u roku od 24 sata u Bosni i Hercegovini i Evropi, uz garanciju kvalitete uz garancijski rok.

Pedesetogodišnja porodična tradicija u oblasti auto industrije svrstava nas među lidere u distribuciji rezervnih dijelova, opreme i kozmetike za putnička i laka komercijalna vozila na tržištu Bosne i Hercegovine i susjednih država.

Our promise extends to lightning-fast shipping and Remarkable Limited Lifetime Warranties on most of our products.

Free Shipping
Why worry about additional costs when you can get your products shipped for free? At Rebuild Master Tech we offer free ground shipping to the continental USA. Need it faster? No problem. We also provide very competitive expedited shipping options. For our international customers, we offer fast and reliable shipping options to get your parts to you no matter where you are in the world.

Limited Lifetime Warranty
When you choose our products, you're choosing quality that lasts. We stand behind our craftsmanship with an industry-leading Limited Lifetime Warranty on most of our products. Our warranties cover the same manufacturer's defects, ensuring peace of mind with every purchase. Should you face any issues, we'll cover the cost of the part (note: labor not included) and offer ground shipping within the continental USA. Choose between our warranty deposit option or our easy send-in service, where we will either repair or replace the defective part.

Made In The USA
While others may claim it, we can prove it—every rebuilt product is made in the U.S.A. from the ground up. We go the extra mile by maintaining the integrity of the electronic systems in the suspension units, keeping them functioning as they were originally designed. You won't find resistors or gimmicks here, just high-quality products that are true to their original design.

Name: Puretrack.co.uk
Description:
Puretrack is a family run company, run by enthusiasts of motorsport. We set out to deliver fantastic products at reasonable prices, with outstanding customer service.

We currently offer track day car hire, fabrication and plan to bring you track days by the end of the year.

Puretrack was  essentially  founded in 2014 after a trip to the famous Nurburgring. Since 2014 we have been organising road trips to Spa Francorchamp, Nurburgring and UK tracks. These trips have included track days on some of the most famous tracks in the world. Since these road trips have been very popular, we have decided to add to our range by offering track day car hire & motorsport parts fabrication.

With over 30 years of motorsport experience we understand the dynamic of running track cars and the trials and tribulations that comes with motorsport. With that being said we decided to offer people that would like to try a track day the chance to experience it for themselves. With our track day car hire this offers a try before you buy scenario. Or if you’re a track day veteran without a car you will love the Renaultsport Clio 182, which is renown for being one of the best hot hatches ever built.

With modifying cars come challenges. There are a lot of companies that offer aftermarket parts but if your doing something a bit different then these are not always available. Which is where our fabrication department comes into its own. With over 25 years’ experience in fabrication we can offer anything from custom made parts to powder coating. We have a range of products available on our site but if you don’t see what your looking for? Drop us a message with what you would like and we can provide a full quotation.

Thank you for taking the time to read about us. We look forward to meeting you on one of our events, or helping you with your passion for cars.

Kind Regards

Matt Dennis

Description:
Vor über 20 Jahren haben wir begonnen, Windschotts für Cabriolets zu entwickeln. Treu geblieben sind wir immer unserem Motto, passgenaue Produkte nach Maß mit höchstem Qualitätsanspruch herzustellen.

Fokussiert haben wir uns auf Produkte, die vor Umwelteinflüssen schützen: 
- vor Hitze und zu viel Sonneneinstrahlung
- vor Wind und Regen
- vor Insekten und Ungeziefer
- vor Pollen und Feinstaub

Seit vielen Jahren stellen wir sehr erfolgreich passgenauen Auto Sonnenschutz für viele aktuelle Fahrzeugmodelle her. Die Sonnenschutzblenden schützen dich während der Fahrt und verschönern gleichzeitig die Optik deines Autos.

Unser patentierter WinClip Fensterschutz bietet dir Schutz zuhause vor Sonne, unerwünschten Tierchen wie Fliegen und Mücken sowie vor Pollenstaub. Die Produktserie wird ständig erweitert und an neue klimatische Herausforderungen angepasst.

Mit den BODI Windschotts, die wir extra für die älteren und zeitlos schönen Golf Cabrio Modelle entwickelt haben, wird die Cabriofahrt windgeschützt zum Genuss und dein Cabrio zum optischen Hingucker. 

Jedes Produkt wird dabei individuell hergestellt, maßgeschneidert für dein Fenster oder dein Automodell. Und die Produktpalette wächst kontinuierlich! Ein Blick in unseren Online Shop lohnt sich immer.

Name: Sweeting Performance - Hydro-Boost Hydro-Max and Air-Hydraulic Power Brake Systems
Description:
Sweeting Performance specializes in power brake systems, particularly the Bosch Hydro-Boost, Bosch Hydro-Max, Bosch iBooster, and our own Air-Hydraulic power brake system. George Sweeting was an engineer for Lockheed during WWII helping to design brake systems for airplanes, he started a small brake rebuilding shop, Power Brake Service, in 1950, his son, Bob Sweeting, built the company up, rebuilding mountains of brake boosters and master cylinders, as well as working on and designing brake systems for many notable clients and projects. The owner, Matthew Sweeting, is the third generation leading the business in designing new retrofit braking systems for individuals with specialty vehicles and small volume new vehicle manufacturers. A fourth generation, naturally crazy about cars and planes, helps and is learning about advanced vehicle brake systems.

Matt was rebuilding brake boosters from a young age - tearing down, buffing, washing, painting, stocking, installing, sourcing, and the general business of brake parts. Being a third generation brakeman meant being taught the right ways about brake systems, new and classic, and having a natural familiarity with these systems from taking them apart and putting them back together repeatedly. The rebuilding market changed, volume and low cost became prioritized, and it has changed again, more recently, in the aftermarket toward new replacement parts that are sourced from the cheapest place they can produced, where quality has never stopped being our focus. Brake systems for new OE vehicles are getting very complex, with computers, electric motors, switches, sensors, and accumulators being added to a once fairly simple master cylinder. We now we work on lower volume, more complex braking systems, sourcing original replacement parts as much as we can and then designing retrofit replacements using new OE parts and/or manufacturing them ourselves, rather than rebuilt.

Our remanufactured shock absorbers undergo a rigorous process that includes thorough inspection, cleaning, and replacement of worn or damaged parts. We use state-of-the-art technology and adhere to strict quality control measures to ensure that our products meet or exceed OEM specifications.

One of the key features of Mubhen shock absorbers is their eco-friendly design. By remanufacturing existing shock absorbers, we reduce waste and minimize the environmental impact of automotive production. Our commitment to sustainability extends beyond our products to our operations, where we implement eco-friendly practices and strive to minimize our carbon footprint.

In addition to our dedication to quality and sustainability, Mubhen is also known for our exceptional customer service. We prioritize customer satisfaction above all else and are committed to providing prompt and reliable support to our clients. Whether you have questions about our products or need assistance with installation, our team of experts is always here to help.

With Mubhen, you can trust that you're getting the highest quality remanufactured shock absorbers that are built to last. Join us in our mission to drive positive change in the automotive industry and experience the Mubhen difference today!

Description:
Apeiro Performance is a South African-based automotive brand specialising in premium vehicle styling, protection, and custom modification. We exist to serve car enthusiasts who demand both aesthetic excellence and functional upgrades—without compromise.

Our services are designed to elevate your vehicle’s appearance, protect its surfaces, and deliver a driving experience that reflects your unique style and standards.

What we offer:

Paint Protection Film (PPF): We use industry-leading PPF to shield your car’s paintwork from scratches, stone chips, and environmental damage. Available in gloss and satin finishes, our PPF is precision-applied for long-lasting, invisible protection.

Vinyl Wrapping: From subtle finishes to bold colour changes, we offer full and partial vinyl wraps using high-quality films. Choose from gloss, matte, satin, metallic, carbon fibre and more.

Window Tinting & Smash and Grab: Enhance your car’s privacy, reduce heat and glare, and block UV rays with our professional window tinting. For added safety, we also install smash & grab film to protect against break-ins and glass shatter.

Detailing & Paint Correction: Before any film or wrap application, we provide in-depth detailing services—clay bar, decontamination, polishing, and multi-stage paint correction to ensure a flawless surface.

Custom Modifications & Installations: We source and install a wide range of aftermarket parts—from styling upgrades like splitters, diffusers, spoilers, and lighting, to interior trim enhancements. Every part is carefully selected and fitted for perfect alignment and lasting quality.

Part Sourcing: Looking for something specific? We help clients find rare or high-performance styling parts that match their build vision, leveraging global networks to source from trusted suppliers.

At Apeiro, we combine craftsmanship, car culture, and client care to deliver premium automotive solutions tailored to every build.

Description: We are a specialist Kenyan craft manufacturer of Vehicle Sump Guards and accessories with an experience of over 15 years. This is why we make it our business to design, manufacture, and test and fit the tailor made sump guards for these exceptional vehicles. We are serious about making high quality products.

Name: PLUS POWER ACCESORIOS, S.L.
Description:
En PLUS POWER ACCESORIOS S.L. nos especializamos en la fabricación y venta de accesorios de automóvil y productos químicos para el cuidado y mantenimiento del vehículo, incluyendo aditivos, productos de limpieza y anticongelantes, entre otros. Ofrecemos un servicio integral de venta y postventa, trabajando con grandes clientes reconocidos a nivel mundial.

Nuestro equipo cuenta con más de 20 años de experiencia en el sector de postventa del automóvil. Desde el año 2000, hemos estado comprometidos con la calidad y la satisfacción del cliente, ofreciendo soluciones rápidas y eficaces para cubrir todas las necesidades que puedan surgir. Las necesidades de nuestros clientes son nuestra prioridad.

Nuestra sólida presencia en el mercado español y nuestra expansión por toda Europa reflejan nuestro compromiso con la excelencia y la calidad. Trabajamos con marcas líderes en la industria automotriz, como Goodyear y Sparco, lo que nos permite ofrecer un catálogo amplio y diversificado de productos de primera calidad. Nos adaptamos a las exigencias del mercado y a las necesidades específicas de cada cliente, garantizando soluciones innovadoras y efectivas que superan las expectativas.

En PLUS POWER ACCESORIOS S.L.., nuestra prioridad es proporcionar un servicio de primera clase que combine celeridad, eficacia y atención personalizada. Estamos comprometidos a ser el socio de confianza de nuestros clientes en el suministro de accesorios y productos químicos para el automóvil, marcando la diferencia en cada interacción y proyecto.

Descubre cómo podemos ayudarte a potenciar tu negocio hoy mismo!

Name: KXTRON Brasil
Description:
A KXTRON-NEXOTRON é especialista em soluções para diagnóstico e manutenção automotiva em parceria com a indústria automobilística desde 1993, tornou-se a pioneira no Brasil desenvolvendo equipamentos de alta precisão para teste e limpeza de bicos injetores, além de sistemas para medir vazão e pressão da bomba de combustível.

Atendemos oficinas mecânicas e somos homologados pelas concessionárias que buscam eficiência, confiabilidade e qualidade. Nosso compromisso é ajudar a entregar mais performance e segurança ao cliente final, com tecnologia nacional e suporte direto com quem entende do assunto.

Name: Inject-net
Description:
Inject-Net est une solution de haute technologie dédiée à la protection, au nettoyage et à l’optimisation des moteurs essence et diesel.

Depuis plus de 50 ans, Inject-Net accompagne les professionnels et les automobilistes face aux problématiques modernes de conduite : embouteillages, limitations de vitesse, trajets courts et dégradation des conditions routières, responsables d’un encrassement prématuré des moteurs.

Nos additifs agissent directement sur le système d’alimentation pour :

Réduire la consommation de carburant

Protéger durablement le moteur

Nettoyer injecteurs, chambre de combustion et vanne EGR

Restaurer les performances d’origine

Inject-Net est à l’initiative de la distribution vertueuse :
 paiement du produit et non de l’emballage
 vente directe dépôt d’usine, sans intermédiaire
 circuits courts et logistique optimisée

Nous accompagnons nos partenaires dans une vente en libre-service, avec une gestion structurée des rayons et un réapprovisionnement régulier des points de vente.

Inject-Net, c’est une approche responsable, performante et durable de l’entretien moteur.

Réduire les consommations. Protéger le moteur. Agir vertueusement.

Name: ایمن سیبک نوین توس
Description:
گروه طراحی و مهندسی ایمن سیبک نوین فعالیت خود را در زمینه طراحی و تولید انواع سیبک خودرو، راهاندازی خطوط تولید سیبک، اخذ استاندارد ملی، و طراحی گیج و فیکسچر های کنترلی خطوط تولید و مونتاژ از سال ۱۳۷۹ شروع کرد.

این گروه متشکل از تیمی متخصص از مهندسین مجرب در زمینه طراحی و تولید انواع سیبک خودرو، نصب و راهاندازی خطوط تولید و اخذ استاندارد ملی می باشد که بیش از ۲۵ سال سابقه داشته و به شرکت های مطرح در این زمینه خدمات ارائه داده و در پروژه های مهم تولیدی سهم مهمی را ایفا نموده است.

تیم متخصص و حرفه ای ایمن سیبک نوین از ابتدا، کیفیت خدمت رسانی را الویت خود قرار داده و می کوشد تا علاوه بر خدمت رسانی سریع و به صرفه، به طور همزمان به دانش مشتریان در زمینه کیفیت و نحوه ساخت و طراحی قطعات جلوبندی بیفزاید. ایمن سیبک نوین دائم در تلاش است تا با استفاده از تجربه های قبلی خود بالاترین کیفیت قطعات را برای مشتریان طراحی و تولید نماید.

Name: Rumble Auto
Description:
Bienvenue chez Rumble Auto ! 

Chez Rumble Auto, nous sommes passionnés par la puissance et la performance automobile. En tant qu'auto-entreprise spécialisée dans la reprogrammation moteur, nous nous efforçons de libérer le potentiel caché de chaque véhicule pour offrir une expérience de conduite exceptionnelle.

Ce que nous offrons :

 Reprogrammation sur mesure : Nous personnalisons chaque intervention pour optimiser les performances de votre moteur en fonction de vos besoins et de vos aspirations.

 Expertise technique : Notre équipe hautement qualifiée combine savoir-faire technique et passion pour offrir des résultats fiables et performants.

 Innovation continue : Nous restons à la pointe des dernières technologies de reprogrammation pour garantir que votre véhicule bénéficie des améliorations les plus récentes.

Notre engagement :

Chez Rumble Auto, nous nous engageons à fournir des solutions de reprogrammation moteur de qualité, à créer des partenariats durables avec nos clients et à dépasser les attentes en termes de performance.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre voyage vers l'excellence automobile !
